ayahs.n: and this is a book which we have sent down blessed and confirming what was before it that you may warn the mother of cities and those around it those who believe in the hereafter believe in it and they are maintaining their prayers

ayahs.t: And who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about Allah or says, "It has been inspired to me," while nothing has been inspired to him, and one who says, "I will reveal [something] like what Allah revealed." And if you could but see when the wrongdoers are in the overwhelming pangs of death while the angels extend their hands, [saying], "Discharge your souls! Today you will be awarded the punishment of [extreme] humiliation for what you used to say against Allah other than the truth and [that] you were, toward His verses, being arrogant."
ayahs.n: and who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about allah or says it has been inspired to me while nothing has been inspired to him and one who says i will reveal something like what allah revealed and if you could but see when the wrongdoers are in the overwhelming pangs of death while the angels extend their hands saying discharge your souls today you will be awarded the punishment of extreme humiliation for what you used to say against allah other than the truth and that you were toward his verses being arrogant

ayahs.t: [It will be said to them], "And you have certainly come to Us alone as We created you the first time, and you have left whatever We bestowed upon you behind you. And We do not see with you your 'intercessors' which you claimed that they were among you associates [of Allah]. It has [all] been severed between you, and lost from you is what you used to claim."
ayahs.n: it will be said to them and you have certainly come to us alone as we created you the first time and you have left whatever we bestowed upon you behind you and we do not see with you your intercessors which you claimed that they were among you associates of allah it has all been severed between you and lost from you is what you used to claim

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah is the cleaver of grain and date seeds. He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living. That is Allah; so how are you deluded?
ayahs.n: indeed allah is the cleaver of grain and date seeds he brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living that is allah so how are you deluded

ayahs.t: [He is] the cleaver of daybreak and has made the night for rest and the sun and moon for calculation. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: he is the cleaver of daybreak and has made the night for rest and the sun and moon for calculation that is the determination of the exalted in might the knowing

ayahs.t: And it is He who placed for you the stars that you may be guided by them through the darknesses of the land and sea. We have detailed the signs for a people who know.
ayahs.n: and it is he who placed for you the stars that you may be guided by them through the darknesses of the land and sea we have detailed the signs for a people who know

ayahs.t: And it is He who produced you from one soul and [gave you] a place of dwelling and of storage. We have detailed the signs for a people who understand.
ayahs.n: and it is he who produced you from one soul and gave you a place of dwelling and of storage we have detailed the signs for a people who understand

ayahs.t: And it is He who sends down rain from the sky, and We produce thereby the growth of all things. We produce from it greenery from which We produce grains arranged in layers. And from the palm trees - of its emerging fruit are clusters hanging low. And [We produce] gardens of grapevines and olives and pomegranates, similar yet varied. Look at [each of] its fruit when it yields and [at] its ripening. Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: and it is he who sends down rain from the sky and we produce thereby the growth of all things we produce from it greenery from which we produce grains arranged in layers and from the palm trees of its emerging fruit are clusters hanging low and we produce gardens of grapevines and olives and pomegranates similar yet varied look at each of its fruit when it yields and at its ripening indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

ayahs.t: But they have attributed to Allah partners - the jinn, while He has created them - and have fabricated for Him sons and daughters. Exalted is He and high above what they describe
ayahs.n: but they have attributed to allah partners the jinn while he has created them and have fabricated for him sons and daughters exalted is he and high above what they describe

ayahs.t: [He is] Originator of the heavens and the earth. How could He have a son when He does not have a companion and He created all things? And He is, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: he is originator of the heavens and the earth how could he have a son when he does not have a companion and he created all things and he is of all things knowing

ayahs.t: That is Allah, your Lord; there is no deity except Him, the Creator of all things, so worship Him. And He is Disposer of all things.
ayahs.n: that is allah your lord there is no deity except him the creator of all things so worship him and he is disposer of all things

ayahs.t: Vision perceives Him not, but He perceives [all] vision; and He is the Subtle, the Acquainted.
ayahs.n: vision perceives him not but he perceives all vision and he is the subtle the acquainted

ayahs.t: There has come to you enlightenment from your Lord. So whoever will see does so for [the benefit of] his soul, and whoever is blind [does harm] against it. And [say], "I am not a guardian over you."
ayahs.n: there has come to you enlightenment from your lord so whoever will see does so for the benefit of his soul and whoever is blind does harm against it and say i am not a guardian over you

ayahs.t: And thus do We diversify the verses so the disbelievers will say, "You have studied," and so We may make the Qur'an clear for a people who know.
ayahs.n: and thus do we diversify the verses so the disbelievers will say you have studied and so we may make the quran clear for a people who know

ayahs.t: Follow, [O Muhammad], what has been revealed to you from your Lord - there is no deity except Him - and turn away from those who associate others with Allah.
ayahs.n: follow o muhammad what has been revealed to you from your lord there is no deity except him and turn away from those who associate others with allah

ayahs.t: But if Allah had willed, they would not have associated. And We have not appointed you over them as a guardian, nor are you a manager over them.
ayahs.n: but if allah had willed they would not have associated and we have not appointed you over them as a guardian nor are you a manager over them

ayahs.t: And do not insult those they invoke other than Allah, lest they insult Allah in enmity without knowledge. Thus We have made pleasing to every community their deeds. Then to their Lord is their return, and He will inform them about what they used to do.
ayahs.n: and do not insult those they invoke other than allah lest they insult allah in enmity without knowledge thus we have made pleasing to every community their deeds then to their lord is their return and he will inform them about what they used to do

ayahs.t: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths that if a sign came to them, they would surely believe in it. Say, "The signs are only with Allah." And what will make you perceive that even if a sign came, they would not believe.
ayahs.n: and they swear by allah their strongest oaths that if a sign came to them they would surely believe in it say the signs are only with allah and what will make you perceive that even if a sign came they would not believe

ayahs.t: And We will turn away their hearts and their eyes just as they refused to believe in it the first time. And We will leave them in their transgression, wandering blindly.
ayahs.n: and we will turn away their hearts and their eyes just as they refused to believe in it the first time and we will leave them in their transgression wandering blindly

ayahs.t: And even if We had sent down to them the angels [with the message] and the dead spoke to them [of it] and We gathered together every [created] thing in front of them, they would not believe unless Allah should will. But most of them, [of that], are ignorant.
ayahs.n: and even if we had sent down to them the angels with the message and the dead spoke to them of it and we gathered together every created thing in front of them they would not believe unless allah should will but most of them of that are ignorant

ayahs.t: And thus We have made for every prophet an enemy - devils from mankind and jinn, inspiring to one another decorative speech in delusion. But if your Lord had willed, they would not have done it, so leave them and that which they invent.
ayahs.n: and thus we have made for every prophet an enemy devils from mankind and jinn inspiring to one another decorative speech in delusion but if your lord had willed they would not have done it so leave them and that which they invent

ayahs.t: And [it is] so the hearts of those who disbelieve in the Hereafter will incline toward it and that they will be satisfied with it and that they will commit that which they are committing.
ayahs.n: and it is so the hearts of those who disbelieve in the hereafter will incline toward it and that they will be satisfied with it and that they will commit that which they are committing

ayahs.t: [Say], "Then is it other than Allah I should seek as judge while it is He who has revealed to you the Book explained in detail?" And those to whom We [previously] gave the Scripture know that it is sent down from your Lord in truth, so never be among the doubters.
ayahs.n: say then is it other than allah i should seek as judge while it is he who has revealed to you the book explained in detail and those to whom we previously gave the scripture know that it is sent down from your lord in truth so never be among the doubters

ayahs.t: And the word of your Lord has been fulfilled in truth and in justice. None can alter His words, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and the word of your lord has been fulfilled in truth and in justice none can alter his words and he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: And if you obey most of those upon the earth, they will mislead you from the way of Allah. They follow not except assumption, and they are not but falsifying.
ayahs.n: and if you obey most of those upon the earth they will mislead you from the way of allah they follow not except assumption and they are not but falsifying

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord is most knowing of who strays from his way and he is most knowing of the rightly guided

ayahs.t: So eat of that [meat] upon which the name of Allah has been mentioned, if you are believers in His verses.
ayahs.n: so eat of that meat upon which the name of allah has been mentioned if you are believers in his verses

ayahs.t: And why should you not eat of that upon which the name of Allah has been mentioned while He has explained in detail to you what He has forbidden you, excepting that to which you are compelled. And indeed do many lead [others] astray through their [own] inclinations without knowledge. Indeed, your Lord - He is most knowing of the transgressors.
ayahs.n: and why should you not eat of that upon which the name of allah has been mentioned while he has explained in detail to you what he has forbidden you excepting that to which you are compelled and indeed do many lead others astray through their own inclinations without knowledge indeed your lord he is most knowing of the transgressors

ayahs.t: And leave what is apparent of sin and what is concealed thereof. Indeed, those who earn [blame for] sin will be recompensed for that which they used to commit.
ayahs.n: and leave what is apparent of sin and what is concealed thereof indeed those who earn blame for sin will be recompensed for that which they used to commit

ayahs.t: And do not eat of that upon which the name of Allah has not been mentioned, for indeed, it is grave disobedience. And indeed do the devils inspire their allies [among men] to dispute with you. And if you were to obey them, indeed, you would be associators [of others with Him].
ayahs.n: and do not eat of that upon which the name of allah has not been mentioned for indeed it is grave disobedience and indeed do the devils inspire their allies among men to dispute with you and if you were to obey them indeed you would be associators of others with him

ayahs.t: And is one who was dead and We gave him life and made for him light by which to walk among the people like one who is in darkness, never to emerge therefrom? Thus it has been made pleasing to the disbelievers that which they were doing.
ayahs.n: and is one who was dead and we gave him life and made for him light by which to walk among the people like one who is in darkness never to emerge therefrom thus it has been made pleasing to the disbelievers that which they were doing

ayahs.t: And thus We have placed within every city the greatest of its criminals to conspire therein. But they conspire not except against themselves, and they perceive [it] not.
ayahs.n: and thus we have placed within every city the greatest of its criminals to conspire therein but they conspire not except against themselves and they perceive it not

ayahs.t: And when a sign comes to them, they say, "Never will we believe until we are given like that which was given to the messengers of Allah." Allah is most knowing of where He places His message. There will afflict those who committed crimes debasement before Allah and severe punishment for what they used to conspire.
ayahs.n: and when a sign comes to them they say never will we believe until we are given like that which was given to the messengers of allah allah is most knowing of where he places his message there will afflict those who committed crimes debasement before allah and severe punishment for what they used to conspire

ayahs.t: So whoever Allah wants to guide - He expands his breast to [contain] Islam; and whoever He wants to misguide - He makes his breast tight and constricted as though he were climbing into the sky. Thus does Allah place defilement upon those who do not believe.
ayahs.n: so whoever allah wants to guide he expands his breast to contain islam and whoever he wants to misguide he makes his breast tight and constricted as though he were climbing into the sky thus does allah place defilement upon those who do not believe

ayahs.t: And this is the path of your Lord, [leading] straight. We have detailed the verses for a people who remember.
ayahs.n: and this is the path of your lord leading straight we have detailed the verses for a people who remember

ayahs.t: For them will be the Home of Peace with their Lord. And He will be their protecting friend because of what they used to do.
ayahs.n: for them will be the home of peace with their lord and he will be their protecting friend because of what they used to do

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], the Day when He will gather them together [and say], "O company of jinn, you have [misled] many of mankind." And their allies among mankind will say, "Our Lord, some of us made use of others, and we have [now] reached our term, which you appointed for us." He will say, "The Fire is your residence, wherein you will abide eternally, except for what Allah wills. Indeed, your Lord is Wise and Knowing."
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad the day when he will gather them together and say o company of jinn you have misled many of mankind and their allies among mankind will say our lord some of us made use of others and we have now reached our term which you appointed for us he will say the fire is your residence wherein you will abide eternally except for what allah wills indeed your lord is wise and knowing

ayahs.t: And thus will We make some of the wrongdoers allies of others for what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: and thus will we make some of the wrongdoers allies of others for what they used to earn

ayahs.t: "O company of jinn and mankind, did there not come to you messengers from among you, relating to you My verses and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?" They will say, "We bear witness against ourselves"; and the worldly life had deluded them, and they will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers.
ayahs.n: o company of jinn and mankind did there not come to you messengers from among you relating to you my verses and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours they will say we bear witness against ourselves and the worldly life had deluded them and they will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers

ayahs.t: That is because your Lord would not destroy the cities for wrongdoing while their people were unaware.
ayahs.n: that is because your lord would not destroy the cities for wrongdoing while their people were unaware

ayahs.t: And for all are degrees from what they have done. And your Lord is not unaware of what they do.
ayahs.n: and for all are degrees from what they have done and your lord is not unaware of what they do

ayahs.t: And your Lord is the Free of need, the possessor of mercy. If He wills, he can do away with you and give succession after you to whomever He wills, just as He produced you from the descendants of another people.
ayahs.n: and your lord is the free of need the possessor of mercy if he wills he can do away with you and give succession after you to whomever he wills just as he produced you from the descendants of another people

ayahs.t: Indeed, what you are promised is coming, and you will not cause failure [to Allah].
ayahs.n: indeed what you are promised is coming and you will not cause failure to allah

ayahs.t: Say, "O my people, work according to your position; [for] indeed, I am working. And you are going to know who will have succession in the home. Indeed, the wrongdoers will not succeed.
ayahs.n: say o my people work according to your position for indeed i am working and you are going to know who will have succession in the home indeed the wrongdoers will not succeed

ayahs.t: And the polytheists assign to Allah from that which He created of crops and livestock a share and say, "This is for Allah," by their claim, "and this is for our partners [associated with Him]." But what is for their "partners" does not reach Allah, while what is for Allah - this reaches their "partners." Evil is that which they rule.
ayahs.n: and the polytheists assign to allah from that which he created of crops and livestock a share and say this is for allah by their claim and this is for our partners associated with him but what is for their partners does not reach allah while what is for allah this reaches their partners evil is that which they rule

ayahs.t: And likewise, to many of the polytheists their partners have made [to seem] pleasing the killing of their children in order to bring about their destruction and to cover them with confusion in their religion. And if Allah had willed, they would not have done so. So leave them and that which they invent.
ayahs.n: and likewise to many of the polytheists their partners have made to seem pleasing the killing of their children in order to bring about their destruction and to cover them with confusion in their religion and if allah had willed they would not have done so so leave them and that which they invent

ayahs.t: And they say, "These animals and crops are forbidden; no one may eat from them except whom we will," by their claim. And there are those [camels] whose backs are forbidden [by them] and those upon which the name of Allah is not mentioned - [all of this] an invention of untruth about Him. He will punish them for what they were inventing.
ayahs.n: and they say these animals and crops are forbidden no one may eat from them except whom we will by their claim and there are those camels whose backs are forbidden by them and those upon which the name of allah is not mentioned all of this an invention of untruth about him he will punish them for what they were inventing

ayahs.t: And they say, "What is in the bellies of these animals is exclusively for our males and forbidden to our females. But if it is [born] dead, then all of them have shares therein." He will punish them for their description. Indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
ayahs.n: and they say what is in the bellies of these animals is exclusively for our males and forbidden to our females but if it is born dead then all of them have shares therein he will punish them for their description indeed he is wise and knowing

ayahs.t: Those will have lost who killed their children in foolishness without knowledge and prohibited what Allah had provided for them, inventing untruth about Allah. They have gone astray and were not [rightly] guided.
ayahs.n: those will have lost who killed their children in foolishness without knowledge and prohibited what allah had provided for them inventing untruth about allah they have gone astray and were not rightly guided

ayahs.t: And He it is who causes gardens to grow, [both] trellised and untrellised, and palm trees and crops of different [kinds of] food and olives and pomegranates, similar and dissimilar. Eat of [each of] its fruit when it yields and give its due [zakah] on the day of its harvest. And be not excessive. Indeed, He does not like those who commit excess.
ayahs.n: and he it is who causes gardens to grow both trellised and untrellised and palm trees and crops of different kinds of food and olives and pomegranates similar and dissimilar eat of each of its fruit when it yields and give its due zakah on the day of its harvest and be not excessive indeed he does not like those who commit excess

ayahs.t: And of the grazing livestock are carriers [of burdens] and those [too] small. Eat of what Allah has provided for you and do not follow the footsteps of Satan. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.
ayahs.n: and of the grazing livestock are carriers of burdens and those too small eat of what allah has provided for you and do not follow the footsteps of satan indeed he is to you a clear enemy

ayahs.t: [They are] eight mates - of the sheep, two and of the goats, two. Say, "Is it the two males He has forbidden or the two females or that which the wombs of the two females contain? Inform me with knowledge, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: they are eight mates of the sheep two and of the goats two say is it the two males he has forbidden or the two females or that which the wombs of the two females contain inform me with knowledge if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: And of the camels, two and of the cattle, two. Say, "Is it the two males He has forbidden or the two females or that which the wombs of the two females contain? Or were you witnesses when Allah charged you with this? Then who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about Allah to mislead the people by [something] other than knowledge? Indeed, Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people."
ayahs.n: and of the camels two and of the cattle two say is it the two males he has forbidden or the two females or that which the wombs of the two females contain or were you witnesses when allah charged you with this then who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about allah to mislead the people by something other than knowledge indeed allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: Say, "I do not find within that which was revealed to me [anything] forbidden to one who would eat it unless it be a dead animal or blood spilled out or the flesh of swine - for indeed, it is impure - or it be [that slaughtered in] disobedience, dedicated to other than Allah. But whoever is forced [by necessity], neither desiring [it] nor transgressing [its limit], then indeed, your Lord is Forgiving and Merciful."
ayahs.n: say i do not find within that which was revealed to me anything forbidden to one who would eat it unless it be a dead animal or blood spilled out or the flesh of swine for indeed it is impure or it be that slaughtered in disobedience dedicated to other than allah but whoever is forced by necessity neither desiring it nor transgressing its limit then indeed your lord is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And to those who are Jews We prohibited every animal of uncloven hoof; and of the cattle and the sheep We prohibited to them their fat, except what adheres to their backs or the entrails or what is joined with bone. [By] that We repaid them for their injustice. And indeed, We are truthful.
ayahs.n: and to those who are jews we prohibited every animal of uncloven hoof and of the cattle and the sheep we prohibited to them their fat except what adheres to their backs or the entrails or what is joined with bone by that we repaid them for their injustice and indeed we are truthful

ayahs.t: So if they deny you, [O Muhammad], say, "Your Lord is the possessor of vast mercy; but His punishment cannot be repelled from the people who are criminals."
ayahs.n: so if they deny you o muhammad say your lord is the possessor of vast mercy but his punishment cannot be repelled from the people who are criminals

ayahs.t: Those who associated with Allah will say, "If Allah had willed, we would not have associated [anything] and neither would our fathers, nor would we have prohibited anything." Likewise did those before deny until they tasted Our punishment. Say, "Do you have any knowledge that you can produce for us? You follow not except assumption, and you are not but falsifying."
ayahs.n: those who associated with allah will say if allah had willed we would not have associated anything and neither would our fathers nor would we have prohibited anything likewise did those before deny until they tasted our punishment say do you have any knowledge that you can produce for us you follow not except assumption and you are not but falsifying

ayahs.t: Say, "With Allah is the far-reaching argument. If He had willed, He would have guided you all."
ayahs.n: say with allah is the far reaching argument if he had willed he would have guided you all

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Bring forward your witnesses who will testify that Allah has prohibited this." And if they testify, do not testify with them. And do not follow the desires of those who deny Our verses and those who do not believe in the Hereafter, while they equate [others] with their Lord.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad bring forward your witnesses who will testify that allah has prohibited this and if they testify do not testify with them and do not follow the desires of those who deny our verses and those who do not believe in the hereafter while they equate others with their lord

ayahs.t: Say, "Come, I will recite what your Lord has prohibited to you. [He commands] that you not associate anything with Him, and to parents, good treatment, and do not kill your children out of poverty; We will provide for you and them. And do not approach immoralities - what is apparent of them and what is concealed. And do not kill the soul which Allah has forbidden [to be killed] except by [legal] right. This has He instructed you that you may use reason."
ayahs.n: say come i will recite what your lord has prohibited to you he commands that you not associate anything with him and to parents good treatment and do not kill your children out of poverty we will provide for you and them and do not approach immoralities what is apparent of them and what is concealed and do not kill the soul which allah has forbidden to be killed except by legal right this has he instructed you that you may use reason

ayahs.t: And do not approach the orphan's property except in a way that is best until he reaches maturity. And give full measure and weight in justice. We do not charge any soul except [with that within] its capacity. And when you testify, be just, even if [it concerns] a near relative. And the covenant of Allah fulfill. This has He instructed you that you may remember.
ayahs.n: and do not approach the orphans property except in a way that is best until he reaches maturity and give full measure and weight in justice we do not charge any soul except with that within its capacity and when you testify be just even if it concerns a near relative and the covenant of allah fulfill this has he instructed you that you may remember

ayahs.t: And, [moreover], this is My path, which is straight, so follow it; and do not follow [other] ways, for you will be separated from His way. This has He instructed you that you may become righteous.
ayahs.n: and moreover this is my path which is straight so follow it and do not follow other ways for you will be separated from his way this has he instructed you that you may become righteous

ayahs.t: Then We gave Moses the Scripture, making complete [Our favor] upon the one who did good and as a detailed explanation of all things and as guidance and mercy that perhaps in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord they would believe.
ayahs.n: then we gave moses the scripture making complete our favor upon the one who did good and as a detailed explanation of all things and as guidance and mercy that perhaps in the matter of the meeting with their lord they would believe

ayahs.t: And this [Qur'an] is a Book We have revealed [which is] blessed, so follow it and fear Allah that you may receive mercy.
ayahs.n: and this quran is a book we have revealed which is blessed so follow it and fear allah that you may receive mercy

ayahs.t: [We revealed it] lest you say, "The Scripture was only sent down to two groups before us, but we were of their study unaware,"
ayahs.n: we revealed it lest you say the scripture was only sent down to two groups before us but we were of their study unaware

ayahs.t: Or lest you say, "If only the Scripture had been revealed to us, we would have been better guided than they." So there has [now] come to you a clear evidence from your Lord and a guidance and mercy. Then who is more unjust than one who denies the verses of Allah and turns away from them? We will recompense those who turn away from Our verses with the worst of punishment for their having turned away.
ayahs.n: or lest you say if only the scripture had been revealed to us we would have been better guided than they so there has now come to you a clear evidence from your lord and a guidance and mercy then who is more unjust than one who denies the verses of allah and turns away from them we will recompense those who turn away from our verses with the worst of punishment for their having turned away

ayahs.t: Do they [then] wait for anything except that the angels should come to them or your Lord should come or that there come some of the signs of your Lord? The Day that some of the signs of your Lord will come no soul will benefit from its faith as long as it had not believed before or had earned through its faith some good. Say, "Wait. Indeed, we [also] are waiting."
ayahs.n: do they then wait for anything except that the angels should come to them or your lord should come or that there come some of the signs of your lord the day that some of the signs of your lord will come no soul will benefit from its faith as long as it had not believed before or had earned through its faith some good say wait indeed we also are waiting

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have divided their religion and become sects - you, [O Muhammad], are not [associated] with them in anything. Their affair is only [left] to Allah; then He will inform them about what they used to do.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have divided their religion and become sects you o muhammad are not associated with them in anything their affair is only left to allah then he will inform them about what they used to do

ayahs.t: Whoever comes [on the Day of Judgement] with a good deed will have ten times the like thereof [to his credit], and whoever comes with an evil deed will not be recompensed except the like thereof; and they will not be wronged.
ayahs.n: whoever comes on the day of judgement with a good deed will have ten times the like thereof to his credit and whoever comes with an evil deed will not be recompensed except the like thereof and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, my Lord has guided me to a straight path - a correct religion - the way of Abraham, inclining toward truth. And he was not among those who associated others with Allah."
ayahs.n: say indeed my lord has guided me to a straight path a correct religion the way of abraham inclining toward truth and he was not among those who associated others with allah

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, my prayer, my rites of sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: say indeed my prayer my rites of sacrifice my living and my dying are for allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: No partner has He. And this I have been commanded, and I am the first [among you] of the Muslims."
ayahs.n: no partner has he and this i have been commanded and i am the first among you of the muslims

ayahs.t: Say, "Is it other than Allah I should desire as a lord while He is the Lord of all things? And every soul earns not [blame] except against itself, and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you concerning that over which you used to differ."
ayahs.n: say is it other than allah i should desire as a lord while he is the lord of all things and every soul earns not blame except against itself and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another then to your lord is your return and he will inform you concerning that over which you used to differ

ayahs.t: And it is He who has made you successors upon the earth and has raised some of you above others in degrees [of rank] that He may try you through what He has given you. Indeed, your Lord is swift in penalty; but indeed, He is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and it is he who has made you successors upon the earth and has raised some of you above others in degrees of rank that he may try you through what he has given you indeed your lord is swift in penalty but indeed he is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem, Sad.
ayahs.n: alif lam meem sad

ayahs.t: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muhammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.
ayahs.n: this is a book revealed to you o muhammad so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers

ayahs.t: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.
ayahs.n: follow o mankind what has been revealed to you from your lord and do not follow other than him any allies little do you remember

ayahs.t: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.
ayahs.n: and how many cities have we destroyed and our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon

ayahs.t: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"
ayahs.n: and their declaration when our punishment came to them was only that they said indeed we were wrongdoers

ayahs.t: Then We will surely question those to whom [a message] was sent, and We will surely question the messengers.
ayahs.n: then we will surely question those to whom a message was sent and we will surely question the messengers

ayahs.t: Then We will surely relate [their deeds] to them with knowledge, and We were not [at all] absent.
ayahs.n: then we will surely relate their deeds to them with knowledge and we were not at all absent

ayahs.t: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful.
ayahs.n: and the weighing of deeds that day will be the truth so those whose scales are heavy it is they who will be the successful

ayahs.t: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.
ayahs.n: and those whose scales are light they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward our verses

ayahs.t: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood little are you grateful

ayahs.t: And We have certainly created you, [O Mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly created you o mankind and given you human form then we said to the angels prostrate to adam so they prostrated except for iblees he was not of those who prostrated

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "What prevented you from prostrating when I commanded you?" [Satan] said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."
ayahs.n: allah said what prevented you from prostrating when i commanded you satan said i am better than him you created me from fire and created him from clay

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise, for it is not for you to be arrogant therein. So get out; indeed, you are of the debased.
ayahs.n: allah said descend from paradise for it is not for you to be arrogant therein so get out indeed you are of the debased

ayahs.t: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
ayahs.n: satan said reprieve me until the day they are resurrected

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Indeed, you are of those reprieved."
ayahs.n: allah said indeed you are of those reprieved

ayahs.t: [Satan] said, "Because You have put me in error, I will surely sit in wait for them on Your straight path.
ayahs.n: satan said because you have put me in error i will surely sit in wait for them on your straight path

ayahs.t: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."
ayahs.n: then i will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left and you will not find most of them grateful to you

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Get out of Paradise, reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."
ayahs.n: allah said get out of paradise reproached and expelled whoever follows you among them i will surely fill hell with you all together

ayahs.t: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."
ayahs.n: and o adam dwell you and your wife in paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree lest you be among the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: But Satan whispered to them to make apparent to them that which was concealed from them of their private parts. He said, "Your Lord did not forbid you this tree except that you become angels or become of the immortal."
ayahs.n: but satan whispered to them to make apparent to them that which was concealed from them of their private parts he said your lord did not forbid you this tree except that you become angels or become of the immortal

ayahs.t: And he swore [by Allah] to them, "Indeed, I am to you from among the sincere advisors."
ayahs.n: and he swore by allah to them indeed i am to you from among the sincere advisors

ayahs.t: So he made them fall, through deception. And when they tasted of the tree, their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten together over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And their Lord called to them, "Did I not forbid you from that tree and tell you that Satan is to you a clear enemy?"
ayahs.n: so he made them fall through deception and when they tasted of the tree their private parts became apparent to them and they began to fasten together over themselves from the leaves of paradise and their lord called to them did i not forbid you from that tree and tell you that satan is to you a clear enemy

ayahs.t: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."
ayahs.n: they said our lord we have wronged ourselves and if you do not forgive us and have mercy upon us we will surely be among the losers

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Descend, being to one another enemies. And for you on the earth is a place of settlement and enjoyment for a time."
ayahs.n: allah said descend being to one another enemies and for you on the earth is a place of settlement and enjoyment for a time

ayahs.t: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth."
ayahs.n: he said therein you will live and therein you will die and from it you will be brought forth

ayahs.t: O children of Adam, We have bestowed upon you clothing to conceal your private parts and as adornment. But the clothing of righteousness - that is best. That is from the signs of Allah that perhaps they will remember.
ayahs.n: o children of adam we have bestowed upon you clothing to conceal your private parts and as adornment but the clothing of righteousness that is best that is from the signs of allah that perhaps they will remember

ayahs.t: O children of Adam, let not Satan tempt you as he removed your parents from Paradise, stripping them of their clothing to show them their private parts. Indeed, he sees you, he and his tribe, from where you do not see them. Indeed, We have made the devils allies to those who do not believe.
ayahs.n: o children of adam let not satan tempt you as he removed your parents from paradise stripping them of their clothing to show them their private parts indeed he sees you he and his tribe from where you do not see them indeed we have made the devils allies to those who do not believe

ayahs.t: And when they commit an immorality, they say, "We found our fathers doing it, and Allah has ordered us to do it." Say, "Indeed, Allah does not order immorality. Do you say about Allah that which you do not know?"
ayahs.n: and when they commit an immorality they say we found our fathers doing it and allah has ordered us to do it say indeed allah does not order immorality do you say about allah that which you do not know

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you maintain yourselves [in worship of Him] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -
ayahs.n: say o muhammad my lord has ordered justice and that you maintain yourselves in worship of him at every place or time of prostration and invoke him sincere to him in religion just as he originated you you will return to life

ayahs.t: A group [of you] He guided, and a group deserved [to be in] error. Indeed, they had taken the devils as allies instead of Allah while they thought that they were guided.
ayahs.n: a group of you he guided and a group deserved to be in error indeed they had taken the devils as allies instead of allah while they thought that they were guided

ayahs.t: O children of Adam, take your adornment at every masjid, and eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess.
ayahs.n: o children of adam take your adornment at every masjid and eat and drink but be not excessive indeed he likes not those who commit excess

ayahs.t: Say, "Who has forbidden the adornment of Allah which He has produced for His servants and the good [lawful] things of provision?" Say, "They are for those who believe during the worldly life [but] exclusively for them on the Day of Resurrection." Thus do We detail the verses for a people who know.
ayahs.n: say who has forbidden the adornment of allah which he has produced for his servants and the good lawful things of provision say they are for those who believe during the worldly life but exclusively for them on the day of resurrection thus do we detail the verses for a people who know

ayahs.t: Say, "My Lord has only forbidden immoralities - what is apparent of them and what is concealed - and sin, and oppression without right, and that you associate with Allah that for which He has not sent down authority, and that you say about Allah that which you do not know."
ayahs.n: say my lord has only forbidden immoralities what is apparent of them and what is concealed and sin and oppression without right and that you associate with allah that for which he has not sent down authority and that you say about allah that which you do not know

ayahs.t: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].
ayahs.n: and for every nation is a specified term so when their time has come they will not remain behind an hour nor will they precede it

ayahs.t: O children of Adam, if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you My verses, then whoever fears Allah and reforms - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.
ayahs.n: o children of adam if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you my verses then whoever fears allah and reforms there will be no fear concerning them nor will they grieve

ayahs.t: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: but the ones who deny our verses and are arrogant toward them those are the companions of the fire they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah a lie or denies His verses? Those will attain their portion of the decree until when Our messengers come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us," and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and who is more unjust than one who invents about allah a lie or denies his verses those will attain their portion of the decree until when our messengers come to them to take them in death they will say where are those you used to invoke besides allah they will say they have departed from us and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers

ayahs.t: [Allah] will say, "Enter among nations which had passed on before you of jinn and mankind into the Fire." Every time a nation enters, it will curse its sister until, when they have all overtaken one another therein, the last of them will say about the first of them "Our Lord, these had misled us, so give them a double punishment of the Fire. He will say, "For each is double, but you do not know."
ayahs.n: allah will say enter among nations which had passed on before you of jinn and mankind into the fire every time a nation enters it will curse its sister until when they have all overtaken one another therein the last of them will say about the first of them our lord these had misled us so give them a double punishment of the fire he will say for each is double but you do not know

ayahs.t: And the first of them will say to the last of them, "Then you had not any favor over us, so taste the punishment for what you used to earn."
ayahs.n: and the first of them will say to the last of them then you had not any favor over us so taste the punishment for what you used to earn

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - the gates of Heaven will not be opened for them, nor will they enter Paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle. And thus do We recompense the criminals.
ayahs.n: indeed those who deny our verses and are arrogant toward them the gates of heaven will not be opened for them nor will they enter paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle and thus do we recompense the criminals

ayahs.t: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: they will have from hell a bed and over them coverings of fire and thus do we recompense the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: But those who believed and did righteous deeds - We charge no soul except [within] its capacity. Those are the companions of Paradise; they will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: but those who believed and did righteous deeds we charge no soul except within its capacity those are the companions of paradise they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: And We will have removed whatever is within their breasts of resentment, [while] flowing beneath them are rivers. And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has guided us to this; and we would never have been guided if Allah had not guided us. Certainly the messengers of our Lord had come with the truth." And they will be called, "This is Paradise, which you have been made to inherit for what you used to do."
ayahs.n: and we will have removed whatever is within their breasts of resentment while flowing beneath them are rivers and they will say praise to allah who has guided us to this and we would never have been guided if allah had not guided us certainly the messengers of our lord had come with the truth and they will be called this is paradise which you have been made to inherit for what you used to do

ayahs.t: And the companions of Paradise will call out to the companions of the Fire, "We have already found what our Lord promised us to be true. Have you found what your Lord promised to be true?" They will say, "Yes." Then an announcer will announce among them, "The curse of Allah shall be upon the wrongdoers."
ayahs.n: and the companions of paradise will call out to the companions of the fire we have already found what our lord promised us to be true have you found what your lord promised to be true they will say yes then an announcer will announce among them the curse of allah shall be upon the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: Who averted [people] from the way of Allah and sought to make it [seem] deviant while they were, concerning the Hereafter, disbelievers.
ayahs.n: who averted people from the way of allah and sought to make it seem deviant while they were concerning the hereafter disbelievers

ayahs.t: And between them will be a partition, and on [its] elevations are men who recognize all by their mark. And they call out to the companions of Paradise, "Peace be upon you." They have not [yet] entered it, but they long intensely.
ayahs.n: and between them will be a partition and on its elevations are men who recognize all by their mark and they call out to the companions of paradise peace be upon you they have not yet entered it but they long intensely

ayahs.t: And when their eyes are turned toward the companions of the Fire, they say, "Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people."
ayahs.n: and when their eyes are turned toward the companions of the fire they say our lord do not place us with the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: And the companions of the Elevations will call to men [within Hell] whom they recognize by their mark, saying, "Of no avail to you was your gathering and [the fact] that you were arrogant."
ayahs.n: and the companions of the elevations will call to men within hell whom they recognize by their mark saying of no avail to you was your gathering and the fact that you were arrogant

ayahs.t: [Allah will say], "Are these the ones whom you [inhabitants of Hell] swore that Allah would never offer them mercy? Enter Paradise, [O People of the Elevations]. No fear will there be concerning you, nor will you grieve."
ayahs.n: allah will say are these the ones whom you inhabitants of hell swore that allah would never offer them mercy enter paradise o people of the elevations no fear will there be concerning you nor will you grieve

ayahs.t: And the companions of the Fire will call to the companions of Paradise, "Pour upon us some water or from whatever Allah has provided you." They will say, "Indeed, Allah has forbidden them both to the disbelievers."
ayahs.n: and the companions of the fire will call to the companions of paradise pour upon us some water or from whatever allah has provided you they will say indeed allah has forbidden them both to the disbelievers

ayahs.t: Who took their religion as distraction and amusement and whom the worldly life deluded." So today We will forget them just as they forgot the meeting of this Day of theirs and for having rejected Our verses.
ayahs.n: who took their religion as distraction and amusement and whom the worldly life deluded so today we will forget them just as they forgot the meeting of this day of theirs and for having rejected our verses

ayahs.t: And We had certainly brought them a Book which We detailed by knowledge - as guidance and mercy to a people who believe.
ayahs.n: and we had certainly brought them a book which we detailed by knowledge as guidance and mercy to a people who believe

ayahs.t: Do they await except its result? The Day its result comes those who had ignored it before will say, "The messengers of our Lord had come with the truth, so are there [now] any intercessors to intercede for us or could we be sent back to do other than we used to do?" They will have lost themselves, and lost from them is what they used to invent.
ayahs.n: do they await except its result the day its result comes those who had ignored it before will say the messengers of our lord had come with the truth so are there now any intercessors to intercede for us or could we be sent back to do other than we used to do they will have lost themselves and lost from them is what they used to invent

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord is Allah, who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He covers the night with the day, [another night] chasing it rapidly; and [He created] the sun, the moon, and the stars, subjected by His command. Unquestionably, His is the creation and the command; blessed is Allah, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord is allah who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established himself above the throne he covers the night with the day another night chasing it rapidly and he created the sun the moon and the stars subjected by his command unquestionably his is the creation and the command blessed is allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.
ayahs.n: call upon your lord in humility and privately indeed he does not like transgressors

ayahs.t: And cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. And invoke Him in fear and aspiration. Indeed, the mercy of Allah is near to the doers of good.
ayahs.n: and cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation and invoke him in fear and aspiration indeed the mercy of allah is near to the doers of good

ayahs.t: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy until, when they have carried heavy rainclouds, We drive them to a dead land and We send down rain therein and bring forth thereby [some] of all the fruits. Thus will We bring forth the dead; perhaps you may be reminded.
ayahs.n: and it is he who sends the winds as good tidings before his mercy until when they have carried heavy rainclouds we drive them to a dead land and we send down rain therein and bring forth thereby some of all the fruits thus will we bring forth the dead perhaps you may be reminded

ayahs.t: And the good land - its vegetation emerges by permission of its Lord; but that which is bad - nothing emerges except sparsely, with difficulty. Thus do We diversify the signs for a people who are grateful.
ayahs.n: and the good land its vegetation emerges by permission of its lord but that which is bad nothing emerges except sparsely with difficulty thus do we diversify the signs for a people who are grateful

ayahs.t: We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a tremendous Day.
ayahs.n: we had certainly sent noah to his people and he said o my people worship allah you have no deity other than him indeed i fear for you the punishment of a tremendous day

ayahs.t: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error."
ayahs.n: said the eminent among his people indeed we see you in clear error

ayahs.t: [Noah] said, "O my people, there is not error in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: noah said o my people there is not error in me but i am a messenger from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allah what you do not know.
ayahs.n: i convey to you the messages of my lord and advise you and i know from allah what you do not know

ayahs.t: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allah so you might receive mercy."
ayahs.n: then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your lord through a man from among you that he may warn you and that you may fear allah so you might receive mercy

ayahs.t: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.
ayahs.n: but they denied him so we saved him and those who were with him in the ship and we drowned those who denied our signs indeed they were a blind people

ayahs.t: And to the 'Aad [We sent] their brother Hud. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him?"
ayahs.n: and to the aad we sent their brother hud he said o my people worship allah you have no deity other than him then will you not fear him

ayahs.t: Said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people, "Indeed, we see you in foolishness, and indeed, we think you are of the liars."
ayahs.n: said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people indeed we see you in foolishness and indeed we think you are of the liars

ayahs.t: [Hud] said, "O my people, there is not foolishness in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: hud said o my people there is not foolishness in me but i am a messenger from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: I convey to you the messages of my Lord, and I am to you a trustworthy adviser.
ayahs.n: i convey to you the messages of my lord and i am to you a trustworthy adviser

ayahs.t: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you? And remember when He made you successors after the people of Noah and increased you in stature extensively. So remember the favors of Allah that you might succeed.
ayahs.n: then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your lord through a man from among you that he may warn you and remember when he made you successors after the people of noah and increased you in stature extensively so remember the favors of allah that you might succeed

ayahs.t: They said, "Have you come to us that we should worship Allah alone and leave what our fathers have worshipped? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.n: they said have you come to us that we should worship allah alone and leave what our fathers have worshipped then bring us what you promise us if you should be of the truthful

ayahs.t: [Hud] said, "Already have defilement and anger fallen upon you from your Lord. Do you dispute with me concerning [mere] names you have named them, you and your fathers, for which Allah has not sent down any authority? Then wait; indeed, I am with you among those who wait."
ayahs.n: hud said already have defilement and anger fallen upon you from your lord do you dispute with me concerning mere names you have named them you and your fathers for which allah has not sent down any authority then wait indeed i am with you among those who wait

ayahs.t: So We saved him and those with him by mercy from Us. And We eliminated those who denied Our signs, and they were not [at all] believers.
ayahs.n: so we saved him and those with him by mercy from us and we eliminated those who denied our signs and they were not at all believers

ayahs.t: And to the Thamud [We sent] their brother Salih. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. There has come to you clear evidence from your Lord. This is the she-camel of Allah [sent] to you as a sign. So leave her to eat within Allah 's land and do not touch her with harm, lest there seize you a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and to the thamud we sent their brother salih he said o my people worship allah you have no deity other than him there has come to you clear evidence from your lord this is the she camel of allah sent to you as a sign so leave her to eat within allah s land and do not touch her with harm lest there seize you a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And remember when He made you successors after the 'Aad and settled you in the land, [and] you take for yourselves palaces from its plains and carve from the mountains, homes. Then remember the favors of Allah and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption."
ayahs.n: and remember when he made you successors after the aad and settled you in the land and you take for yourselves palaces from its plains and carve from the mountains homes then remember the favors of allah and do not commit abuse on the earth spreading corruption

ayahs.t: Said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people to those who were oppressed - to those who believed among them, "Do you [actually] know that Salih is sent from his Lord?" They said, "Indeed we, in that with which he was sent, are believers."
ayahs.n: said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people to those who were oppressed to those who believed among them do you actually know that salih is sent from his lord they said indeed we in that with which he was sent are believers

ayahs.t: Said those who were arrogant, "Indeed we, in that which you have believed, are disbelievers."
ayahs.n: said those who were arrogant indeed we in that which you have believed are disbelievers

ayahs.t: So they hamstrung the she-camel and were insolent toward the command of their Lord and said, "O Salih, bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the messengers."
ayahs.n: so they hamstrung the she camel and were insolent toward the command of their lord and said o salih bring us what you promise us if you should be of the messengers

ayahs.t: So the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone.
ayahs.n: so the earthquake seized them and they became within their home corpses fallen prone

ayahs.t: And he turned away from them and said, "O my people, I had certainly conveyed to you the message of my Lord and advised you, but you do not like advisors."
ayahs.n: and he turned away from them and said o my people i had certainly conveyed to you the message of my lord and advised you but you do not like advisors

ayahs.t: And [We had sent] Lot when he said to his people, "Do you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds?
ayahs.n: and we had sent lot when he said to his people do you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds

ayahs.t: Indeed, you approach men with desire, instead of women. Rather, you are a transgressing people."
ayahs.n: indeed you approach men with desire instead of women rather you are a transgressing people

ayahs.t: But the answer of his people was only that they said, "Evict them from your city! Indeed, they are men who keep themselves pure."
ayahs.n: but the answer of his people was only that they said evict them from your city indeed they are men who keep themselves pure

ayahs.t: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; she was of those who remained [with the evildoers].
ayahs.n: so we saved him and his family except for his wife she was of those who remained with the evildoers

ayahs.t: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones]. Then see how was the end of the criminals.
ayahs.n: and we rained upon them a rain of stones then see how was the end of the criminals

ayahs.t: And to [the people of] Madyan [We sent] their brother Shu'ayb. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. There has come to you clear evidence from your Lord. So fulfill the measure and weight and do not deprive people of their due and cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. That is better for you, if you should be believers.
ayahs.n: and to the people of madyan we sent their brother shuayb he said o my people worship allah you have no deity other than him there has come to you clear evidence from your lord so fulfill the measure and weight and do not deprive people of their due and cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation that is better for you if you should be believers

ayahs.t: And do not sit on every path, threatening and averting from the way of Allah those who believe in Him, seeking to make it [seem] deviant. And remember when you were few and He increased you. And see how was the end of the corrupters.
ayahs.n: and do not sit on every path threatening and averting from the way of allah those who believe in him seeking to make it seem deviant and remember when you were few and he increased you and see how was the end of the corrupters

ayahs.t: And if there should be a group among you who has believed in that with which I have been sent and a group that has not believed, then be patient until Allah judges between us. And He is the best of judges."
ayahs.n: and if there should be a group among you who has believed in that with which i have been sent and a group that has not believed then be patient until allah judges between us and he is the best of judges

ayahs.t: Said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people, "We will surely evict you, O Shu'ayb, and those who have believed with you from our city, or you must return to our religion." He said, "Even if we were unwilling?"
ayahs.n: said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people we will surely evict you o shuayb and those who have believed with you from our city or you must return to our religion he said even if we were unwilling

ayahs.t: We would have invented against Allah a lie if we returned to your religion after Allah had saved us from it. And it is not for us to return to it except that Allah, our Lord, should will. Our Lord has encompassed all things in knowledge. Upon Allah we have relied. Our Lord, decide between us and our people in truth, and You are the best of those who give decision."
ayahs.n: we would have invented against allah a lie if we returned to your religion after allah had saved us from it and it is not for us to return to it except that allah our lord should will our lord has encompassed all things in knowledge upon allah we have relied our lord decide between us and our people in truth and you are the best of those who give decision

ayahs.t: Said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people, "If you should follow Shu'ayb, indeed, you would then be losers."
ayahs.n: said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people if you should follow shuayb indeed you would then be losers

ayahs.t: So the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone.
ayahs.n: so the earthquake seized them and they became within their home corpses fallen prone

ayahs.t: Those who denied Shu'ayb - it was as though they had never resided there. Those who denied Shu'ayb - it was they who were the losers.
ayahs.n: those who denied shuayb it was as though they had never resided there those who denied shuayb it was they who were the losers

ayahs.t: And he turned away from them and said, "O my people, I had certainly conveyed to you the messages of my Lord and advised you, so how could I grieve for a disbelieving people?"
ayahs.n: and he turned away from them and said o my people i had certainly conveyed to you the messages of my lord and advised you so how could i grieve for a disbelieving people

ayahs.t: And We sent to no city a prophet [who was denied] except that We seized its people with poverty and hardship that they might humble themselves [to Allah].
ayahs.n: and we sent to no city a prophet who was denied except that we seized its people with poverty and hardship that they might humble themselves to allah

ayahs.t: Then We exchanged in place of the bad [condition], good, until they increased [and prospered] and said, "Our fathers [also] were touched with hardship and ease." So We seized them suddenly while they did not perceive.
ayahs.n: then we exchanged in place of the bad condition good until they increased and prospered and said our fathers also were touched with hardship and ease so we seized them suddenly while they did not perceive

ayahs.t: And if only the people of the cities had believed and feared Allah, We would have opened upon them blessings from the heaven and the earth; but they denied [the messengers], so We seized them for what they were earning."
ayahs.n: and if only the people of the cities had believed and feared allah we would have opened upon them blessings from the heaven and the earth but they denied the messengers so we seized them for what they were earning

ayahs.t: Then, did the people of the cities feel secure from Our punishment coming to them at night while they were asleep?
ayahs.n: then did the people of the cities feel secure from our punishment coming to them at night while they were asleep

ayahs.t: Or did the people of the cities feel secure from Our punishment coming to them in the morning while they were at play?
ayahs.n: or did the people of the cities feel secure from our punishment coming to them in the morning while they were at play

ayahs.t: Then did they feel secure from the plan of Allah? But no one feels secure from the plan of Allah except the losing people.
ayahs.n: then did they feel secure from the plan of allah but no one feels secure from the plan of allah except the losing people

ayahs.t: Has it not become clear to those who inherited the earth after its [previous] people that if We willed, We could afflict them for their sins? But We seal over their hearts so they do not hear.
ayahs.n: has it not become clear to those who inherited the earth after its previous people that if we willed we could afflict them for their sins but we seal over their hearts so they do not hear

ayahs.t: Those cities - We relate to you, [O Muhammad], some of their news. And certainly did their messengers come to them with clear proofs, but they were not to believe in that which they had denied before. Thus does Allah seal over the hearts of the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: those cities we relate to you o muhammad some of their news and certainly did their messengers come to them with clear proofs but they were not to believe in that which they had denied before thus does allah seal over the hearts of the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And We did not find for most of them any covenant; but indeed, We found most of them defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: and we did not find for most of them any covenant but indeed we found most of them defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Then We sent after them Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were unjust toward them. So see how was the end of the corrupters.
ayahs.n: then we sent after them moses with our signs to pharaoh and his establishment but they were unjust toward them so see how was the end of the corrupters

ayahs.t: And Moses said, "O Pharaoh, I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds
ayahs.n: and moses said o pharaoh i am a messenger from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: [Who is] obligated not to say about Allah except the truth. I have come to you with clear evidence from your Lord, so send with me the Children of Israel."
ayahs.n: who is obligated not to say about allah except the truth i have come to you with clear evidence from your lord so send with me the children of israel

ayahs.t: [Pharaoh] said, "If you have come with a sign, then bring it forth, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.n: pharaoh said if you have come with a sign then bring it forth if you should be of the truthful

ayahs.t: So Moses threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent, manifest.
ayahs.n: so moses threw his staff and suddenly it was a serpent manifest

ayahs.t: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white [with radiance] for the observers.
ayahs.n: and he drew out his hand thereupon it was white with radiance for the observers

ayahs.t: Said the eminent among the people of Pharaoh, "Indeed, this is a learned magician
ayahs.n: said the eminent among the people of pharaoh indeed this is a learned magician

ayahs.t: Who wants to expel you from your land [through magic], so what do you instruct?"
ayahs.n: who wants to expel you from your land through magic so what do you instruct

ayahs.t: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
ayahs.n: they said postpone the matter of him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers

ayahs.t: Who will bring you every learned magician."
ayahs.n: who will bring you every learned magician

ayahs.t: And the magicians came to Pharaoh. They said, "Indeed for us is a reward if we are the predominant."
ayahs.n: and the magicians came to pharaoh they said indeed for us is a reward if we are the predominant

ayahs.t: He said, "Yes, and, [moreover], you will be among those made near [to me]."
ayahs.n: he said yes and moreover you will be among those made near to me

ayahs.t: They said, "O Moses, either you throw [your staff], or we will be the ones to throw [first]."
ayahs.n: they said o moses either you throw your staff or we will be the ones to throw first

ayahs.t: He said, "Throw," and when they threw, they bewitched the eyes of the people and struck terror into them, and they presented a great [feat of] magic.
ayahs.n: he said throw and when they threw they bewitched the eyes of the people and struck terror into them and they presented a great feat of magic

ayahs.t: And We inspired to Moses, "Throw your staff," and at once it devoured what they were falsifying.
ayahs.n: and we inspired to moses throw your staff and at once it devoured what they were falsifying

ayahs.t: So the truth was established, and abolished was what they were doing.
ayahs.n: so the truth was established and abolished was what they were doing

ayahs.t: And Pharaoh and his people were overcome right there and became debased.
ayahs.n: and pharaoh and his people were overcome right there and became debased

ayahs.t: And the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah].
ayahs.n: and the magicians fell down in prostration to allah

ayahs.t: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,
ayahs.n: they said we have believed in the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: The Lord of Moses and Aaron."
ayahs.n: the lord of moses and aaron

ayahs.t: Said Pharaoh, "You believed in him before I gave you permission. Indeed, this is a conspiracy which you conspired in the city to expel therefrom its people. But you are going to know.
ayahs.n: said pharaoh you believed in him before i gave you permission indeed this is a conspiracy which you conspired in the city to expel therefrom its people but you are going to know

ayahs.t: I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides; then I will surely crucify you all."
ayahs.n: i will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides then i will surely crucify you all

ayahs.t: They said, "Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
ayahs.n: they said indeed to our lord we will return

ayahs.t: And you do not resent us except because we believed in the signs of our Lord when they came to us. Our Lord, pour upon us patience and let us die as Muslims [in submission to You]."
ayahs.n: and you do not resent us except because we believed in the signs of our lord when they came to us our lord pour upon us patience and let us die as muslims in submission to you

ayahs.t: And the eminent among the people of Pharaoh said," Will you leave Moses and his people to cause corruption in the land and abandon you and your gods?" [Pharaoh] said, "We will kill their sons and keep their women alive; and indeed, we are subjugators over them."
ayahs.n: and the eminent among the people of pharaoh said will you leave moses and his people to cause corruption in the land and abandon you and your gods pharaoh said we will kill their sons and keep their women alive and indeed we are subjugators over them

ayahs.t: Said Moses to his people, "Seek help through Allah and be patient. Indeed, the earth belongs to Allah. He causes to inherit it whom He wills of His servants. And the [best] outcome is for the righteous."
ayahs.n: said moses to his people seek help through allah and be patient indeed the earth belongs to allah he causes to inherit it whom he wills of his servants and the best outcome is for the righteous

ayahs.t: They said, "We have been harmed before you came to us and after you have come to us." He said, "Perhaps your Lord will destroy your enemy and grant you succession in the land and see how you will do."
ayahs.n: they said we have been harmed before you came to us and after you have come to us he said perhaps your lord will destroy your enemy and grant you succession in the land and see how you will do

ayahs.t: And We certainly seized the people of Pharaoh with years of famine and a deficiency in fruits that perhaps they would be reminded.
ayahs.n: and we certainly seized the people of pharaoh with years of famine and a deficiency in fruits that perhaps they would be reminded

ayahs.t: But when good came to them, they said, "This is ours [by right]." And if a bad [condition] struck them, they saw an evil omen in Moses and those with him. Unquestionably, their fortune is with Allah, but most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: but when good came to them they said this is ours by right and if a bad condition struck them they saw an evil omen in moses and those with him unquestionably their fortune is with allah but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: And they said, "No matter what sign you bring us with which to bewitch us, we will not be believers in you."
ayahs.n: and they said no matter what sign you bring us with which to bewitch us we will not be believers in you

ayahs.t: So We sent upon them the flood and locusts and lice and frogs and blood as distinct signs, but they were arrogant and were a criminal people.
ayahs.n: so we sent upon them the flood and locusts and lice and frogs and blood as distinct signs but they were arrogant and were a criminal people

ayahs.t: And when the punishment descended upon them, they said, "O Moses, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. If you [can] remove the punishment from us, we will surely believe you, and we will send with you the Children of Israel."
