ayahs.t: Those who believe in Allah and the Last Day would not ask permission of you to be excused from striving with their wealth and their lives. And Allah is Knowing of those who fear Him.
ayahs.n: those who believe in allah and the last day would not ask permission of you to be excused from striving with their wealth and their lives and allah is knowing of those who fear him

ayahs.t: Only those would ask permission of you who do not believe in Allah and the Last Day and whose hearts have doubted, and they, in their doubt, are hesitating.
ayahs.n: only those would ask permission of you who do not believe in allah and the last day and whose hearts have doubted and they in their doubt are hesitating

ayahs.t: And if they had intended to go forth, they would have prepared for it [some] preparation. But Allah disliked their being sent, so He kept them back, and they were told, "Remain [behind] with those who remain."
ayahs.n: and if they had intended to go forth they would have prepared for it some preparation but allah disliked their being sent so he kept them back and they were told remain behind with those who remain

ayahs.t: Had they gone forth with you, they would not have increased you except in confusion, and they would have been active among you, seeking [to cause] you fitnah. And among you are avid listeners to them. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: had they gone forth with you they would not have increased you except in confusion and they would have been active among you seeking to cause you fitnah and among you are avid listeners to them and allah is knowing of the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: They had already desired dissension before and had upset matters for you until the truth came and the ordinance of Allah appeared, while they were averse.
ayahs.n: they had already desired dissension before and had upset matters for you until the truth came and the ordinance of allah appeared while they were averse

ayahs.t: And among them is he who says, "Permit me [to remain at home] and do not put me to trial." Unquestionably, into trial they have fallen. And indeed, Hell will encompass the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and among them is he who says permit me to remain at home and do not put me to trial unquestionably into trial they have fallen and indeed hell will encompass the disbelievers

ayahs.t: If good befalls you, it distresses them; but if disaster strikes you, they say, "We took our matter [in hand] before," and turn away while they are rejoicing.
ayahs.n: if good befalls you it distresses them but if disaster strikes you they say we took our matter in hand before and turn away while they are rejoicing

ayahs.t: Say, "Never will we be struck except by what Allah has decreed for us; He is our protector." And upon Allah let the believers rely.
ayahs.n: say never will we be struck except by what allah has decreed for us he is our protector and upon allah let the believers rely

ayahs.t: Say, "Do you await for us except one of the two best things while we await for you that Allah will afflict you with punishment from Himself or at our hands? So wait; indeed we, along with you, are waiting."
ayahs.n: say do you await for us except one of the two best things while we await for you that allah will afflict you with punishment from himself or at our hands so wait indeed we along with you are waiting

ayahs.t: Say, "Spend willingly or unwillingly; never will it be accepted from you. Indeed, you have been a defiantly disobedient people."
ayahs.n: say spend willingly or unwillingly never will it be accepted from you indeed you have been a defiantly disobedient people

ayahs.t: And what prevents their expenditures from being accepted from them but that they have disbelieved in Allah and in His Messenger and that they come not to prayer except while they are lazy and that they do not spend except while they are unwilling.
ayahs.n: and what prevents their expenditures from being accepted from them but that they have disbelieved in allah and in his messenger and that they come not to prayer except while they are lazy and that they do not spend except while they are unwilling

ayahs.t: So let not their wealth or their children impress you. Allah only intends to punish them through them in worldly life and that their souls should depart [at death] while they are disbelievers.
ayahs.n: so let not their wealth or their children impress you allah only intends to punish them through them in worldly life and that their souls should depart at death while they are disbelievers

ayahs.t: And they swear by Allah that they are from among you while they are not from among you; but they are a people who are afraid.
ayahs.n: and they swear by allah that they are from among you while they are not from among you but they are a people who are afraid

ayahs.t: If they could find a refuge or some caves or any place to enter [and hide], they would turn to it while they run heedlessly.
ayahs.n: if they could find a refuge or some caves or any place to enter and hide they would turn to it while they run heedlessly

ayahs.t: And among them are some who criticize you concerning the [distribution of] charities. If they are given from them, they approve; but if they are not given from them, at once they become angry.
ayahs.n: and among them are some who criticize you concerning the distribution of charities if they are given from them they approve but if they are not given from them at once they become angry

ayahs.t: If only they had been satisfied with what Allah and His Messenger gave them and said, "Sufficient for us is Allah; Allah will give us of His bounty, and [so will] His Messenger; indeed, we are desirous toward Allah," [it would have been better for them].
ayahs.n: if only they had been satisfied with what allah and his messenger gave them and said sufficient for us is allah allah will give us of his bounty and so will his messenger indeed we are desirous toward allah it would have been better for them

ayahs.t: Zakah expenditures are only for the poor and for the needy and for those employed to collect [zakah] and for bringing hearts together [for Islam] and for freeing captives [or slaves] and for those in debt and for the cause of Allah and for the [stranded] traveler - an obligation [imposed] by Allah. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: zakah expenditures are only for the poor and for the needy and for those employed to collect zakah and for bringing hearts together for islam and for freeing captives or slaves and for those in debt and for the cause of allah and for the stranded traveler an obligation imposed by allah and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And among them are those who abuse the Prophet and say, "He is an ear." Say, "[It is] an ear of goodness for you that believes in Allah and believes the believers and [is] a mercy to those who believe among you." And those who abuse the Messenger of Allah - for them is a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and among them are those who abuse the prophet and say he is an ear say it is an ear of goodness for you that believes in allah and believes the believers and is a mercy to those who believe among you and those who abuse the messenger of allah for them is a painful punishment

ayahs.t: They swear by Allah to you [Muslims] to satisfy you. But Allah and His Messenger are more worthy for them to satisfy, if they should be believers.
ayahs.n: they swear by allah to you muslims to satisfy you but allah and his messenger are more worthy for them to satisfy if they should be believers

ayahs.t: Do they not know that whoever opposes Allah and His Messenger - that for him is the fire of Hell, wherein he will abide eternally? That is the great disgrace.
ayahs.n: do they not know that whoever opposes allah and his messenger that for him is the fire of hell wherein he will abide eternally that is the great disgrace

ayahs.t: They hypocrites are apprehensive lest a surah be revealed about them, informing them of what is in their hearts. Say, "Mock [as you wish]; indeed, Allah will expose that which you fear."
ayahs.n: they hypocrites are apprehensive lest a surah be revealed about them informing them of what is in their hearts say mock as you wish indeed allah will expose that which you fear

ayahs.t: And if you ask them, they will surely say, "We were only conversing and playing." Say, "Is it Allah and His verses and His Messenger that you were mocking?"
ayahs.n: and if you ask them they will surely say we were only conversing and playing say is it allah and his verses and his messenger that you were mocking

ayahs.t: Make no excuse; you have disbelieved after your belief. If We pardon one faction of you - We will punish another faction because they were criminals.
ayahs.n: make no excuse you have disbelieved after your belief if we pardon one faction of you we will punish another faction because they were criminals

ayahs.t: The hypocrite men and hypocrite women are of one another. They enjoin what is wrong and forbid what is right and close their hands. They have forgotten Allah, so He has forgotten them [accordingly]. Indeed, the hypocrites - it is they who are the defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: the hypocrite men and hypocrite women are of one another they enjoin what is wrong and forbid what is right and close their hands they have forgotten allah so he has forgotten them accordingly indeed the hypocrites it is they who are the defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Allah has promised the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the disbelievers the fire of Hell, wherein they will abide eternally. It is sufficient for them. And Allah has cursed them, and for them is an enduring punishment.
ayahs.n: allah has promised the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the disbelievers the fire of hell wherein they will abide eternally it is sufficient for them and allah has cursed them and for them is an enduring punishment

ayahs.t: [You disbelievers are] like those before you; they were stronger than you in power and more abundant in wealth and children. They enjoyed their portion [of worldly enjoyment], and you have enjoyed your portion as those before you enjoyed their portion, and you have engaged [in vanities] like that in which they engaged. [It is] those whose deeds have become worthless in this world and in the Hereafter, and it is they who are the losers.
ayahs.n: you disbelievers are like those before you they were stronger than you in power and more abundant in wealth and children they enjoyed their portion of worldly enjoyment and you have enjoyed your portion as those before you enjoyed their portion and you have engaged in vanities like that in which they engaged it is those whose deeds have become worthless in this world and in the hereafter and it is they who are the losers

ayahs.t: Has there not reached them the news of those before them - the people of Noah and [the tribes of] 'Aad and Thamud and the people of Abraham and the companions of Madyan and the towns overturned? Their messengers came to them with clear proofs. And Allah would never have wronged them, but they were wronging themselves.
ayahs.n: has there not reached them the news of those before them the people of noah and the tribes of aad and thamud and the people of abraham and the companions of madyan and the towns overturned their messengers came to them with clear proofs and allah would never have wronged them but they were wronging themselves

ayahs.t: The believing men and believing women are allies of one another. They enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong and establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. Those - Allah will have mercy upon them. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Wise.
ayahs.n: the believing men and believing women are allies of one another they enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong and establish prayer and give zakah and obey allah and his messenger those allah will have mercy upon them indeed allah is exalted in might and wise

ayahs.t: Allah has promised the believing men and believing women gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally, and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence; but approval from Allah is greater. It is that which is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: allah has promised the believing men and believing women gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein they abide eternally and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence but approval from allah is greater it is that which is the great attainment

ayahs.t: O Prophet, fight against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them. And their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: o prophet fight against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them and their refuge is hell and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: They swear by Allah that they did not say [anything against the Prophet] while they had said the word of disbelief and disbelieved after their [pretense of] Islam and planned that which they were not to attain. And they were not resentful except [for the fact] that Allah and His Messenger had enriched them of His bounty. So if they repent, it is better for them; but if they turn away, Allah will punish them with a painful punishment in this world and the Hereafter. And there will not be for them on earth any protector or helper.
ayahs.n: they swear by allah that they did not say anything against the prophet while they had said the word of disbelief and disbelieved after their pretense of islam and planned that which they were not to attain and they were not resentful except for the fact that allah and his messenger had enriched them of his bounty so if they repent it is better for them but if they turn away allah will punish them with a painful punishment in this world and the hereafter and there will not be for them on earth any protector or helper

ayahs.t: And among them are those who made a covenant with Allah, [saying], "If He should give us from His bounty, we will surely spend in charity, and we will surely be among the righteous."
ayahs.n: and among them are those who made a covenant with allah saying if he should give us from his bounty we will surely spend in charity and we will surely be among the righteous

ayahs.t: But when he gave them from His bounty, they were stingy with it and turned away while they refused.
ayahs.n: but when he gave them from his bounty they were stingy with it and turned away while they refused

ayahs.t: So He penalized them with hypocrisy in their hearts until the Day they will meet Him - because they failed Allah in what they promised Him and because they [habitually] used to lie.
ayahs.n: so he penalized them with hypocrisy in their hearts until the day they will meet him because they failed allah in what they promised him and because they habitually used to lie

ayahs.t: Did they not know that Allah knows their secrets and their private conversations and that Allah is the Knower of the unseen?
ayahs.n: did they not know that allah knows their secrets and their private conversations and that allah is the knower of the unseen

ayahs.t: Those who criticize the contributors among the believers concerning [their] charities and [criticize] the ones who find nothing [to spend] except their effort, so they ridicule them - Allah will ridicule them, and they will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: those who criticize the contributors among the believers concerning their charities and criticize the ones who find nothing to spend except their effort so they ridicule them allah will ridicule them and they will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: Ask forgiveness for them, [O Muhammad], or do not ask forgiveness for them. If you should ask forgiveness for them seventy times - never will Allah forgive them. That is because they disbelieved in Allah and His Messenger, and Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
ayahs.n: ask forgiveness for them o muhammad or do not ask forgiveness for them if you should ask forgiveness for them seventy times never will allah forgive them that is because they disbelieved in allah and his messenger and allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people

ayahs.t: Those who remained behind rejoiced in their staying [at home] after [the departure of] the Messenger of Allah and disliked to strive with their wealth and their lives in the cause of Allah and said, "Do not go forth in the heat." Say, "The fire of Hell is more intensive in heat" - if they would but understand.
ayahs.n: those who remained behind rejoiced in their staying at home after the departure of the messenger of allah and disliked to strive with their wealth and their lives in the cause of allah and said do not go forth in the heat say the fire of hell is more intensive in heat if they would but understand

ayahs.t: So let them laugh a little and [then] weep much as recompense for what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: so let them laugh a little and then weep much as recompense for what they used to earn

ayahs.t: If Allah should return you to a faction of them [after the expedition] and then they ask your permission to go out [to battle], say, "You will not go out with me, ever, and you will never fight with me an enemy. Indeed, you were satisfied with sitting [at home] the first time, so sit [now] with those who stay behind."
ayahs.n: if allah should return you to a faction of them after the expedition and then they ask your permission to go out to battle say you will not go out with me ever and you will never fight with me an enemy indeed you were satisfied with sitting at home the first time so sit now with those who stay behind

ayahs.t: And do not pray [the funeral prayer, O Muhammad], over any of them who has died - ever - or stand at his grave. Indeed, they disbelieved in Allah and His Messenger and died while they were defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: and do not pray the funeral prayer o muhammad over any of them who has died ever or stand at his grave indeed they disbelieved in allah and his messenger and died while they were defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: And let not their wealth and their children impress you. Allah only intends to punish them through them in this world and that their souls should depart [at death] while they are disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and let not their wealth and their children impress you allah only intends to punish them through them in this world and that their souls should depart at death while they are disbelievers

ayahs.t: And when a surah was revealed [enjoining them] to believe in Allah and to fight with His Messenger, those of wealth among them asked your permission [to stay back] and said, "Leave us to be with them who sit [at home]."
ayahs.n: and when a surah was revealed enjoining them to believe in allah and to fight with his messenger those of wealth among them asked your permission to stay back and said leave us to be with them who sit at home

ayahs.t: They were satisfied to be with those who stay behind, and their hearts were sealed over, so they do not understand.
ayahs.n: they were satisfied to be with those who stay behind and their hearts were sealed over so they do not understand

ayahs.t: But the Messenger and those who believed with him fought with their wealth and their lives. Those will have [all that is] good, and it is those who are the successful.
ayahs.n: but the messenger and those who believed with him fought with their wealth and their lives those will have all that is good and it is those who are the successful

ayahs.t: Allah has prepared for them gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide eternally. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: allah has prepared for them gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein they will abide eternally that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: And those with excuses among the bedouins came to be permitted [to remain], and they who had lied to Allah and His Messenger sat [at home]. There will strike those who disbelieved among them a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and those with excuses among the bedouins came to be permitted to remain and they who had lied to allah and his messenger sat at home there will strike those who disbelieved among them a painful punishment

ayahs.t: There is not upon the weak or upon the ill or upon those who do not find anything to spend any discomfort when they are sincere to Allah and His Messenger. There is not upon the doers of good any cause [for blame]. And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: there is not upon the weak or upon the ill or upon those who do not find anything to spend any discomfort when they are sincere to allah and his messenger there is not upon the doers of good any cause for blame and allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Nor [is there blame] upon those who, when they came to you that you might give them mounts, you said, "I can find nothing for you to ride upon." They turned back while their eyes overflowed with tears out of grief that they could not find something to spend [for the cause of Allah].
ayahs.n: nor is there blame upon those who when they came to you that you might give them mounts you said i can find nothing for you to ride upon they turned back while their eyes overflowed with tears out of grief that they could not find something to spend for the cause of allah

ayahs.t: The cause [for blame] is only upon those who ask permission of you while they are rich. They are satisfied to be with those who stay behind, and Allah has sealed over their hearts, so they do not know.
ayahs.n: the cause for blame is only upon those who ask permission of you while they are rich they are satisfied to be with those who stay behind and allah has sealed over their hearts so they do not know

ayahs.t: They will make excuses to you when you have returned to them. Say, "Make no excuse - never will we believe you. Allah has already informed us of your news. And Allah will observe your deeds, and [so will] His Messenger; then you will be taken back to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you of what you used to do."
ayahs.n: they will make excuses to you when you have returned to them say make no excuse never will we believe you allah has already informed us of your news and allah will observe your deeds and so will his messenger then you will be taken back to the knower of the unseen and the witnessed and he will inform you of what you used to do

ayahs.t: They will swear by Allah to you when you return to them that you would leave them alone. So leave them alone; indeed they are evil; and their refuge is Hell as recompense for what they had been earning.
ayahs.n: they will swear by allah to you when you return to them that you would leave them alone so leave them alone indeed they are evil and their refuge is hell as recompense for what they had been earning

ayahs.t: They swear to you so that you might be satisfied with them. But if you should be satisfied with them - indeed, Allah is not satisfied with a defiantly disobedient people.
ayahs.n: they swear to you so that you might be satisfied with them but if you should be satisfied with them indeed allah is not satisfied with a defiantly disobedient people

ayahs.t: The bedouins are stronger in disbelief and hypocrisy and more likely not to know the limits of what [laws] Allah has revealed to His Messenger. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: the bedouins are stronger in disbelief and hypocrisy and more likely not to know the limits of what laws allah has revealed to his messenger and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And among the bedouins are some who consider what they spend as a loss and await for you turns of misfortune. Upon them will be a misfortune of evil. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing.
ayahs.n: and among the bedouins are some who consider what they spend as a loss and await for you turns of misfortune upon them will be a misfortune of evil and allah is hearing and knowing

ayahs.t: But among the bedouins are some who believe in Allah and the Last Day and consider what they spend as means of nearness to Allah and of [obtaining] invocations of the Messenger. Unquestionably, it is a means of nearness for them. Allah will admit them to His mercy. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: but among the bedouins are some who believe in allah and the last day and consider what they spend as means of nearness to allah and of obtaining invocations of the messenger unquestionably it is a means of nearness for them allah will admit them to his mercy indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And the first forerunners [in the faith] among the Muhajireen and the Ansar and those who followed them with good conduct - Allah is pleased with them and they are pleased with Him, and He has prepared for them gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: and the first forerunners in the faith among the muhajireen and the ansar and those who followed them with good conduct allah is pleased with them and they are pleased with him and he has prepared for them gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein they will abide forever that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: And among those around you of the bedouins are hypocrites, and [also] from the people of Madinah. They have become accustomed to hypocrisy. You, [O Muhammad], do not know them, [but] We know them. We will punish them twice [in this world]; then they will be returned to a great punishment.
ayahs.n: and among those around you of the bedouins are hypocrites and also from the people of madinah they have become accustomed to hypocrisy you o muhammad do not know them but we know them we will punish them twice in this world then they will be returned to a great punishment

ayahs.t: And [there are] others who have acknowledged their sins. They had mixed a righteous deed with another that was bad. Perhaps Allah will turn to them in forgiveness. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and there are others who have acknowledged their sins they had mixed a righteous deed with another that was bad perhaps allah will turn to them in forgiveness indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Take, [O, Muhammad], from their wealth a charity by which you purify them and cause them increase, and invoke [Allah 's blessings] upon them. Indeed, your invocations are reassurance for them. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing.
ayahs.n: take o muhammad from their wealth a charity by which you purify them and cause them increase and invoke allah s blessings upon them indeed your invocations are reassurance for them and allah is hearing and knowing

ayahs.t: Do they not know that it is Allah who accepts repentance from His servants and receives charities and that it is Allah who is the Accepting of repentance, the Merciful?
ayahs.n: do they not know that it is allah who accepts repentance from his servants and receives charities and that it is allah who is the accepting of repentance the merciful

ayahs.t: And say, "Do [as you will], for Allah will see your deeds, and [so, will] His Messenger and the believers. And you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you of what you used to do."
ayahs.n: and say do as you will for allah will see your deeds and so will his messenger and the believers and you will be returned to the knower of the unseen and the witnessed and he will inform you of what you used to do

ayahs.t: And [there are] others deferred until the command of Allah - whether He will punish them or whether He will forgive them. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: and there are others deferred until the command of allah whether he will punish them or whether he will forgive them and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And [there are] those [hypocrites] who took for themselves a mosque for causing harm and disbelief and division among the believers and as a station for whoever had warred against Allah and His Messenger before. And they will surely swear, "We intended only the best." And Allah testifies that indeed they are liars.
ayahs.n: and there are those hypocrites who took for themselves a mosque for causing harm and disbelief and division among the believers and as a station for whoever had warred against allah and his messenger before and they will surely swear we intended only the best and allah testifies that indeed they are liars

ayahs.t: Do not stand [for prayer] within it - ever. A mosque founded on righteousness from the first day is more worthy for you to stand in. Within it are men who love to purify themselves; and Allah loves those who purify themselves.
ayahs.n: do not stand for prayer within it ever a mosque founded on righteousness from the first day is more worthy for you to stand in within it are men who love to purify themselves and allah loves those who purify themselves

ayahs.t: Then is one who laid the foundation of his building on righteousness [with fear] from Allah and [seeking] His approval better or one who laid the foundation of his building on the edge of a bank about to collapse, so it collapsed with him into the fire of Hell? And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
ayahs.n: then is one who laid the foundation of his building on righteousness with fear from allah and seeking his approval better or one who laid the foundation of his building on the edge of a bank about to collapse so it collapsed with him into the fire of hell and allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: Their building which they built will not cease to be a [cause of] skepticism in their hearts until their hearts are stopped. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: their building which they built will not cease to be a cause of skepticism in their hearts until their hearts are stopped and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah has purchased from the believers their lives and their properties [in exchange] for that they will have Paradise. They fight in the cause of Allah, so they kill and are killed. [It is] a true promise [binding] upon Him in the Torah and the Gospel and the Qur'an. And who is truer to his covenant than Allah? So rejoice in your transaction which you have contracted. And it is that which is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: indeed allah has purchased from the believers their lives and their properties in exchange for that they will have paradise they fight in the cause of allah so they kill and are killed it is a true promise binding upon him in the torah and the gospel and the quran and who is truer to his covenant than allah so rejoice in your transaction which you have contracted and it is that which is the great attainment

ayahs.t: [Such believers are] the repentant, the worshippers, the praisers [of Allah], the travelers [for His cause], those who bow and prostrate [in prayer], those who enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong, and those who observe the limits [set by] Allah. And give good tidings to the believers.
ayahs.n: such believers are the repentant the worshippers the praisers of allah the travelers for his cause those who bow and prostrate in prayer those who enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong and those who observe the limits set by allah and give good tidings to the believers

ayahs.t: It is not for the Prophet and those who have believed to ask forgiveness for the polytheists, even if they were relatives, after it has become clear to them that they are companions of Hellfire.
ayahs.n: it is not for the prophet and those who have believed to ask forgiveness for the polytheists even if they were relatives after it has become clear to them that they are companions of hellfire

ayahs.t: And the request of forgiveness of Abraham for his father was only because of a promise he had made to him. But when it became apparent to Abraham that his father was an enemy to Allah, he disassociated himself from him. Indeed was Abraham compassionate and patient.
ayahs.n: and the request of forgiveness of abraham for his father was only because of a promise he had made to him but when it became apparent to abraham that his father was an enemy to allah he disassociated himself from him indeed was abraham compassionate and patient

ayahs.t: And Allah would not let a people stray after He has guided them until He makes clear to them what they should avoid. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of all things.
ayahs.n: and allah would not let a people stray after he has guided them until he makes clear to them what they should avoid indeed allah is knowing of all things

ayahs.t: Indeed, to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; He gives life and causes death. And you have not besides Allah any protector or any helper.
ayahs.n: indeed to allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth he gives life and causes death and you have not besides allah any protector or any helper

ayahs.t: Allah has already forgiven the Prophet and the Muhajireen and the Ansar who followed him in the hour of difficulty after the hearts of a party of them had almost inclined [to doubt], and then He forgave them. Indeed, He was to them Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: allah has already forgiven the prophet and the muhajireen and the ansar who followed him in the hour of difficulty after the hearts of a party of them had almost inclined to doubt and then he forgave them indeed he was to them kind and merciful

ayahs.t: And [He also forgave] the three who were left behind [and regretted their error] to the point that the earth closed in on them in spite of its vastness and their souls confined them and they were certain that there is no refuge from Allah except in Him. Then He turned to them so they could repent. Indeed, Allah is the Accepting of repentance, the Merciful.
ayahs.n: and he also forgave the three who were left behind and regretted their error to the point that the earth closed in on them in spite of its vastness and their souls confined them and they were certain that there is no refuge from allah except in him then he turned to them so they could repent indeed allah is the accepting of repentance the merciful

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, fear Allah and be with those who are true.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed fear allah and be with those who are true

ayahs.t: It was not [proper] for the people of Madinah and those surrounding them of the bedouins that they remain behind after [the departure of] the Messenger of Allah or that they prefer themselves over his self. That is because they are not afflicted by thirst or fatigue or hunger in the cause of Allah, nor do they tread on any ground that enrages the disbelievers, nor do they inflict upon an enemy any infliction but that is registered for them as a righteous deed. Indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of the doers of good.
ayahs.n: it was not proper for the people of madinah and those surrounding them of the bedouins that they remain behind after the departure of the messenger of allah or that they prefer themselves over his self that is because they are not afflicted by thirst or fatigue or hunger in the cause of allah nor do they tread on any ground that enrages the disbelievers nor do they inflict upon an enemy any infliction but that is registered for them as a righteous deed indeed allah does not allow to be lost the reward of the doers of good

ayahs.t: Nor do they spend an expenditure, small or large, or cross a valley but that it is registered for them that Allah may reward them for the best of what they were doing.
ayahs.n: nor do they spend an expenditure small or large or cross a valley but that it is registered for them that allah may reward them for the best of what they were doing

ayahs.t: And it is not for the believers to go forth [to battle] all at once. For there should separate from every division of them a group [remaining] to obtain understanding in the religion and warn their people when they return to them that they might be cautious.
ayahs.n: and it is not for the believers to go forth to battle all at once for there should separate from every division of them a group remaining to obtain understanding in the religion and warn their people when they return to them that they might be cautious

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, fight those adjacent to you of the disbelievers and let them find in you harshness. And know that Allah is with the righteous.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed fight those adjacent to you of the disbelievers and let them find in you harshness and know that allah is with the righteous

ayahs.t: And whenever a surah is revealed, there are among the hypocrites those who say, "Which of you has this increased faith?" As for those who believed, it has increased them in faith, while they are rejoicing.
ayahs.n: and whenever a surah is revealed there are among the hypocrites those who say which of you has this increased faith as for those who believed it has increased them in faith while they are rejoicing

ayahs.t: But as for those in whose hearts is disease, it has [only] increased them in evil [in addition] to their evil. And they will have died while they are disbelievers.
ayahs.n: but as for those in whose hearts is disease it has only increased them in evil in addition to their evil and they will have died while they are disbelievers

ayahs.t: Do they not see that they are tried every year once or twice but then they do not repent nor do they remember?
ayahs.n: do they not see that they are tried every year once or twice but then they do not repent nor do they remember

ayahs.t: And whenever a surah is revealed, they look at each other, [saying], "Does anyone see you?" and then they dismiss themselves. Allah has dismissed their hearts because they are a people who do not understand.
ayahs.n: and whenever a surah is revealed they look at each other saying does anyone see you and then they dismiss themselves allah has dismissed their hearts because they are a people who do not understand

ayahs.t: There has certainly come to you a Messenger from among yourselves. Grievous to him is what you suffer; [he is] concerned over you and to the believers is kind and merciful.
ayahs.n: there has certainly come to you a messenger from among yourselves grievous to him is what you suffer he is concerned over you and to the believers is kind and merciful

ayahs.t: But if they turn away, [O Muhammad], say, "Sufficient for me is Allah; there is no deity except Him. On Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne."
ayahs.n: but if they turn away o muhammad say sufficient for me is allah there is no deity except him on him i have relied and he is the lord of the great throne

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the wise Book
ayahs.n: alif lam ra these are the verses of the wise book

ayahs.t: Have the people been amazed that We revealed [revelation] to a man from among them, [saying], "Warn mankind and give good tidings to those who believe that they will have a [firm] precedence of honor with their Lord"? [But] the disbelievers say, "Indeed, this is an obvious magician."
ayahs.n: have the people been amazed that we revealed revelation to a man from among them saying warn mankind and give good tidings to those who believe that they will have a firm precedence of honor with their lord but the disbelievers say indeed this is an obvious magician

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord is Allah, who created the heavens and the earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne, arranging the matter [of His creation]. There is no intercessor except after His permission. That is Allah, your Lord, so worship Him. Then will you not remember?
ayahs.n: indeed your lord is allah who created the heavens and the earth in six days and then established himself above the throne arranging the matter of his creation there is no intercessor except after his permission that is allah your lord so worship him then will you not remember

ayahs.t: To Him is your return all together. [It is] the promise of Allah [which is] truth. Indeed, He begins the [process of] creation and then repeats it that He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds, in justice. But those who disbelieved will have a drink of scalding water and a painful punishment for what they used to deny.
ayahs.n: to him is your return all together it is the promise of allah which is truth indeed he begins the process of creation and then repeats it that he may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds in justice but those who disbelieved will have a drink of scalding water and a painful punishment for what they used to deny

ayahs.t: It is He who made the sun a shining light and the moon a derived light and determined for it phases - that you may know the number of years and account [of time]. Allah has not created this except in truth. He details the signs for a people who know
ayahs.n: it is he who made the sun a shining light and the moon a derived light and determined for it phases that you may know the number of years and account of time allah has not created this except in truth he details the signs for a people who know

ayahs.t: Indeed, in the alternation of the night and the day and [in] what Allah has created in the heavens and the earth are signs for a people who fear Allah
ayahs.n: indeed in the alternation of the night and the day and in what allah has created in the heavens and the earth are signs for a people who fear allah

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who do not expect the meeting with Us and are satisfied with the life of this world and feel secure therein and those who are heedless of Our signs
ayahs.n: indeed those who do not expect the meeting with us and are satisfied with the life of this world and feel secure therein and those who are heedless of our signs

ayahs.t: For those their refuge will be the Fire because of what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: for those their refuge will be the fire because of what they used to earn

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - their Lord will guide them because of their faith. Beneath them rivers will flow in the Gardens of Pleasure
ayahs.n: indeed those who have believed and done righteous deeds their lord will guide them because of their faith beneath them rivers will flow in the gardens of pleasure

ayahs.t: Their call therein will be, "Exalted are You, O Allah," and their greeting therein will be, "Peace." And the last of their call will be, "Praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds!"
ayahs.n: their call therein will be exalted are you o allah and their greeting therein will be peace and the last of their call will be praise to allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: And if Allah was to hasten for the people the evil [they invoke] as He hastens for them the good, their term would have been ended for them. But We leave the ones who do not expect the meeting with Us, in their transgression, wandering blindly
ayahs.n: and if allah was to hasten for the people the evil they invoke as he hastens for them the good their term would have been ended for them but we leave the ones who do not expect the meeting with us in their transgression wandering blindly

ayahs.t: And when affliction touches man, he calls upon Us, whether lying on his side or sitting or standing; but when We remove from him his affliction, he continues [in disobedience] as if he had never called upon Us to [remove] an affliction that touched him. Thus is made pleasing to the transgressors that which they have been doing
ayahs.n: and when affliction touches man he calls upon us whether lying on his side or sitting or standing but when we remove from him his affliction he continues in disobedience as if he had never called upon us to remove an affliction that touched him thus is made pleasing to the transgressors that which they have been doing

ayahs.t: And We had already destroyed generations before you when they wronged, and their messengers had come to them with clear proofs, but they were not to believe. Thus do We recompense the criminal people
ayahs.n: and we had already destroyed generations before you when they wronged and their messengers had come to them with clear proofs but they were not to believe thus do we recompense the criminal people

ayahs.t: Then We made you successors in the land after them so that We may observe how you will do.
ayahs.n: then we made you successors in the land after them so that we may observe how you will do

ayahs.t: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who do not expect the meeting with Us say, "Bring us a Qur'an other than this or change it." Say, [O Muhammad], "It is not for me to change it on my own accord. I only follow what is revealed to me. Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day."
ayahs.n: and when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences those who do not expect the meeting with us say bring us a quran other than this or change it say o muhammad it is not for me to change it on my own accord i only follow what is revealed to me indeed i fear if i should disobey my lord the punishment of a tremendous day

ayahs.t: Say, "If Allah had willed, I would not have recited it to you, nor would He have made it known to you, for I had remained among you a lifetime before it. Then will you not reason?"
ayahs.n: say if allah had willed i would not have recited it to you nor would he have made it known to you for i had remained among you a lifetime before it then will you not reason

ayahs.t: So who is more unjust than he who invents a lie about Allah or denies His signs? Indeed, the criminals will not succeed
ayahs.n: so who is more unjust than he who invents a lie about allah or denies his signs indeed the criminals will not succeed

ayahs.t: And they worship other than Allah that which neither harms them nor benefits them, and they say, "These are our intercessors with Allah " Say, "Do you inform Allah of something He does not know in the heavens or on the earth?" Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him
ayahs.n: and they worship other than allah that which neither harms them nor benefits them and they say these are our intercessors with allah say do you inform allah of something he does not know in the heavens or on the earth exalted is he and high above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: And mankind was not but one community [united in religion], but [then] they differed. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it would have been judged between them [immediately] concerning that over which they differ.
ayahs.n: and mankind was not but one community united in religion but then they differed and if not for a word that preceded from your lord it would have been judged between them immediately concerning that over which they differ

ayahs.t: And they say, "Why is a sign not sent down to him from his Lord?" So say, "The unseen is only for Allah [to administer], so wait; indeed, I am with you among those who wait."
ayahs.n: and they say why is a sign not sent down to him from his lord so say the unseen is only for allah to administer so wait indeed i am with you among those who wait

ayahs.t: And when We give the people a taste of mercy after adversity has touched them, at once they conspire against Our verses. Say, "Allah is swifter in strategy." Indeed, Our messengers record that which you conspire
ayahs.n: and when we give the people a taste of mercy after adversity has touched them at once they conspire against our verses say allah is swifter in strategy indeed our messengers record that which you conspire

ayahs.t: It is He who enables you to travel on land and sea until, when you are in ships and they sail with them by a good wind and they rejoice therein, there comes a storm wind and the waves come upon them from everywhere and they assume that they are surrounded, supplicating Allah, sincere to Him in religion, "If You should save us from this, we will surely be among the thankful."
ayahs.n: it is he who enables you to travel on land and sea until when you are in ships and they sail with them by a good wind and they rejoice therein there comes a storm wind and the waves come upon them from everywhere and they assume that they are surrounded supplicating allah sincere to him in religion if you should save us from this we will surely be among the thankful

ayahs.t: But when He saves them, at once they commit injustice upon the earth without right. O mankind, your injustice is only against yourselves, [being merely] the enjoyment of worldly life. Then to Us is your return, and We will inform you of what you used to do.
ayahs.n: but when he saves them at once they commit injustice upon the earth without right o mankind your injustice is only against yourselves being merely the enjoyment of worldly life then to us is your return and we will inform you of what you used to do

ayahs.t: The example of [this] worldly life is but like rain which We have sent down from the sky that the plants of the earth absorb - [those] from which men and livestock eat - until, when the earth has taken on its adornment and is beautified and its people suppose that they have capability over it, there comes to it Our command by night or by day, and We make it as a harvest, as if it had not flourished yesterday. Thus do We explain in detail the signs for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: the example of this worldly life is but like rain which we have sent down from the sky that the plants of the earth absorb those from which men and livestock eat until when the earth has taken on its adornment and is beautified and its people suppose that they have capability over it there comes to it our command by night or by day and we make it as a harvest as if it had not flourished yesterday thus do we explain in detail the signs for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: And Allah invites to the Home of Peace and guides whom He wills to a straight path
ayahs.n: and allah invites to the home of peace and guides whom he wills to a straight path

ayahs.t: For them who have done good is the best [reward] and extra. No darkness will cover their faces, nor humiliation. Those are companions of Paradise; they will abide therein eternally
ayahs.n: for them who have done good is the best reward and extra no darkness will cover their faces nor humiliation those are companions of paradise they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: But they who have earned [blame for] evil doings - the recompense of an evil deed is its equivalent, and humiliation will cover them. They will have from Allah no protector. It will be as if their faces are covered with pieces of the night - so dark [are they]. Those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: but they who have earned blame for evil doings the recompense of an evil deed is its equivalent and humiliation will cover them they will have from allah no protector it will be as if their faces are covered with pieces of the night so dark are they those are the companions of the fire they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], the Day We will gather them all together - then We will say to those who associated others with Allah, "[Remain in] your place, you and your 'partners.' " Then We will separate them, and their "partners" will say, "You did not used to worship us,
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad the day we will gather them all together then we will say to those who associated others with allah remain in your place you and your partners then we will separate them and their partners will say you did not used to worship us

ayahs.t: And sufficient is Allah as a witness between us and you that we were of your worship unaware."
ayahs.n: and sufficient is allah as a witness between us and you that we were of your worship unaware

ayahs.t: There, [on that Day], every soul will be put to trial for what it did previously, and they will be returned to Allah, their master, the Truth, and lost from them is whatever they used to invent.
ayahs.n: there on that day every soul will be put to trial for what it did previously and they will be returned to allah their master the truth and lost from them is whatever they used to invent

ayahs.t: Say, "Who provides for you from the heaven and the earth? Or who controls hearing and sight and who brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and who arranges [every] matter?" They will say, "Allah," so say, "Then will you not fear Him?"
ayahs.n: say who provides for you from the heaven and the earth or who controls hearing and sight and who brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and who arranges every matter they will say allah so say then will you not fear him

ayahs.t: For that is Allah, your Lord, the Truth. And what can be beyond truth except error? So how are you averted?
ayahs.n: for that is allah your lord the truth and what can be beyond truth except error so how are you averted

ayahs.t: Thus the word of your Lord has come into effect upon those who defiantly disobeyed - that they will not believe.
ayahs.n: thus the word of your lord has come into effect upon those who defiantly disobeyed that they will not believe

ayahs.t: Say, "Are there of your 'partners' any who begins creation and then repeats it?" Say, "Allah begins creation and then repeats it, so how are you deluded?"
ayahs.n: say are there of your partners any who begins creation and then repeats it say allah begins creation and then repeats it so how are you deluded

ayahs.t: Say, "Are there of your 'partners' any who guides to the truth?" Say, "Allah guides to the truth. So is He who guides to the truth more worthy to be followed or he who guides not unless he is guided? Then what is [wrong] with you - how do you judge?"
ayahs.n: say are there of your partners any who guides to the truth say allah guides to the truth so is he who guides to the truth more worthy to be followed or he who guides not unless he is guided then what is wrong with you how do you judge

ayahs.t: And most of them follow not except assumption. Indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do.
ayahs.n: and most of them follow not except assumption indeed assumption avails not against the truth at all indeed allah is knowing of what they do

ayahs.t: And it was not [possible] for this Qur'an to be produced by other than Allah, but [it is] a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of the [former] Scripture, about which there is no doubt, from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: and it was not possible for this quran to be produced by other than allah but it is a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of the former scripture about which there is no doubt from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Or do they say [about the Prophet], "He invented it?" Say, "Then bring forth a surah like it and call upon [for assistance] whomever you can besides Allah, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: or do they say about the prophet he invented it say then bring forth a surah like it and call upon for assistance whomever you can besides allah if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Rather, they have denied that which they encompass not in knowledge and whose interpretation has not yet come to them. Thus did those before them deny. Then observe how was the end of the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: rather they have denied that which they encompass not in knowledge and whose interpretation has not yet come to them thus did those before them deny then observe how was the end of the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: And of them are those who believe in it, and of them are those who do not believe in it. And your Lord is most knowing of the corrupters
ayahs.n: and of them are those who believe in it and of them are those who do not believe in it and your lord is most knowing of the corrupters

ayahs.t: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad], then say, "For me are my deeds, and for you are your deeds. You are disassociated from what I do, and I am disassociated from what you do."
ayahs.n: and if they deny you o muhammad then say for me are my deeds and for you are your deeds you are disassociated from what i do and i am disassociated from what you do

ayahs.t: And among them are those who listen to you. But can you cause the deaf to hear, although they will not use reason?
ayahs.n: and among them are those who listen to you but can you cause the deaf to hear although they will not use reason

ayahs.t: And among them are those who look at you. But can you guide the blind although they will not [attempt to] see?
ayahs.n: and among them are those who look at you but can you guide the blind although they will not attempt to see

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah does not wrong the people at all, but it is the people who are wronging themselves.
ayahs.n: indeed allah does not wrong the people at all but it is the people who are wronging themselves

ayahs.t: And on the Day when He will gather them, [it will be] as if they had not remained [in the world] but an hour of the day, [and] they will know each other. Those will have lost who denied the meeting with Allah and were not guided
ayahs.n: and on the day when he will gather them it will be as if they had not remained in the world but an hour of the day and they will know each other those will have lost who denied the meeting with allah and were not guided

ayahs.t: And whether We show you some of what We promise them, [O Muhammad], or We take you in death, to Us is their return; then, [either way], Allah is a witness concerning what they are doing
ayahs.n: and whether we show you some of what we promise them o muhammad or we take you in death to us is their return then either way allah is a witness concerning what they are doing

ayahs.t: And for every nation is a messenger. So when their messenger comes, it will be judged between them in justice, and they will not be wronged
ayahs.n: and for every nation is a messenger so when their messenger comes it will be judged between them in justice and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.n: and they say when is the fulfillment of this promise if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Say, "I possess not for myself any harm or benefit except what Allah should will. For every nation is a [specified] term. When their time has come, then they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it]."
ayahs.n: say i possess not for myself any harm or benefit except what allah should will for every nation is a specified term when their time has come then they will not remain behind an hour nor will they precede it

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered: if His punishment should come to you by night or by day - for which [aspect] of it would the criminals be impatient?"
ayahs.n: say have you considered if his punishment should come to you by night or by day for which aspect of it would the criminals be impatient

ayahs.t: Then is it that when it has [actually] occurred you will believe in it? Now? And you were [once] for it impatient
ayahs.n: then is it that when it has actually occurred you will believe in it now and you were once for it impatient

ayahs.t: Then it will be said to those who had wronged, "Taste the punishment of eternity; are you being recompensed except for what you used to earn?"
ayahs.n: then it will be said to those who had wronged taste the punishment of eternity are you being recompensed except for what you used to earn

ayahs.t: And they ask information of you, [O Muhammad], "Is it true?" Say, "Yes, by my Lord. Indeed, it is truth; and you will not cause failure [to Allah]."
ayahs.n: and they ask information of you o muhammad is it true say yes by my lord indeed it is truth and you will not cause failure to allah

ayahs.t: And if each soul that wronged had everything on earth, it would offer it in ransom. And they will confide regret when they see the punishment; and they will be judged in justice, and they will not be wronged
ayahs.n: and if each soul that wronged had everything on earth it would offer it in ransom and they will confide regret when they see the punishment and they will be judged in justice and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth. Unquestionably, the promise of Allah is truth, but most of them do not know
ayahs.n: unquestionably to allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth unquestionably the promise of allah is truth but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: He gives life and causes death, and to Him you will be returned
ayahs.n: he gives life and causes death and to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: O mankind, there has to come to you instruction from your Lord and healing for what is in the breasts and guidance and mercy for the believers.
ayahs.n: o mankind there has to come to you instruction from your lord and healing for what is in the breasts and guidance and mercy for the believers

ayahs.t: Say, "In the bounty of Allah and in His mercy - in that let them rejoice; it is better than what they accumulate."
ayahs.n: say in the bounty of allah and in his mercy in that let them rejoice it is better than what they accumulate

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you seen what Allah has sent down to you of provision of which you have made [some] lawful and [some] unlawful?" Say, "Has Allah permitted you [to do so], or do you invent [something] about Allah?"
ayahs.n: say have you seen what allah has sent down to you of provision of which you have made some lawful and some unlawful say has allah permitted you to do so or do you invent something about allah

ayahs.t: And what will be the supposition of those who invent falsehood about Allah on the Day of Resurrection? Indeed, Allah is full of bounty to the people, but most of them are not grateful."
ayahs.n: and what will be the supposition of those who invent falsehood about allah on the day of resurrection indeed allah is full of bounty to the people but most of them are not grateful

ayahs.t: And, [O Muhammad], you are not [engaged] in any matter or recite any of the Qur'an and you [people] do not do any deed except that We are witness over you when you are involved in it. And not absent from your Lord is any [part] of an atom's weight within the earth or within the heaven or [anything] smaller than that or greater but that it is in a clear register.
ayahs.n: and o muhammad you are not engaged in any matter or recite any of the quran and you people do not do any deed except that we are witness over you when you are involved in it and not absent from your lord is any part of an atoms weight within the earth or within the heaven or anything smaller than that or greater but that it is in a clear register

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, [for] the allies of Allah there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve
ayahs.n: unquestionably for the allies of allah there will be no fear concerning them nor will they grieve

ayahs.t: Those who believed and were fearing Allah
ayahs.n: those who believed and were fearing allah

ayahs.t: For them are good tidings in the worldly life and in the Hereafter. No change is there in the words of Allah. That is what is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: for them are good tidings in the worldly life and in the hereafter no change is there in the words of allah that is what is the great attainment

ayahs.t: And let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, honor [due to power] belongs to Allah entirely. He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and let not their speech grieve you indeed honor due to power belongs to allah entirely he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, to Allah belongs whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth. And those who invoke other than Allah do not [actually] follow [His] "partners." They follow not except assumption, and they are not but falsifying
ayahs.n: unquestionably to allah belongs whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth and those who invoke other than allah do not actually follow his partners they follow not except assumption and they are not but falsifying

ayahs.t: It is He who made for you the night to rest therein and the day, giving sight. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.
ayahs.n: it is he who made for you the night to rest therein and the day giving sight indeed in that are signs for a people who listen

ayahs.t: They have said, "Allah has taken a son." Exalted is He; He is the [one] Free of need. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth. You have no authority for this [claim]. Do you say about Allah that which you do not know?
ayahs.n: they have said allah has taken a son exalted is he he is the one free of need to him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth you have no authority for this claim do you say about allah that which you do not know

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, those who invent falsehood about Allah will not succeed."
ayahs.n: say indeed those who invent falsehood about allah will not succeed

ayahs.t: [For them is brief] enjoyment in this world; then to Us is their return; then We will make them taste the severe punishment because they used to disbelieve
ayahs.n: for them is brief enjoyment in this world then to us is their return then we will make them taste the severe punishment because they used to disbelieve

ayahs.t: And recite to them the news of Noah, when he said to his people, "O my people, if my residence and my reminding of the signs of Allah has become burdensome upon you - then I have relied upon Allah. So resolve upon your plan and [call upon] your associates. Then let not your plan be obscure to you. Then carry it out upon me and do not give me respite.
ayahs.n: and recite to them the news of noah when he said to his people o my people if my residence and my reminding of the signs of allah has become burdensome upon you then i have relied upon allah so resolve upon your plan and call upon your associates then let not your plan be obscure to you then carry it out upon me and do not give me respite

ayahs.t: And if you turn away [from my advice] then no payment have I asked of you. My reward is only from Allah, and I have been commanded to be of the Muslims."
ayahs.n: and if you turn away from my advice then no payment have i asked of you my reward is only from allah and i have been commanded to be of the muslims

ayahs.t: And they denied him, so We saved him and those with him in the ship and made them successors, and We drowned those who denied Our signs. Then see how was the end of those who were warned.
ayahs.n: and they denied him so we saved him and those with him in the ship and made them successors and we drowned those who denied our signs then see how was the end of those who were warned

ayahs.t: Then We sent after him messengers to their peoples, and they came to them with clear proofs. But they were not to believe in that which they had denied before. Thus We seal over the hearts of the transgressors
ayahs.n: then we sent after him messengers to their peoples and they came to them with clear proofs but they were not to believe in that which they had denied before thus we seal over the hearts of the transgressors

ayahs.t: Then We sent after them Moses and Aaron to Pharaoh and his establishment with Our signs, but they behaved arrogantly and were a criminal people
ayahs.n: then we sent after them moses and aaron to pharaoh and his establishment with our signs but they behaved arrogantly and were a criminal people

ayahs.t: So when there came to them the truth from Us, they said, "Indeed, this is obvious magic."
ayahs.n: so when there came to them the truth from us they said indeed this is obvious magic

ayahs.t: Moses said, "Do you say [thus] about the truth when it has come to you? Is this magic? But magicians will not succeed."
ayahs.n: moses said do you say thus about the truth when it has come to you is this magic but magicians will not succeed

ayahs.t: They said, "Have you come to us to turn us away from that upon which we found our fathers and so that you two may have grandeur in the land? And we are not believers in you."
ayahs.n: they said have you come to us to turn us away from that upon which we found our fathers and so that you two may have grandeur in the land and we are not believers in you

ayahs.t: And Pharaoh said, "Bring to me every learned magician."
ayahs.n: and pharaoh said bring to me every learned magician

ayahs.t: So when the magicians came, Moses said to them, "Throw down whatever you will throw."
ayahs.n: so when the magicians came moses said to them throw down whatever you will throw

ayahs.t: And when they had thrown, Moses said, "What you have brought is [only] magic. Indeed, Allah will expose its worthlessness. Indeed, Allah does not amend the work of corrupters.
ayahs.n: and when they had thrown moses said what you have brought is only magic indeed allah will expose its worthlessness indeed allah does not amend the work of corrupters

ayahs.t: And Allah will establish the truth by His words, even if the criminals dislike it."
ayahs.n: and allah will establish the truth by his words even if the criminals dislike it

ayahs.t: But no one believed Moses, except [some] youths among his people, for fear of Pharaoh and his establishment that they would persecute them. And indeed, Pharaoh was haughty within the land, and indeed, he was of the transgressors
ayahs.n: but no one believed moses except some youths among his people for fear of pharaoh and his establishment that they would persecute them and indeed pharaoh was haughty within the land and indeed he was of the transgressors

ayahs.t: And Moses said, "O my people, if you have believed in Allah, then rely upon Him, if you should be Muslims."
ayahs.n: and moses said o my people if you have believed in allah then rely upon him if you should be muslims

ayahs.t: So they said, "Upon Allah do we rely. Our Lord, make us not [objects of] trial for the wrongdoing people
ayahs.n: so they said upon allah do we rely our lord make us not objects of trial for the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: And save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people."
ayahs.n: and save us by your mercy from the disbelieving people

ayahs.t: And We inspired to Moses and his brother, "Settle your people in Egypt in houses and make your houses [facing the] qiblah and establish prayer and give good tidings to the believers."
ayahs.n: and we inspired to moses and his brother settle your people in egypt in houses and make your houses facing the qiblah and establish prayer and give good tidings to the believers

ayahs.t: And Moses said, "Our Lord, indeed You have given Pharaoh and his establishment splendor and wealth in the worldly life, our Lord, that they may lead [men] astray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealth and harden their hearts so that they will not believe until they see the painful punishment."
ayahs.n: and moses said our lord indeed you have given pharaoh and his establishment splendor and wealth in the worldly life our lord that they may lead men astray from your way our lord obliterate their wealth and harden their hearts so that they will not believe until they see the painful punishment

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Your supplication has been answered." So remain on a right course and follow not the way of those who do not know."
ayahs.n: allah said your supplication has been answered so remain on a right course and follow not the way of those who do not know

ayahs.t: And We took the Children of Israel across the sea, and Pharaoh and his soldiers pursued them in tyranny and enmity until, when drowning overtook him, he said, "I believe that there is no deity except that in whom the Children of Israel believe, and I am of the Muslims."
ayahs.n: and we took the children of israel across the sea and pharaoh and his soldiers pursued them in tyranny and enmity until when drowning overtook him he said i believe that there is no deity except that in whom the children of israel believe and i am of the muslims

ayahs.t: Now? And you had disobeyed [Him] before and were of the corrupters?
ayahs.n: now and you had disobeyed him before and were of the corrupters

ayahs.t: So today We will save you in body that you may be to those who succeed you a sign. And indeed, many among the people, of Our signs, are heedless
ayahs.n: so today we will save you in body that you may be to those who succeed you a sign and indeed many among the people of our signs are heedless

ayahs.t: And We had certainty settled the Children of Israel in an agreeable settlement and provided them with good things. And they did not differ until [after] knowledge had come to them. Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ
ayahs.n: and we had certainty settled the children of israel in an agreeable settlement and provided them with good things and they did not differ until after knowledge had come to them indeed your lord will judge between them on the day of resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

ayahs.t: So if you are in doubt, [O Muhammad], about that which We have revealed to you, then ask those who have been reading the Scripture before you. The truth has certainly come to you from your Lord, so never be among the doubters.
ayahs.n: so if you are in doubt o muhammad about that which we have revealed to you then ask those who have been reading the scripture before you the truth has certainly come to you from your lord so never be among the doubters

ayahs.t: And never be of those who deny the signs of Allah and [thus] be among the losers.
ayahs.n: and never be of those who deny the signs of allah and thus be among the losers

ayahs.t: Indeed, those upon whom the word of your Lord has come into effect will not believe,
ayahs.n: indeed those upon whom the word of your lord has come into effect will not believe

ayahs.t: Even if every sign should come to them, until they see the painful punishment.
ayahs.n: even if every sign should come to them until they see the painful punishment

ayahs.t: Then has there not been a [single] city that believed so its faith benefited it except the people of Jonah? When they believed, We removed from them the punishment of disgrace in worldly life and gave them enjoyment for a time.
ayahs.n: then has there not been a single city that believed so its faith benefited it except the people of jonah when they believed we removed from them the punishment of disgrace in worldly life and gave them enjoyment for a time

ayahs.t: And had your Lord willed, those on earth would have believed - all of them entirely. Then, [O Muhammad], would you compel the people in order that they become believers?
ayahs.n: and had your lord willed those on earth would have believed all of them entirely then o muhammad would you compel the people in order that they become believers

ayahs.t: And it is not for a soul to believe except by permission of Allah, and He will place defilement upon those who will not use reason.
ayahs.n: and it is not for a soul to believe except by permission of allah and he will place defilement upon those who will not use reason

ayahs.t: Say, "Observe what is in the heavens and earth." But of no avail will be signs or warners to a people who do not believe
ayahs.n: say observe what is in the heavens and earth but of no avail will be signs or warners to a people who do not believe

ayahs.t: So do they wait except for like [what occurred in] the days of those who passed on before them? Say, "Then wait; indeed, I am with you among those who wait."
ayahs.n: so do they wait except for like what occurred in the days of those who passed on before them say then wait indeed i am with you among those who wait

ayahs.t: Then We will save our messengers and those who have believed. Thus, it is an obligation upon Us that We save the believers
ayahs.n: then we will save our messengers and those who have believed thus it is an obligation upon us that we save the believers

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "O people, if you are in doubt as to my religion - then I do not worship those which you worship besides Allah; but I worship Allah, who causes your death. And I have been commanded to be of the believers
ayahs.n: say o muhammad o people if you are in doubt as to my religion then i do not worship those which you worship besides allah but i worship allah who causes your death and i have been commanded to be of the believers

ayahs.t: And [commanded], 'Direct your face toward the religion, inclining to truth, and never be of those who associate others with Allah;
ayahs.n: and commanded direct your face toward the religion inclining to truth and never be of those who associate others with allah

ayahs.t: And do not invoke besides Allah that which neither benefits you nor harms you, for if you did, then indeed you would be of the wrongdoers.'"
ayahs.n: and do not invoke besides allah that which neither benefits you nor harms you for if you did then indeed you would be of the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: And if Allah should touch you with adversity, there is no remover of it except Him; and if He intends for you good, then there is no repeller of His bounty. He causes it to reach whom He wills of His servants. And He is the Forgiving, the Merciful
ayahs.n: and if allah should touch you with adversity there is no remover of it except him and if he intends for you good then there is no repeller of his bounty he causes it to reach whom he wills of his servants and he is the forgiving the merciful

ayahs.t: Say, "O mankind, the truth has come to you from your Lord, so whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] his soul, and whoever goes astray only goes astray [in violation] against it. And I am not over you a manager."
ayahs.n: say o mankind the truth has come to you from your lord so whoever is guided is only guided for the benefit of his soul and whoever goes astray only goes astray in violation against it and i am not over you a manager

ayahs.t: And follow what is revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and be patient until Allah will judge. And He is the best of judges.
ayahs.n: and follow what is revealed to you o muhammad and be patient until allah will judge and he is the best of judges

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Ra. [This is] a Book whose verses are perfected and then presented in detail from [one who is] Wise and Acquainted.
ayahs.n: alif lam ra this is a book whose verses are perfected and then presented in detail from one who is wise and acquainted

ayahs.t: [Through a messenger, saying], "Do not worship except Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a warner and a bringer of good tidings,"
ayahs.n: through a messenger saying do not worship except allah indeed i am to you from him a warner and a bringer of good tidings

ayahs.t: And [saying], "Seek forgiveness of your Lord and repent to Him, [and] He will let you enjoy a good provision for a specified term and give every doer of favor his favor. But if you turn away, then indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a great Day.
ayahs.n: and saying seek forgiveness of your lord and repent to him and he will let you enjoy a good provision for a specified term and give every doer of favor his favor but if you turn away then indeed i fear for you the punishment of a great day

ayahs.t: To Allah is your return, and He is over all things competent."
ayahs.n: to allah is your return and he is over all things competent
