So have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? And the home of the Hereafter is best for those who fear Allah; then will you not reason?
ayahs.n: and we sent not before you as messengers except men to whom we revealed from among the people of cities so have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them and the home of the hereafter is best for those who fear allah then will you not reason

ayahs.t: [They continued] until, when the messengers despaired and were certain that they had been denied, there came to them Our victory, and whoever We willed was saved. And Our punishment cannot be repelled from the people who are criminals.
ayahs.n: they continued until when the messengers despaired and were certain that they had been denied there came to them our victory and whoever we willed was saved and our punishment cannot be repelled from the people who are criminals

ayahs.t: There was certainly in their stories a lesson for those of understanding. Never was the Qur'an a narration invented, but a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of all things and guidance and mercy for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: there was certainly in their stories a lesson for those of understanding never was the quran a narration invented but a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of all things and guidance and mercy for a people who believe

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem, Ra. These are the verses of the Book; and what has been revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, but most of the people do not believe.
ayahs.n: alif lam meem ra these are the verses of the book and what has been revealed to you from your lord is the truth but most of the people do not believe

ayahs.t: It is Allah who erected the heavens without pillars that you [can] see; then He established Himself above the Throne and made subject the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. He arranges [each] matter; He details the signs that you may, of the meeting with your Lord, be certain.
ayahs.n: it is allah who erected the heavens without pillars that you can see then he established himself above the throne and made subject the sun and the moon each running its course for a specified term he arranges each matter he details the signs that you may of the meeting with your lord be certain

ayahs.t: And it is He who spread the earth and placed therein firmly set mountains and rivers; and from all of the fruits He made therein two mates; He causes the night to cover the day. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: and it is he who spread the earth and placed therein firmly set mountains and rivers and from all of the fruits he made therein two mates he causes the night to cover the day indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: And within the land are neighboring plots and gardens of grapevines and crops and palm trees, [growing] several from a root or otherwise, watered with one water; but We make some of them exceed others in [quality of] fruit. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason.
ayahs.n: and within the land are neighboring plots and gardens of grapevines and crops and palm trees growing several from a root or otherwise watered with one water but we make some of them exceed others in quality of fruit indeed in that are signs for a people who reason

ayahs.t: And if you are astonished, [O Muhammad] - then astonishing is their saying, "When we are dust, will we indeed be [brought] into a new creation?" Those are the ones who have disbelieved in their Lord, and those will have shackles upon their necks, and those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: and if you are astonished o muhammad then astonishing is their saying when we are dust will we indeed be brought into a new creation those are the ones who have disbelieved in their lord and those will have shackles upon their necks and those are the companions of the fire they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: They impatiently urge you to bring about evil before good, while there has already occurred before them similar punishments [to what they demand]. And indeed, your Lord is full of forgiveness for the people despite their wrongdoing, and indeed, your Lord is severe in penalty.
ayahs.n: they impatiently urge you to bring about evil before good while there has already occurred before them similar punishments to what they demand and indeed your lord is full of forgiveness for the people despite their wrongdoing and indeed your lord is severe in penalty

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieved say, "Why has a sign not been sent down to him from his Lord?" You are only a warner, and for every people is a guide.
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieved say why has a sign not been sent down to him from his lord you are only a warner and for every people is a guide

ayahs.t: Allah knows what every female carries and what the wombs lose [prematurely] or exceed. And everything with Him is by due measure.
ayahs.n: allah knows what every female carries and what the wombs lose prematurely or exceed and everything with him is by due measure

ayahs.t: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Grand, the Exalted.
ayahs.n: he is knower of the unseen and the witnessed the grand the exalted

ayahs.t: It is the same [to Him] concerning you whether one conceals [his] speech or one publicizes it and whether one is hidden by night or conspicuous [among others] by day.
ayahs.n: it is the same to him concerning you whether one conceals his speech or one publicizes it and whether one is hidden by night or conspicuous among others by day

ayahs.t: For each one are successive [angels] before and behind him who protect him by the decree of Allah. Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves. And when Allah intends for a people ill, there is no repelling it. And there is not for them besides Him any patron.
ayahs.n: for each one are successive angels before and behind him who protect him by the decree of allah indeed allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves and when allah intends for a people ill there is no repelling it and there is not for them besides him any patron

ayahs.t: It is He who shows you lightening, [causing] fear and aspiration, and generates the heavy clouds.
ayahs.n: it is he who shows you lightening causing fear and aspiration and generates the heavy clouds

ayahs.t: And the thunder exalts [Allah] with praise of Him - and the angels [as well] from fear of Him - and He sends thunderbolts and strikes therewith whom He wills while they dispute about Allah; and He is severe in assault.
ayahs.n: and the thunder exalts allah with praise of him and the angels as well from fear of him and he sends thunderbolts and strikes therewith whom he wills while they dispute about allah and he is severe in assault

ayahs.t: To Him [alone] is the supplication of truth. And those they call upon besides Him do not respond to them with a thing, except as one who stretches his hands toward water [from afar, calling it] to reach his mouth, but it will not reach it [thus]. And the supplication of the disbelievers is not but in error [i.e. futility].
ayahs.n: to him alone is the supplication of truth and those they call upon besides him do not respond to them with a thing except as one who stretches his hands toward water from afar calling it to reach his mouth but it will not reach it thus and the supplication of the disbelievers is not but in error i e futility

ayahs.t: And to Allah prostrates whoever is within the heavens and the earth, willingly or by compulsion, and their shadows [as well] in the mornings and the afternoons.
ayahs.n: and to allah prostrates whoever is within the heavens and the earth willingly or by compulsion and their shadows as well in the mornings and the afternoons

ayahs.t: Say, "Who is Lord of the heavens and earth?" Say, "Allah." Say, "Have you then taken besides Him allies not possessing [even] for themselves any benefit or any harm?" Say, "Is the blind equivalent to the seeing? Or is darkness equivalent to light? Or have they attributed to Allah partners who created like His creation so that the creation [of each] seemed similar to them?" Say, "Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is the One, the Prevailing."
ayahs.n: say who is lord of the heavens and earth say allah say have you then taken besides him allies not possessing even for themselves any benefit or any harm say is the blind equivalent to the seeing or is darkness equivalent to light or have they attributed to allah partners who created like his creation so that the creation of each seemed similar to them say allah is the creator of all things and he is the one the prevailing

ayahs.t: He sends down from the sky, rain, and valleys flow according to their capacity, and the torrent carries a rising foam. And from that [ore] which they heat in the fire, desiring adornments and utensils, is a foam like it. Thus Allah presents [the example of] truth and falsehood. As for the foam, it vanishes, [being] cast off; but as for that which benefits the people, it remains on the earth. Thus does Allah present examples.
ayahs.n: he sends down from the sky rain and valleys flow according to their capacity and the torrent carries a rising foam and from that ore which they heat in the fire desiring adornments and utensils is a foam like it thus allah presents the example of truth and falsehood as for the foam it vanishes being cast off but as for that which benefits the people it remains on the earth thus does allah present examples

ayahs.t: For those who have responded to their Lord is the best [reward], but those who did not respond to Him - if they had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby. Those will have the worst account, and their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the resting place.
ayahs.n: for those who have responded to their lord is the best reward but those who did not respond to him if they had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it they would attempt to ransom themselves thereby those will have the worst account and their refuge is hell and wretched is the resting place

ayahs.t: Then is he who knows that what has been revealed to you from your Lord is the truth like one who is blind? They will only be reminded who are people of understanding -
ayahs.n: then is he who knows that what has been revealed to you from your lord is the truth like one who is blind they will only be reminded who are people of understanding

ayahs.t: Those who fulfill the covenant of Allah and do not break the contract,
ayahs.n: those who fulfill the covenant of allah and do not break the contract

ayahs.t: And those who join that which Allah has ordered to be joined and fear their Lord and are afraid of the evil of [their] account,
ayahs.n: and those who join that which allah has ordered to be joined and fear their lord and are afraid of the evil of their account

ayahs.t: And those who are patient, seeking the countenance of their Lord, and establish prayer and spend from what We have provided for them secretly and publicly and prevent evil with good - those will have the good consequence of [this] home -
ayahs.n: and those who are patient seeking the countenance of their lord and establish prayer and spend from what we have provided for them secretly and publicly and prevent evil with good those will have the good consequence of this home

ayahs.t: Gardens of perpetual residence; they will enter them with whoever were righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their descendants. And the angels will enter upon them from every gate, [saying],
ayahs.n: gardens of perpetual residence they will enter them with whoever were righteous among their fathers their spouses and their descendants and the angels will enter upon them from every gate saying

ayahs.t: "Peace be upon you for what you patiently endured. And excellent is the final home."
ayahs.n: peace be upon you for what you patiently endured and excellent is the final home

ayahs.t: But those who break the covenant of Allah after contracting it and sever that which Allah has ordered to be joined and spread corruption on earth - for them is the curse, and they will have the worst home.
ayahs.n: but those who break the covenant of allah after contracting it and sever that which allah has ordered to be joined and spread corruption on earth for them is the curse and they will have the worst home

ayahs.t: Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. And they rejoice in the worldly life, while the worldly life is not, compared to the Hereafter, except [brief] enjoyment.
ayahs.n: allah extends provision for whom he wills and restricts it and they rejoice in the worldly life while the worldly life is not compared to the hereafter except brief enjoyment

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieved say, "Why has a sign not been sent down to him from his Lord?" Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, Allah leaves astray whom He wills and guides to Himself whoever turns back [to Him] -
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieved say why has a sign not been sent down to him from his lord say o muhammad indeed allah leaves astray whom he wills and guides to himself whoever turns back to him

ayahs.t: Those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of Allah. Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured."
ayahs.n: those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of allah unquestionably by the remembrance of allah hearts are assured

ayahs.t: Those who have believed and done righteous deeds - a good state is theirs and a good return.
ayahs.n: those who have believed and done righteous deeds a good state is theirs and a good return

ayahs.t: Thus have We sent you to a community before which [other] communities have passed on so you might recite to them that which We revealed to you, while they disbelieve in the Most Merciful. Say, "He is my Lord; there is no deity except Him. Upon Him I rely, and to Him is my return."
ayahs.n: thus have we sent you to a community before which other communities have passed on so you might recite to them that which we revealed to you while they disbelieve in the most merciful say he is my lord there is no deity except him upon him i rely and to him is my return

ayahs.t: And if there was any qur'an by which the mountains would be removed or the earth would be broken apart or the dead would be made to speak, [it would be this Qur'an], but to Allah belongs the affair entirely. Then have those who believed not accepted that had Allah willed, He would have guided the people, all of them? And those who disbelieve do not cease to be struck, for what they have done, by calamity - or it will descend near their home - until there comes the promise of Allah. Indeed, Allah does not fail in [His] promise.
ayahs.n: and if there was any quran by which the mountains would be removed or the earth would be broken apart or the dead would be made to speak it would be this quran but to allah belongs the affair entirely then have those who believed not accepted that had allah willed he would have guided the people all of them and those who disbelieve do not cease to be struck for what they have done by calamity or it will descend near their home until there comes the promise of allah indeed allah does not fail in his promise

ayahs.t: And already were [other] messengers ridiculed before you, and I extended the time of those who disbelieved; then I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty.
ayahs.n: and already were other messengers ridiculed before you and i extended the time of those who disbelieved then i seized them and how terrible was my penalty

ayahs.t: Then is He who is a maintainer of every soul, [knowing] what it has earned, [like any other]? But to Allah they have attributed partners. Say, "Name them. Or do you inform Him of that which He knows not upon the earth or of what is apparent of speech?" Rather, their [own] plan has been made attractive to those who disbelieve, and they have been averted from the way. And whomever Allah leaves astray - there will be for him no guide.
ayahs.n: then is he who is a maintainer of every soul knowing what it has earned like any other but to allah they have attributed partners say name them or do you inform him of that which he knows not upon the earth or of what is apparent of speech rather their own plan has been made attractive to those who disbelieve and they have been averted from the way and whomever allah leaves astray there will be for him no guide

ayahs.t: For them will be punishment in the life of [this] world, and the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe. And they will not have from Allah any protector.
ayahs.n: for them will be punishment in the life of this world and the punishment of the hereafter is more severe and they will not have from allah any protector

ayahs.t: The example of Paradise, which the righteous have been promised, is [that] beneath it rivers flow. Its fruit is lasting, and its shade. That is the consequence for the righteous, and the consequence for the disbelievers is the Fire.
ayahs.n: the example of paradise which the righteous have been promised is that beneath it rivers flow its fruit is lasting and its shade that is the consequence for the righteous and the consequence for the disbelievers is the fire

ayahs.t: And [the believers among] those to whom We have given the [previous] Scripture rejoice at what has been revealed to you, [O Muhammad], but among the [opposing] factions are those who deny part of it. Say, "I have only been commanded to worship Allah and not associate [anything] with Him. To Him I invite, and to Him is my return."
ayahs.n: and the believers among those to whom we have given the previous scripture rejoice at what has been revealed to you o muhammad but among the opposing factions are those who deny part of it say i have only been commanded to worship allah and not associate anything with him to him i invite and to him is my return

ayahs.t: And thus We have revealed it as an Arabic legislation. And if you should follow their inclinations after what has come to you of knowledge, you would not have against Allah any ally or any protector.
ayahs.n: and thus we have revealed it as an arabic legislation and if you should follow their inclinations after what has come to you of knowledge you would not have against allah any ally or any protector

ayahs.t: And We have already sent messengers before you and assigned to them wives and descendants. And it was not for a messenger to come with a sign except by permission of Allah. For every term is a decree.
ayahs.n: and we have already sent messengers before you and assigned to them wives and descendants and it was not for a messenger to come with a sign except by permission of allah for every term is a decree

ayahs.t: Allah eliminates what He wills or confirms, and with Him is the Mother of the Book.
ayahs.n: allah eliminates what he wills or confirms and with him is the mother of the book

ayahs.t: And whether We show you part of what We promise them or take you in death, upon you is only the [duty of] notification, and upon Us is the account.
ayahs.n: and whether we show you part of what we promise them or take you in death upon you is only the duty of notification and upon us is the account

ayahs.t: Have they not seen that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? And Allah decides; there is no adjuster of His decision. And He is swift in account.
ayahs.n: have they not seen that we set upon the land reducing it from its borders and allah decides there is no adjuster of his decision and he is swift in account

ayahs.t: And those before them had plotted, but to Allah belongs the plan entirely. He knows what every soul earns, and the disbelievers will know for whom is the final home.
ayahs.n: and those before them had plotted but to allah belongs the plan entirely he knows what every soul earns and the disbelievers will know for whom is the final home

ayahs.t: And those who have disbelieved say, "You are not a messenger." Say, [O Muhammad], "Sufficient is Allah as Witness between me and you, and [the witness of] whoever has knowledge of the Scripture."
ayahs.n: and those who have disbelieved say you are not a messenger say o muhammad sufficient is allah as witness between me and you and the witness of whoever has knowledge of the scripture

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Ra. [This is] a Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that you might bring mankind out of darknesses into the light by permission of their Lord - to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy -
ayahs.n: alif lam ra this is a book which we have revealed to you o muhammad that you might bring mankind out of darknesses into the light by permission of their lord to the path of the exalted in might the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. And woe to the disbelievers from a severe punishment
ayahs.n: allah to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth and woe to the disbelievers from a severe punishment

ayahs.t: The ones who prefer the worldly life over the Hereafter and avert [people] from the way of Allah, seeking to make it (seem) deviant. Those are in extreme error.
ayahs.n: the ones who prefer the worldly life over the hereafter and avert people from the way of allah seeking to make it seem deviant those are in extreme error

ayahs.t: And We did not send any messenger except [speaking] in the language of his people to state clearly for them, and Allah sends astray [thereby] whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: and we did not send any messenger except speaking in the language of his people to state clearly for them and allah sends astray thereby whom he wills and guides whom he wills and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And We certainly sent Moses with Our signs, [saying], "Bring out your people from darknesses into the light and remind them of the days of Allah." Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
ayahs.n: and we certainly sent moses with our signs saying bring out your people from darknesses into the light and remind them of the days of allah indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

ayahs.t: And [recall, O Children of Israel], when Moses said to His people, "Remember the favor of Allah upon you when He saved you from the people of Pharaoh, who were afflicting you with the worst torment and were slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.
ayahs.n: and recall o children of israel when moses said to his people remember the favor of allah upon you when he saved you from the people of pharaoh who were afflicting you with the worst torment and were slaughtering your newborn sons and keeping your females alive and in that was a great trial from your lord

ayahs.t: And [remember] when your Lord proclaimed, 'If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor]; but if you deny, indeed, My punishment is severe.' "
ayahs.n: and remember when your lord proclaimed if you are grateful i will surely increase you in favor but if you deny indeed my punishment is severe

ayahs.t: And Moses said, "If you should disbelieve, you and whoever is on the earth entirely - indeed, Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy."
ayahs.n: and moses said if you should disbelieve you and whoever is on the earth entirely indeed allah is free of need and praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Has there not reached you the news of those before you - the people of Noah and 'Aad and Thamud and those after them? No one knows them but Allah. Their messengers brought them clear proofs, but they returned their hands to their mouths and said, "Indeed, we disbelieve in that with which you have been sent, and indeed we are, about that to which you invite us, in disquieting doubt."
ayahs.n: has there not reached you the news of those before you the people of noah and aad and thamud and those after them no one knows them but allah their messengers brought them clear proofs but they returned their hands to their mouths and said indeed we disbelieve in that with which you have been sent and indeed we are about that to which you invite us in disquieting doubt

ayahs.t: Their messengers said, "Can there be doubt about Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth? He invites you that He may forgive you of your sins, and He delays your death for a specified term." They said, "You are not but men like us who wish to avert us from what our fathers were worshipping. So bring us a clear authority."
ayahs.n: their messengers said can there be doubt about allah creator of the heavens and earth he invites you that he may forgive you of your sins and he delays your death for a specified term they said you are not but men like us who wish to avert us from what our fathers were worshipping so bring us a clear authority

ayahs.t: Their messengers said to them, "We are only men like you, but Allah confers favor upon whom He wills of His servants. It has never been for us to bring you evidence except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
ayahs.n: their messengers said to them we are only men like you but allah confers favor upon whom he wills of his servants it has never been for us to bring you evidence except by permission of allah and upon allah let the believers rely

ayahs.t: And why should we not rely upon Allah while He has guided us to our [good] ways. And we will surely be patient against whatever harm you should cause us. And upon Allah let those who would rely [indeed] rely."
ayahs.n: and why should we not rely upon allah while he has guided us to our good ways and we will surely be patient against whatever harm you should cause us and upon allah let those who would rely indeed rely

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieved said to their messengers, "We will surely drive you out of our land, or you must return to our religion." So their Lord inspired to them, "We will surely destroy the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieved said to their messengers we will surely drive you out of our land or you must return to our religion so their lord inspired to them we will surely destroy the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: And We will surely cause you to dwell in the land after them. That is for he who fears My position and fears My threat."
ayahs.n: and we will surely cause you to dwell in the land after them that is for he who fears my position and fears my threat

ayahs.t: And they requested victory from Allah, and disappointed, [therefore], was every obstinate tyrant.
ayahs.n: and they requested victory from allah and disappointed therefore was every obstinate tyrant

ayahs.t: Before him is Hell, and he will be given a drink of purulent water.
ayahs.n: before him is hell and he will be given a drink of purulent water

ayahs.t: He will gulp it but will hardly [be able to] swallow it. And death will come to him from everywhere, but he is not to die. And before him is a massive punishment.
ayahs.n: he will gulp it but will hardly be able to swallow it and death will come to him from everywhere but he is not to die and before him is a massive punishment

ayahs.t: The example of those who disbelieve in their Lord is [that] their deeds are like ashes which the wind blows forcefully on a stormy day; they are unable [to keep] from what they earned a [single] thing. That is what is extreme error.
ayahs.n: the example of those who disbelieve in their lord is that their deeds are like ashes which the wind blows forcefully on a stormy day they are unable to keep from what they earned a single thing that is what is extreme error

ayahs.t: Have you not seen that Allah created the heavens and the earth in truth? If He wills, He can do away with you and produce a new creation.
ayahs.n: have you not seen that allah created the heavens and the earth in truth if he wills he can do away with you and produce a new creation

ayahs.t: And that is not difficult for Allah.
ayahs.n: and that is not difficult for allah

ayahs.t: And they will come out [for judgement] before Allah all together, and the weak will say to those who were arrogant, "Indeed, we were your followers, so can you avail us anything against the punishment of Allah?" They will say, "If Allah had guided us, we would have guided you. It is all the same for us whether we show intolerance or are patient: there is for us no place of escape."
ayahs.n: and they will come out for judgement before allah all together and the weak will say to those who were arrogant indeed we were your followers so can you avail us anything against the punishment of allah they will say if allah had guided us we would have guided you it is all the same for us whether we show intolerance or are patient there is for us no place of escape

ayahs.t: And Satan will say when the matter has been concluded, "Indeed, Allah had promised you the promise of truth. And I promised you, but I betrayed you. But I had no authority over you except that I invited you, and you responded to me. So do not blame me; but blame yourselves. I cannot be called to your aid, nor can you be called to my aid. Indeed, I deny your association of me [with Allah] before. Indeed, for the wrongdoers is a painful punishment."
ayahs.n: and satan will say when the matter has been concluded indeed allah had promised you the promise of truth and i promised you but i betrayed you but i had no authority over you except that i invited you and you responded to me so do not blame me but blame yourselves i cannot be called to your aid nor can you be called to my aid indeed i deny your association of me with allah before indeed for the wrongdoers is a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And those who believed and did righteous deeds will be admitted to gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding eternally therein by permission of their Lord; and their greeting therein will be, "Peace!"
ayahs.n: and those who believed and did righteous deeds will be admitted to gardens beneath which rivers flow abiding eternally therein by permission of their lord and their greeting therein will be peace

ayahs.t: Have you not considered how Allah presents an example, [making] a good word like a good tree, whose root is firmly fixed and its branches [high] in the sky?
ayahs.n: have you not considered how allah presents an example making a good word like a good tree whose root is firmly fixed and its branches high in the sky

ayahs.t: It produces its fruit all the time, by permission of its Lord. And Allah presents examples for the people that perhaps they will be reminded.
ayahs.n: it produces its fruit all the time by permission of its lord and allah presents examples for the people that perhaps they will be reminded

ayahs.t: And the example of a bad word is like a bad tree, uprooted from the surface of the earth, not having any stability.
ayahs.n: and the example of a bad word is like a bad tree uprooted from the surface of the earth not having any stability

ayahs.t: Allah keeps firm those who believe, with the firm word, in worldly life and in the Hereafter. And Allah sends astray the wrongdoers. And Allah does what He wills.
ayahs.n: allah keeps firm those who believe with the firm word in worldly life and in the hereafter and allah sends astray the wrongdoers and allah does what he wills

ayahs.t: Have you not considered those who exchanged the favor of Allah for disbelief and settled their people [in] the home of ruin?
ayahs.n: have you not considered those who exchanged the favor of allah for disbelief and settled their people in the home of ruin

ayahs.t: [It is] Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the settlement.
ayahs.n: it is hell which they will enter to burn and wretched is the settlement

ayahs.t: And they have attributed to Allah equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy yourselves, for indeed, your destination is the Fire."
ayahs.n: and they have attributed to allah equals to mislead people from his way say enjoy yourselves for indeed your destination is the fire

ayahs.t: [O Muhammad], tell My servants who have believed to establish prayer and spend from what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, before a Day comes in which there will be no exchange, nor any friendships.
ayahs.n: o muhammad tell my servants who have believed to establish prayer and spend from what we have provided them secretly and publicly before a day comes in which there will be no exchange nor any friendships

ayahs.t: It is Allah who created the heavens and the earth and sent down rain from the sky and produced thereby some fruits as provision for you and subjected for you the ships to sail through the sea by His command and subjected for you the rivers.
ayahs.n: it is allah who created the heavens and the earth and sent down rain from the sky and produced thereby some fruits as provision for you and subjected for you the ships to sail through the sea by his command and subjected for you the rivers

ayahs.t: And He subjected for you the sun and the moon, continuous [in orbit], and subjected for you the night and the day.
ayahs.n: and he subjected for you the sun and the moon continuous in orbit and subjected for you the night and the day

ayahs.t: And He gave you from all you asked of Him. And if you should count the favor of Allah, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, mankind is [generally] most unjust and ungrateful.
ayahs.n: and he gave you from all you asked of him and if you should count the favor of allah you could not enumerate them indeed mankind is generally most unjust and ungrateful

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham said, "My Lord, make this city [Makkah] secure and keep me and my sons away from worshipping idols.
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when abraham said my lord make this city makkah secure and keep me and my sons away from worshipping idols

ayahs.t: My Lord, indeed they have led astray many among the people. So whoever follows me - then he is of me; and whoever disobeys me - indeed, You are [yet] Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: my lord indeed they have led astray many among the people so whoever follows me then he is of me and whoever disobeys me indeed you are yet forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Our Lord, I have settled some of my descendants in an uncultivated valley near Your sacred House, our Lord, that they may establish prayer. So make hearts among the people incline toward them and provide for them from the fruits that they might be grateful.
ayahs.n: our lord i have settled some of my descendants in an uncultivated valley near your sacred house our lord that they may establish prayer so make hearts among the people incline toward them and provide for them from the fruits that they might be grateful

ayahs.t: Our Lord, indeed You know what we conceal and what we declare, and nothing is hidden from Allah on the earth or in the heaven.
ayahs.n: our lord indeed you know what we conceal and what we declare and nothing is hidden from allah on the earth or in the heaven

ayahs.t: Praise to Allah, who has granted to me in old age Ishmael and Isaac. Indeed, my Lord is the Hearer of supplication.
ayahs.n: praise to allah who has granted to me in old age ishmael and isaac indeed my lord is the hearer of supplication

ayahs.t: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and [many] from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.
ayahs.n: my lord make me an establisher of prayer and many from my descendants our lord and accept my supplication

ayahs.t: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers the Day the account is established."
ayahs.n: our lord forgive me and my parents and the believers the day the account is established

ayahs.t: And never think that Allah is unaware of what the wrongdoers do. He only delays them for a Day when eyes will stare [in horror].
ayahs.n: and never think that allah is unaware of what the wrongdoers do he only delays them for a day when eyes will stare in horror

ayahs.t: Racing ahead, their heads raised up, their glance does not come back to them, and their hearts are void.
ayahs.n: racing ahead their heads raised up their glance does not come back to them and their hearts are void

ayahs.t: And, [O Muhammad], warn the people of a Day when the punishment will come to them and those who did wrong will say, "Our Lord, delay us for a short term; we will answer Your call and follow the messengers." [But it will be said], "Had you not sworn, before, that for you there would be no cessation?
ayahs.n: and o muhammad warn the people of a day when the punishment will come to them and those who did wrong will say our lord delay us for a short term we will answer your call and follow the messengers but it will be said had you not sworn before that for you there would be no cessation

ayahs.t: And you lived among the dwellings of those who wronged themselves, and it had become clear to you how We dealt with them. And We presented for you [many] examples."
ayahs.n: and you lived among the dwellings of those who wronged themselves and it had become clear to you how we dealt with them and we presented for you many examples

ayahs.t: And they had planned their plan, but with Allah is [recorded] their plan, even if their plan had been [sufficient] to do away with the mountains.
ayahs.n: and they had planned their plan but with allah is recorded their plan even if their plan had been sufficient to do away with the mountains

ayahs.t: So never think that Allah will fail in His promise to His messengers. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution.
ayahs.n: so never think that allah will fail in his promise to his messengers indeed allah is exalted in might and owner of retribution

ayahs.t: [It will be] on the Day the earth will be replaced by another earth, and the heavens [as well], and all creatures will come out before Allah, the One, the Prevailing.
ayahs.n: it will be on the day the earth will be replaced by another earth and the heavens as well and all creatures will come out before allah the one the prevailing

ayahs.t: And you will see the criminals that Day bound together in shackles,
ayahs.n: and you will see the criminals that day bound together in shackles

ayahs.t: Their garments of liquid pitch and their faces covered by the Fire.
ayahs.n: their garments of liquid pitch and their faces covered by the fire

ayahs.t: So that Allah will recompense every soul for what it earned. Indeed, Allah is swift in account.
ayahs.n: so that allah will recompense every soul for what it earned indeed allah is swift in account

ayahs.t: This [Qur'an] is notification for the people that they may be warned thereby and that they may know that He is but one God and that those of understanding will be reminded.
ayahs.n: this quran is notification for the people that they may be warned thereby and that they may know that he is but one god and that those of understanding will be reminded

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an.
ayahs.n: alif lam ra these are the verses of the book and a clear quran

ayahs.t: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.
ayahs.n: perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been muslims

ayahs.t: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.
ayahs.n: let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by false hope for they are going to know

ayahs.t: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.
ayahs.n: and we did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree

ayahs.t: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.
ayahs.n: no nation will precede its term nor will they remain thereafter

ayahs.t: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.
ayahs.n: and they say o you upon whom the message has been sent down indeed you are mad

ayahs.t: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"
ayahs.n: why do you not bring us the angels if you should be among the truthful

ayahs.t: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved.
ayahs.n: we do not send down the angels except with truth and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved

ayahs.t: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian.
ayahs.n: indeed it is we who sent down the quran and indeed we will be its guardian

ayahs.t: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples.
ayahs.n: and we had certainly sent messengers before you o muhammad among the sects of the former peoples

ayahs.t: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.
ayahs.n: and no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him

ayahs.t: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals.
ayahs.n: thus do we insert denial into the hearts of the criminals

ayahs.t: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.
ayahs.n: they will not believe in it while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples

ayahs.t: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,
ayahs.n: and even if we opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend

ayahs.t: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."
ayahs.n: they would say our eyes have only been dazzled rather we are a people affected by magic

ayahs.t: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.
ayahs.n: and we have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers

ayahs.t: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]
ayahs.n: and we have protected it from every devil expelled from the mercy of allah

ayahs.t: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.
ayahs.n: except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame

ayahs.t: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.
ayahs.n: and the earth we have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein something of every well balanced thing

ayahs.t: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.
ayahs.n: and we have made for you therein means of living and for those for whom you are not providers

ayahs.t: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure.
ayahs.n: and there is not a thing but that with us are its depositories and we do not send it down except according to a known measure

ayahs.t: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.
ayahs.n: and we have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it and you are not its retainers

ayahs.t: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.
ayahs.n: and indeed it is we who give life and cause death and we are the inheritor

ayahs.t: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].
ayahs.n: and we have already known the preceding generations among you and we have already known the later ones to come

ayahs.t: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
ayahs.n: and indeed your lord will gather them indeed he is wise and knowing

ayahs.t: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.
ayahs.n: and we did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud

ayahs.t: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.
ayahs.n: and the jinn we created before from scorching fire

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when your lord said to the angels i will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud

ayahs.t: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."
ayahs.n: and when i have proportioned him and breathed into him of my created soul then fall down to him in prostration

ayahs.t: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
ayahs.n: so the angels prostrated all of them entirely

ayahs.t: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated.
ayahs.n: except iblees he refused to be with those who prostrated

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"
ayahs.n: allah said o iblees what is the matter with you that you are not with those who prostrate

ayahs.t: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."
ayahs.n: he said never would i prostrate to a human whom you created out of clay from an altered black mud

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled.
ayahs.n: allah said then get out of it for indeed you are expelled

ayahs.t: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."
ayahs.n: and indeed upon you is the curse until the day of recompense

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
ayahs.n: he said my lord then reprieve me until the day they are resurrected

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
ayahs.n: allah said so indeed you are of those reprieved

ayahs.t: Until the Day of the time well-known."
ayahs.n: until the day of the time well known

ayahs.t: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all
ayahs.n: iblees said my lord because you have put me in error i will surely make disobedience attractive to them on earth and i will mislead them all

ayahs.t: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
ayahs.n: except among them your chosen servants

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.
ayahs.n: allah said this is a path of return to me that is straight

ayahs.t: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.
ayahs.n: indeed my servants no authority will you have over them except those who follow you of the deviators

ayahs.t: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.
ayahs.n: and indeed hell is the promised place for them all

ayahs.t: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated."
ayahs.n: it has seven gates for every gate is of them a portion designated

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs.
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be within gardens and springs

ayahs.t: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."
ayahs.n: having been told enter it in peace safe and secure

ayahs.t: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.
ayahs.n: and we will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment so they will be brothers on thrones facing each other

ayahs.t: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.
ayahs.n: no fatigue will touch them therein nor from it will they ever be removed

ayahs.t: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.
ayahs.n: o muhammad inform my servants that it is i who am the forgiving the merciful

ayahs.t: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and that it is my punishment which is the painful punishment

ayahs.t: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
ayahs.n: and inform them about the guests of abraham

ayahs.t: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you."
ayahs.n: when they entered upon him and said peace abraham said indeed we are fearful of you

ayahs.t: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."
ayahs.n: the angels said fear not indeed we give you good tidings of a learned boy

ayahs.t: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"
ayahs.n: he said have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me then of what wonder do you inform

ayahs.t: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."
ayahs.n: they said we have given you good tidings in truth so do not be of the despairing

ayahs.t: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"
ayahs.n: he said and who despairs of the mercy of his lord except for those astray

ayahs.t: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
ayahs.n: abraham said then what is your business here o messengers

ayahs.t: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,
ayahs.n: they said indeed we have been sent to a people of criminals

ayahs.t: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
ayahs.n: except the family of lot indeed we will save them all

ayahs.t: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
ayahs.n: except his wife allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind

ayahs.t: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
ayahs.n: and when the messengers came to the family of lot

ayahs.t: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."
ayahs.n: he said indeed you are people unknown

ayahs.t: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
ayahs.n: they said but we have come to you with that about which they were disputing

ayahs.t: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.
ayahs.n: and we have come to you with truth and indeed we are truthful

ayahs.t: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."
ayahs.n: so set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded

ayahs.t: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
ayahs.n: and we conveyed to him the decree of that matter that those sinners would be eliminated by early morning

ayahs.t: And the people of the city came rejoicing.
ayahs.n: and the people of the city came rejoicing

ayahs.t: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
ayahs.n: lot said indeed these are my guests so do not shame me

ayahs.t: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me."
ayahs.n: and fear allah and do not disgrace me

ayahs.t: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"
ayahs.n: they said have we not forbidden you from protecting people

ayahs.t: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."
ayahs.n: lot said these are my daughters if you would be doers of lawful marriage

ayahs.t: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.
ayahs.n: by your life o muhammad indeed they were in their intoxication wandering blindly

ayahs.t: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.
ayahs.n: so the shriek seized them at sunrise

ayahs.t: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.
ayahs.n: and we made the highest part of the city its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay

ayahs.t: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.
ayahs.n: indeed in that are signs for those who discern

ayahs.t: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road.
ayahs.n: and indeed those cities are situated on an established road

ayahs.t: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
ayahs.n: indeed in that is a sign for the believers

ayahs.t: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: and the companions of the thicket were also wrongdoers

ayahs.t: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.
ayahs.n: so we took retribution from them and indeed both cities are on a clear highway

ayahs.t: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers.
ayahs.n: and certainly did the companions of thamud deny the messengers

ayahs.t: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.
ayahs.n: and we gave them our signs but from them they were turning away

ayahs.n: and they used to carve from the mountains houses feeling secure

ayahs.t: But the shriek seized them at early morning.
ayahs.n: but the shriek seized them at early morning

ayahs.t: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: so nothing availed them from what they used to earn

ayahs.t: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
ayahs.n: and we have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth and indeed the hour is coming so forgive with gracious forgiveness

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord he is the knowing creator

ayahs.t: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly given you o muhammad seven of the often repeated verses and the great quran

ayahs.t: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers
ayahs.n: do not extend your eyes toward that by which we have given enjoyment to certain categories of the disbelievers and do not grieve over them and lower your wing to the believers

ayahs.t: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -
ayahs.n: and say indeed i am the clear warner

ayahs.t: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
ayahs.n: just as we had revealed scriptures to the separators

ayahs.t: Who have made the Qur'an into portions.
ayahs.n: who have made the quran into portions

ayahs.t: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
ayahs.n: so by your lord we will surely question them all

ayahs.t: About what they used to do.
ayahs.n: about what they used to do

ayahs.n: then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists

ayahs.t: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
ayahs.n: indeed we are sufficient for you against the mockers

ayahs.t: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know.
ayahs.n: who make equal with allah another deity but they are going to know

ayahs.t: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.
ayahs.n: and we already know that your breast is constrained by what they say

ayahs.t: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
ayahs.n: so exalt allah with praise of your lord and be of those who prostrate to him

ayahs.t: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death).
ayahs.n: and worship your lord until there comes to you the certainty death

ayahs.t: The command of Allah is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.
ayahs.n: the command of allah is coming so be not impatient for it exalted is he and high above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: He sends down the angels, with the inspiration of His command, upon whom He wills of His servants, [telling them], "Warn that there is no deity except Me; so fear Me."
ayahs.n: he sends down the angels with the inspiration of his command upon whom he wills of his servants telling them warn that there is no deity except me so fear me

ayahs.n: he created the heavens and earth in truth high is he above what they associate with him

ayahs.n: he created man from a sperm drop then at once he is a clear adversary

ayahs.n: and the grazing livestock he has created for you in them is warmth and numerous benefits and from them you eat

ayahs.t: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].
ayahs.n: and for you in them is the enjoyment of beauty when you bring them in for the evening and when you send them out to pasture

ayahs.t: And they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves. Indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and they carry your loads to a land you could not have reached except with difficulty to yourselves indeed your lord is kind and merciful

ayahs.t: And [He created] the horses, mules and donkeys for you to ride and [as] adornment. And He creates that which you do not know.
ayahs.n: and he created the horses mules and donkeys for you to ride and as adornment and he creates that which you do not know

ayahs.t: And upon Allah is the direction of the [right] way, and among the various paths are those deviating. And if He willed, He could have guided you all.
ayahs.n: and upon allah is the direction of the right way and among the various paths are those deviating and if he willed he could have guided you all

ayahs.t: It is He who sends down rain from the sky; from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture [animals].
ayahs.n: it is he who sends down rain from the sky from it is drink and from it is foliage in which you pasture animals

ayahs.t: He causes to grow for you thereby the crops, olives, palm trees, grapevines, and from all the fruits. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: he causes to grow for you thereby the crops olives palm trees grapevines and from all the fruits indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: And He has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon, and the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reason.
ayahs.n: and he has subjected for you the night and day and the sun and moon and the stars are subjected by his command indeed in that are signs for a people who reason

ayahs.t: And [He has subjected] whatever He multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember.
ayahs.n: and he has subjected whatever he multiplied for you on the earth of varying colors indeed in that is a sign for a people who remember

ayahs.t: And it is He who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear. And you see the ships plowing through it, and [He subjected it] that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.
ayahs.n: and it is he who subjected the sea for you to eat from it tender meat and to extract from it ornaments which you wear and you see the ships plowing through it and he subjected it that you may seek of his bounty and perhaps you will be grateful

ayahs.t: And He has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it shift with you, and [made] rivers and roads, that you may be guided,
ayahs.n: and he has cast into the earth firmly set mountains lest it shift with you and made rivers and roads that you may be guided

ayahs.t: And landmarks. And by the stars they are [also] guided.
ayahs.n: and landmarks and by the stars they are also guided

ayahs.t: Then is He who creates like one who does not create? So will you not be reminded?
ayahs.n: then is he who creates like one who does not create so will you not be reminded

ayahs.t: And if you should count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and if you should count the favors of allah you could not enumerate them indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And Allah knows what you conceal and what you declare.
ayahs.n: and allah knows what you conceal and what you declare

ayahs.t: And those they invoke other than Allah create nothing, and they [themselves] are created.
ayahs.n: and those they invoke other than allah create nothing and they themselves are created

ayahs.t: They are, [in fact], dead, not alive, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected.
ayahs.n: they are in fact dead not alive and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected

ayahs.t: Your god is one God. But those who do not believe in the Hereafter - their hearts are disapproving, and they are arrogant.
ayahs.n: your god is one god but those who do not believe in the hereafter their hearts are disapproving and they are arrogant

ayahs.t: Assuredly, Allah knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He does not like the arrogant.
ayahs.n: assuredly allah knows what they conceal and what they declare indeed he does not like the arrogant

ayahs.t: And when it is said to them, "What has your Lord sent down?" They say, "Legends of the former peoples,"
ayahs.n: and when it is said to them what has your lord sent down they say legends of the former peoples

ayahs.t: That they may bear their own burdens in full on the Day of Resurrection and some of the burdens of those whom they misguide without knowledge. Unquestionably, evil is that which they bear.
ayahs.n: that they may bear their own burdens in full on the day of resurrection and some of the burdens of those whom they misguide without knowledge unquestionably evil is that which they bear

ayahs.t: Those before them had already plotted, but Allah came at their building from the foundations, so the roof fell upon them from above them, and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive.
ayahs.n: those before them had already plotted but allah came at their building from the foundations so the roof fell upon them from above them and the punishment came to them from where they did not perceive

ayahs.t: Then on the Day of Resurrection He will disgrace them and say, "Where are My 'partners' for whom you used to oppose [the believers]?" Those who were given knowledge will say, "Indeed disgrace, this Day, and evil are upon the disbelievers" -
ayahs.n: then on the day of resurrection he will disgrace them and say where are my partners for whom you used to oppose the believers those who were given knowledge will say indeed disgrace this day and evil are upon the disbelievers

ayahs.t: The ones whom the angels take in death [while] wronging themselves, and [who] then offer submission, [saying], "We were not doing any evil." But, yes! Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what you used to do.
ayahs.n: the ones whom the angels take in death while wronging themselves and who then offer submission saying we were not doing any evil but yes indeed allah is knowing of what you used to do

ayahs.t: So enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant.
ayahs.n: so enter the gates of hell to abide eternally therein and how wretched is the residence of the arrogant

ayahs.t: And it will be said to those who feared Allah, "What did your Lord send down?" They will say, "[That which is] good." For those who do good in this world is good; and the home of the Hereafter is better. And how excellent is the home of the righteous -
ayahs.n: and it will be said to those who feared allah what did your lord send down they will say that which is good for those who do good in this world is good and the home of the hereafter is better and how excellent is the home of the righteous

ayahs.t: Gardens of perpetual residence, which they will enter, beneath which rivers flow. They will have therein whatever they wish. Thus does Allah reward the righteous -
ayahs.n: gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter beneath which rivers flow they will have therein whatever they wish thus does allah reward the righteous

ayahs.t: The ones whom the angels take in death, [being] good and pure; [the angels] will say, "Peace be upon you. Enter Paradise for what you used to do."
ayahs.n: the ones whom the angels take in death being good and pure the angels will say peace be upon you enter paradise for what you used to do

ayahs.t: Do the disbelievers await [anything] except that the angels should come to them or there comes the command of your Lord? Thus did those do before them. And Allah wronged them not, but they had been wronging themselves.
ayahs.n: do the disbelievers await anything except that the angels should come to them or there comes the command of your lord thus did those do before them and allah wronged them not but they had been wronging themselves

ayahs.t: So they were struck by the evil consequences of what they did and were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
ayahs.n: so they were struck by the evil consequences of what they did and were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

ayahs.t: And those who associate others with Allah say, "If Allah had willed, we would not have worshipped anything other than Him, neither we nor our fathers, nor would we have forbidden anything through other than Him." Thus did those do before them. So is there upon the messengers except [the duty of] clear notification?
ayahs.n: and those who associate others with allah say if allah had willed we would not have worshipped anything other than him neither we nor our fathers nor would we have forbidden anything through other than him thus did those do before them so is there upon the messengers except the duty of clear notification

ayahs.t: And We certainly sent into every nation a messenger, [saying], "Worship Allah and avoid Taghut." And among them were those whom Allah guided, and among them were those upon whom error was [deservedly] decreed. So proceed through the earth and observe how was the end of the deniers.
ayahs.n: and we certainly sent into every nation a messenger saying worship allah and avoid taghut and among them were those whom allah guided and among them were those upon whom error was deservedly decreed so proceed through the earth and observe how was the end of the deniers

ayahs.t: [Even] if you should strive for their guidance, [O Muhammad], indeed, Allah does not guide those He sends astray, and they will have no helpers.
ayahs.n: even if you should strive for their guidance o muhammad indeed allah does not guide those he sends astray and they will have no helpers

ayahs.t: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths [that] Allah will not resurrect one who dies. But yes - [it is] a true promise [binding] upon Him, but most of the people do not know.
ayahs.n: and they swear by allah their strongest oaths that allah will not resurrect one who dies but yes it is a true promise binding upon him but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: [It is] so He will make clear to them [the truth of] that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars.
ayahs.n: it is so he will make clear to them the truth of that wherein they differ and so those who have disbelieved may know that they were liars

ayahs.t: Indeed, Our word to a thing when We intend it is but that We say to it, "Be," and it is.
ayahs.n: indeed our word to a thing when we intend it is but that we say to it be and it is

ayahs.t: And those who emigrated for [the cause of] Allah after they had been wronged - We will surely settle them in this world in a good place; but the reward of the Hereafter is greater, if only they could know.
ayahs.n: and those who emigrated for the cause of allah after they had been wronged we will surely settle them in this world in a good place but the reward of the hereafter is greater if only they could know

ayahs.t: [They are] those who endured patiently and upon their Lord relied.
ayahs.n: they are those who endured patiently and upon their lord relied

ayahs.t: And We sent not before you except men to whom We revealed [Our message]. So ask the people of the message if you do not know.
ayahs.n: and we sent not before you except men to whom we revealed our message so ask the people of the message if you do not know

ayahs.t: [We sent them] with clear proofs and written ordinances. And We revealed to you the message that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought.
ayahs.n: we sent them with clear proofs and written ordinances and we revealed to you the message that you may make clear to the people what was sent down to them and that they might give thought

ayahs.t: Then, do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that Allah will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive?
ayahs.n: then do those who have planned evil deeds feel secure that allah will not cause the earth to swallow them or that the punishment will not come upon them from where they do not perceive

ayahs.t: Or that He would not seize them during their [usual] activity, and they could not cause failure?
ayahs.n: or that he would not seize them during their usual activity and they could not cause failure

ayahs.t: Or that He would not seize them gradually [in a state of dread]? But indeed, your Lord is Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: or that he would not seize them gradually in a state of dread but indeed your lord is kind and merciful

ayahs.t: Have they not considered what things Allah has created? Their shadows incline to the right and to the left, prostrating to Allah, while they are humble.
ayahs.n: have they not considered what things allah has created their shadows incline to the right and to the left prostrating to allah while they are humble

ayahs.t: And to Allah prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures, and the angels [as well], and they are not arrogant.
ayahs.n: and to allah prostrates whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth of creatures and the angels as well and they are not arrogant

ayahs.t: They fear their Lord above them, and they do what they are commanded.
ayahs.n: they fear their lord above them and they do what they are commanded

ayahs.t: And Allah has said, "Do not take for yourselves two deities. He is but one God, so fear only Me."
ayahs.n: and allah has said do not take for yourselves two deities he is but one god so fear only me

ayahs.t: And to Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and to Him is [due] worship constantly. Then is it other than Allah that you fear?
ayahs.n: and to him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth and to him is due worship constantly then is it other than allah that you fear

ayahs.t: And whatever you have of favor - it is from Allah. Then when adversity touches you, to Him you cry for help.
ayahs.n: and whatever you have of favor it is from allah then when adversity touches you to him you cry for help

ayahs.t: Then when He removes the adversity from you, at once a party of you associates others with their Lord
ayahs.n: then when he removes the adversity from you at once a party of you associates others with their lord

ayahs.t: So they will deny what We have given them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.
ayahs.n: so they will deny what we have given them then enjoy yourselves for you are going to know

ayahs.t: And they assign to what they do not know a portion of that which We have provided them. By Allah, you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent.
ayahs.n: and they assign to what they do not know a portion of that which we have provided them by allah you will surely be questioned about what you used to invent

ayahs.t: And they attribute to Allah daughters - exalted is He - and for them is what they desire.
ayahs.n: and they attribute to allah daughters exalted is he and for them is what they desire

ayahs.t: And when one of them is informed of [the birth of] a female, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.
ayahs.n: and when one of them is informed of the birth of a female his face becomes dark and he suppresses grief

ayahs.t: He hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed. Should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground? Unquestionably, evil is what they decide.
ayahs.n: he hides himself from the people because of the ill of which he has been informed should he keep it in humiliation or bury it in the ground unquestionably evil is what they decide

ayahs.t: For those who do not believe in the Hereafter is the description of evil; and for Allah is the highest attribute. And He is Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: for those who do not believe in the hereafter is the description of evil and for allah is the highest attribute and he is exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And if Allah were to impose blame on the people for their wrongdoing, He would not have left upon the earth any creature, but He defers them for a specified term. And when their term has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].
ayahs.n: and if allah were to impose blame on the people for their wrongdoing he would not have left upon the earth any creature but he defers them for a specified term and when their term has come they will not remain behind an hour nor will they precede it

ayahs.t: And they attribute to Allah that which they dislike, and their tongues assert the lie that they will have the best [from Him]. Assuredly, they will have the Fire, and they will be [therein] neglected.
ayahs.n: and they attribute to allah that which they dislike and their tongues assert the lie that they will have the best from him assuredly they will have the fire and they will be therein neglected

ayahs.t: By Allah, We did certainly send [messengers] to nations before you, but Satan made their deeds attractive to them. And he is the disbelievers' ally today [as well], and they will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: by allah we did certainly send messengers to nations before you but satan made their deeds attractive to them and he is the disbelievers ally today as well and they will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And We have not revealed to you the Book, [O Muhammad], except for you to make clear to them that wherein they have differed and as guidance and mercy for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: and we have not revealed to you the book o muhammad except for you to make clear to them that wherein they have differed and as guidance and mercy for a people who believe

ayahs.t: And Allah has sent down rain from the sky and given life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who listen.
ayahs.n: and allah has sent down rain from the sky and given life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness indeed in that is a sign for a people who listen

ayahs.t: And indeed, for you in grazing livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from what is in their bellies - between excretion and blood - pure milk, palatable to drinkers.
ayahs.n: and indeed for you in grazing livestock is a lesson we give you drink from what is in their bellies between excretion and blood pure milk palatable to drinkers

ayahs.t: And from the fruits of the palm trees and grapevines you take intoxicant and good provision. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who reason.
ayahs.n: and from the fruits of the palm trees and grapevines you take intoxicant and good provision indeed in that is a sign for a people who reason

ayahs.t: And your Lord inspired to the bee, "Take for yourself among the mountains, houses, and among the trees and [in] that which they construct.
ayahs.n: and your lord inspired to the bee take for yourself among the mountains houses and among the trees and in that which they construct

ayahs.t: Then eat from all the fruits and follow the ways of your Lord laid down [for you]." There emerges from their bellies a drink, varying in colors, in which there is healing for people. Indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: then eat from all the fruits and follow the ways of your lord laid down for you there emerges from their bellies a drink varying in colors in which there is healing for people indeed in that is a sign for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: And Allah created you; then He will take you in death. And among you is he who is reversed to the most decrepit [old] age so that he will not know, after [having had] knowledge, a thing. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Competent.
ayahs.n: and allah created you then he will take you in death and among you is he who is reversed to the most decrepit old age so that he will not know after having had knowledge a thing indeed allah is knowing and competent

ayahs.t: And Allah has favored some of you over others in provision. But those who were favored would not hand over their provision to those whom their right hands possess so they would be equal to them therein. Then is it the favor of Allah they reject?
ayahs.n: and allah has favored some of you over others in provision but those who were favored would not hand over their provision to those whom their right hands possess so they would be equal to them therein then is it the favor of allah they reject

ayahs.t: And Allah has made for you from yourselves mates and has made for you from your mates sons and grandchildren and has provided for you from the good things. Then in falsehood do they believe and in the favor of Allah they disbelieve?
ayahs.n: and allah has made for you from yourselves mates and has made for you from your mates sons and grandchildren and has provided for you from the good things then in falsehood do they believe and in the favor of allah they disbelieve

ayahs.t: And they worship besides Allah that which does not possess for them [the power of] provision from the heavens and the earth at all, and [in fact], they are unable.
ayahs.n: and they worship besides allah that which does not possess for them the power of provision from the heavens and the earth at all and in fact they are unable

ayahs.t: So do not assert similarities to Allah. Indeed, Allah knows and you do not know.
ayahs.n: so do not assert similarities to allah indeed allah knows and you do not know

ayahs.t: Allah presents an example: a slave [who is] owned and unable to do a thing and he to whom We have provided from Us good provision, so he spends from it secretly and publicly. Can they be equal? Praise to Allah! But most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: allah presents an example a slave who is owned and unable to do a thing and he to whom we have provided from us good provision so he spends from it secretly and publicly can they be equal praise to allah but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: And Allah presents an example of two men, one of them dumb and unable to do a thing, while he is a burden to his guardian. Wherever he directs him, he brings no good. Is he equal to one who commands justice, while he is on a straight path?
