ayahs.t: [The Prophet] has said, "My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe."
ayahs.n: the prophet has said my lord judge between us in truth and our lord is the most merciful the one whose help is sought against that which you describe

ayahs.t: O mankind, fear your Lord. Indeed, the convulsion of the [final] Hour is a terrible thing.
ayahs.n: o mankind fear your lord indeed the convulsion of the final hour is a terrible thing

ayahs.t: On the Day you see it every nursing mother will be distracted from that [child] she was nursing, and every pregnant woman will abort her pregnancy, and you will see the people [appearing] intoxicated while they are not intoxicated; but the punishment of Allah is severe.
ayahs.n: on the day you see it every nursing mother will be distracted from that child she was nursing and every pregnant woman will abort her pregnancy and you will see the people appearing intoxicated while they are not intoxicated but the punishment of allah is severe

ayahs.t: And of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge and follows every rebellious devil.
ayahs.n: and of the people is he who disputes about allah without knowledge and follows every rebellious devil

ayahs.t: It has been decreed for every devil that whoever turns to him - he will misguide him and will lead him to the punishment of the Blaze.
ayahs.n: it has been decreed for every devil that whoever turns to him he will misguide him and will lead him to the punishment of the blaze

ayahs.t: O People, if you should be in doubt about the Resurrection, then [consider that] indeed, We created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot, and then from a lump of flesh, formed and unformed - that We may show you. And We settle in the wombs whom We will for a specified term, then We bring you out as a child, and then [We develop you] that you may reach your [time of] maturity. And among you is he who is taken in [early] death, and among you is he who is returned to the most decrepit [old] age so that he knows, after [once having] knowledge, nothing. And you see the earth barren, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and swells and grows [something] of every beautiful kind.
ayahs.n: o people if you should be in doubt about the resurrection then consider that indeed we created you from dust then from a sperm drop then from a clinging clot and then from a lump of flesh formed and unformed that we may show you and we settle in the wombs whom we will for a specified term then we bring you out as a child and then we develop you that you may reach your time of maturity and among you is he who is taken in early death and among you is he who is returned to the most decrepit old age so that he knows after once having knowledge nothing and you see the earth barren but when we send down upon it rain it quivers and swells and grows something of every beautiful kind

ayahs.t: That is because Allah is the Truth and because He gives life to the dead and because He is over all things competent
ayahs.n: that is because allah is the truth and because he gives life to the dead and because he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: And [that they may know] that the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - and that Allah will resurrect those in the graves.
ayahs.n: and that they may know that the hour is coming no doubt about it and that allah will resurrect those in the graves

ayahs.t: And of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening book [from Him],
ayahs.n: and of the people is he who disputes about allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening book from him

ayahs.t: Twisting his neck [in arrogance] to mislead [people] from the way of Allah. For him in the world is disgrace, and We will make him taste on the Day of Resurrection the punishment of the Burning Fire [while it is said],
ayahs.n: twisting his neck in arrogance to mislead people from the way of allah for him in the world is disgrace and we will make him taste on the day of resurrection the punishment of the burning fire while it is said

ayahs.t: "That is for what your hands have put forth and because Allah is not ever unjust to [His] servants."
ayahs.n: that is for what your hands have put forth and because allah is not ever unjust to his servants

ayahs.t: And of the people is he who worships Allah on an edge. If he is touched by good, he is reassured by it; but if he is struck by trial, he turns on his face [to the other direction]. He has lost [this] world and the Hereafter. That is what is the manifest loss.
ayahs.n: and of the people is he who worships allah on an edge if he is touched by good he is reassured by it but if he is struck by trial he turns on his face to the other direction he has lost this world and the hereafter that is what is the manifest loss

ayahs.t: He invokes instead of Allah that which neither harms him nor benefits him. That is what is the extreme error.
ayahs.n: he invokes instead of allah that which neither harms him nor benefits him that is what is the extreme error

ayahs.t: He invokes one whose harm is closer than his benefit - how wretched the protector and how wretched the associate.
ayahs.n: he invokes one whose harm is closer than his benefit how wretched the protector and how wretched the associate

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. Indeed, Allah does what He intends.
ayahs.n: indeed allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow indeed allah does what he intends

ayahs.t: Whoever should think that Allah will not support [Prophet Muhammad] in this world and the Hereafter - let him extend a rope to the ceiling, then cut off [his breath], and let him see: will his effort remove that which enrages [him]?
ayahs.n: whoever should think that allah will not support prophet muhammad in this world and the hereafter let him extend a rope to the ceiling then cut off his breath and let him see will his effort remove that which enrages him

ayahs.t: And thus have We sent the Qur'an down as verses of clear evidence and because Allah guides whom He intends.
ayahs.n: and thus have we sent the quran down as verses of clear evidence and because allah guides whom he intends

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have believed and those who were Jews and the Sabeans and the Christians and the Magians and those who associated with Allah - Allah will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allah is, over all things, Witness.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have believed and those who were jews and the sabeans and the christians and the magians and those who associated with allah allah will judge between them on the day of resurrection indeed allah is over all things witness

ayahs.t: Do you not see that to Allah prostrates whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth and the sun, the moon, the stars, the mountains, the trees, the moving creatures and many of the people? But upon many the punishment has been justified. And he whom Allah humiliates - for him there is no bestower of honor. Indeed, Allah does what He wills.
ayahs.n: do you not see that to allah prostrates whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth and the sun the moon the stars the mountains the trees the moving creatures and many of the people but upon many the punishment has been justified and he whom allah humiliates for him there is no bestower of honor indeed allah does what he wills

ayahs.t: These are two adversaries who have disputed over their Lord. But those who disbelieved will have cut out for them garments of fire. Poured upon their heads will be scalding water
ayahs.n: these are two adversaries who have disputed over their lord but those who disbelieved will have cut out for them garments of fire poured upon their heads will be scalding water

ayahs.t: By which is melted that within their bellies and [their] skins.
ayahs.n: by which is melted that within their bellies and their skins

ayahs.t: And for [striking] them are maces of iron.
ayahs.n: and for striking them are maces of iron

ayahs.t: Every time they want to get out of Hellfire from anguish, they will be returned to it, and [it will be said], "Taste the punishment of the Burning Fire!"
ayahs.n: every time they want to get out of hellfire from anguish they will be returned to it and it will be said taste the punishment of the burning fire

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearl, and their garments therein will be silk.
ayahs.n: indeed allah will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow they will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearl and their garments therein will be silk

ayahs.t: And they had been guided [in worldly life] to good speech, and they were guided to the path of the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: and they had been guided in worldly life to good speech and they were guided to the path of the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have disbelieved and avert [people] from the way of Allah and [from] al-Masjid al-Haram, which We made for the people - equal are the resident therein and one from outside; and [also] whoever intends [a deed] therein of deviation [in religion] or wrongdoing - We will make him taste of a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have disbelieved and avert people from the way of allah and from al masjid al haram which we made for the people equal are the resident therein and one from outside and also whoever intends a deed therein of deviation in religion or wrongdoing we will make him taste of a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We designated for Abraham the site of the House, [saying], "Do not associate anything with Me and purify My House for those who perform Tawaf and those who stand [in prayer] and those who bow and prostrate.
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when we designated for abraham the site of the house saying do not associate anything with me and purify my house for those who perform tawaf and those who stand in prayer and those who bow and prostrate

ayahs.t: And proclaim to the people the Hajj [pilgrimage]; they will come to you on foot and on every lean camel; they will come from every distant pass -
ayahs.n: and proclaim to the people the hajj pilgrimage they will come to you on foot and on every lean camel they will come from every distant pass

ayahs.t: That they may witness benefits for themselves and mention the name of Allah on known days over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. So eat of them and feed the miserable and poor.
ayahs.n: that they may witness benefits for themselves and mention the name of allah on known days over what he has provided for them of sacrificial animals so eat of them and feed the miserable and poor

ayahs.t: Then let them end their untidiness and fulfill their vows and perform Tawaf around the ancient House."
ayahs.n: then let them end their untidiness and fulfill their vows and perform tawaf around the ancient house

ayahs.t: That [has been commanded], and whoever honors the sacred ordinances of Allah - it is best for him in the sight of his Lord. And permitted to you are the grazing livestock, except what is recited to you. So avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement,
ayahs.n: that has been commanded and whoever honors the sacred ordinances of allah it is best for him in the sight of his lord and permitted to you are the grazing livestock except what is recited to you so avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement

ayahs.t: Inclining [only] to Allah, not associating [anything] with Him. And he who associates with Allah - it is as though he had fallen from the sky and was snatched by the birds or the wind carried him down into a remote place.
ayahs.n: inclining only to allah not associating anything with him and he who associates with allah it is as though he had fallen from the sky and was snatched by the birds or the wind carried him down into a remote place

ayahs.t: That [is so]. And whoever honors the symbols of Allah - indeed, it is from the piety of hearts.
ayahs.n: that is so and whoever honors the symbols of allah indeed it is from the piety of hearts

ayahs.t: For you the animals marked for sacrifice are benefits for a specified term; then their place of sacrifice is at the ancient House.
ayahs.n: for you the animals marked for sacrifice are benefits for a specified term then their place of sacrifice is at the ancient house

ayahs.t: And for all religion We have appointed a rite [of sacrifice] that they may mention the name of Allah over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. For your god is one God, so to Him submit. And, [O Muhammad], give good tidings to the humble [before their Lord]
ayahs.n: and for all religion we have appointed a rite of sacrifice that they may mention the name of allah over what he has provided for them of sacrificial animals for your god is one god so to him submit and o muhammad give good tidings to the humble before their lord

ayahs.t: Who, when Allah is mentioned, their hearts are fearful, and [to] the patient over what has afflicted them, and the establishers of prayer and those who spend from what We have provided them.
ayahs.n: who when allah is mentioned their hearts are fearful and to the patient over what has afflicted them and the establishers of prayer and those who spend from what we have provided them

ayahs.t: And the camels and cattle We have appointed for you as among the symbols of Allah; for you therein is good. So mention the name of Allah upon them when lined up [for sacrifice]; and when they are [lifeless] on their sides, then eat from them and feed the needy and the beggar. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may be grateful.
ayahs.n: and the camels and cattle we have appointed for you as among the symbols of allah for you therein is good so mention the name of allah upon them when lined up for sacrifice and when they are lifeless on their sides then eat from them and feed the needy and the beggar thus have we subjected them to you that you may be grateful

ayahs.t: Their meat will not reach Allah, nor will their blood, but what reaches Him is piety from you. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may glorify Allah for that [to] which He has guided you; and give good tidings to the doers of good.
ayahs.n: their meat will not reach allah nor will their blood but what reaches him is piety from you thus have we subjected them to you that you may glorify allah for that to which he has guided you and give good tidings to the doers of good

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah defends those who have believed. Indeed, Allah does not like everyone treacherous and ungrateful.
ayahs.n: indeed allah defends those who have believed indeed allah does not like everyone treacherous and ungrateful

ayahs.t: Permission [to fight] has been given to those who are being fought, because they were wronged. And indeed, Allah is competent to give them victory.
ayahs.n: permission to fight has been given to those who are being fought because they were wronged and indeed allah is competent to give them victory

ayahs.t: [They are] those who have been evicted from their homes without right - only because they say, "Our Lord is Allah." And were it not that Allah checks the people, some by means of others, there would have been demolished monasteries, churches, synagogues, and mosques in which the name of Allah is much mentioned. And Allah will surely support those who support Him. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: they are those who have been evicted from their homes without right only because they say our lord is allah and were it not that allah checks the people some by means of others there would have been demolished monasteries churches synagogues and mosques in which the name of allah is much mentioned and allah will surely support those who support him indeed allah is powerful and exalted in might

ayahs.t: [And they are] those who, if We give them authority in the land, establish prayer and give zakah and enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong. And to Allah belongs the outcome of [all] matters.
ayahs.n: and they are those who if we give them authority in the land establish prayer and give zakah and enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong and to allah belongs the outcome of all matters

ayahs.t: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - so, before them, did the people of Noah and 'Aad and Thamud deny [their prophets],
ayahs.n: and if they deny you o muhammad so before them did the people of noah and aad and thamud deny their prophets

ayahs.t: And the people of Abraham and the people of Lot
ayahs.n: and the people of abraham and the people of lot

ayahs.t: And the inhabitants of Madyan. And Moses was denied, so I prolonged enjoyment for the disbelievers; then I seized them, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
ayahs.n: and the inhabitants of madyan and moses was denied so i prolonged enjoyment for the disbelievers then i seized them and how terrible was my reproach

ayahs.t: And how many a city did We destroy while it was committing wrong - so it is [now] fallen into ruin - and [how many] an abandoned well and [how many] a lofty palace.
ayahs.n: and how many a city did we destroy while it was committing wrong so it is now fallen into ruin and how many an abandoned well and how many a lofty palace

ayahs.t: So have they not traveled through the earth and have hearts by which to reason and ears by which to hear? For indeed, it is not eyes that are blinded, but blinded are the hearts which are within the breasts.
ayahs.n: so have they not traveled through the earth and have hearts by which to reason and ears by which to hear for indeed it is not eyes that are blinded but blinded are the hearts which are within the breasts

ayahs.t: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. But Allah will never fail in His promise. And indeed, a day with your Lord is like a thousand years of those which you count.
ayahs.n: and they urge you to hasten the punishment but allah will never fail in his promise and indeed a day with your lord is like a thousand years of those which you count

ayahs.t: And for how many a city did I prolong enjoyment while it was committing wrong. Then I seized it, and to Me is the [final] destination.
ayahs.n: and for how many a city did i prolong enjoyment while it was committing wrong then i seized it and to me is the final destination

ayahs.t: Say, "O people, I am only to you a clear warner."
ayahs.n: say o people i am only to you a clear warner

ayahs.t: And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - for them is forgiveness and noble provision.
ayahs.n: and those who have believed and done righteous deeds for them is forgiveness and noble provision

ayahs.t: But the ones who strove against Our verses, [seeking] to cause failure - those are the companions of Hellfire.
ayahs.n: but the ones who strove against our verses seeking to cause failure those are the companions of hellfire

ayahs.t: And We did not send before you any messenger or prophet except that when he spoke [or recited], Satan threw into it [some misunderstanding]. But Allah abolishes that which Satan throws in; then Allah makes precise His verses. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: and we did not send before you any messenger or prophet except that when he spoke or recited satan threw into it some misunderstanding but allah abolishes that which satan throws in then allah makes precise his verses and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: [That is] so He may make what Satan throws in a trial for those within whose hearts is disease and those hard of heart. And indeed, the wrongdoers are in extreme dissension.
ayahs.n: that is so he may make what satan throws in a trial for those within whose hearts is disease and those hard of heart and indeed the wrongdoers are in extreme dissension

ayahs.t: And so those who were given knowledge may know that it is the truth from your Lord and [therefore] believe in it, and their hearts humbly submit to it. And indeed is Allah the Guide of those who have believed to a straight path.
ayahs.n: and so those who were given knowledge may know that it is the truth from your lord and therefore believe in it and their hearts humbly submit to it and indeed is allah the guide of those who have believed to a straight path

ayahs.t: But those who disbelieve will not cease to be in doubt of it until the Hour comes upon them unexpectedly or there comes to them the punishment of a barren Day.
ayahs.n: but those who disbelieve will not cease to be in doubt of it until the hour comes upon them unexpectedly or there comes to them the punishment of a barren day

ayahs.t: [All] sovereignty that Day is for Allah; He will judge between them. So they who believed and did righteous deeds will be in the Gardens of Pleasure.
ayahs.n: all sovereignty that day is for allah he will judge between them so they who believed and did righteous deeds will be in the gardens of pleasure

ayahs.t: And they who disbelieved and denied Our signs - for those there will be a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: and they who disbelieved and denied our signs for those there will be a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: And those who emigrated for the cause of Allah and then were killed or died - Allah will surely provide for them a good provision. And indeed, it is Allah who is the best of providers.
ayahs.n: and those who emigrated for the cause of allah and then were killed or died allah will surely provide for them a good provision and indeed it is allah who is the best of providers

ayahs.t: He will surely cause them to enter an entrance with which they will be pleased, and indeed, Allah is Knowing and Forbearing.
ayahs.n: he will surely cause them to enter an entrance with which they will be pleased and indeed allah is knowing and forbearing

ayahs.t: That [is so]. And whoever responds [to injustice] with the equivalent of that with which he was harmed and then is tyrannized - Allah will surely aid him. Indeed, Allah is Pardoning and Forgiving.
ayahs.n: that is so and whoever responds to injustice with the equivalent of that with which he was harmed and then is tyrannized allah will surely aid him indeed allah is pardoning and forgiving

ayahs.t: That is because Allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and because Allah is Hearing and Seeing.
ayahs.n: that is because allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and because allah is hearing and seeing

ayahs.t: That is because Allah is the Truth, and that which they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the Most High, the Grand.
ayahs.n: that is because allah is the truth and that which they call upon other than him is falsehood and because allah is the most high the grand

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah has sent down rain from the sky and the earth becomes green? Indeed, Allah is Subtle and Acquainted.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah has sent down rain from the sky and the earth becomes green indeed allah is subtle and acquainted

ayahs.t: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth. And indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: to him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and indeed allah is the free of need the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah has subjected to you whatever is on the earth and the ships which run through the sea by His command? And He restrains the sky from falling upon the earth, unless by His permission. Indeed Allah, to the people, is Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah has subjected to you whatever is on the earth and the ships which run through the sea by his command and he restrains the sky from falling upon the earth unless by his permission indeed allah to the people is kind and merciful

ayahs.t: And He is the one who gave you life; then He causes you to die and then will [again] give you life. Indeed, mankind is ungrateful.
ayahs.n: and he is the one who gave you life then he causes you to die and then will again give you life indeed mankind is ungrateful

ayahs.t: For every religion We have appointed rites which they perform. So, [O Muhammad], let the disbelievers not contend with you over the matter but invite them to your Lord. Indeed, you are upon straight guidance.
ayahs.n: for every religion we have appointed rites which they perform so o muhammad let the disbelievers not contend with you over the matter but invite them to your lord indeed you are upon straight guidance

ayahs.t: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allah is most knowing of what you do.
ayahs.n: and if they dispute with you then say allah is most knowing of what you do

ayahs.t: Allah will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."
ayahs.n: allah will judge between you on the day of resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ

ayahs.t: Do you not know that Allah knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allah, is easy.
ayahs.n: do you not know that allah knows what is in the heaven and earth indeed that is in a record indeed that for allah is easy

ayahs.t: And they worship besides Allah that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.
ayahs.n: and they worship besides allah that for which he has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge and there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper

ayahs.t: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, you recognize in the faces of those who disbelieve disapproval. They are almost on the verge of assaulting those who recite to them Our verses. Say, "Then shall I inform you of [what is] worse than that? [It is] the Fire which Allah has promised those who disbelieve, and wretched is the destination."
ayahs.n: and when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences you recognize in the faces of those who disbelieve disapproval they are almost on the verge of assaulting those who recite to them our verses say then shall i inform you of what is worse than that it is the fire which allah has promised those who disbelieve and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: O people, an example is presented, so listen to it. Indeed, those you invoke besides Allah will never create [as much as] a fly, even if they gathered together for that purpose. And if the fly should steal away from them a [tiny] thing, they could not recover it from him. Weak are the pursuer and pursued.
ayahs.n: o people an example is presented so listen to it indeed those you invoke besides allah will never create as much as a fly even if they gathered together for that purpose and if the fly should steal away from them a tiny thing they could not recover it from him weak are the pursuer and pursued

ayahs.t: They have not appraised Allah with true appraisal. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: they have not appraised allah with true appraisal indeed allah is powerful and exalted in might

ayahs.t: Allah chooses from the angels messengers and from the people. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing.
ayahs.n: allah chooses from the angels messengers and from the people indeed allah is hearing and seeing

ayahs.t: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allah will be returned [all] matters.
ayahs.n: he knows what is presently before them and what will be after them and to allah will be returned all matters

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed bow and prostrate and worship your lord and do good that you may succeed

ayahs.t: And strive for Allah with the striving due to Him. He has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty. [It is] the religion of your father, Abraham. Allah named you "Muslims" before [in former scriptures] and in this [revelation] that the Messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people. So establish prayer and give zakah and hold fast to Allah. He is your protector; and excellent is the protector, and excellent is the helper.
ayahs.n: and strive for allah with the striving due to him he has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty it is the religion of your father abraham allah named you muslims before in former scriptures and in this revelation that the messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people so establish prayer and give zakah and hold fast to allah he is your protector and excellent is the protector and excellent is the helper

ayahs.t: Certainly will the believers have succeeded:
ayahs.n: certainly will the believers have succeeded

ayahs.t: They who are during their prayer humbly submissive
ayahs.n: they who are during their prayer humbly submissive

ayahs.t: And they who turn away from ill speech
ayahs.n: and they who turn away from ill speech

ayahs.t: And they who are observant of zakah
ayahs.n: and they who are observant of zakah

ayahs.t: And they who guard their private parts
ayahs.n: and they who guard their private parts

ayahs.t: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they will not be blamed -
ayahs.n: except from their wives or those their right hands possess for indeed they will not be blamed

ayahs.t: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors -
ayahs.n: but whoever seeks beyond that then those are the transgressors

ayahs.t: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive
ayahs.n: and they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive

ayahs.t: And they who carefully maintain their prayers -
ayahs.n: and they who carefully maintain their prayers

ayahs.t: Those are the inheritors
ayahs.n: those are the inheritors

ayahs.t: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: who will inherit al firdaus they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay.
ayahs.n: and certainly did we create man from an extract of clay

ayahs.t: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging.
ayahs.n: then we placed him as a sperm drop in a firm lodging

ayahs.t: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allah, the best of creators.
ayahs.n: then we made the sperm drop into a clinging clot and we made the clot into a lump of flesh and we made from the lump bones and we covered the bones with flesh then we developed him into another creation so blessed is allah the best of creators

ayahs.t: Then indeed, after that you are to die.
ayahs.n: then indeed after that you are to die

ayahs.t: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected.
ayahs.n: then indeed you on the day of resurrection will be resurrected

ayahs.t: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.
ayahs.n: and we have created above you seven layered heavens and never have we been of our creation unaware

ayahs.t: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.
ayahs.n: and we have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth and indeed we are able to take it away

ayahs.t: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.
ayahs.n: and we brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat

ayahs.t: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food for those who eat.
ayahs.n: and we brought forth a tree issuing from mount sinai which produces oil and food for those who eat

ayahs.t: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.
ayahs.n: and indeed for you in livestock is a lesson we give you drink from that which is in their bellies and for you in them are numerous benefits and from them you eat

ayahs.t: And upon them and on ships you are carried.
ayahs.n: and upon them and on ships you are carried

ayahs.t: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"
ayahs.n: and we had certainly sent noah to his people and he said o my people worship allah you have no deity other than him then will you not fear him

ayahs.t: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allah had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.
ayahs.n: but the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said this is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you and if allah had willed to send a messenger he would have sent down angels we have not heard of this among our forefathers

ayahs.t: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time."
ayahs.n: he is not but a man possessed with madness so wait concerning him for a time

ayahs.t: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."
ayahs.n: noah said my lord support me because they have denied me

ayahs.t: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation, and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into the ship from each [creature] two mates and your family, except those for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.
ayahs.n: so we inspired to him construct the ship under our observation and our inspiration and when our command comes and the oven overflows put into the ship from each creature two mates and your family except those for whom the decree of destruction has proceeded and do not address me concerning those who have wronged indeed they are to be drowned

ayahs.t: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allah who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'
ayahs.n: and when you have boarded the ship you and those with you then say praise to allah who has saved us from the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].' "
ayahs.n: and say my lord let me land at a blessed landing place and you are the best to accommodate us

ayahs.t: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].
ayahs.n: indeed in that are signs and indeed we are ever testing our servants

ayahs.t: Then We produced after them a generation of others.
ayahs.n: then we produced after them a generation of others

ayahs.t: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"
ayahs.n: and we sent among them a messenger from themselves saying worship allah you have no deity other than him then will you not fear him

ayahs.t: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.
ayahs.n: and the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the hereafter while we had given them luxury in the worldly life said this is not but a man like yourselves he eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink

ayahs.t: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.
ayahs.n: and if you should obey a man like yourselves indeed you would then be losers

ayahs.t: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?
ayahs.n: does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth once more

ayahs.t: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.
ayahs.n: how far how far is that which you are promised

ayahs.t: Life is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.
ayahs.n: life is not but our worldly life we die and live but we will not be resurrected

ayahs.t: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allah, and we will not believe him."
ayahs.n: he is not but a man who has invented a lie about allah and we will not believe him

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."
ayahs.n: he said my lord support me because they have denied me

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."
ayahs.n: allah said after a little they will surely become regretful

ayahs.t: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.
ayahs.n: so the shriek seized them in truth and we made them as plant stubble then away with the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: Then We produced after them other generations.
ayahs.n: then we produced after them other generations

ayahs.t: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].
ayahs.n: no nation will precede its time of termination nor will they remain thereafter

ayahs.t: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe.
ayahs.n: then we sent our messengers in succession every time there came to a nation its messenger they denied him so we made them follow one another to destruction and we made them narrations so away with a people who do not believe

ayahs.t: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority
ayahs.n: then we sent moses and his brother aaron with our signs and a clear authority

ayahs.t: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.
ayahs.n: to pharaoh and his establishment but they were arrogant and were a haughty people

ayahs.t: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"
ayahs.n: they said should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude

ayahs.t: So they denied them and were of those destroyed.
ayahs.n: so they denied them and were of those destroyed

ayahs.t: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.
ayahs.n: and we certainly gave moses the scripture that perhaps they would be guided

ayahs.t: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.
ayahs.n: and we made the son of mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level areas and flowing water

ayahs.t: [Allah said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed, I, of what you do, am Knowing.
ayahs.n: allah said o messengers eat from the good foods and work righteousness indeed i of what you do am knowing

ayahs.t: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."
ayahs.n: and indeed this your religion is one religion and i am your lord so fear me

ayahs.t: But the people divided their religion among them into sects - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing.
ayahs.n: but the people divided their religion among them into sects each faction in what it has rejoicing

ayahs.t: So leave them in their confusion for a time.
ayahs.n: so leave them in their confusion for a time

ayahs.t: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children
ayahs.n: do they think that what we extend to them of wealth and children

ayahs.t: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.
ayahs.n: is because we hasten for them good things rather they do not perceive

ayahs.t: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord
ayahs.n: indeed they who are apprehensive from fear of their lord

ayahs.t: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord
ayahs.n: and they who believe in the signs of their lord

ayahs.t: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord
ayahs.n: and they who do not associate anything with their lord

ayahs.t: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -
ayahs.n: and they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their lord

ayahs.t: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.
ayahs.n: it is those who hasten to good deeds and they outstrip others therein

ayahs.t: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.
ayahs.n: and we charge no soul except with that within its capacity and with us is a record which speaks with truth and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides disbelief which they are doing,
ayahs.n: but their hearts are covered with confusion over this and they have evil deeds besides disbelief which they are doing

ayahs.t: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allah] for help.
ayahs.n: until when we seize their affluent ones with punishment at once they are crying to allah for help

ayahs.t: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.
ayahs.n: do not cry out today indeed by us you will not be helped

ayahs.t: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels
ayahs.n: my verses had already been recited to you but you were turning back on your heels

ayahs.t: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.
ayahs.n: in arrogance regarding it conversing by night speaking evil

ayahs.t: Then have they not reflected over the Qur'an, or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?
ayahs.n: then have they not reflected over the quran or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers

ayahs.t: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?
ayahs.n: or did they not know their messenger so they are toward him disacknowledging

ayahs.t: Or do they say, "In him is madness?" Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.
ayahs.n: or do they say in him is madness rather he brought them the truth but most of them to the truth are averse

ayahs.t: But if the Truth had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.
ayahs.n: but if the truth had followed their inclinations the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined rather we have brought them their message but they from their message are turning away

ayahs.t: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.
ayahs.n: or do you o muhammad ask them for payment but the reward of your lord is best and he is the best of providers

ayahs.t: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.
ayahs.n: and indeed you invite them to a straight path

ayahs.t: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.
ayahs.n: but indeed those who do not believe in the hereafter are deviating from the path

ayahs.t: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.
ayahs.n: and even if we gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction they would persist in their transgression wandering blindly

ayahs.t: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]
ayahs.n: and we had gripped them with suffering as a warning but they did not yield to their lord nor did they humbly supplicate and will continue thus

ayahs.t: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.
ayahs.n: until when we have opened before them a door of severe punishment immediately they will be therein in despair

ayahs.t: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful.
ayahs.n: and it is he who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts little are you grateful

ayahs.t: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.
ayahs.n: and it is he who has multiplied you throughout the earth and to him you will be gathered

ayahs.t: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason?
ayahs.n: and it is he who gives life and causes death and his is the alternation of the night and the day then will you not reason

ayahs.t: Rather, they say like what the former peoples said.
ayahs.n: rather they say like what the former peoples said

ayahs.t: They said, "When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
ayahs.n: they said when we have died and become dust and bones are we indeed to be resurrected

ayahs.t: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples."
ayahs.n: we have been promised this we and our forefathers before this is not but legends of the former peoples

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know?"
ayahs.n: say o muhammad to whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it if you should know

ayahs.t: They will say, "To Allah." Say, "Then will you not remember?"
ayahs.n: they will say to allah say then will you not remember

ayahs.t: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne?"
ayahs.n: say who is lord of the seven heavens and lord of the great throne

ayahs.t: They will say, "[They belong] to Allah." Say, "Then will you not fear Him?"
ayahs.n: they will say they belong to allah say then will you not fear him

ayahs.t: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know?"
ayahs.n: say in whose hand is the realm of all things and he protects while none can protect against him if you should know

ayahs.t: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allah." Say, "Then how are you deluded?"
ayahs.n: they will say all belongs to allah say then how are you deluded

ayahs.t: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.
ayahs.n: rather we have brought them the truth and indeed they are liars

ayahs.t: Allah has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have sought to overcome others. Exalted is Allah above what they describe [concerning Him].
ayahs.n: allah has not taken any son nor has there ever been with him any deity if there had been then each deity would have taken what it created and some of them would have sought to overcome others exalted is allah above what they describe concerning him

ayahs.t: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him].
ayahs.n: he is knower of the unseen and the witnessed so high is he above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised,
ayahs.n: say o muhammad my lord if you should show me that which they are promised

ayahs.t: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people."
ayahs.n: my lord then do not place me among the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: And indeed, We are able to show you what We have promised them.
ayahs.n: and indeed we are able to show you what we have promised them

ayahs.t: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe.
ayahs.n: repel by means of what is best their evil we are most knowing of what they describe

ayahs.t: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils,
ayahs.n: and say my lord i seek refuge in you from the incitements of the devils

ayahs.t: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me."
ayahs.n: and i seek refuge in you my lord lest they be present with me

ayahs.t: [For such is the state of the disbelievers], until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back
ayahs.n: for such is the state of the disbelievers until when death comes to one of them he says my lord send me back

ayahs.t: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected.
ayahs.n: that i might do righteousness in that which i left behind no it is only a word he is saying and behind them is a barrier until the day they are resurrected

ayahs.t: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another.
ayahs.n: so when the horn is blown no relationship will there be among them that day nor will they ask about one another

ayahs.t: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful.
ayahs.n: and those whose scales are heavy with good deeds it is they who are the successful

ayahs.t: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally.
ayahs.n: but those whose scales are light those are the ones who have lost their souls being in hell abiding eternally

ayahs.t: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles.
ayahs.n: the fire will sear their faces and they therein will have taut smiles

ayahs.t: [It will be said]. "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them?"
ayahs.n: it will be said were not my verses recited to you and you used to deny them

ayahs.t: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray.
ayahs.n: they will say our lord our wretchedness overcame us and we were a people astray

ayahs.t: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers."
ayahs.n: our lord remove us from it and if we were to return to evil we would indeed be wrongdoers

ayahs.t: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me.
ayahs.n: he will say remain despised therein and do not speak to me

ayahs.t: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.'
ayahs.n: indeed there was a party of my servants who said our lord we have believed so forgive us and have mercy upon us and you are the best of the merciful

ayahs.t: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.
ayahs.n: but you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget my remembrance and you used to laugh at them

ayahs.t: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]."
ayahs.n: indeed i have rewarded them this day for their patient endurance that they are the attainers of success

ayahs.t: [Allah] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years?"
ayahs.n: allah will say how long did you remain on earth in number of years

ayahs.t: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."
ayahs.n: they will say we remained a day or part of a day ask those who enumerate

ayahs.t: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.
ayahs.n: he will say you stayed not but a little if only you had known

ayahs.t: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"
ayahs.n: then did you think that we created you uselessly and that to us you would not be returned

ayahs.t: So exalted is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.
ayahs.n: so exalted is allah the sovereign the truth there is no deity except him lord of the noble throne

ayahs.t: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.
ayahs.n: and whoever invokes besides allah another deity for which he has no proof then his account is only with his lord indeed the disbelievers will not succeed

ayahs.t: And, [O Muhammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."
ayahs.n: and o muhammad say my lord forgive and have mercy and you are the best of the merciful

ayahs.t: [This is] a surah which We have sent down and made [that within it] obligatory and revealed therein verses of clear evidence that you might remember.
ayahs.n: this is a surah which we have sent down and made that within it obligatory and revealed therein verses of clear evidence that you might remember

ayahs.t: The [unmarried] woman or [unmarried] man found guilty of sexual intercourse - lash each one of them with a hundred lashes, and do not be taken by pity for them in the religion of Allah, if you should believe in Allah and the Last Day. And let a group of the believers witness their punishment.
ayahs.n: the unmarried woman or unmarried man found guilty of sexual intercourse lash each one of them with a hundred lashes and do not be taken by pity for them in the religion of allah if you should believe in allah and the last day and let a group of the believers witness their punishment

ayahs.t: The fornicator does not marry except a [female] fornicator or polytheist, and none marries her except a fornicator or a polytheist, and that has been made unlawful to the believers.
ayahs.n: the fornicator does not marry except a female fornicator or polytheist and none marries her except a fornicator or a polytheist and that has been made unlawful to the believers

ayahs.t: And those who accuse chaste women and then do not produce four witnesses - lash them with eighty lashes and do not accept from them testimony ever after. And those are the defiantly disobedient,
ayahs.n: and those who accuse chaste women and then do not produce four witnesses lash them with eighty lashes and do not accept from them testimony ever after and those are the defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Except for those who repent thereafter and reform, for indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: except for those who repent thereafter and reform for indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And those who accuse their wives [of adultery] and have no witnesses except themselves - then the witness of one of them [shall be] four testimonies [swearing] by Allah that indeed, he is of the truthful.
ayahs.n: and those who accuse their wives of adultery and have no witnesses except themselves then the witness of one of them shall be four testimonies swearing by allah that indeed he is of the truthful

ayahs.t: And the fifth [oath will be] that the curse of Allah be upon him if he should be among the liars.
ayahs.n: and the fifth oath will be that the curse of allah be upon him if he should be among the liars

ayahs.t: But it will prevent punishment from her if she gives four testimonies [swearing] by Allah that indeed, he is of the liars.
ayahs.n: but it will prevent punishment from her if she gives four testimonies swearing by allah that indeed he is of the liars

ayahs.t: And the fifth [oath will be] that the wrath of Allah be upon her if he was of the truthful.
ayahs.n: and the fifth oath will be that the wrath of allah be upon her if he was of the truthful

ayahs.t: And if not for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy... and because Allah is Accepting of repentance and Wise.
ayahs.n: and if not for the favor of allah upon you and his mercy and because allah is accepting of repentance and wise

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who came with falsehood are a group among you. Do not think it bad for you; rather it is good for you. For every person among them is what [punishment] he has earned from the sin, and he who took upon himself the greater portion thereof - for him is a great punishment.
ayahs.n: indeed those who came with falsehood are a group among you do not think it bad for you rather it is good for you for every person among them is what punishment he has earned from the sin and he who took upon himself the greater portion thereof for him is a great punishment

ayahs.t: Why, when you heard it, did not the believing men and believing women think good of one another and say, "This is an obvious falsehood"?
ayahs.n: why when you heard it did not the believing men and believing women think good of one another and say this is an obvious falsehood

ayahs.t: Why did they [who slandered] not produce for it four witnesses? And when they do not produce the witnesses, then it is they, in the sight of Allah, who are the liars.
ayahs.n: why did they who slandered not produce for it four witnesses and when they do not produce the witnesses then it is they in the sight of allah who are the liars

ayahs.t: And if it had not been for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy in this world and the Hereafter, you would have been touched for that [lie] in which you were involved by a great punishment
ayahs.n: and if it had not been for the favor of allah upon you and his mercy in this world and the hereafter you would have been touched for that lie in which you were involved by a great punishment

ayahs.t: When you received it with your tongues and said with your mouths that of which you had no knowledge and thought it was insignificant while it was, in the sight of Allah, tremendous.
ayahs.n: when you received it with your tongues and said with your mouths that of which you had no knowledge and thought it was insignificant while it was in the sight of allah tremendous

ayahs.t: And why, when you heard it, did you not say, "It is not for us to speak of this. Exalted are You, [O Allah]; this is a great slander"?
ayahs.n: and why when you heard it did you not say it is not for us to speak of this exalted are you o allah this is a great slander

ayahs.t: Allah warns you against returning to the likes of this [conduct], ever, if you should be believers.
ayahs.n: allah warns you against returning to the likes of this conduct ever if you should be believers

ayahs.t: And Allah makes clear to you the verses, and Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: and allah makes clear to you the verses and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who like that immorality should be spread [or publicized] among those who have believed will have a painful punishment in this world and the Hereafter. And Allah knows and you do not know.
ayahs.n: indeed those who like that immorality should be spread or publicized among those who have believed will have a painful punishment in this world and the hereafter and allah knows and you do not know

ayahs.t: And if it had not been for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy... and because Allah is Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and if it had not been for the favor of allah upon you and his mercy and because allah is kind and merciful

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, do not follow the footsteps of Satan. And whoever follows the footsteps of Satan - indeed, he enjoins immorality and wrongdoing. And if not for the favor of Allah upon you and His mercy, not one of you would have been pure, ever, but Allah purifies whom He wills, and Allah is Hearing and Knowing.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed do not follow the footsteps of satan and whoever follows the footsteps of satan indeed he enjoins immorality and wrongdoing and if not for the favor of allah upon you and his mercy not one of you would have been pure ever but allah purifies whom he wills and allah is hearing and knowing

ayahs.t: And let not those of virtue among you and wealth swear not to give [aid] to their relatives and the needy and the emigrants for the cause of Allah, and let them pardon and overlook. Would you not like that Allah should forgive you? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: and let not those of virtue among you and wealth swear not to give aid to their relatives and the needy and the emigrants for the cause of allah and let them pardon and overlook would you not like that allah should forgive you and allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who [falsely] accuse chaste, unaware and believing women are cursed in this world and the Hereafter; and they will have a great punishment
ayahs.n: indeed those who falsely accuse chaste unaware and believing women are cursed in this world and the hereafter and they will have a great punishment

ayahs.t: On a Day when their tongues, their hands and their feet will bear witness against them as to what they used to do.
ayahs.n: on a day when their tongues their hands and their feet will bear witness against them as to what they used to do

ayahs.t: That Day, Allah will pay them in full their deserved recompense, and they will know that it is Allah who is the perfect in justice.
ayahs.n: that day allah will pay them in full their deserved recompense and they will know that it is allah who is the perfect in justice

ayahs.t: Evil words are for evil men, and evil men are [subjected] to evil words. And good words are for good men, and good men are [an object] of good words. Those [good people] are declared innocent of what the slanderers say. For them is forgiveness and noble provision.
ayahs.n: evil words are for evil men and evil men are subjected to evil words and good words are for good men and good men are an object of good words those good people are declared innocent of what the slanderers say for them is forgiveness and noble provision

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, do not enter houses other than your own houses until you ascertain welcome and greet their inhabitants. That is best for you; perhaps you will be reminded.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed do not enter houses other than your own houses until you ascertain welcome and greet their inhabitants that is best for you perhaps you will be reminded

ayahs.t: And if you do not find anyone therein, do not enter them until permission has been given you. And if it is said to you, "Go back," then go back; it is purer for you. And Allah is Knowing of what you do.
ayahs.n: and if you do not find anyone therein do not enter them until permission has been given you and if it is said to you go back then go back it is purer for you and allah is knowing of what you do

ayahs.t: There is no blame upon you for entering houses not inhabited in which there is convenience for you. And Allah knows what you reveal and what you conceal.
ayahs.n: there is no blame upon you for entering houses not inhabited in which there is convenience for you and allah knows what you reveal and what you conceal

ayahs.t: Tell the believing men to reduce [some] of their vision and guard their private parts. That is purer for them. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what they do.
ayahs.n: tell the believing men to reduce some of their vision and guard their private parts that is purer for them indeed allah is acquainted with what they do

ayahs.t: And tell the believing women to reduce [some] of their vision and guard their private parts and not expose their adornment except that which [necessarily] appears thereof and to wrap [a portion of] their headcovers over their chests and not expose their adornment except to their husbands, their fathers, their husbands' fathers, their sons, their husbands' sons, their brothers, their brothers' sons, their sisters' sons, their women, that which their right hands possess, or those male attendants having no physical desire, or children who are not yet aware of the private aspects of women. And let them not stamp their feet to make known what they conceal of their adornment. And turn to Allah in repentance, all of you, O believers, that you might succeed.
ayahs.n: and tell the believing women to reduce some of their vision and guard their private parts and not expose their adornment except that which necessarily appears thereof and to wrap a portion of their headcovers over their chests and not expose their adornment except to their husbands their fathers their husbands fathers their sons their husbands sons their brothers their brothers sons their sisters sons their women that which their right hands possess or those male attendants having no physical desire or children who are not yet aware of the private aspects of women and let them not stamp their feet to make known what they conceal of their adornment and turn to allah in repentance all of you o believers that you might succeed

ayahs.t: And marry the unmarried among you and the righteous among your male slaves and female slaves. If they should be poor, Allah will enrich them from His bounty, and Allah is all-Encompassing and Knowing.
ayahs.n: and marry the unmarried among you and the righteous among your male slaves and female slaves if they should be poor allah will enrich them from his bounty and allah is all encompassing and knowing

ayahs.t: But let them who find not [the means for] marriage abstain [from sexual relations] until Allah enriches them from His bounty. And those who seek a contract [for eventual emancipation] from among whom your right hands possess - then make a contract with them if you know there is within them goodness and give them from the wealth of Allah which He has given you. And do not compel your slave girls to prostitution, if they desire chastity, to seek [thereby] the temporary interests of worldly life. And if someone should compel them, then indeed, Allah is [to them], after their compulsion, Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: but let them who find not the means for marriage abstain from sexual relations until allah enriches them from his bounty and those who seek a contract for eventual emancipation from among whom your right hands possess then make a contract with them if you know there is within them goodness and give them from the wealth of allah which he has given you and do not compel your slave girls to prostitution if they desire chastity to seek thereby the temporary interests of worldly life and if someone should compel them then indeed allah is to them after their compulsion forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And We have certainly sent down to you distinct verses and examples from those who passed on before you and an admonition for those who fear Allah.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly sent down to you distinct verses and examples from those who passed on before you and an admonition for those who fear allah

ayahs.t: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The example of His light is like a niche within which is a lamp, the lamp is within glass, the glass as if it were a pearly [white] star lit from [the oil of] a blessed olive tree, neither of the east nor of the west, whose oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whom He wills. And Allah presents examples for the people, and Allah is Knowing of all things.
ayahs.n: allah is the light of the heavens and the earth the example of his light is like a niche within which is a lamp the lamp is within glass the glass as if it were a pearly white star lit from the oil of a blessed olive tree neither of the east nor of the west whose oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire light upon light allah guides to his light whom he wills and allah presents examples for the people and allah is knowing of all things

ayahs.t: [Such niches are] in mosques which Allah has ordered to be raised and that His name be mentioned therein; exalting Him within them in the morning and the evenings
ayahs.n: such niches are in mosques which allah has ordered to be raised and that his name be mentioned therein exalting him within them in the morning and the evenings

ayahs.t: [Are] men whom neither commerce nor sale distracts from the remembrance of Allah and performance of prayer and giving of zakah. They fear a Day in which the hearts and eyes will [fearfully] turn about -
ayahs.n: are men whom neither commerce nor sale distracts from the remembrance of allah and performance of prayer and giving of zakah they fear a day in which the hearts and eyes will fearfully turn about

ayahs.t: That Allah may reward them [according to] the best of what they did and increase them from His bounty. And Allah gives provision to whom He wills without account.
ayahs.n: that allah may reward them according to the best of what they did and increase them from his bounty and allah gives provision to whom he wills without account

ayahs.t: But those who disbelieved - their deeds are like a mirage in a lowland which a thirsty one thinks is water until, when he comes to it, he finds it is nothing but finds Allah before Him, and He will pay him in full his due; and Allah is swift in account.
ayahs.n: but those who disbelieved their deeds are like a mirage in a lowland which a thirsty one thinks is water until when he comes to it he finds it is nothing but finds allah before him and he will pay him in full his due and allah is swift in account

ayahs.t: Or [they are] like darknesses within an unfathomable sea which is covered by waves, upon which are waves, over which are clouds - darknesses, some of them upon others. When one puts out his hand [therein], he can hardly see it. And he to whom Allah has not granted light - for him there is no light.
ayahs.n: or they are like darknesses within an unfathomable sea which is covered by waves upon which are waves over which are clouds darknesses some of them upon others when one puts out his hand therein he can hardly see it and he to whom allah has not granted light for him there is no light

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah is exalted by whomever is within the heavens and the earth and [by] the birds with wings spread [in flight]? Each [of them] has known his [means of] prayer and exalting [Him], and Allah is Knowing of what they do.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah is exalted by whomever is within the heavens and the earth and by the birds with wings spread in flight each of them has known his means of prayer and exalting him and allah is knowing of what they do

ayahs.t: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and to Allah is the destination.
ayahs.n: and to allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and to allah is the destination

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah drives clouds? Then He brings them together, then He makes them into a mass, and you see the rain emerge from within it. And He sends down from the sky, mountains [of clouds] within which is hail, and He strikes with it whom He wills and averts it from whom He wills. The flash of its lightening almost takes away the eyesight.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah drives clouds then he brings them together then he makes them into a mass and you see the rain emerge from within it and he sends down from the sky mountains of clouds within which is hail and he strikes with it whom he wills and averts it from whom he wills the flash of its lightening almost takes away the eyesight

ayahs.t: Allah alternates the night and the day. Indeed in that is a lesson for those who have vision.
ayahs.n: allah alternates the night and the day indeed in that is a lesson for those who have vision

ayahs.t: Allah has created every [living] creature from water. And of them are those that move on their bellies, and of them are those that walk on two legs, and of them are those that walk on four. Allah creates what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: allah has created every living creature from water and of them are those that move on their bellies and of them are those that walk on two legs and of them are those that walk on four allah creates what he wills indeed allah is over all things competent

ayahs.t: We have certainly sent down distinct verses. And Allah guides whom He wills to a straight path.
ayahs.n: we have certainly sent down distinct verses and allah guides whom he wills to a straight path

ayahs.t: But the hypocrites say, "We have believed in Allah and in the Messenger, and we obey"; then a party of them turns away after that. And those are not believers.
ayahs.n: but the hypocrites say we have believed in allah and in the messenger and we obey then a party of them turns away after that and those are not believers

ayahs.t: And when they are called to [the words of] Allah and His Messenger to judge between them, at once a party of them turns aside [in refusal].
ayahs.n: and when they are called to the words of allah and his messenger to judge between them at once a party of them turns aside in refusal

ayahs.t: But if the right is theirs, they come to him in prompt obedience.
ayahs.n: but if the right is theirs they come to him in prompt obedience

ayahs.t: Is there disease in their hearts? Or have they doubted? Or do they fear that Allah will be unjust to them, or His Messenger? Rather, it is they who are the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: is there disease in their hearts or have they doubted or do they fear that allah will be unjust to them or his messenger rather it is they who are the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: The only statement of the [true] believers when they are called to Allah and His Messenger to judge between them is that they say, "We hear and we obey." And those are the successful.
ayahs.n: the only statement of the true believers when they are called to allah and his messenger to judge between them is that they say we hear and we obey and those are the successful

ayahs.t: And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger and fears Allah and is conscious of Him - it is those who are the attainers.
ayahs.n: and whoever obeys allah and his messenger and fears allah and is conscious of him it is those who are the attainers

ayahs.t: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths that if you ordered them, they would go forth [in Allah 's cause]. Say, "Do not swear. [Such] obedience is known. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with that which you do."
ayahs.n: and they swear by allah their strongest oaths that if you ordered them they would go forth in allah s cause say do not swear such obedience is known indeed allah is acquainted with that which you do

ayahs.t: Say, "Obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon him is only that [duty] with which he has been charged, and upon you is that with which you have been charged. And if you obey him, you will be [rightly] guided. And there is not upon the Messenger except the [responsibility for] clear notification."
ayahs.n: say obey allah and obey the messenger but if you turn away then upon him is only that duty with which he has been charged and upon you is that with which you have been charged and if you obey him you will be rightly guided and there is not upon the messenger except the responsibility for clear notification

ayahs.t: Allah has promised those who have believed among you and done righteous deeds that He will surely grant them succession [to authority] upon the earth just as He granted it to those before them and that He will surely establish for them [therein] their religion which He has preferred for them and that He will surely substitute for them, after their fear, security, [for] they worship Me, not associating anything with Me. But whoever disbelieves after that - then those are the defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: allah has promised those who have believed among you and done righteous deeds that he will surely grant them succession to authority upon the earth just as he granted it to those before them and that he will surely establish for them therein their religion which he has preferred for them and that he will surely substitute for them after their fear security for they worship me not associating anything with me but whoever disbelieves after that then those are the defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: And establish prayer and give zakah and obey the Messenger - that you may receive mercy.
ayahs.n: and establish prayer and give zakah and obey the messenger that you may receive mercy

ayahs.t: Never think that the disbelievers are causing failure [to Allah] upon the earth. Their refuge will be the Fire - and how wretched the destination.
ayahs.n: never think that the disbelievers are causing failure to allah upon the earth their refuge will be the fire and how wretched the destination

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, let those whom your right hands possess and those who have not [yet] reached puberty among you ask permission of you [before entering] at three times: before the dawn prayer and when you put aside your clothing [for rest] at noon and after the night prayer. [These are] three times of privacy for you. There is no blame upon you nor upon them beyond these [periods], for they continually circulate among you - some of you, among others. Thus does Allah make clear to you the verses; and Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed let those whom your right hands possess and those who have not yet reached puberty among you ask permission of you before entering at three times before the dawn prayer and when you put aside your clothing for rest at noon and after the night prayer these are three times of privacy for you there is no blame upon you nor upon them beyond these periods for they continually circulate among you some of you among others thus does allah make clear to you the verses and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And when the children among you reach puberty, let them ask permission [at all times] as those before them have done. Thus does Allah make clear to you His verses; and Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: and when the children among you reach puberty let them ask permission at all times as those before them have done thus does allah make clear to you his verses and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And women of post-menstrual age who have no desire for marriage - there is no blame upon them for putting aside their outer garments [but] not displaying adornment. But to modestly refrain [from that] is better for them. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing.
ayahs.n: and women of post menstrual age who have no desire for marriage there is no blame upon them for putting aside their outer garments but not displaying adornment but to modestly refrain from that is better for them and allah is hearing and knowing
