ayahs.n: those upon whom the word will have come into effect will say our lord these are the ones we led to error we led them to error just as we were in error we declare our disassociation from them to you they did not used to worship us

ayahs.t: And it will be said, "Invoke your 'partners' " and they will invoke them; but they will not respond to them, and they will see the punishment. If only they had followed guidance!
ayahs.n: and it will be said invoke your partners and they will invoke them but they will not respond to them and they will see the punishment if only they had followed guidance

ayahs.t: And [mention] the Day He will call them and say, "What did you answer the messengers?"
ayahs.n: and mention the day he will call them and say what did you answer the messengers

ayahs.t: But the information will be unapparent to them that Day, so they will not [be able to] ask one another.
ayahs.n: but the information will be unapparent to them that day so they will not be able to ask one another

ayahs.t: But as for one who had repented, believed, and done righteousness, it is promised by Allah that he will be among the successful.
ayahs.n: but as for one who had repented believed and done righteousness it is promised by allah that he will be among the successful

ayahs.t: And your Lord creates what He wills and chooses; not for them was the choice. Exalted is Allah and high above what they associate with Him.
ayahs.n: and your lord creates what he wills and chooses not for them was the choice exalted is allah and high above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: And your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare.
ayahs.n: and your lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare

ayahs.t: And He is Allah; there is no deity except Him. To Him is [due all] praise in the first [life] and the Hereafter. And His is the [final] decision, and to Him you will be returned.
ayahs.n: and he is allah there is no deity except him to him is due all praise in the first life and the hereafter and his is the final decision and to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered: if Allah should make for you the night continuous until the Day of Resurrection, what deity other than Allah could bring you light? Then will you not hear?"
ayahs.n: say have you considered if allah should make for you the night continuous until the day of resurrection what deity other than allah could bring you light then will you not hear

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered: if Allah should make for you the day continuous until the Day of Resurrection, what deity other than Allah could bring you a night in which you may rest? Then will you not see?"
ayahs.n: say have you considered if allah should make for you the day continuous until the day of resurrection what deity other than allah could bring you a night in which you may rest then will you not see

ayahs.t: And out of His mercy He made for you the night and the day that you may rest therein and [by day] seek from His bounty and [that] perhaps you will be grateful.
ayahs.n: and out of his mercy he made for you the night and the day that you may rest therein and by day seek from his bounty and that perhaps you will be grateful

ayahs.t: And [warn of] the Day He will call them and say, "Where are my 'partners' which you used to claim?"
ayahs.n: and warn of the day he will call them and say where are my partners which you used to claim

ayahs.t: And We will extract from every nation a witness and say, "Produce your proof," and they will know that the truth belongs to Allah, and lost from them is that which they used to invent.
ayahs.n: and we will extract from every nation a witness and say produce your proof and they will know that the truth belongs to allah and lost from them is that which they used to invent

ayahs.t: Indeed, Qarun was from the people of Moses, but he tyrannized them. And We gave him of treasures whose keys would burden a band of strong men; thereupon his people said to him, "Do not exult. Indeed, Allah does not like the exultant.
ayahs.n: indeed qarun was from the people of moses but he tyrannized them and we gave him of treasures whose keys would burden a band of strong men thereupon his people said to him do not exult indeed allah does not like the exultant

ayahs.t: But seek, through that which Allah has given you, the home of the Hereafter; and [yet], do not forget your share of the world. And do good as Allah has done good to you. And desire not corruption in the land. Indeed, Allah does not like corrupters."
ayahs.n: but seek through that which allah has given you the home of the hereafter and yet do not forget your share of the world and do good as allah has done good to you and desire not corruption in the land indeed allah does not like corrupters

ayahs.t: He said, "I was only given it because of knowledge I have." Did he not know that Allah had destroyed before him of generations those who were greater than him in power and greater in accumulation [of wealth]? But the criminals, about their sins, will not be asked.
ayahs.n: he said i was only given it because of knowledge i have did he not know that allah had destroyed before him of generations those who were greater than him in power and greater in accumulation of wealth but the criminals about their sins will not be asked

ayahs.t: So he came out before his people in his adornment. Those who desired the worldly life said, "Oh, would that we had like what was given to Qarun. Indeed, he is one of great fortune."
ayahs.n: so he came out before his people in his adornment those who desired the worldly life said oh would that we had like what was given to qarun indeed he is one of great fortune

ayahs.t: But those who had been given knowledge said, "Woe to you! The reward of Allah is better for he who believes and does righteousness. And none are granted it except the patient."
ayahs.n: but those who had been given knowledge said woe to you the reward of allah is better for he who believes and does righteousness and none are granted it except the patient

ayahs.t: And We caused the earth to swallow him and his home. And there was for him no company to aid him other than Allah, nor was he of those who [could] defend themselves.
ayahs.n: and we caused the earth to swallow him and his home and there was for him no company to aid him other than allah nor was he of those who could defend themselves

ayahs.t: And those who had wished for his position the previous day began to say, "Oh, how Allah extends provision to whom He wills of His servants and restricts it! If not that Allah had conferred favor on us, He would have caused it to swallow us. Oh, how the disbelievers do not succeed!"
ayahs.n: and those who had wished for his position the previous day began to say oh how allah extends provision to whom he wills of his servants and restricts it if not that allah had conferred favor on us he would have caused it to swallow us oh how the disbelievers do not succeed

ayahs.t: That home of the Hereafter We assign to those who do not desire exaltedness upon the earth or corruption. And the [best] outcome is for the righteous.
ayahs.n: that home of the hereafter we assign to those who do not desire exaltedness upon the earth or corruption and the best outcome is for the righteous

ayahs.t: Whoever comes [on the Day of Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it; and whoever comes with an evil deed - then those who did evil deeds will not be recompensed except [as much as] what they used to do.
ayahs.n: whoever comes on the day of judgement with a good deed will have better than it and whoever comes with an evil deed then those who did evil deeds will not be recompensed except as much as what they used to do

ayahs.t: Indeed, [O Muhammad], He who imposed upon you the Qur'an will take you back to a place of return. Say, "My Lord is most knowing of who brings guidance and who is in clear error."
ayahs.n: indeed o muhammad he who imposed upon you the quran will take you back to a place of return say my lord is most knowing of who brings guidance and who is in clear error

ayahs.t: And you were not expecting that the Book would be conveyed to you, but [it is] a mercy from your Lord. So do not be an assistant to the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and you were not expecting that the book would be conveyed to you but it is a mercy from your lord so do not be an assistant to the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And never let them avert you from the verses of Allah after they have been revealed to you. And invite [people] to your Lord. And never be of those who associate others with Allah.
ayahs.n: and never let them avert you from the verses of allah after they have been revealed to you and invite people to your lord and never be of those who associate others with allah

ayahs.t: And do not invoke with Allah another deity. There is no deity except Him. Everything will be destroyed except His Face. His is the judgement, and to Him you will be returned.
ayahs.n: and do not invoke with allah another deity there is no deity except him everything will be destroyed except his face his is the judgement and to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem
ayahs.n: alif lam meem

ayahs.t: Do the people think that they will be left to say, "We believe" and they will not be tried?
ayahs.n: do the people think that they will be left to say we believe and they will not be tried

ayahs.t: But We have certainly tried those before them, and Allah will surely make evident those who are truthful, and He will surely make evident the liars.
ayahs.n: but we have certainly tried those before them and allah will surely make evident those who are truthful and he will surely make evident the liars

ayahs.t: Or do those who do evil deeds think they can outrun Us? Evil is what they judge.
ayahs.n: or do those who do evil deeds think they can outrun us evil is what they judge

ayahs.t: Whoever should hope for the meeting with Allah - indeed, the term decreed by Allah is coming. And He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: whoever should hope for the meeting with allah indeed the term decreed by allah is coming and he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: And whoever strives only strives for [the benefit of] himself. Indeed, Allah is free from need of the worlds.
ayahs.n: and whoever strives only strives for the benefit of himself indeed allah is free from need of the worlds

ayahs.t: And those who believe and do righteous deeds - We will surely remove from them their misdeeds and will surely reward them according to the best of what they used to do.
ayahs.n: and those who believe and do righteous deeds we will surely remove from them their misdeeds and will surely reward them according to the best of what they used to do

ayahs.t: And We have enjoined upon man goodness to parents. But if they endeavor to make you associate with Me that of which you have no knowledge, do not obey them. To Me is your return, and I will inform you about what you used to do.
ayahs.n: and we have enjoined upon man goodness to parents but if they endeavor to make you associate with me that of which you have no knowledge do not obey them to me is your return and i will inform you about what you used to do

ayahs.t: And those who believe and do righteous deeds - We will surely admit them among the righteous [into Paradise].
ayahs.n: and those who believe and do righteous deeds we will surely admit them among the righteous into paradise

ayahs.t: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allah," but when one [of them] is harmed for [the cause of] Allah, they consider the trial of the people as [if it were] the punishment of Allah. But if victory comes from your Lord, they say, "Indeed, We were with you." Is not Allah most knowing of what is within the breasts of all creatures?
ayahs.n: and of the people are some who say we believe in allah but when one of them is harmed for the cause of allah they consider the trial of the people as if it were the punishment of allah but if victory comes from your lord they say indeed we were with you is not allah most knowing of what is within the breasts of all creatures

ayahs.t: And Allah will surely make evident those who believe, and He will surely make evident the hypocrites.
ayahs.n: and allah will surely make evident those who believe and he will surely make evident the hypocrites

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Follow our way, and we will carry your sins." But they will not carry anything of their sins. Indeed, they are liars.
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieve say to those who believe follow our way and we will carry your sins but they will not carry anything of their sins indeed they are liars

ayahs.t: But they will surely carry their [own] burdens and [other] burdens along with their burdens, and they will surely be questioned on the Day of Resurrection about what they used to invent.
ayahs.n: but they will surely carry their own burdens and other burdens along with their burdens and they will surely be questioned on the day of resurrection about what they used to invent

ayahs.t: And We certainly sent Noah to his people, and he remained among them a thousand years minus fifty years, and the flood seized them while they were wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: and we certainly sent noah to his people and he remained among them a thousand years minus fifty years and the flood seized them while they were wrongdoers

ayahs.t: But We saved him and the companions of the ship, and We made it a sign for the worlds.
ayahs.n: but we saved him and the companions of the ship and we made it a sign for the worlds

ayahs.t: And [We sent] Abraham, when he said to his people, "Worship Allah and fear Him. That is best for you, if you should know.
ayahs.n: and we sent abraham when he said to his people worship allah and fear him that is best for you if you should know

ayahs.t: You only worship, besides Allah, idols, and you produce a falsehood. Indeed, those you worship besides Allah do not possess for you [the power of] provision. So seek from Allah provision and worship Him and be grateful to Him. To Him you will be returned."
ayahs.n: you only worship besides allah idols and you produce a falsehood indeed those you worship besides allah do not possess for you the power of provision so seek from allah provision and worship him and be grateful to him to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: And if you [people] deny [the message] - already nations before you have denied. And there is not upon the Messenger except [the duty of] clear notification.
ayahs.n: and if you people deny the message already nations before you have denied and there is not upon the messenger except the duty of clear notification

ayahs.t: Have they not considered how Allah begins creation and then repeats it? Indeed that, for Allah, is easy.
ayahs.n: have they not considered how allah begins creation and then repeats it indeed that for allah is easy

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how He began creation. Then Allah will produce the final creation. Indeed Allah, over all things, is competent."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad travel through the land and observe how he began creation then allah will produce the final creation indeed allah over all things is competent

ayahs.t: He punishes whom He wills and has mercy upon whom He wills, and to Him you will be returned.
ayahs.n: he punishes whom he wills and has mercy upon whom he wills and to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: And you will not cause failure [to Allah] upon the earth or in the heaven. And you have not other than Allah any protector or any helper.
ayahs.n: and you will not cause failure to allah upon the earth or in the heaven and you have not other than allah any protector or any helper

ayahs.t: And the ones who disbelieve in the signs of Allah and the meeting with Him - those have despaired of My mercy, and they will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and the ones who disbelieve in the signs of allah and the meeting with him those have despaired of my mercy and they will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And the answer of Abraham's people was not but that they said, "Kill him or burn him," but Allah saved him from the fire. Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: and the answer of abrahams people was not but that they said kill him or burn him but allah saved him from the fire indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

ayahs.t: And [Abraham] said, "You have only taken, other than Allah, idols as [a bond of] affection among you in worldly life. Then on the Day of Resurrection you will deny one another and curse one another, and your refuge will be the Fire, and you will not have any helpers."
ayahs.n: and abraham said you have only taken other than allah idols as a bond of affection among you in worldly life then on the day of resurrection you will deny one another and curse one another and your refuge will be the fire and you will not have any helpers

ayahs.t: And Lot believed him. [Abraham] said, "Indeed, I will emigrate to [the service of] my Lord. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
ayahs.n: and lot believed him abraham said indeed i will emigrate to the service of my lord indeed he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And We gave to Him Isaac and Jacob and placed in his descendants prophethood and scripture. And We gave him his reward in this world, and indeed, he is in the Hereafter among the righteous.
ayahs.n: and we gave to him isaac and jacob and placed in his descendants prophethood and scripture and we gave him his reward in this world and indeed he is in the hereafter among the righteous

ayahs.t: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Indeed, you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds.
ayahs.n: and mention lot when he said to his people indeed you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds

ayahs.t: Indeed, you approach men and obstruct the road and commit in your meetings [every] evil." And the answer of his people was not but they said, "Bring us the punishment of Allah, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.n: indeed you approach men and obstruct the road and commit in your meetings every evil and the answer of his people was not but they said bring us the punishment of allah if you should be of the truthful

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, support me against the corrupting people."
ayahs.n: he said my lord support me against the corrupting people

ayahs.t: And when Our messengers came to Abraham with the good tidings, they said, "Indeed, we will destroy the people of that Lot's city. Indeed, its people have been wrongdoers."
ayahs.n: and when our messengers came to abraham with the good tidings they said indeed we will destroy the people of that lots city indeed its people have been wrongdoers

ayahs.t: [Abraham] said, "Indeed, within it is Lot." They said, "We are more knowing of who is within it. We will surely save him and his family, except his wife. She is to be of those who remain behind."
ayahs.n: abraham said indeed within it is lot they said we are more knowing of who is within it we will surely save him and his family except his wife she is to be of those who remain behind

ayahs.t: And when Our messengers came to Lot, he was distressed for them and felt for them great discomfort. They said, "Fear not, nor grieve. Indeed, we will save you and your family, except your wife; she is to be of those who remain behind.
ayahs.n: and when our messengers came to lot he was distressed for them and felt for them great discomfort they said fear not nor grieve indeed we will save you and your family except your wife she is to be of those who remain behind

ayahs.t: Indeed, we will bring down on the people of this city punishment from the sky because they have been defiantly disobedient."
ayahs.n: indeed we will bring down on the people of this city punishment from the sky because they have been defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: And We have certainly left of it a sign as clear evidence for a people who use reason.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly left of it a sign as clear evidence for a people who use reason

ayahs.t: And to Madyan [We sent] their brother Shu'ayb, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah and expect the Last Day and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption."
ayahs.n: and to madyan we sent their brother shuayb and he said o my people worship allah and expect the last day and do not commit abuse on the earth spreading corruption

ayahs.t: But they denied him, so the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone.
ayahs.n: but they denied him so the earthquake seized them and they became within their home corpses fallen prone

ayahs.t: And [We destroyed] 'Aad and Thamud, and it has become clear to you from their [ruined] dwellings. And Satan had made pleasing to them their deeds and averted them from the path, and they were endowed with perception.
ayahs.n: and we destroyed aad and thamud and it has become clear to you from their ruined dwellings and satan had made pleasing to them their deeds and averted them from the path and they were endowed with perception

ayahs.t: And [We destroyed] Qarun and Pharaoh and Haman. And Moses had already come to them with clear evidences, and they were arrogant in the land, but they were not outrunners [of Our punishment].
ayahs.n: and we destroyed qarun and pharaoh and haman and moses had already come to them with clear evidences and they were arrogant in the land but they were not outrunners of our punishment

ayahs.t: So each We seized for his sin; and among them were those upon whom We sent a storm of stones, and among them were those who were seized by the blast [from the sky], and among them were those whom We caused the earth to swallow, and among them were those whom We drowned. And Allah would not have wronged them, but it was they who were wronging themselves.
ayahs.n: so each we seized for his sin and among them were those upon whom we sent a storm of stones and among them were those who were seized by the blast from the sky and among them were those whom we caused the earth to swallow and among them were those whom we drowned and allah would not have wronged them but it was they who were wronging themselves

ayahs.t: The example of those who take allies other than Allah is like that of the spider who takes a home. And indeed, the weakest of homes is the home of the spider, if they only knew.
ayahs.n: the example of those who take allies other than allah is like that of the spider who takes a home and indeed the weakest of homes is the home of the spider if they only knew

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah knows whatever thing they call upon other than Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: indeed allah knows whatever thing they call upon other than him and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And these examples We present to the people, but none will understand them except those of knowledge.
ayahs.n: and these examples we present to the people but none will understand them except those of knowledge

ayahs.t: Allah created the heavens and the earth in truth. Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
ayahs.n: allah created the heavens and the earth in truth indeed in that is a sign for the believers

ayahs.t: Recite, [O Muhammad], what has been revealed to you of the Book and establish prayer. Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing, and the remembrance of Allah is greater. And Allah knows that which you do.
ayahs.n: recite o muhammad what has been revealed to you of the book and establish prayer indeed prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing and the remembrance of allah is greater and allah knows that which you do

ayahs.t: And do not argue with the People of the Scripture except in a way that is best, except for those who commit injustice among them, and say, "We believe in that which has been revealed to us and revealed to you. And our God and your God is one; and we are Muslims [in submission] to Him."
ayahs.n: and do not argue with the people of the scripture except in a way that is best except for those who commit injustice among them and say we believe in that which has been revealed to us and revealed to you and our god and your god is one and we are muslims in submission to him

ayahs.t: And thus We have sent down to you the Qur'an. And those to whom We [previously] gave the Scripture believe in it. And among these [people of Makkah] are those who believe in it. And none reject Our verses except the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and thus we have sent down to you the quran and those to whom we previously gave the scripture believe in it and among these people of makkah are those who believe in it and none reject our verses except the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And you did not recite before it any scripture, nor did you inscribe one with your right hand. Otherwise the falsifiers would have had [cause for] doubt.
ayahs.n: and you did not recite before it any scripture nor did you inscribe one with your right hand otherwise the falsifiers would have had cause for doubt

ayahs.t: Rather, the Qur'an is distinct verses [preserved] within the breasts of those who have been given knowledge. And none reject Our verses except the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: rather the quran is distinct verses preserved within the breasts of those who have been given knowledge and none reject our verses except the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: But they say, "Why are not signs sent down to him from his Lord?" Say, "The signs are only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."
ayahs.n: but they say why are not signs sent down to him from his lord say the signs are only with allah and i am only a clear warner

ayahs.t: And is it not sufficient for them that We revealed to you the Book which is recited to them? Indeed in that is a mercy and reminder for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: and is it not sufficient for them that we revealed to you the book which is recited to them indeed in that is a mercy and reminder for a people who believe

ayahs.t: Say, "Sufficient is Allah between me and you as Witness. He knows what is in the heavens and earth. And they who have believed in falsehood and disbelieved in Allah - it is those who are the losers."
ayahs.n: say sufficient is allah between me and you as witness he knows what is in the heavens and earth and they who have believed in falsehood and disbelieved in allah it is those who are the losers

ayahs.t: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. And if not for [the decree of] a specified term, punishment would have reached them. But it will surely come to them suddenly while they perceive not.
ayahs.n: and they urge you to hasten the punishment and if not for the decree of a specified term punishment would have reached them but it will surely come to them suddenly while they perceive not

ayahs.t: They urge you to hasten the punishment. And indeed, Hell will be encompassing of the disbelievers
ayahs.n: they urge you to hasten the punishment and indeed hell will be encompassing of the disbelievers

ayahs.t: On the Day the punishment will cover them from above them and from below their feet and it is said, "Taste [the result of] what you used to do."
ayahs.n: on the day the punishment will cover them from above them and from below their feet and it is said taste the result of what you used to do

ayahs.t: O My servants who have believed, indeed My earth is spacious, so worship only Me.
ayahs.n: o my servants who have believed indeed my earth is spacious so worship only me

ayahs.t: Every soul will taste death. Then to Us will you be returned.
ayahs.n: every soul will taste death then to us will you be returned

ayahs.t: And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - We will surely assign to them of Paradise [elevated] chambers beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Excellent is the reward of the [righteous] workers
ayahs.n: and those who have believed and done righteous deeds we will surely assign to them of paradise elevated chambers beneath which rivers flow wherein they abide eternally excellent is the reward of the righteous workers

ayahs.t: Who have been patient and upon their Lord rely.
ayahs.n: who have been patient and upon their lord rely

ayahs.t: And how many a creature carries not its [own] provision. Allah provides for it and for you. And He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and how many a creature carries not its own provision allah provides for it and for you and he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: If you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth and subjected the sun and the moon?" they would surely say, "Allah." Then how are they deluded?
ayahs.n: if you asked them who created the heavens and earth and subjected the sun and the moon they would surely say allah then how are they deluded

ayahs.t: Allah extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts for him. Indeed Allah is, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: allah extends provision for whom he wills of his servants and restricts for him indeed allah is of all things knowing

ayahs.t: And if you asked them, "Who sends down rain from the sky and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness?" they would surely say " Allah." Say, "Praise to Allah "; but most of them do not reason.
ayahs.n: and if you asked them who sends down rain from the sky and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness they would surely say allah say praise to allah but most of them do not reason

ayahs.t: And this worldly life is not but diversion and amusement. And indeed, the home of the Hereafter - that is the [eternal] life, if only they knew.
ayahs.n: and this worldly life is not but diversion and amusement and indeed the home of the hereafter that is the eternal life if only they knew

ayahs.t: And when they board a ship, they supplicate Allah, sincere to Him in religion. But when He delivers them to the land, at once they associate others with Him
ayahs.n: and when they board a ship they supplicate allah sincere to him in religion but when he delivers them to the land at once they associate others with him

ayahs.t: So that they will deny what We have granted them, and they will enjoy themselves. But they are going to know.
ayahs.n: so that they will deny what we have granted them and they will enjoy themselves but they are going to know

ayahs.t: Have they not seen that We made [Makkah] a safe sanctuary, while people are being taken away all around them? Then in falsehood do they believe, and in the favor of Allah they disbelieve?
ayahs.n: have they not seen that we made makkah a safe sanctuary while people are being taken away all around them then in falsehood do they believe and in the favor of allah they disbelieve

ayahs.t: And who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about Allah or denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a [sufficient] residence for the disbelievers?
ayahs.n: and who is more unjust than one who invents a lie about allah or denies the truth when it has come to him is there not in hell a sufficient residence for the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allah is with the doers of good.
ayahs.n: and those who strive for us we will surely guide them to our ways and indeed allah is with the doers of good

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem.
ayahs.n: alif lam meem

ayahs.t: The Byzantines have been defeated
ayahs.n: the byzantines have been defeated

ayahs.t: In the nearest land. But they, after their defeat, will overcome.
ayahs.n: in the nearest land but they after their defeat will overcome

ayahs.t: Within three to nine years. To Allah belongs the command before and after. And that day the believers will rejoice
ayahs.n: within three to nine years to allah belongs the command before and after and that day the believers will rejoice

ayahs.t: In the victory of Allah. He gives victory to whom He wills, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
ayahs.n: in the victory of allah he gives victory to whom he wills and he is the exalted in might the merciful

ayahs.t: [It is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in His promise, but most of the people do not know.
ayahs.n: it is the promise of allah allah does not fail in his promise but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: They know what is apparent of the worldly life, but they, of the Hereafter, are unaware.
ayahs.n: they know what is apparent of the worldly life but they of the hereafter are unaware

ayahs.t: Do they not contemplate within themselves? Allah has not created the heavens and the earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term. And indeed, many of the people, in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord, are disbelievers.
ayahs.n: do they not contemplate within themselves allah has not created the heavens and the earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term and indeed many of the people in the matter of the meeting with their lord are disbelievers

ayahs.t: Have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? They were greater than them in power, and they plowed the earth and built it up more than they have built it up, and their messengers came to them with clear evidences. And Allah would not ever have wronged them, but they were wronging themselves.
ayahs.n: have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them they were greater than them in power and they plowed the earth and built it up more than they have built it up and their messengers came to them with clear evidences and allah would not ever have wronged them but they were wronging themselves

ayahs.t: Then the end of those who did evil was the worst [consequence] because they denied the signs of Allah and used to ridicule them.
ayahs.n: then the end of those who did evil was the worst consequence because they denied the signs of allah and used to ridicule them

ayahs.t: Allah begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.
ayahs.n: allah begins creation then he will repeat it then to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair.
ayahs.n: and the day the hour appears the criminals will be in despair

ayahs.t: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.
ayahs.n: and there will not be for them among their alleged partners any intercessors and they will then be disbelievers in their partners

ayahs.t: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated.
ayahs.n: and the day the hour appears that day they will become separated

ayahs.t: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.
ayahs.n: and as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds they will be in a garden of paradise delighted

ayahs.t: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].
ayahs.n: but as for those who disbelieved and denied our verses and the meeting of the hereafter those will be brought into the punishment to remain

ayahs.t: So exalted is Allah when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.
ayahs.n: so exalted is allah when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning

ayahs.t: And to Him is [due all] praise throughout the heavens and the earth. And [exalted is He] at night and when you are at noon.
ayahs.n: and to him is due all praise throughout the heavens and the earth and exalted is he at night and when you are at noon

ayahs.t: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.
ayahs.n: he brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness and thus will you be brought out

ayahs.t: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that he created you from dust then suddenly you were human beings dispersing throughout the earth

ayahs.t: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquillity in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that he created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquillity in them and he placed between you affection and mercy indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge

ayahs.t: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of his bounty indeed in that are signs for a people who listen

ayahs.t: And of His signs is [that] He shows you the lightning [causing] fear and aspiration, and He sends down rain from the sky by which He brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that he shows you the lightning causing fear and aspiration and he sends down rain from the sky by which he brings to life the earth after its lifelessness indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason

ayahs.t: And of His signs is that the heaven and earth remain by His command. Then when He calls you with a [single] call from the earth, immediately you will come forth.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that the heaven and earth remain by his command then when he calls you with a single call from the earth immediately you will come forth

ayahs.t: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient.
ayahs.n: and to him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth all are to him devoutly obedient

ayahs.t: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest attribute in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: and it is he who begins creation then he repeats it and that is even easier for him to him belongs the highest attribute in the heavens and earth and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein [and] would fear them as your fear of one another [within a partnership]? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason.
ayahs.n: he presents to you an example from yourselves do you have among those whom your right hands possess any partners in what we have provided for you so that you are equal therein and would fear them as your fear of one another within a partnership thus do we detail the verses for a people who use reason

ayahs.t: But those who wrong follow their [own] desires without knowledge. Then who can guide one whom Allah has sent astray? And for them there are no helpers.
ayahs.n: but those who wrong follow their own desires without knowledge then who can guide one whom allah has sent astray and for them there are no helpers

ayahs.t: So direct your face toward the religion, inclining to truth. [Adhere to] the fitrah of Allah upon which He has created [all] people. No change should there be in the creation of Allah. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know.
ayahs.n: so direct your face toward the religion inclining to truth adhere to the fitrah of allah upon which he has created all people no change should there be in the creation of allah that is the correct religion but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: [Adhere to it], turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allah
ayahs.n: adhere to it turning in repentance to him and fear him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with allah

ayahs.t: [Or] of those who have divided their religion and become sects, every faction rejoicing in what it has.
ayahs.n: or of those who have divided their religion and become sects every faction rejoicing in what it has

ayahs.t: And when adversity touches the people, they call upon their Lord, turning in repentance to Him. Then when He lets them taste mercy from Him, at once a party of them associate others with their Lord,
ayahs.n: and when adversity touches the people they call upon their lord turning in repentance to him then when he lets them taste mercy from him at once a party of them associate others with their lord

ayahs.t: So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.
ayahs.n: so that they will deny what we have granted them then enjoy yourselves for you are going to know

ayahs.t: Or have We sent down to them an authority, and it speaks of what they were associating with Him?
ayahs.n: or have we sent down to them an authority and it speaks of what they were associating with him

ayahs.t: And when We let the people taste mercy, they rejoice therein, but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth, immediately they despair.
ayahs.n: and when we let the people taste mercy they rejoice therein but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth immediately they despair

ayahs.t: Do they not see that Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed, in that are signs for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: do they not see that allah extends provision for whom he wills and restricts it indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

ayahs.t: So give the relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the countenance of Allah, and it is they who will be the successful.
ayahs.n: so give the relative his right as well as the needy and the traveler that is best for those who desire the countenance of allah and it is they who will be the successful

ayahs.t: And whatever you give for interest to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with Allah. But what you give in zakah, desiring the countenance of Allah - those are the multipliers.
ayahs.n: and whatever you give for interest to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with allah but what you give in zakah desiring the countenance of allah those are the multipliers

ayahs.t: Allah is the one who created you, then provided for you, then will cause you to die, and then will give you life. Are there any of your "partners" who does anything of that? Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.
ayahs.n: allah is the one who created you then provided for you then will cause you to die and then will give you life are there any of your partners who does anything of that exalted is he and high above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by [reason of] what the hands of people have earned so He may let them taste part of [the consequence of] what they have done that perhaps they will return [to righteousness].
ayahs.n: corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by reason of what the hands of people have earned so he may let them taste part of the consequence of what they have done that perhaps they will return to righteousness

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before. Most of them were associators [of others with Allah].
ayahs.n: say o muhammad travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before most of them were associators of others with allah

ayahs.t: So direct your face toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allah of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.
ayahs.n: so direct your face toward the correct religion before a day comes from allah of which there is no repelling that day they will be divided

ayahs.t: Whoever disbelieves - upon him is [the consequence of] his disbelief. And whoever does righteousness - they are for themselves preparing,
ayahs.n: whoever disbelieves upon him is the consequence of his disbelief and whoever does righteousness they are for themselves preparing

ayahs.t: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: that he may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of his bounty indeed he does not like the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that he sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste his mercy and so the ships may sail at his command and so you may seek of his bounty and perhaps you will be grateful

ayahs.t: And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers.
ayahs.n: and we have already sent messengers before you to their peoples and they came to them with clear evidences then we took retribution from those who committed crimes and incumbent upon us was support of the believers

ayahs.t: It is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however He wills, and He makes them fragments so you see the rain emerge from within them. And when He causes it to fall upon whom He wills of His servants, immediately they rejoice
ayahs.n: it is allah who sends the winds and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however he wills and he makes them fragments so you see the rain emerge from within them and when he causes it to fall upon whom he wills of his servants immediately they rejoice

ayahs.t: Although they were, before it was sent down upon them - before that, in despair.
ayahs.n: although they were before it was sent down upon them before that in despair

ayahs.t: So observe the effects of the mercy of Allah - how He gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed, that [same one] will give life to the dead, and He is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: so observe the effects of the mercy of allah how he gives life to the earth after its lifelessness indeed that same one will give life to the dead and he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: But if We should send a [bad] wind and they saw [their crops] turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers.
ayahs.n: but if we should send a bad wind and they saw their crops turned yellow they would remain thereafter disbelievers

ayahs.t: So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs, retreating.
ayahs.n: so indeed you will not make the dead hear nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs retreating

ayahs.t: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [in submission to Allah].
ayahs.n: and you cannot guide the blind away from their error you will only make hear those who believe in our verses so they are muslims in submission to allah

ayahs.t: Allah is the one who created you from weakness, then made after weakness strength, then made after strength weakness and white hair. He creates what He wills, and He is the Knowing, the Competent.
ayahs.n: allah is the one who created you from weakness then made after weakness strength then made after strength weakness and white hair he creates what he wills and he is the knowing the competent

ayahs.t: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour. Thus they were deluded.
ayahs.n: and the day the hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour thus they were deluded

ayahs.t: But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, "You remained the extent of Allah 's decree until the Day of Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know."
ayahs.n: but those who were given knowledge and faith will say you remained the extent of allah s decree until the day of resurrection and this is the day of resurrection but you did not used to know

ayahs.t: So that Day, their excuse will not benefit those who wronged, nor will they be asked to appease [Allah].
ayahs.n: so that day their excuse will not benefit those who wronged nor will they be asked to appease allah

ayahs.t: And We have certainly presented to the people in this Qur'an from every [kind of] example. But, [O Muhammad], if you should bring them a sign, the disbelievers will surely say, "You [believers] are but falsifiers."
ayahs.n: and we have certainly presented to the people in this quran from every kind of example but o muhammad if you should bring them a sign the disbelievers will surely say you believers are but falsifiers

ayahs.t: Thus does Allah seal the hearts of those who do not know.
ayahs.n: thus does allah seal the hearts of those who do not know

ayahs.t: So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And let them not disquiet you who are not certain [in faith].
ayahs.n: so be patient indeed the promise of allah is truth and let them not disquiet you who are not certain in faith

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem.
ayahs.n: alif lam meem

ayahs.t: These are verses of the wise Book,
ayahs.n: these are verses of the wise book

ayahs.t: As guidance and mercy for the doers of good
ayahs.n: as guidance and mercy for the doers of good

ayahs.t: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and they, of the Hereafter, are certain [in faith].
ayahs.n: who establish prayer and give zakah and they of the hereafter are certain in faith

ayahs.t: Those are on [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.
ayahs.n: those are on right guidance from their lord and it is those who are the successful

ayahs.t: And of the people is he who buys the amusement of speech to mislead [others] from the way of Allah without knowledge and who takes it in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: and of the people is he who buys the amusement of speech to mislead others from the way of allah without knowledge and who takes it in ridicule those will have a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: And when our verses are recited to him, he turns away arrogantly as if he had not heard them, as if there was in his ears deafness. So give him tidings of a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and when our verses are recited to him he turns away arrogantly as if he had not heard them as if there was in his ears deafness so give him tidings of a painful punishment

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them are the Gardens of Pleasure.
ayahs.n: indeed those who believe and do righteous deeds for them are the gardens of pleasure

ayahs.t: Wherein they abide eternally; [it is] the promise of Allah [which is] truth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: wherein they abide eternally it is the promise of allah which is truth and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: He created the heavens without pillars that you see and has cast into the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with you, and dispersed therein from every creature. And We sent down rain from the sky and made grow therein [plants] of every noble kind.
ayahs.n: he created the heavens without pillars that you see and has cast into the earth firmly set mountains lest it should shift with you and dispersed therein from every creature and we sent down rain from the sky and made grow therein plants of every noble kind

ayahs.t: This is the creation of Allah. So show Me what those other than Him have created. Rather, the wrongdoers are in clear error.
ayahs.n: this is the creation of allah so show me what those other than him have created rather the wrongdoers are in clear error

ayahs.t: And We had certainly given Luqman wisdom [and said], "Be grateful to Allah." And whoever is grateful is grateful for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever denies [His favor] - then indeed, Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: and we had certainly given luqman wisdom and said be grateful to allah and whoever is grateful is grateful for the benefit of himself and whoever denies his favor then indeed allah is free of need and praiseworthy

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Luqman said to his son while he was instructing him, "O my son, do not associate [anything] with Allah. Indeed, association [with him] is great injustice."
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when luqman said to his son while he was instructing him o my son do not associate anything with allah indeed association with him is great injustice

ayahs.t: And We have enjoined upon man [care] for his parents. His mother carried him, [increasing her] in weakness upon weakness, and his weaning is in two years. Be grateful to Me and to your parents; to Me is the [final] destination.
ayahs.n: and we have enjoined upon man care for his parents his mother carried him increasing her in weakness upon weakness and his weaning is in two years be grateful to me and to your parents to me is the final destination

ayahs.t: But if they endeavor to make you associate with Me that of which you have no knowledge, do not obey them but accompany them in [this] world with appropriate kindness and follow the way of those who turn back to Me [in repentance]. Then to Me will be your return, and I will inform you about what you used to do.
ayahs.n: but if they endeavor to make you associate with me that of which you have no knowledge do not obey them but accompany them in this world with appropriate kindness and follow the way of those who turn back to me in repentance then to me will be your return and i will inform you about what you used to do

ayahs.t: [And Luqman said], "O my son, indeed if wrong should be the weight of a mustard seed and should be within a rock or [anywhere] in the heavens or in the earth, Allah will bring it forth. Indeed, Allah is Subtle and Acquainted.
ayahs.n: and luqman said o my son indeed if wrong should be the weight of a mustard seed and should be within a rock or anywhere in the heavens or in the earth allah will bring it forth indeed allah is subtle and acquainted

ayahs.t: O my son, establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid what is wrong, and be patient over what befalls you. Indeed, [all] that is of the matters [requiring] determination.
ayahs.n: o my son establish prayer enjoin what is right forbid what is wrong and be patient over what befalls you indeed all that is of the matters requiring determination

ayahs.t: And do not turn your cheek [in contempt] toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly. Indeed, Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful.
ayahs.n: and do not turn your cheek in contempt toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly indeed allah does not like everyone self deluded and boastful

ayahs.t: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys."
ayahs.n: and be moderate in your pace and lower your voice indeed the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah has made subject to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and amply bestowed upon you His favors, [both] apparent and unapparent? But of the people is he who disputes about Allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening Book [from Him].
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah has made subject to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and amply bestowed upon you his favors both apparent and unapparent but of the people is he who disputes about allah without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening book from him

ayahs.t: And when it is said to them, "Follow what Allah has revealed," they say, "Rather, we will follow that upon which we found our fathers." Even if Satan was inviting them to the punishment of the Blaze?
ayahs.n: and when it is said to them follow what allah has revealed they say rather we will follow that upon which we found our fathers even if satan was inviting them to the punishment of the blaze

ayahs.t: And whoever submits his face to Allah while he is a doer of good - then he has grasped the most trustworthy handhold. And to Allah will be the outcome of [all] matters.
ayahs.n: and whoever submits his face to allah while he is a doer of good then he has grasped the most trustworthy handhold and to allah will be the outcome of all matters

ayahs.t: And whoever has disbelieved - let not his disbelief grieve you. To Us is their return, and We will inform them of what they did. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: and whoever has disbelieved let not his disbelief grieve you to us is their return and we will inform them of what they did indeed allah is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: We grant them enjoyment for a little; then We will force them to a massive punishment.
ayahs.n: we grant them enjoyment for a little then we will force them to a massive punishment

ayahs.t: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and earth?" they would surely say, "Allah." Say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah "; but most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: and if you asked them who created the heavens and earth they would surely say allah say all praise is due to allah but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: To Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and earth. Indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: to allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and earth indeed allah is the free of need the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: And if whatever trees upon the earth were pens and the sea [was ink], replenished thereafter by seven [more] seas, the words of Allah would not be exhausted. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Wise.
ayahs.n: and if whatever trees upon the earth were pens and the sea was ink replenished thereafter by seven more seas the words of allah would not be exhausted indeed allah is exalted in might and wise

ayahs.t: Your creation and your resurrection will not be but as that of a single soul. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing.
ayahs.n: your creation and your resurrection will not be but as that of a single soul indeed allah is hearing and seeing

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term, and that Allah, with whatever you do, is Acquainted?
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon each running its course for a specified term and that allah with whatever you do is acquainted

ayahs.t: That is because Allah is the Truth, and that what they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the Most High, the Grand.
ayahs.n: that is because allah is the truth and that what they call upon other than him is falsehood and because allah is the most high the grand

ayahs.t: Do you not see that ships sail through the sea by the favor of Allah that He may show you of His signs? Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
ayahs.n: do you not see that ships sail through the sea by the favor of allah that he may show you of his signs indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

ayahs.t: And when waves come over them like canopies, they supplicate Allah, sincere to Him in religion. But when He delivers them to the land, there are [some] of them who are moderate [in faith]. And none rejects Our signs except everyone treacherous and ungrateful.
ayahs.n: and when waves come over them like canopies they supplicate allah sincere to him in religion but when he delivers them to the land there are some of them who are moderate in faith and none rejects our signs except everyone treacherous and ungrateful

ayahs.t: O mankind, fear your Lord and fear a Day when no father will avail his son, nor will a son avail his father at all. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver.
ayahs.n: o mankind fear your lord and fear a day when no father will avail his son nor will a son avail his father at all indeed the promise of allah is truth so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about allah by the deceiver

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah [alone] has knowledge of the Hour and sends down the rain and knows what is in the wombs. And no soul perceives what it will earn tomorrow, and no soul perceives in what land it will die. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Acquainted.
ayahs.n: indeed allah alone has knowledge of the hour and sends down the rain and knows what is in the wombs and no soul perceives what it will earn tomorrow and no soul perceives in what land it will die indeed allah is knowing and acquainted

ayahs.t: Alif, Lam, Meem.
ayahs.n: alif lam meem

ayahs.t: [This is] the revelation of the Book about which there is no doubt from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: this is the revelation of the book about which there is no doubt from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Or do they say, "He invented it"? Rather, it is the truth from your Lord, [O Muhammad], that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you [so] perhaps they will be guided.
ayahs.n: or do they say he invented it rather it is the truth from your lord o muhammad that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you so perhaps they will be guided

ayahs.t: It is Allah who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days; then He established Himself above the Throne. You have not besides Him any protector or any intercessor; so will you not be reminded?
ayahs.n: it is allah who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days then he established himself above the throne you have not besides him any protector or any intercessor so will you not be reminded

ayahs.t: He arranges [each] matter from the heaven to the earth; then it will ascend to Him in a Day, the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count.
ayahs.n: he arranges each matter from the heaven to the earth then it will ascend to him in a day the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count

ayahs.t: That is the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
ayahs.n: that is the knower of the unseen and the witnessed the exalted in might the merciful

ayahs.t: Who perfected everything which He created and began the creation of man from clay.
ayahs.n: who perfected everything which he created and began the creation of man from clay

ayahs.t: Then He made his posterity out of the extract of a liquid disdained.
ayahs.n: then he made his posterity out of the extract of a liquid disdained

ayahs.t: Then He proportioned him and breathed into him from His [created] soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful.
ayahs.n: then he proportioned him and breathed into him from his created soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts little are you grateful

ayahs.t: And they say, "When we are lost within the earth, will we indeed be [recreated] in a new creation?" Rather, they are, in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord, disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and they say when we are lost within the earth will we indeed be recreated in a new creation rather they are in the matter of the meeting with their lord disbelievers

ayahs.t: Say, "The angel of death will take you who has been entrusted with you. Then to your Lord you will be returned."
ayahs.n: say the angel of death will take you who has been entrusted with you then to your lord you will be returned

ayahs.t: If you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their Lord, [saying], "Our Lord, we have seen and heard, so return us [to the world]; we will work righteousness. Indeed, we are [now] certain."
ayahs.n: if you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their lord saying our lord we have seen and heard so return us to the world we will work righteousness indeed we are now certain

ayahs.t: And if We had willed, We could have given every soul its guidance, but the word from Me will come into effect [that] "I will surely fill Hell with jinn and people all together.
ayahs.n: and if we had willed we could have given every soul its guidance but the word from me will come into effect that i will surely fill hell with jinn and people all together

ayahs.t: So taste [punishment] because you forgot the meeting of this, your Day; indeed, We have [accordingly] forgotten you. And taste the punishment of eternity for what you used to do."
ayahs.n: so taste punishment because you forgot the meeting of this your day indeed we have accordingly forgotten you and taste the punishment of eternity for what you used to do

ayahs.t: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant.
ayahs.n: only those believe in our verses who when they are reminded by them fall down in prostration and exalt allah with praise of their lord and they are not arrogant

ayahs.t: They arise from [their] beds; they supplicate their Lord in fear and aspiration, and from what We have provided them, they spend.
ayahs.n: they arise from their beds they supplicate their lord in fear and aspiration and from what we have provided them they spend

ayahs.t: And no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do.
ayahs.n: and no soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes as reward for what they used to do

ayahs.t: Then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient? They are not equal.
ayahs.n: then is one who was a believer like one who was defiantly disobedient they are not equal

ayahs.t: As for those who believed and did righteous deeds, for them will be the Gardens of Refuge as accommodation for what they used to do.
ayahs.n: as for those who believed and did righteous deeds for them will be the gardens of refuge as accommodation for what they used to do

ayahs.t: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny."
ayahs.n: but as for those who defiantly disobeyed their refuge is the fire every time they wish to emerge from it they will be returned to it while it is said to them taste the punishment of the fire which you used to deny

ayahs.t: And we will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will repent.
ayahs.n: and we will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will repent

ayahs.t: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution.
ayahs.n: and who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his lord then he turns away from them indeed we from the criminals will take retribution

ayahs.t: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And we made the Torah guidance for the Children of Israel.
ayahs.n: and we certainly gave moses the scripture so do not be in doubt over his meeting and we made the torah guidance for the children of israel

ayahs.t: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs.
ayahs.n: and we made from among them leaders guiding by our command when they were patient and when they were certain of our signs

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord will judge between them on the day of resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

ayahs.t: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear?
ayahs.n: has it not become clear to them how many generations we destroyed before them as they walk among their dwellings indeed in that are signs then do they not hear

ayahs.t: Have they not seen that We drive the water [in clouds] to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and [they] themselves? Then do they not see?
ayahs.n: have they not seen that we drive the water in clouds to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and they themselves then do they not see

ayahs.t: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.n: and they say when will be this conquest if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad on the day of conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them nor will they be reprieved

ayahs.t: So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting.
ayahs.n: so turn away from them and wait indeed they are waiting

ayahs.t: O Prophet, fear Allah and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: o prophet fear allah and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites indeed allah is ever knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And follow that which is revealed to you from your Lord. Indeed Allah is ever, with what you do, Acquainted.
ayahs.n: and follow that which is revealed to you from your lord indeed allah is ever with what you do acquainted

ayahs.t: And rely upon Allah; and sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs.
ayahs.n: and rely upon allah and sufficient is allah as disposer of affairs

ayahs.t: Allah has not made for a man two hearts in his interior. And He has not made your wives whom you declare unlawful your mothers. And he has not made your adopted sons your [true] sons. That is [merely] your saying by your mouths, but Allah says the truth, and He guides to the [right] way.
ayahs.n: allah has not made for a man two hearts in his interior and he has not made your wives whom you declare unlawful your mothers and he has not made your adopted sons your true sons that is merely your saying by your mouths but allah says the truth and he guides to the right way

ayahs.t: Call them by [the names of] their fathers; it is more just in the sight of Allah. But if you do not know their fathers - then they are [still] your brothers in religion and those entrusted to you. And there is no blame upon you for that in which you have erred but [only for] what your hearts intended. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: call them by the names of their fathers it is more just in the sight of allah but if you do not know their fathers then they are still your brothers in religion and those entrusted to you and there is no blame upon you for that in which you have erred but only for what your hearts intended and ever is allah forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: The Prophet is more worthy of the believers than themselves, and his wives are [in the position of] their mothers. And those of [blood] relationship are more entitled [to inheritance] in the decree of Allah than the [other] believers and the emigrants, except that you may do to your close associates a kindness [through bequest]. That was in the Book inscribed.
ayahs.n: the prophet is more worthy of the believers than themselves and his wives are in the position of their mothers and those of blood relationship are more entitled to inheritance in the decree of allah than the other believers and the emigrants except that you may do to your close associates a kindness through bequest that was in the book inscribed

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We took from the prophets their covenant and from you and from Noah and Abraham and Moses and Jesus, the son of Mary; and We took from them a solemn covenant.
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when we took from the prophets their covenant and from you and from noah and abraham and moses and jesus the son of mary and we took from them a solemn covenant

ayahs.t: That He may question the truthful about their truth. And He has prepared for the disbelievers a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: that he may question the truthful about their truth and he has prepared for the disbelievers a painful punishment

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, remember the favor of Allah upon you when armies came to [attack] you and We sent upon them a wind and armies [of angels] you did not see. And ever is Allah, of what you do, Seeing.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed remember the favor of allah upon you when armies came to attack you and we sent upon them a wind and armies of angels you did not see and ever is allah of what you do seeing

ayahs.t: [Remember] when they came at you from above you and from below you, and when eyes shifted [in fear], and hearts reached the throats and you assumed about Allah [various] assumptions.
ayahs.n: remember when they came at you from above you and from below you and when eyes shifted in fear and hearts reached the throats and you assumed about allah various assumptions

ayahs.t: There the believers were tested and shaken with a severe shaking.
ayahs.n: there the believers were tested and shaken with a severe shaking

ayahs.t: And [remember] when the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease said, "Allah and His Messenger did not promise us except delusion,"
ayahs.n: and remember when the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease said allah and his messenger did not promise us except delusion

ayahs.t: And when a faction of them said, "O people of Yathrib, there is no stability for you [here], so return [home]." And a party of them asked permission of the Prophet, saying, "Indeed, our houses are unprotected," while they were not exposed. They did not intend except to flee.
ayahs.n: and when a faction of them said o people of yathrib there is no stability for you here so return home and a party of them asked permission of the prophet saying indeed our houses are unprotected while they were not exposed they did not intend except to flee

ayahs.t: And if they had been entered upon from all its [surrounding] regions and fitnah had been demanded of them, they would have done it and not hesitated over it except briefly.
ayahs.n: and if they had been entered upon from all its surrounding regions and fitnah had been demanded of them they would have done it and not hesitated over it except briefly

ayahs.t: And they had already promised Allah before not to turn their backs and flee. And ever is the promise to Allah [that about which one will be] questioned.
ayahs.n: and they had already promised allah before not to turn their backs and flee and ever is the promise to allah that about which one will be questioned

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Never will fleeing benefit you if you should flee from death or killing; and then [if you did], you would not be given enjoyment [of life] except for a little."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad never will fleeing benefit you if you should flee from death or killing and then if you did you would not be given enjoyment of life except for a little

ayahs.t: Say, "Who is it that can protect you from Allah if He intends for you an ill or intends for you a mercy?" And they will not find for themselves besides Allah any protector or any helper.
ayahs.n: say who is it that can protect you from allah if he intends for you an ill or intends for you a mercy and they will not find for themselves besides allah any protector or any helper

ayahs.t: Already Allah knows the hinderers among you and those [hypocrites] who say to their brothers, "Come to us," and do not go to battle, except for a few,
ayahs.n: already allah knows the hinderers among you and those hypocrites who say to their brothers come to us and do not go to battle except for a few

ayahs.t: Indisposed toward you. And when fear comes, you see them looking at you, their eyes revolving like one being overcome by death. But when fear departs, they lash you with sharp tongues, indisposed toward [any] good. Those have not believed, so Allah has rendered their deeds worthless, and ever is that, for Allah, easy.
ayahs.n: indisposed toward you and when fear comes you see them looking at you their eyes revolving like one being overcome by death but when fear departs they lash you with sharp tongues indisposed toward any good those have not believed so allah has rendered their deeds worthless and ever is that for allah easy

ayahs.t: They think the companies have not [yet] withdrawn. And if the companies should come [again], they would wish they were in the desert among the bedouins, inquiring [from afar] about your news. And if they should be among you, they would not fight except for a little.
ayahs.n: they think the companies have not yet withdrawn and if the companies should come again they would wish they were in the desert among the bedouins inquiring from afar about your news and if they should be among you they would not fight except for a little

ayahs.t: There has certainly been for you in the Messenger of Allah an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day and [who] remembers Allah often.
ayahs.n: there has certainly been for you in the messenger of allah an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in allah and the last day and who remembers allah often

ayahs.t: And when the believers saw the companies, they said, "This is what Allah and His Messenger had promised us, and Allah and His Messenger spoke the truth." And it increased them only in faith and acceptance.
ayahs.n: and when the believers saw the companies they said this is what allah and his messenger had promised us and allah and his messenger spoke the truth and it increased them only in faith and acceptance

ayahs.t: Among the believers are men true to what they promised Allah. Among them is he who has fulfilled his vow [to the death], and among them is he who awaits [his chance]. And they did not alter [the terms of their commitment] by any alteration -
ayahs.n: among the believers are men true to what they promised allah among them is he who has fulfilled his vow to the death and among them is he who awaits his chance and they did not alter the terms of their commitment by any alteration
