ayahs.t: That Allah may reward the truthful for their truth and punish the hypocrites if He wills or accept their repentance. Indeed, Allah is ever Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: that allah may reward the truthful for their truth and punish the hypocrites if he wills or accept their repentance indeed allah is ever forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And Allah repelled those who disbelieved, in their rage, not having obtained any good. And sufficient was Allah for the believers in battle, and ever is Allah Powerful and Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: and allah repelled those who disbelieved in their rage not having obtained any good and sufficient was allah for the believers in battle and ever is allah powerful and exalted in might

ayahs.t: And He brought down those who supported them among the People of the Scripture from their fortresses and cast terror into their hearts [so that] a party you killed, and you took captive a party.
ayahs.n: and he brought down those who supported them among the people of the scripture from their fortresses and cast terror into their hearts so that a party you killed and you took captive a party

ayahs.t: And He caused you to inherit their land and their homes and their properties and a land which you have not trodden. And ever is Allah, over all things, competent.
ayahs.n: and he caused you to inherit their land and their homes and their properties and a land which you have not trodden and ever is allah over all things competent

ayahs.t: O Prophet, say to your wives, "If you should desire the worldly life and its adornment, then come, I will provide for you and give you a gracious release.
ayahs.n: o prophet say to your wives if you should desire the worldly life and its adornment then come i will provide for you and give you a gracious release

ayahs.t: But if you should desire Allah and His Messenger and the home of the Hereafter - then indeed, Allah has prepared for the doers of good among you a great reward."
ayahs.n: but if you should desire allah and his messenger and the home of the hereafter then indeed allah has prepared for the doers of good among you a great reward

ayahs.t: O wives of the Prophet, whoever of you should commit a clear immorality - for her the punishment would be doubled two fold, and ever is that, for Allah, easy.
ayahs.n: o wives of the prophet whoever of you should commit a clear immorality for her the punishment would be doubled two fold and ever is that for allah easy

ayahs.t: And whoever of you devoutly obeys Allah and His Messenger and does righteousness - We will give her her reward twice; and We have prepared for her a noble provision.
ayahs.n: and whoever of you devoutly obeys allah and his messenger and does righteousness we will give her her reward twice and we have prepared for her a noble provision

ayahs.t: O wives of the Prophet, you are not like anyone among women. If you fear Allah, then do not be soft in speech [to men], lest he in whose heart is disease should covet, but speak with appropriate speech.
ayahs.n: o wives of the prophet you are not like anyone among women if you fear allah then do not be soft in speech to men lest he in whose heart is disease should covet but speak with appropriate speech

ayahs.t: And abide in your houses and do not display yourselves as [was] the display of the former times of ignorance. And establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. Allah intends only to remove from you the impurity [of sin], O people of the [Prophet's] household, and to purify you with [extensive] purification.
ayahs.n: and abide in your houses and do not display yourselves as was the display of the former times of ignorance and establish prayer and give zakah and obey allah and his messenger allah intends only to remove from you the impurity of sin o people of the prophets household and to purify you with extensive purification

ayahs.t: And remember what is recited in your houses of the verses of Allah and wisdom. Indeed, Allah is ever Subtle and Acquainted [with all things].
ayahs.n: and remember what is recited in your houses of the verses of allah and wisdom indeed allah is ever subtle and acquainted with all things

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Muslim men and Muslim women, the believing men and believing women, the obedient men and obedient women, the truthful men and truthful women, the patient men and patient women, the humble men and humble women, the charitable men and charitable women, the fasting men and fasting women, the men who guard their private parts and the women who do so, and the men who remember Allah often and the women who do so - for them Allah has prepared forgiveness and a great reward.
ayahs.n: indeed the muslim men and muslim women the believing men and believing women the obedient men and obedient women the truthful men and truthful women the patient men and patient women the humble men and humble women the charitable men and charitable women the fasting men and fasting women the men who guard their private parts and the women who do so and the men who remember allah often and the women who do so for them allah has prepared forgiveness and a great reward

ayahs.t: It is not for a believing man or a believing woman, when Allah and His Messenger have decided a matter, that they should [thereafter] have any choice about their affair. And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly strayed into clear error.
ayahs.n: it is not for a believing man or a believing woman when allah and his messenger have decided a matter that they should thereafter have any choice about their affair and whoever disobeys allah and his messenger has certainly strayed into clear error

ayahs.t: And [remember, O Muhammad], when you said to the one on whom Allah bestowed favor and you bestowed favor, "Keep your wife and fear Allah," while you concealed within yourself that which Allah is to disclose. And you feared the people, while Allah has more right that you fear Him. So when Zayd had no longer any need for her, We married her to you in order that there not be upon the believers any discomfort concerning the wives of their adopted sons when they no longer have need of them. And ever is the command of Allah accomplished.
ayahs.n: and remember o muhammad when you said to the one on whom allah bestowed favor and you bestowed favor keep your wife and fear allah while you concealed within yourself that which allah is to disclose and you feared the people while allah has more right that you fear him so when zayd had no longer any need for her we married her to you in order that there not be upon the believers any discomfort concerning the wives of their adopted sons when they no longer have need of them and ever is the command of allah accomplished

ayahs.t: There is not to be upon the Prophet any discomfort concerning that which Allah has imposed upon him. [This is] the established way of Allah with those [prophets] who have passed on before. And ever is the command of Allah a destiny decreed.
ayahs.n: there is not to be upon the prophet any discomfort concerning that which allah has imposed upon him this is the established way of allah with those prophets who have passed on before and ever is the command of allah a destiny decreed

ayahs.t: [Allah praises] those who convey the messages of Allah and fear Him and do not fear anyone but Allah. And sufficient is Allah as Accountant.
ayahs.n: allah praises those who convey the messages of allah and fear him and do not fear anyone but allah and sufficient is allah as accountant

ayahs.t: Muhammad is not the father of [any] one of your men, but [he is] the Messenger of Allah and last of the prophets. And ever is Allah, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: muhammad is not the father of any one of your men but he is the messenger of allah and last of the prophets and ever is allah of all things knowing

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance
ayahs.n: o you who have believed remember allah with much remembrance

ayahs.t: And exalt Him morning and afternoon.
ayahs.n: and exalt him morning and afternoon

ayahs.t: It is He who confers blessing upon you, and His angels [ask Him to do so] that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And ever is He, to the believers, Merciful.
ayahs.n: it is he who confers blessing upon you and his angels ask him to do so that he may bring you out from darknesses into the light and ever is he to the believers merciful

ayahs.t: Their greeting the Day they meet Him will be, "Peace." And He has prepared for them a noble reward.
ayahs.n: their greeting the day they meet him will be peace and he has prepared for them a noble reward

ayahs.t: O Prophet, indeed We have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
ayahs.n: o prophet indeed we have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner

ayahs.t: And one who invites to Allah, by His permission, and an illuminating lamp.
ayahs.n: and one who invites to allah by his permission and an illuminating lamp

ayahs.t: And give good tidings to the believers that they will have from Allah great bounty.
ayahs.n: and give good tidings to the believers that they will have from allah great bounty

ayahs.t: And do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites but do not harm them, and rely upon Allah. And sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs.
ayahs.n: and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites but do not harm them and rely upon allah and sufficient is allah as disposer of affairs

ayahs.t: O You who have believed, when you marry believing women and then divorce them before you have touched them, then there is not for you any waiting period to count concerning them. So provide for them and give them a gracious release.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when you marry believing women and then divorce them before you have touched them then there is not for you any waiting period to count concerning them so provide for them and give them a gracious release

ayahs.t: O Prophet, indeed We have made lawful to you your wives to whom you have given their due compensation and those your right hand possesses from what Allah has returned to you [of captives] and the daughters of your paternal uncles and the daughters of your paternal aunts and the daughters of your maternal uncles and the daughters of your maternal aunts who emigrated with you and a believing woman if she gives herself to the Prophet [and] if the Prophet wishes to marry her, [this is] only for you, excluding the [other] believers. We certainly know what We have made obligatory upon them concerning their wives and those their right hands possess, [but this is for you] in order that there will be upon you no discomfort. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o prophet indeed we have made lawful to you your wives to whom you have given their due compensation and those your right hand possesses from what allah has returned to you of captives and the daughters of your paternal uncles and the daughters of your paternal aunts and the daughters of your maternal uncles and the daughters of your maternal aunts who emigrated with you and a believing woman if she gives herself to the prophet and if the prophet wishes to marry her this is only for you excluding the other believers we certainly know what we have made obligatory upon them concerning their wives and those their right hands possess but this is for you in order that there will be upon you no discomfort and ever is allah forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: You, [O Muhammad], may put aside whom you will of them or take to yourself whom you will. And any that you desire of those [wives] from whom you had [temporarily] separated - there is no blame upon you [in returning her]. That is more suitable that they should be content and not grieve and that they should be satisfied with what you have given them - all of them. And Allah knows what is in your hearts. And ever is Allah Knowing and Forbearing.
ayahs.n: you o muhammad may put aside whom you will of them or take to yourself whom you will and any that you desire of those wives from whom you had temporarily separated there is no blame upon you in returning her that is more suitable that they should be content and not grieve and that they should be satisfied with what you have given them all of them and allah knows what is in your hearts and ever is allah knowing and forbearing

ayahs.t: Not lawful to you, [O Muhammad], are [any additional] women after [this], nor [is it] for you to exchange them for [other] wives, even if their beauty were to please you, except what your right hand possesses. And ever is Allah, over all things, an Observer.
ayahs.n: not lawful to you o muhammad are any additional women after this nor is it for you to exchange them for other wives even if their beauty were to please you except what your right hand possesses and ever is allah over all things an observer

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, do not enter the houses of the Prophet except when you are permitted for a meal, without awaiting its readiness. But when you are invited, then enter; and when you have eaten, disperse without seeking to remain for conversation. Indeed, that [behavior] was troubling the Prophet, and he is shy of [dismissing] you. But Allah is not shy of the truth. And when you ask [his wives] for something, ask them from behind a partition. That is purer for your hearts and their hearts. And it is not [conceivable or lawful] for you to harm the Messenger of Allah or to marry his wives after him, ever. Indeed, that would be in the sight of Allah an enormity.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed do not enter the houses of the prophet except when you are permitted for a meal without awaiting its readiness but when you are invited then enter and when you have eaten disperse without seeking to remain for conversation indeed that behavior was troubling the prophet and he is shy of dismissing you but allah is not shy of the truth and when you ask his wives for something ask them from behind a partition that is purer for your hearts and their hearts and it is not conceivable or lawful for you to harm the messenger of allah or to marry his wives after him ever indeed that would be in the sight of allah an enormity

ayahs.t: Whether you reveal a thing or conceal it, indeed Allah is ever, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: whether you reveal a thing or conceal it indeed allah is ever of all things knowing

ayahs.t: There is no blame upon women concerning their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their brothers' sons or their sisters' sons or their women or those their right hands possess. And fear Allah. Indeed Allah is ever, over all things, Witness.
ayahs.n: there is no blame upon women concerning their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their brothers sons or their sisters sons or their women or those their right hands possess and fear allah indeed allah is ever over all things witness

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah confers blessing upon the Prophet, and His angels [ask Him to do so]. O you who have believed, ask [Allah to confer] blessing upon him and ask [Allah to grant him] peace.
ayahs.n: indeed allah confers blessing upon the prophet and his angels ask him to do so o you who have believed ask allah to confer blessing upon him and ask allah to grant him peace

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who abuse Allah and His Messenger - Allah has cursed them in this world and the Hereafter and prepared for them a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: indeed those who abuse allah and his messenger allah has cursed them in this world and the hereafter and prepared for them a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: And those who harm believing men and believing women for [something] other than what they have earned have certainly born upon themselves a slander and manifest sin.
ayahs.n: and those who harm believing men and believing women for something other than what they have earned have certainly born upon themselves a slander and manifest sin

ayahs.t: O Prophet, tell your wives and your daughters and the women of the believers to bring down over themselves [part] of their outer garments. That is more suitable that they will be known and not be abused. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o prophet tell your wives and your daughters and the women of the believers to bring down over themselves part of their outer garments that is more suitable that they will be known and not be abused and ever is allah forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: If the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease and those who spread rumors in al-Madinah do not cease, We will surely incite you against them; then they will not remain your neighbors therein except for a little.
ayahs.n: if the hypocrites and those in whose hearts is disease and those who spread rumors in al madinah do not cease we will surely incite you against them then they will not remain your neighbors therein except for a little

ayahs.t: Accursed wherever they are found, [being] seized and massacred completely.
ayahs.n: accursed wherever they are found being seized and massacred completely

ayahs.t: [This is] the established way of Allah with those who passed on before; and you will not find in the way of Allah any change.
ayahs.n: this is the established way of allah with those who passed on before and you will not find in the way of allah any change

ayahs.t: People ask you concerning the Hour. Say," Knowledge of it is only with Allah. And what may make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near."
ayahs.n: people ask you concerning the hour say knowledge of it is only with allah and what may make you perceive perhaps the hour is near

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah has cursed the disbelievers and prepared for them a Blaze.
ayahs.n: indeed allah has cursed the disbelievers and prepared for them a blaze

ayahs.t: Abiding therein forever, they will not find a protector or a helper.
ayahs.n: abiding therein forever they will not find a protector or a helper

ayahs.t: The Day their faces will be turned about in the Fire, they will say, "How we wish we had obeyed Allah and obeyed the Messenger."
ayahs.n: the day their faces will be turned about in the fire they will say how we wish we had obeyed allah and obeyed the messenger

ayahs.t: And they will say, "Our Lord, indeed we obeyed our masters and our dignitaries, and they led us astray from the [right] way.
ayahs.n: and they will say our lord indeed we obeyed our masters and our dignitaries and they led us astray from the right way

ayahs.t: Our Lord, give them double the punishment and curse them with a great curse."
ayahs.n: our lord give them double the punishment and curse them with a great curse

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, be not like those who abused Moses; then Allah cleared him of what they said. And he, in the sight of Allah, was distinguished.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed be not like those who abused moses then allah cleared him of what they said and he in the sight of allah was distinguished

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, fear Allah and speak words of appropriate justice.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed fear allah and speak words of appropriate justice

ayahs.t: He will [then] amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly attained a great attainment.
ayahs.n: he will then amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins and whoever obeys allah and his messenger has certainly attained a great attainment

ayahs.t: Indeed, we offered the Trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains, and they declined to bear it and feared it; but man [undertook to] bear it. Indeed, he was unjust and ignorant.
ayahs.n: indeed we offered the trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains and they declined to bear it and feared it but man undertook to bear it indeed he was unjust and ignorant

ayahs.t: [It was] so that Allah may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the men and women who associate others with Him and that Allah may accept repentance from the believing men and believing women. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: it was so that allah may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the men and women who associate others with him and that allah may accept repentance from the believing men and believing women and ever is allah forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and to Him belongs [all] praise in the Hereafter. And He is the Wise, the Acquainted.
ayahs.n: all praise is due to allah to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and to him belongs all praise in the hereafter and he is the wise the acquainted

ayahs.t: He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein. And He is the Merciful, the Forgiving.
ayahs.n: he knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein and he is the merciful the forgiving

ayahs.t: But those who disbelieve say, "The Hour will not come to us." Say, "Yes, by my Lord, it will surely come to you. [Allah is] the Knower of the unseen." Not absent from Him is an atom's weight within the heavens or within the earth or [what is] smaller than that or greater, except that it is in a clear register -
ayahs.n: but those who disbelieve say the hour will not come to us say yes by my lord it will surely come to you allah is the knower of the unseen not absent from him is an atoms weight within the heavens or within the earth or what is smaller than that or greater except that it is in a clear register

ayahs.t: That He may reward those who believe and do righteous deeds. Those will have forgiveness and noble provision.
ayahs.n: that he may reward those who believe and do righteous deeds those will have forgiveness and noble provision

ayahs.t: But those who strive against Our verses [seeking] to cause failure - for them will be a painful punishment of foul nature.
ayahs.n: but those who strive against our verses seeking to cause failure for them will be a painful punishment of foul nature

ayahs.t: And those who have been given knowledge see that what is revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, and it guides to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: and those who have been given knowledge see that what is revealed to you from your lord is the truth and it guides to the path of the exalted in might the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: But those who disbelieve say, "Shall we direct you to a man who will inform you [that] when you have disintegrated in complete disintegration, you will [then] be [recreated] in a new creation?
ayahs.n: but those who disbelieve say shall we direct you to a man who will inform you that when you have disintegrated in complete disintegration you will then be recreated in a new creation

ayahs.t: Has he invented about Allah a lie or is there in him madness?" Rather, they who do not believe in the Hereafter will be in the punishment and [are in] extreme error.
ayahs.n: has he invented about allah a lie or is there in him madness rather they who do not believe in the hereafter will be in the punishment and are in extreme error

ayahs.t: Then, do they not look at what is before them and what is behind them of the heaven and earth? If We should will, We could cause the earth to swallow them or [could] let fall upon them fragments from the sky. Indeed in that is a sign for every servant turning back [to Allah].
ayahs.n: then do they not look at what is before them and what is behind them of the heaven and earth if we should will we could cause the earth to swallow them or could let fall upon them fragments from the sky indeed in that is a sign for every servant turning back to allah

ayahs.t: And We certainly gave David from Us bounty. [We said], "O mountains, repeat [Our] praises with him, and the birds [as well]." And We made pliable for him iron,
ayahs.n: and we certainly gave david from us bounty we said o mountains repeat our praises with him and the birds as well and we made pliable for him iron

ayahs.t: [Commanding him], "Make full coats of mail and calculate [precisely] the links, and work [all of you] righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Seeing."
ayahs.n: commanding him make full coats of mail and calculate precisely the links and work all of you righteousness indeed i of what you do am seeing

ayahs.t: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind - its morning [journey was that of] a month - and its afternoon [journey was that of] a month, and We made flow for him a spring of [liquid] copper. And among the jinn were those who worked for him by the permission of his Lord. And whoever deviated among them from Our command - We will make him taste of the punishment of the Blaze.
ayahs.n: and to solomon we subjected the wind its morning journey was that of a month and its afternoon journey was that of a month and we made flow for him a spring of liquid copper and among the jinn were those who worked for him by the permission of his lord and whoever deviated among them from our command we will make him taste of the punishment of the blaze

ayahs.t: They made for him what he willed of elevated chambers, statues, bowls like reservoirs, and stationary kettles. [We said], "Work, O family of David, in gratitude." And few of My servants are grateful.
ayahs.n: they made for him what he willed of elevated chambers statues bowls like reservoirs and stationary kettles we said work o family of david in gratitude and few of my servants are grateful

ayahs.t: And when We decreed for Solomon death, nothing indicated to the jinn his death except a creature of the earth eating his staff. But when he fell, it became clear to the jinn that if they had known the unseen, they would not have remained in humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: and when we decreed for solomon death nothing indicated to the jinn his death except a creature of the earth eating his staff but when he fell it became clear to the jinn that if they had known the unseen they would not have remained in humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: There was for [the tribe of] Saba' in their dwelling place a sign: two [fields of] gardens on the right and on the left. [They were told], "Eat from the provisions of your Lord and be grateful to Him. A good land [have you], and a forgiving Lord."
ayahs.n: there was for the tribe of saba in their dwelling place a sign two fields of gardens on the right and on the left they were told eat from the provisions of your lord and be grateful to him a good land have you and a forgiving lord

ayahs.t: But they turned away [refusing], so We sent upon them the flood of the dam, and We replaced their two [fields of] gardens with gardens of bitter fruit, tamarisks and something of sparse lote trees.
ayahs.n: but they turned away refusing so we sent upon them the flood of the dam and we replaced their two fields of gardens with gardens of bitter fruit tamarisks and something of sparse lote trees

ayahs.t: [By] that We repaid them because they disbelieved. And do We [thus] repay except the ungrateful?
ayahs.n: by that we repaid them because they disbelieved and do we thus repay except the ungrateful

ayahs.t: And We placed between them and the cities which We had blessed [many] visible cities. And We determined between them the [distances of] journey, [saying], "Travel between them by night or day in safety."
ayahs.n: and we placed between them and the cities which we had blessed many visible cities and we determined between them the distances of journey saying travel between them by night or day in safety

ayahs.t: But [insolently] they said, "Our Lord, lengthen the distance between our journeys," and wronged themselves, so We made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
ayahs.n: but insolently they said our lord lengthen the distance between our journeys and wronged themselves so we made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

ayahs.t: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers.
ayahs.n: and iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption so they followed him except for a party of believers

ayahs.t: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian.
ayahs.n: and he had over them no authority except it was decreed that we might make evident who believes in the hereafter from who is thereof in doubt and your lord over all things is guardian

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom's weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad invoke those you claim as deities besides allah they do not possess an atoms weight of ability in the heavens or on the earth and they do not have therein any partnership with him nor is there for him from among them any assistant

ayahs.t: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand.
ayahs.n: and intercession does not benefit with him except for one whom he permits and those wait until when terror is removed from their hearts they will say to one another what has your lord said they will say the truth and he is the most high the grand

ayahs.t: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error."
ayahs.n: say who provides for you from the heavens and the earth say allah and indeed we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error

ayahs.t: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do."
ayahs.n: say you will not be asked about what we committed and we will not be asked about what you do

ayahs.t: Say, "Our Lord will bring us together; then He will judge between us in truth. And He is the Knowing Judge."
ayahs.n: say our lord will bring us together then he will judge between us in truth and he is the knowing judge

ayahs.t: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
ayahs.n: say show me those whom you have attached to him as partners no rather he alone is allah the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know.
ayahs.n: and we have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.n: and they say when is this promise if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]."
ayahs.n: say for you is the appointment of a day when you will not remain thereafter an hour nor will you precede it

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieve say, "We will never believe in this Qur'an nor in that before it." But if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their Lord, refuting each other's words... Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "If not for you, we would have been believers."
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieve say we will never believe in this quran nor in that before it but if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their lord refuting each others words those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant if not for you we would have been believers

ayahs.t: Those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed, "Did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you? Rather, you were criminals."
ayahs.n: those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you rather you were criminals

ayahs.t: Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "Rather, [it was your] conspiracy of night and day when you were ordering us to disbelieve in Allah and attribute to Him equals." But they will [all] confide regret when they see the punishment; and We will put shackles on the necks of those who disbelieved. Will they be recompensed except for what they used to do?
ayahs.n: those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant rather it was your conspiracy of night and day when you were ordering us to disbelieve in allah and attribute to him equals but they will all confide regret when they see the punishment and we will put shackles on the necks of those who disbelieved will they be recompensed except for what they used to do

ayahs.t: And We did not send into a city any warner except that its affluent said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers."
ayahs.n: and we did not send into a city any warner except that its affluent said indeed we in that with which you were sent are disbelievers

ayahs.t: And they said, "We are more [than the believers] in wealth and children, and we are not to be punished."
ayahs.n: and they said we are more than the believers in wealth and children and we are not to be punished

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it], but most of the people do not know."
ayahs.n: say indeed my lord extends provision for whom he wills and restricts it but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: And it is not your wealth or your children that bring you nearer to Us in position, but it is [by being] one who has believed and done righteousness. For them there will be the double reward for what they did, and they will be in the upper chambers [of Paradise], safe [and secure].
ayahs.n: and it is not your wealth or your children that bring you nearer to us in position but it is by being one who has believed and done righteousness for them there will be the double reward for what they did and they will be in the upper chambers of paradise safe and secure

ayahs.t: And the ones who strive against Our verses to cause [them] failure - those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].
ayahs.n: and the ones who strive against our verses to cause them failure those will be brought into the punishment to remain

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts [it] for him. But whatever thing you spend [in His cause] - He will compensate it; and He is the best of providers."
ayahs.n: say indeed my lord extends provision for whom he wills of his servants and restricts it for him but whatever thing you spend in his cause he will compensate it and he is the best of providers

ayahs.t: And [mention] the Day when He will gather them all and then say to the angels, "Did these [people] used to worship you?"
ayahs.n: and mention the day when he will gather them all and then say to the angels did these people used to worship you

ayahs.t: They will say, "Exalted are You! You, [O Allah], are our benefactor not them. Rather, they used to worship the jinn; most of them were believers in them."
ayahs.n: they will say exalted are you you o allah are our benefactor not them rather they used to worship the jinn most of them were believers in them

ayahs.t: But today you do not hold for one another [the power of] benefit or harm, and We will say to those who wronged, "Taste the punishment of the Fire, which you used to deny."
ayahs.n: but today you do not hold for one another the power of benefit or harm and we will say to those who wronged taste the punishment of the fire which you used to deny

ayahs.t: And when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, they say, "This is not but a man who wishes to avert you from that which your fathers were worshipping." And they say, "This is not except a lie invented." And those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, "This is not but obvious magic."
ayahs.n: and when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences they say this is not but a man who wishes to avert you from that which your fathers were worshipping and they say this is not except a lie invented and those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them this is not but obvious magic

ayahs.t: And We had not given them any scriptures which they could study, and We had not sent to them before you, [O Muhammad], any warner.
ayahs.n: and we had not given them any scriptures which they could study and we had not sent to them before you o muhammad any warner

ayahs.t: And those before them denied, and the people of Makkah have not attained a tenth of what We had given them. But the former peoples denied My messengers, so how [terrible] was My reproach.
ayahs.n: and those before them denied and the people of makkah have not attained a tenth of what we had given them but the former peoples denied my messengers so how terrible was my reproach

ayahs.t: Say, "I only advise you of one [thing] - that you stand for Allah, [seeking truth] in pairs and individually, and then give thought." There is not in your companion any madness. He is only a warner to you before a severe punishment.
ayahs.n: say i only advise you of one thing that you stand for allah seeking truth in pairs and individually and then give thought there is not in your companion any madness he is only a warner to you before a severe punishment

ayahs.t: Say, "Whatever payment I might have asked of you - it is yours. My payment is only from Allah, and He is, over all things, Witness."
ayahs.n: say whatever payment i might have asked of you it is yours my payment is only from allah and he is over all things witness

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, my Lord projects the truth. Knower of the unseen."
ayahs.n: say indeed my lord projects the truth knower of the unseen

ayahs.t: Say, "The truth has come, and falsehood can neither begin [anything] nor repeat [it]."
ayahs.n: say the truth has come and falsehood can neither begin anything nor repeat it

ayahs.t: Say, "If I should err, I would only err against myself. But if I am guided, it is by what my Lord reveals to me. Indeed, He is Hearing and near."
ayahs.n: say if i should err i would only err against myself but if i am guided it is by what my lord reveals to me indeed he is hearing and near

ayahs.t: And if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape, and they will be seized from a place nearby.
ayahs.n: and if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape and they will be seized from a place nearby

ayahs.t: And they will [then] say, "We believe in it!" But how for them will be the taking [of faith] from a place far away?
ayahs.n: and they will then say we believe in it but how for them will be the taking of faith from a place far away

ayahs.t: And they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away.
ayahs.n: and they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away

ayahs.t: And prevention will be placed between them and what they desire, as was done with their kind before. Indeed, they were in disquieting denial.
ayahs.n: and prevention will be placed between them and what they desire as was done with their kind before indeed they were in disquieting denial

ayahs.t: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four. He increases in creation what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: all praise is due to allah creator of the heavens and the earth who made the angels messengers having wings two or three or four he increases in creation what he wills indeed allah is over all things competent

ayahs.t: Whatever Allah grants to people of mercy - none can withhold it; and whatever He withholds - none can release it thereafter. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: whatever allah grants to people of mercy none can withhold it and whatever he withholds none can release it thereafter and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: O mankind, remember the favor of Allah upon you. Is there any creator other than Allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth? There is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded?
ayahs.n: o mankind remember the favor of allah upon you is there any creator other than allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth there is no deity except him so how are you deluded

ayahs.t: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - already were messengers denied before you. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
ayahs.n: and if they deny you o muhammad already were messengers denied before you and to allah are returned all matters

ayahs.t: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver.
ayahs.n: o mankind indeed the promise of allah is truth so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about allah by the deceiver

ayahs.t: Indeed, Satan is an enemy to you; so take him as an enemy. He only invites his party to be among the companions of the Blaze.
ayahs.n: indeed satan is an enemy to you so take him as an enemy he only invites his party to be among the companions of the blaze

ayahs.t: Those who disbelieve will have a severe punishment, and those who believe and do righteous deeds will have forgiveness and great reward.
ayahs.n: those who disbelieve will have a severe punishment and those who believe and do righteous deeds will have forgiveness and great reward

ayahs.t: Then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good [like one rightly guided]? For indeed, Allah sends astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. So do not let yourself perish over them in regret. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do.
ayahs.n: then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good like one rightly guided for indeed allah sends astray whom he wills and guides whom he wills so do not let yourself perish over them in regret indeed allah is knowing of what they do

ayahs.t: And it is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds, and We drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Thus is the resurrection.
ayahs.n: and it is allah who sends the winds and they stir the clouds and we drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness thus is the resurrection

ayahs.t: Whoever desires honor [through power] - then to Allah belongs all honor. To Him ascends good speech, and righteous work raises it. But they who plot evil deeds will have a severe punishment, and the plotting of those - it will perish.
ayahs.n: whoever desires honor through power then to allah belongs all honor to him ascends good speech and righteous work raises it but they who plot evil deeds will have a severe punishment and the plotting of those it will perish

ayahs.t: And Allah created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop; then He made you mates. And no female conceives nor does she give birth except with His knowledge. And no aged person is granted [additional] life nor is his lifespan lessened but that it is in a register. Indeed, that for Allah is easy.
ayahs.n: and allah created you from dust then from a sperm drop then he made you mates and no female conceives nor does she give birth except with his knowledge and no aged person is granted additional life nor is his lifespan lessened but that it is in a register indeed that for allah is easy

ayahs.t: And not alike are the two bodies of water. One is fresh and sweet, palatable for drinking, and one is salty and bitter. And from each you eat tender meat and extract ornaments which you wear, and you see the ships plowing through [them] that you might seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.
ayahs.n: and not alike are the two bodies of water one is fresh and sweet palatable for drinking and one is salty and bitter and from each you eat tender meat and extract ornaments which you wear and you see the ships plowing through them that you might seek of his bounty and perhaps you will be grateful

ayahs.t: He causes the night to enter the day, and He causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon - each running [its course] for a specified term. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs sovereignty. And those whom you invoke other than Him do not possess [as much as] the membrane of a date seed.
ayahs.n: he causes the night to enter the day and he causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon each running its course for a specified term that is allah your lord to him belongs sovereignty and those whom you invoke other than him do not possess as much as the membrane of a date seed

ayahs.t: If you invoke them, they do not hear your supplication; and if they heard, they would not respond to you. And on the Day of Resurrection they will deny your association. And none can inform you like [one] Acquainted [with all matters].
ayahs.n: if you invoke them they do not hear your supplication and if they heard they would not respond to you and on the day of resurrection they will deny your association and none can inform you like one acquainted with all matters

ayahs.t: O mankind, you are those in need of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: o mankind you are those in need of allah while allah is the free of need the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: If He wills, He can do away with you and bring forth a new creation.
ayahs.n: if he wills he can do away with you and bring forth a new creation

ayahs.t: And that is for Allah not difficult.
ayahs.n: and that is for allah not difficult

ayahs.t: And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And if a heavily laden soul calls [another] to [carry some of] its load, nothing of it will be carried, even if he should be a close relative. You can only warn those who fear their Lord unseen and have established prayer. And whoever purifies himself only purifies himself for [the benefit of] his soul. And to Allah is the [final] destination.
ayahs.n: and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another and if a heavily laden soul calls another to carry some of its load nothing of it will be carried even if he should be a close relative you can only warn those who fear their lord unseen and have established prayer and whoever purifies himself only purifies himself for the benefit of his soul and to allah is the final destination

ayahs.t: Not equal are the blind and the seeing,
ayahs.n: not equal are the blind and the seeing

ayahs.t: Nor are the darknesses and the light,
ayahs.n: nor are the darknesses and the light

ayahs.t: Nor are the shade and the heat,
ayahs.n: nor are the shade and the heat

ayahs.t: And not equal are the living and the dead. Indeed, Allah causes to hear whom He wills, but you cannot make hear those in the graves.
ayahs.n: and not equal are the living and the dead indeed allah causes to hear whom he wills but you cannot make hear those in the graves

ayahs.t: You, [O Muhammad], are not but a warner.
ayahs.n: you o muhammad are not but a warner

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have sent you with the truth as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. And there was no nation but that there had passed within it a warner.
ayahs.n: indeed we have sent you with the truth as a bringer of good tidings and a warner and there was no nation but that there had passed within it a warner

ayahs.t: And if they deny you - then already have those before them denied. Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening Scripture.
ayahs.n: and if they deny you then already have those before them denied their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening scripture

ayahs.t: Then I seized the ones who disbelieved, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
ayahs.n: then i seized the ones who disbelieved and how terrible was my reproach

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky, and We produce thereby fruits of varying colors? And in the mountains are tracts, white and red of varying shades and [some] extremely black.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah sends down rain from the sky and we produce thereby fruits of varying colors and in the mountains are tracts white and red of varying shades and some extremely black

ayahs.t: And among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly. Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Forgiving.
ayahs.n: and among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly only those fear allah from among his servants who have knowledge indeed allah is exalted in might and forgiving

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend [in His cause] out of what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, [can] expect a profit that will never perish -
ayahs.n: indeed those who recite the book of allah and establish prayer and spend in his cause out of what we have provided them secretly and publicly can expect a profit that will never perish

ayahs.t: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative.
ayahs.n: that he may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of his bounty indeed he is forgiving and appreciative

ayahs.t: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed, Allah, of His servants, is Acquainted and Seeing.
ayahs.n: and that which we have revealed to you o muhammad of the book is the truth confirming what was before it indeed allah of his servants is acquainted and seeing

ayahs.t: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty.
ayahs.n: then we caused to inherit the book those we have chosen of our servants and among them is he who wrongs himself and among them is he who is moderate and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of allah that inheritance is what is the great bounty

ayahs.t: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk.
ayahs.n: for them are gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter they will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls and their garments therein will be silk

ayahs.t: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative -
ayahs.n: and they will say praise to allah who has removed from us all sorrow indeed our lord is forgiving and appreciative

ayahs.t: He who has settled us in the home of duration out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]."
ayahs.n: he who has settled us in the home of duration out of his bounty there touches us not in it any fatigue and there touches us not in it weariness of mind

ayahs.t: And for those who disbelieve will be the fire of Hell. [Death] is not decreed for them so they may die, nor will its torment be lightened for them. Thus do we recompense every ungrateful one.
ayahs.n: and for those who disbelieve will be the fire of hell death is not decreed for them so they may die nor will its torment be lightened for them thus do we recompense every ungrateful one

ayahs.t: And they will cry out therein, "Our Lord, remove us; we will do righteousness - other than what we were doing!" But did We not grant you life enough for whoever would remember therein to remember, and the warner had come to you? So taste [the punishment], for there is not for the wrongdoers any helper.
ayahs.n: and they will cry out therein our lord remove us we will do righteousness other than what we were doing but did we not grant you life enough for whoever would remember therein to remember and the warner had come to you so taste the punishment for there is not for the wrongdoers any helper

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah is Knower of the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and earth. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: indeed allah is knower of the unseen aspects of the heavens and earth indeed he is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: It is He who has made you successors upon the earth. And whoever disbelieves - upon him will be [the consequence of] his disbelief. And the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them in the sight of their Lord except in hatred; and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them except in loss.
ayahs.n: it is he who has made you successors upon the earth and whoever disbelieves upon him will be the consequence of his disbelief and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them in the sight of their lord except in hatred and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them except in loss

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered your 'partners' whom you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created from the earth, or have they partnership [with Him] in the heavens? Or have We given them a book so they are [standing] on evidence therefrom? [No], rather, the wrongdoers do not promise each other except delusion."
ayahs.n: say have you considered your partners whom you invoke besides allah show me what they have created from the earth or have they partnership with him in the heavens or have we given them a book so they are standing on evidence therefrom no rather the wrongdoers do not promise each other except delusion

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving.
ayahs.n: indeed allah holds the heavens and the earth lest they cease and if they should cease no one could hold them in place after him indeed he is forbearing and forgiving

ayahs.t: And they swore by Allah their strongest oaths that if a warner came to them, they would be more guided than [any] one of the [previous] nations. But when a warner came to them, it did not increase them except in aversion.
ayahs.n: and they swore by allah their strongest oaths that if a warner came to them they would be more guided than any one of the previous nations but when a warner came to them it did not increase them except in aversion

ayahs.t: [Due to] arrogance in the land and plotting of evil; but the evil plot does not encompass except its own people. Then do they await except the way of the former peoples? But you will never find in the way of Allah any change, and you will never find in the way of Allah any alteration.
ayahs.n: due to arrogance in the land and plotting of evil but the evil plot does not encompass except its own people then do they await except the way of the former peoples but you will never find in the way of allah any change and you will never find in the way of allah any alteration

ayahs.t: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent.
ayahs.n: have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them and they were greater than them in power but allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth indeed he is ever knowing and competent

ayahs.t: And if Allah were to impose blame on the people for what they have earned, He would not leave upon the earth any creature. But He defers them for a specified term. And when their time comes, then indeed Allah has ever been, of His servants, Seeing.
ayahs.n: and if allah were to impose blame on the people for what they have earned he would not leave upon the earth any creature but he defers them for a specified term and when their time comes then indeed allah has ever been of his servants seeing

ayahs.t: Ya, Seen.
ayahs.n: ya seen

ayahs.t: By the wise Qur'an.
ayahs.n: by the wise quran

ayahs.t: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers,
ayahs.n: indeed you o muhammad are from among the messengers

ayahs.t: On a straight path.
ayahs.n: on a straight path

ayahs.t: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
ayahs.n: this is a revelation of the exalted in might the merciful

ayahs.t: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.
ayahs.n: that you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned so they are unaware

ayahs.t: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.
ayahs.n: already the word has come into effect upon most of them so they do not believe

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.
ayahs.n: indeed we have put shackles on their necks and they are to their chins so they are with heads kept aloft

ayahs.t: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.
ayahs.n: and we have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them so they do not see

ayahs.t: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.
ayahs.n: and it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them they will not believe

ayahs.t: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.
ayahs.n: you can only warn one who follows the message and fears the most merciful unseen so give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward

ayahs.t: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.
ayahs.n: indeed it is we who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind and all things we have enumerated in a clear register

ayahs.t: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -
ayahs.n: and present to them an example the people of the city when the messengers came to it

ayahs.t: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened them with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."
ayahs.n: when we sent to them two but they denied them so we strengthened them with a third and they said indeed we are messengers to you

ayahs.t: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."
ayahs.n: they said you are not but human beings like us and the most merciful has not revealed a thing you are only telling lies

ayahs.t: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you,
ayahs.n: they said our lord knows that we are messengers to you

ayahs.t: And we are not responsible except for clear notification."
ayahs.n: and we are not responsible except for clear notification

ayahs.t: They said, "Indeed, we consider you a bad omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and there will surely touch you, from us, a painful punishment."
ayahs.n: they said indeed we consider you a bad omen if you do not desist we will surely stone you and there will surely touch you from us a painful punishment

ayahs.t: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people."
ayahs.n: they said your omen is with yourselves is it because you were reminded rather you are a transgressing people

ayahs.t: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers.
ayahs.n: and there came from the farthest end of the city a man running he said o my people follow the messengers

ayahs.t: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided.
ayahs.n: follow those who do not ask of you any payment and they are rightly guided

ayahs.t: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned?
ayahs.n: and why should i not worship he who created me and to whom you will be returned

ayahs.t: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me?
ayahs.n: should i take other than him false deities while if the most merciful intends for me some adversity their intercession will not avail me at all nor can they save me

ayahs.t: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error.
ayahs.n: indeed i would then be in manifest error

ayahs.t: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me."
ayahs.n: indeed i have believed in your lord so listen to me

ayahs.t: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know
ayahs.n: it was said enter paradise he said i wish my people could know

ayahs.t: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored."
ayahs.n: of how my lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored

ayahs.t: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.
ayahs.n: and we did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven nor would we have done so

ayahs.t: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.
ayahs.n: it was not but one shout and immediately they were extinguished

ayahs.t: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.
ayahs.n: how regretful for the servants there did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him

ayahs.t: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?
ayahs.n: have they not considered how many generations we destroyed before them that they to them will not return

ayahs.t: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.
ayahs.n: and indeed all of them will yet be brought present before us

ayahs.t: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.
ayahs.n: and a sign for them is the dead earth we have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain and from it they eat

ayahs.t: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -
ayahs.n: and we placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs

ayahs.t: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?
ayahs.n: that they may eat of his fruit and their hands have not produced it so will they not be grateful

ayahs.t: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.
ayahs.n: exalted is he who created all pairs from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know

ayahs.t: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.
ayahs.n: and a sign for them is the night we remove from it the light of day so they are left in darkness

ayahs.t: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and the sun runs on course toward its stopping point that is the determination of the exalted in might the knowing

ayahs.t: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.
ayahs.n: and the moon we have determined for it phases until it returns appearing like the old date stalk

ayahs.t: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.
ayahs.n: it is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon nor does the night overtake the day but each in an orbit is swimming

ayahs.t: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.
ayahs.n: and a sign for them is that we carried their forefathers in a laden ship

ayahs.t: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.
ayahs.n: and we created for them from the likes of it that which they ride

ayahs.t: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved
ayahs.n: and if we should will we could drown them then no one responding to a cry would there be for them nor would they be saved

ayahs.t: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time.
ayahs.n: except as a mercy from us and provision for a time

ayahs.t: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy... "
ayahs.n: but when it is said to them beware of what is before you and what is behind you perhaps you will receive mercy

ayahs.t: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away.
ayahs.n: and no sign comes to them from the signs of their lord except that they are from it turning away

ayahs.t: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allah has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allah had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error."
ayahs.n: and when it is said to them spend from that which allah has provided for you those who disbelieve say to those who believe should we feed one whom if allah had willed he would have fed you are not but in clear error

ayahs.t: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.n: and they say when is this promise if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.
ayahs.n: they do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing

ayahs.t: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.
ayahs.n: and they will not be able to give any instruction nor to their people can they return

ayahs.t: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.
ayahs.n: and the horn will be blown and at once from the graves to their lord they will hasten

ayahs.t: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."
ayahs.n: they will say o woe to us who has raised us up from our sleeping place the reply will be this is what the most merciful had promised and the messengers told the truth

ayahs.t: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.
ayahs.n: it will not be but one blast and at once they are all brought present before us

ayahs.t: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.
ayahs.n: so today no soul will be wronged at all and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do

ayahs.t: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation -
ayahs.n: indeed the companions of paradise that day will be amused in joyful occupation

ayahs.t: They and their spouses - in shade, reclining on adorned couches.
ayahs.n: they and their spouses in shade reclining on adorned couches

ayahs.t: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]
ayahs.n: for them therein is fruit and for them is whatever they request or wish

ayahs.t: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.
ayahs.n: and peace a word from a merciful lord

ayahs.t: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.
ayahs.n: then he will say but stand apart today you criminals

ayahs.t: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -
ayahs.n: did i not enjoin upon you o children of adam that you not worship satan for indeed he is to you a clear enemy

ayahs.t: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path.
ayahs.n: and that you worship only me this is a straight path

ayahs.t: And he had already led astray from among you much of creation, so did you not use reason?
ayahs.n: and he had already led astray from among you much of creation so did you not use reason

ayahs.t: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.
ayahs.n: this is the hellfire which you were promised

ayahs.t: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."
ayahs.n: enter to burn therein today for what you used to deny

ayahs.t: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: that day we will seal over their mouths and their hands will speak to us and their feet will testify about what they used to earn

ayahs.t: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?
ayahs.n: and if we willed we could have obliterated their eyes and they would race to find the path and how could they see

ayahs.t: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.
ayahs.n: and if we willed we could have deformed them paralyzing them in their places so they would not be able to proceed nor could they return

ayahs.t: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?
ayahs.n: and he to whom we grant long life we reverse in creation so will they not understand

ayahs.t: And We did not give Prophet Muhammad, knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur'an
ayahs.n: and we did not give prophet muhammad knowledge of poetry nor is it befitting for him it is not but a message and a clear quran

ayahs.t: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word against the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: to warn whoever is alive and justify the word against the disbelievers

ayahs.t: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?
ayahs.n: do they not see that we have created for them from what our hands have made grazing livestock and then they are their owners

ayahs.t: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.
ayahs.n: and we have tamed them for them so some of them they ride and some of them they eat

ayahs.t: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?
ayahs.n: and for them therein are other benefits and drinks so will they not be grateful

ayahs.t: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.
ayahs.n: but they have taken besides allah false deities that perhaps they would be helped

ayahs.t: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.
ayahs.n: they are not able to help them and they themselves are for them soldiers in attendance

ayahs.t: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.
ayahs.n: so let not their speech grieve you indeed we know what they conceal and what they declare

ayahs.t: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?
ayahs.n: does man not consider that we created him from a mere sperm drop then at once he is a clear adversary

ayahs.t: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"
ayahs.n: and he presents for us an example and forgets his own creation he says who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated

ayahs.t: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."
ayahs.n: say he will give them life who produced them the first time and he is of all creation knowing

ayahs.t: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.
ayahs.n: it is he who made for you from the green tree fire and then from it you ignite

ayahs.t: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.
ayahs.n: is not he who created the heavens and the earth able to create the likes of them yes it is so and he is the knowing creator

ayahs.t: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.
ayahs.n: his command is only when he intends a thing that he says to it be and it is

ayahs.t: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.
ayahs.n: so exalted is he in whose hand is the realm of all things and to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: By those [angels] lined up in rows
ayahs.n: by those angels lined up in rows

ayahs.t: And those who drive [the clouds]
ayahs.n: and those who drive the clouds

ayahs.t: And those who recite the message,
ayahs.n: and those who recite the message

ayahs.t: Indeed, your God is One,
ayahs.n: indeed your god is one

ayahs.t: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
ayahs.n: lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and lord of the sunrises

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
ayahs.n: indeed we have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars

ayahs.t: And as protection against every rebellious devil
ayahs.n: and as protection against every rebellious devil

ayahs.t: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
ayahs.n: so they may not listen to the exalted assembly of angels and are pelted from every side

ayahs.t: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment,
ayahs.n: repelled and for them is a constant punishment

ayahs.t: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
ayahs.n: except one who snatches some words by theft but they are pursued by a burning flame piercing in brightness

ayahs.n: then inquire of them o muhammad are they a stronger or more difficult creation or those others we have created indeed we created men from sticky clay

ayahs.t: But you wonder, while they mock,
ayahs.n: but you wonder while they mock

ayahs.t: And when they are reminded, they remember not.
ayahs.n: and when they are reminded they remember not

ayahs.t: And when they see a sign, they ridicule
ayahs.n: and when they see a sign they ridicule

ayahs.t: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
ayahs.n: and say this is not but obvious magic

ayahs.n: when we have died and become dust and bones are we indeed to be resurrected

ayahs.n: and our forefathers as well

ayahs.n: say yes and you will be rendered contemptible

ayahs.t: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
ayahs.n: it will be only one shout and at once they will be observing

ayahs.n: they will say o woe to us this is the day of recompense

ayahs.n: they will be told this is the day of judgement which you used to deny

ayahs.n: the angels will be ordered gather those who committed wrong their kinds and what they used to worship

ayahs.t: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
ayahs.n: other than allah and guide them to the path of hellfire

ayahs.n: and stop them indeed they are to be questioned

ayahs.t: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"
ayahs.n: they will be asked what is wrong with you why do you not help each other

ayahs.t: But they, that Day, are in surrender.
ayahs.n: but they that day are in surrender

ayahs.n: and they will approach one another blaming each other

ayahs.n: they will say indeed you used to come at us from the right

ayahs.n: the oppressors will say rather you yourselves were not believers

ayahs.n: and we had over you no authority but you were a transgressing people

ayahs.n: and we led you to deviation indeed we were deviators

ayahs.n: indeed that is how we deal with the criminals

ayahs.n: and were saying are we to leave our gods for a mad poet

ayahs.n: indeed you disbelievers will be tasters of the painful punishment

ayahs.n: and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do

ayahs.n: but not the chosen servants of allah

ayahs.n: those will have a provision determined

ayahs.t: Fruits; and they will be honored

ayahs.n: in gardens of pleasure

ayahs.n: on thrones facing one another

ayahs.n: white and delicious to the drinkers

ayahs.n: no bad effect is there in it nor from it will they be intoxicated

ayahs.n: and they will approach one another inquiring of each other

ayahs.n: a speaker among them will say indeed i had a companion on earth

ayahs.n: that when we have died and become dust and bones we will indeed be recompensed

ayahs.n: and indeed they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies

ayahs.n: when he came to his lord with a sound heart

ayahs.t: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself.
ayahs.n: and we blessed him and isaac but among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself

ayahs.t: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron.
ayahs.n: and we did certainly confer favor upon moses and aaron

ayahs.t: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction,
ayahs.n: and we saved them and their people from the great affliction

ayahs.t: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.
ayahs.n: and we supported them so it was they who overcame

ayahs.t: And We gave them the explicit Scripture,
ayahs.n: and we gave them the explicit scripture

ayahs.t: And We guided them on the straight path.
ayahs.n: and we guided them on the straight path

ayahs.t: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:
ayahs.n: and we left for them favorable mention among later generations

ayahs.t: "Peace upon Moses and Aaron."
ayahs.n: peace upon moses and aaron

ayahs.t: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
ayahs.n: indeed we thus reward the doers of good

ayahs.t: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.
ayahs.n: indeed they were of our believing servants

ayahs.t: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,
ayahs.n: and indeed elias was from among the messengers

ayahs.t: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allah?
ayahs.n: when he said to his people will you not fear allah
