ayahs.t: Do you call upon Ba'l and leave the best of creators -
ayahs.n: do you call upon bal and leave the best of creators

ayahs.t: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"
ayahs.n: allah your lord and the lord of your first forefathers

ayahs.t: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment],
ayahs.n: and they denied him so indeed they will be brought for punishment

ayahs.t: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
ayahs.n: except the chosen servants of allah

ayahs.t: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
ayahs.n: and we left for him favorable mention among later generations

ayahs.t: "Peace upon Elias."
ayahs.n: peace upon elias

ayahs.t: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
ayahs.n: indeed we thus reward the doers of good

ayahs.t: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
ayahs.n: indeed he was of our believing servants

ayahs.t: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.
ayahs.n: and indeed lot was among the messengers

ayahs.t: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all,
ayahs.n: so mention when we saved him and his family all

ayahs.t: Except his wife among those who remained [with the evildoers].
ayahs.n: except his wife among those who remained with the evildoers

ayahs.t: Then We destroyed the others.
ayahs.n: then we destroyed the others

ayahs.t: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
ayahs.n: and indeed you pass by them in the morning

ayahs.t: And at night. Then will you not use reason?
ayahs.n: and at night then will you not use reason

ayahs.t: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers.
ayahs.n: and indeed jonah was among the messengers

ayahs.t: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.
ayahs.n: mention when he ran away to the laden ship

ayahs.t: And he drew lots and was among the losers.
ayahs.n: and he drew lots and was among the losers

ayahs.t: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy.
ayahs.n: then the fish swallowed him while he was blameworthy

ayahs.t: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah,
ayahs.n: and had he not been of those who exalt allah

ayahs.t: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
ayahs.n: he would have remained inside its belly until the day they are resurrected

ayahs.t: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill.
ayahs.n: but we threw him onto the open shore while he was ill

ayahs.t: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.
ayahs.n: and we caused to grow over him a gourd vine

ayahs.t: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
ayahs.n: and we sent him to his people of a hundred thousand or more

ayahs.t: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.
ayahs.n: and they believed so we gave them enjoyment of life for a time

ayahs.t: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?
ayahs.n: so inquire of them o muhammad does your lord have daughters while they have sons

ayahs.t: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses?"
ayahs.n: or did we create the angels as females while they were witnesses

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,
ayahs.n: unquestionably it is out of their invented falsehood that they say

ayahs.t: " Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.
ayahs.n: allah has begotten and indeed they are liars

ayahs.t: Has He chosen daughters over sons?
ayahs.n: has he chosen daughters over sons

ayahs.t: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement?
ayahs.n: what is wrong with you how do you make judgement

ayahs.t: Then will you not be reminded?
ayahs.n: then will you not be reminded

ayahs.t: Or do you have a clear authority?
ayahs.n: or do you have a clear authority

ayahs.t: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.
ayahs.n: then produce your scripture if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: And they have claimed between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought to [punishment].
ayahs.n: and they have claimed between him and the jinn a lineage but the jinn have already known that they who made such claims will be brought to punishment

ayahs.t: Exalted is Allah above what they describe,
ayahs.n: exalted is allah above what they describe

ayahs.t: Except the chosen servants of Allah [who do not share in that sin].
ayahs.n: except the chosen servants of allah who do not share in that sin

ayahs.t: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship,
ayahs.n: so indeed you disbelievers and whatever you worship

ayahs.t: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him
ayahs.n: you cannot tempt anyone away from him

ayahs.t: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire.
ayahs.n: except he who is to enter and burn in the hellfire

ayahs.t: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position.
ayahs.n: the angels say there is not among us any except that he has a known position

ayahs.t: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer].
ayahs.n: and indeed we are those who line up for prayer

ayahs.t: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allah."
ayahs.n: and indeed we are those who exalt allah

ayahs.t: And indeed, the disbelievers used to say,
ayahs.n: and indeed the disbelievers used to say

ayahs.t: "If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples,
ayahs.n: if we had a message from those of the former peoples

ayahs.t: We would have been the chosen servants of Allah."
ayahs.n: we would have been the chosen servants of allah

ayahs.t: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know.
ayahs.n: but they disbelieved in it so they are going to know

ayahs.t: And Our word has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers,
ayahs.n: and our word has already preceded for our servants the messengers

ayahs.t: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory
ayahs.n: that indeed they would be those given victory

ayahs.t: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers will be those who overcome.
ayahs.n: and that indeed our soldiers will be those who overcome

ayahs.t: So, [O Muhammad], leave them for a time.
ayahs.n: so o muhammad leave them for a time

ayahs.t: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see.
ayahs.n: and see what will befall them for they are going to see

ayahs.t: Then for Our punishment are they impatient?
ayahs.n: then for our punishment are they impatient

ayahs.t: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned.
ayahs.n: but when it descends in their territory then evil is the morning of those who were warned

ayahs.t: And leave them for a time.
ayahs.n: and leave them for a time

ayahs.t: And see, for they are going to see.
ayahs.n: and see for they are going to see

ayahs.t: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe.
ayahs.n: exalted is your lord the lord of might above what they describe

ayahs.t: And peace upon the messengers.
ayahs.n: and peace upon the messengers

ayahs.t: And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: and praise to allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Sad. By the Qur'an containing reminder...
ayahs.n: sad by the quran containing reminder

ayahs.t: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.
ayahs.n: but those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension

ayahs.t: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.
ayahs.n: how many a generation have we destroyed before them and they then called out but it was not a time for escape

ayahs.t: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.
ayahs.n: and they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves and the disbelievers say this is a magician and a liar

ayahs.t: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."
ayahs.n: has he made the gods only one god indeed this is a curious thing

ayahs.t: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.
ayahs.n: and the eminent among them went forth saying continue and be patient over the defense of your gods indeed this is a thing intended

ayahs.t: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.
ayahs.n: we have not heard of this in the latest religion this is not but a fabrication

ayahs.t: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.
ayahs.n: has the message been revealed to him out of all of us rather they are in doubt about my message rather they have not yet tasted my punishment

ayahs.t: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?
ayahs.n: or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your lord the exalted in might the bestower

ayahs.t: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.
ayahs.n: or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them then let them ascend through any ways of access

ayahs.t: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].
ayahs.n: they are but soldiers who will be defeated there among the companies of disbelievers

ayahs.t: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] 'Aad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,
ayahs.n: the people of noah denied before them and the tribe of aad and pharaoh the owner of stakes

ayahs.t: And [the tribe of] Thamud and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket. Those are the companies.
ayahs.n: and the tribe of thamud and the people of lot and the companions of the thicket those are the companies

ayahs.t: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.
ayahs.n: each of them denied the messengers so my penalty was justified

ayahs.t: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.
ayahs.n: and these disbelievers await not but one blast of the horn for it there will be no delay

ayahs.t: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account"
ayahs.n: and they say our lord hasten for us our share of the punishment before the day of account

ayahs.t: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allah].
ayahs.n: be patient over what they say and remember our servant david the possessor of strength indeed he was one who repeatedly turned back to allah

ayahs.t: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allah] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise.
ayahs.n: indeed we subjected the mountains to praise with him exalting allah in the late afternoon and after sunrise

ayahs.t: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises].
ayahs.n: and the birds were assembled all with him repeating praises

ayahs.t: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech.
ayahs.n: and we strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech

ayahs.t: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber -
ayahs.n: and has there come to you the news of the adversaries when they climbed over the wall of his prayer chamber

ayahs.t: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, "Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path.
ayahs.n: when they entered upon david and he was alarmed by them they said fear not we are two adversaries one of whom has wronged the other so judge between us with truth and do not exceed it and guide us to the sound path

ayahs.t: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech."
ayahs.n: indeed this my brother has ninety nine ewes and i have one ewe so he said entrust her to me and he overpowered me in speech

ayahs.t: [David] said, "He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they." And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allah].
ayahs.n: david said he has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe in addition to his ewes and indeed many associates oppress one another except for those who believe and do righteous deeds and few are they and david became certain that we had tried him and he asked forgiveness of his lord and fell down bowing in prostration and turned in repentance to allah

ayahs.t: So We forgave him that; and indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.
ayahs.n: so we forgave him that and indeed for him is nearness to us and a good place of return

ayahs.t: [We said], "O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allah." Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allah will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account.
ayahs.n: we said o david indeed we have made you a successor upon the earth so judge between the people in truth and do not follow your own desire as it will lead you astray from the way of allah indeed those who go astray from the way of allah will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the day of account

ayahs.t: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire.
ayahs.n: and we did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly that is the assumption of those who disbelieve so woe to those who disbelieve from the fire

ayahs.t: Or should we treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allah like the wicked?
ayahs.n: or should we treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land or should we treat those who fear allah like the wicked

ayahs.t: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded.
ayahs.n: this is a blessed book which we have revealed to you o muhammad that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded

ayahs.t: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah].
ayahs.n: and to david we gave solomon an excellent servant indeed he was one repeatedly turning back to allah

ayahs.t: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses.
ayahs.n: mention when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised standing racehorses

ayahs.t: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until the sun disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."
ayahs.n: and he said indeed i gave preference to the love of good things over the remembrance of my lord until the sun disappeared into the curtain of darkness

ayahs.t: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks.
ayahs.n: he said return them to me and set about striking their legs and necks

ayahs.t: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.
ayahs.n: and we certainly tried solomon and placed on his throne a body then he returned

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."
ayahs.n: he said my lord forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me indeed you are the bestower

ayahs.t: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,
ayahs.n: so we subjected to him the wind blowing by his command gently wherever he directed

ayahs.t: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver
ayahs.n: and also the devils of jinn every builder and diver

ayahs.t: And others bound together in shackles.
ayahs.n: and others bound together in shackles

ayahs.t: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account."
ayahs.n: we said this is our gift so grant or withhold without account

ayahs.t: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.
ayahs.n: and indeed for him is nearness to us and a good place of return

ayahs.t: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."
ayahs.n: and remember our servant job when he called to his lord indeed satan has touched me with hardship and torment

ayahs.t: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for] a cool bath and drink."
ayahs.n: so he was told strike the ground with your foot this is a spring for a cool bath and drink

ayahs.t: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.
ayahs.n: and we granted him his family and a like number with them as mercy from us and a reminder for those of understanding

ayahs.t: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah].
ayahs.n: we said and take in your hand a bunch of grass and strike with it and do not break your oath indeed we found him patient an excellent servant indeed he was one repeatedly turning back to allah

ayahs.t: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.
ayahs.n: and remember our servants abraham isaac and jacob those of strength and religious vision

ayahs.t: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter].
ayahs.n: indeed we chose them for an exclusive quality remembrance of the home of the hereafter

ayahs.t: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding.
ayahs.n: and indeed they are to us among the chosen and outstanding

ayahs.t: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding.
ayahs.n: and remember ishmael elisha and dhul kifl and all are among the outstanding

ayahs.t: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return
ayahs.n: this is a reminder and indeed for the righteous is a good place of return

ayahs.t: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.
ayahs.n: gardens of perpetual residence whose doors will be opened to them

ayahs.t: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.
ayahs.n: reclining within them they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink

ayahs.t: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age.
ayahs.n: and with them will be women limiting their glances and of equal age

ayahs.t: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account.
ayahs.n: this is what you the righteous are promised for the day of account

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion.
ayahs.n: indeed this is our provision for it there is no depletion

ayahs.t: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return -
ayahs.n: this is so but indeed for the transgressors is an evil place of return

ayahs.t: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place.
ayahs.n: hell which they will enter to burn and wretched is the resting place

ayahs.t: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence.
ayahs.n: this so let them taste it is scalding water and foul purulence

ayahs.t: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds.
ayahs.n: and other punishments of its type in various kinds

ayahs.t: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire."
ayahs.n: its inhabitants will say this is a company bursting in with you no welcome for them indeed they will burn in the fire

ayahs.t: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement."
ayahs.n: they will say nor you no welcome for you you our leaders brought this upon us and wretched is the settlement

ayahs.t: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire."
ayahs.n: they will say our lord whoever brought this upon us increase for him double punishment in the fire

ayahs.t: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst?
ayahs.n: and they will say why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst

ayahs.t: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them?"
ayahs.n: is it because we took them in ridicule or has our vision turned away from them

ayahs.t: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire.
ayahs.n: indeed that is truth the quarreling of the people of the fire

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad i am only a warner and there is not any deity except allah the one the prevailing

ayahs.t: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver."
ayahs.n: lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them the exalted in might the perpetual forgiver

ayahs.t: Say, "It is great news
ayahs.n: say it is great news

ayahs.t: From which you turn away.
ayahs.n: from which you turn away

ayahs.t: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam].
ayahs.n: i had no knowledge of the exalted assembly of angels when they were disputing the creation of adam

ayahs.t: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner."
ayahs.n: it has not been revealed to me except that i am a clear warner

ayahs.t: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay.
ayahs.n: so mention when your lord said to the angels indeed i am going to create a human being from clay

ayahs.t: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."
ayahs.n: so when i have proportioned him and breathed into him of my created soul then fall down to him in prostration

ayahs.t: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely.
ayahs.n: so the angels prostrated all of them entirely

ayahs.t: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: except iblees he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"
ayahs.n: allah said o iblees what prevented you from prostrating to that which i created with my hands were you arrogant then or were you already among the haughty

ayahs.t: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."
ayahs.n: he said i am better than him you created me from fire and created him from clay

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled.
ayahs.n: allah said then get out of paradise for indeed you are expelled

ayahs.t: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense."
ayahs.n: and indeed upon you is my curse until the day of recompense

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
ayahs.n: he said my lord then reprieve me until the day they are resurrected

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
ayahs.n: allah said so indeed you are of those reprieved

ayahs.t: Until the Day of the time well-known."
ayahs.n: until the day of the time well known

ayahs.t: [Iblees] said, "By your might, I will surely mislead them all
ayahs.n: iblees said by your might i will surely mislead them all

ayahs.t: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
ayahs.n: except among them your chosen servants

ayahs.t: [Allah] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say -
ayahs.n: allah said the truth is my oath and the truth i say

ayahs.t: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together."
ayahs.n: that i will surely fill hell with you and those of them that follow you all together

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "I do not ask you for the Qur'an any payment, and I am not of the pretentious
ayahs.n: say o muhammad i do not ask you for the quran any payment and i am not of the pretentious

ayahs.t: It is but a reminder to the worlds.
ayahs.n: it is but a reminder to the worlds

ayahs.t: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time."
ayahs.n: and you will surely know the truth of its information after a time

ayahs.t: The revelation of the Qur'an is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: the revelation of the quran is from allah the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have sent down to you the Book, [O Muhammad], in truth. So worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion.
ayahs.n: indeed we have sent down to you the book o muhammad in truth so worship allah being sincere to him in religion

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, for Allah is the pure religion. And those who take protectors besides Him [say], "We only worship them that they may bring us nearer to Allah in position." Indeed, Allah will judge between them concerning that over which they differ. Indeed, Allah does not guide he who is a liar and [confirmed] disbeliever.
ayahs.n: unquestionably for allah is the pure religion and those who take protectors besides him say we only worship them that they may bring us nearer to allah in position indeed allah will judge between them concerning that over which they differ indeed allah does not guide he who is a liar and confirmed disbeliever

ayahs.t: If Allah had intended to take a son, He could have chosen from what He creates whatever He willed. Exalted is He; He is Allah, the One, the Prevailing.
ayahs.n: if allah had intended to take a son he could have chosen from what he creates whatever he willed exalted is he he is allah the one the prevailing

ayahs.t: He created the heavens and earth in truth. He wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. Unquestionably, He is the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.
ayahs.n: he created the heavens and earth in truth he wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon each running its course for a specified term unquestionably he is the exalted in might the perpetual forgiver

ayahs.t: He created you from one soul. Then He made from it its mate, and He produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, within three darknesses. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs dominion. There is no deity except Him, so how are you averted?
ayahs.n: he created you from one soul then he made from it its mate and he produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates he creates you in the wombs of your mothers creation after creation within three darknesses that is allah your lord to him belongs dominion there is no deity except him so how are you averted

ayahs.t: If you disbelieve - indeed, Allah is Free from need of you. And He does not approve for His servants disbelief. And if you are grateful, He approves it for you; and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you used to do. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: if you disbelieve indeed allah is free from need of you and he does not approve for his servants disbelief and if you are grateful he approves it for you and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another then to your lord is your return and he will inform you about what you used to do indeed he is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon his Lord, turning to Him [alone]; then when He bestows on him a favor from Himself, he forgets Him whom he called upon before, and he attributes to Allah equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy your disbelief for a little; indeed, you are of the companions of the Fire."
ayahs.n: and when adversity touches man he calls upon his lord turning to him alone then when he bestows on him a favor from himself he forgets him whom he called upon before and he attributes to allah equals to mislead people from his way say enjoy your disbelief for a little indeed you are of the companions of the fire

ayahs.t: Is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night, prostrating and standing [in prayer], fearing the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord, [like one who does not]? Say, "Are those who know equal to those who do not know?" Only they will remember [who are] people of understanding.
ayahs.n: is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night prostrating and standing in prayer fearing the hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his lord like one who does not say are those who know equal to those who do not know only they will remember who are people of understanding

ayahs.t: Say, "O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord. For those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allah is spacious. Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account."
ayahs.n: say o my servants who have believed fear your lord for those who do good in this world is good and the earth of allah is spacious indeed the patient will be given their reward without account

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad indeed i have been commanded to worship allah being sincere to him in religion

ayahs.t: And I have been commanded to be the first [among you] of the Muslims."
ayahs.n: and i have been commanded to be the first among you of the muslims

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day."
ayahs.n: say indeed i fear if i should disobey my lord the punishment of a tremendous day

ayahs.t: Say, "Allah [alone] do I worship, sincere to Him in my religion,
ayahs.n: say allah alone do i worship sincere to him in my religion

ayahs.t: So worship what you will besides Him." Say, "Indeed, the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, that is the manifest loss."
ayahs.n: so worship what you will besides him say indeed the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the day of resurrection unquestionably that is the manifest loss

ayahs.t: They will have canopies of fire above them and below them, canopies. By that Allah threatens His servants. O My servants, then fear Me.
ayahs.n: they will have canopies of fire above them and below them canopies by that allah threatens his servants o my servants then fear me

ayahs.t: But those who have avoided Taghut, lest they worship it, and turned back to Allah - for them are good tidings. So give good tidings to My servants
ayahs.n: but those who have avoided taghut lest they worship it and turned back to allah for them are good tidings so give good tidings to my servants

ayahs.t: Who listen to speech and follow the best of it. Those are the ones Allah has guided, and those are people of understanding.
ayahs.n: who listen to speech and follow the best of it those are the ones allah has guided and those are people of understanding

ayahs.t: Then, is one who has deserved the decree of punishment [to be guided]? Then, can you save one who is in the Fire?
ayahs.n: then is one who has deserved the decree of punishment to be guided then can you save one who is in the fire

ayahs.t: But those who have feared their Lord - for them are chambers, above them chambers built high, beneath which rivers flow. [This is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in [His] promise.
ayahs.n: but those who have feared their lord for them are chambers above them chambers built high beneath which rivers flow this is the promise of allah allah does not fail in his promise

ayahs.t: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs [and rivers] in the earth; then He produces thereby crops of varying colors; then they dry and you see them turned yellow; then He makes them [scattered] debris. Indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding.
ayahs.n: do you not see that allah sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs and rivers in the earth then he produces thereby crops of varying colors then they dry and you see them turned yellow then he makes them scattered debris indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding

ayahs.t: So is one whose breast Allah has expanded to [accept] Islam and he is upon a light from his Lord [like one whose heart rejects it]? Then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allah. Those are in manifest error.
ayahs.n: so is one whose breast allah has expanded to accept islam and he is upon a light from his lord like one whose heart rejects it then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of allah those are in manifest error

ayahs.t: Allah has sent down the best statement: a consistent Book wherein is reiteration. The skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their Lord; then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance of Allah. That is the guidance of Allah by which He guides whom He wills. And one whom Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide.
ayahs.n: allah has sent down the best statement a consistent book wherein is reiteration the skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their lord then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance of allah that is the guidance of allah by which he guides whom he wills and one whom allah leaves astray for him there is no guide

ayahs.t: Then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [like one secure from it]? And it will be said to the wrongdoers, "Taste what you used to earn."
ayahs.n: then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the day of resurrection like one secure from it and it will be said to the wrongdoers taste what you used to earn

ayahs.t: Those before them denied, and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive.
ayahs.n: those before them denied and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive

ayahs.t: So Allah made them taste disgrace in worldly life. But the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.
ayahs.n: so allah made them taste disgrace in worldly life but the punishment of the hereafter is greater if they only knew

ayahs.t: And We have certainly presented for the people in this Qur'an from every [kind of] example - that they might remember.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly presented for the people in this quran from every kind of example that they might remember

ayahs.t: [It is] an Arabic Qur'an, without any deviance that they might become righteous.
ayahs.n: it is an arabic quran without any deviance that they might become righteous

ayahs.t: Allah presents an example: a slave owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man - are they equal in comparison? Praise be to Allah! But most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: allah presents an example a slave owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man are they equal in comparison praise be to allah but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: Indeed, you are to die, and indeed, they are to die.
ayahs.n: indeed you are to die and indeed they are to die

ayahs.t: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, before your Lord, will dispute.
ayahs.n: then indeed you on the day of resurrection before your lord will dispute

ayahs.t: So who is more unjust than one who lies about Allah and denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers?
ayahs.n: so who is more unjust than one who lies about allah and denies the truth when it has come to him is there not in hell a residence for the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And the one who has brought the truth and [they who] believed in it - those are the righteous.
ayahs.n: and the one who has brought the truth and they who believed in it those are the righteous

ayahs.t: They will have whatever they desire with their Lord. That is the reward of the doers of good -
ayahs.n: they will have whatever they desire with their lord that is the reward of the doers of good

ayahs.t: That Allah may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do.
ayahs.n: that allah may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do

ayahs.t: Is not Allah sufficient for His Servant [Prophet Muhammad]? And [yet], they threaten you with those [they worship] other than Him. And whoever Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide.
ayahs.n: is not allah sufficient for his servant prophet muhammad and yet they threaten you with those they worship other than him and whoever allah leaves astray for him there is no guide

ayahs.t: And whoever Allah guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allah Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution?
ayahs.n: and whoever allah guides for him there is no misleader is not allah exalted in might and owner of retribution

ayahs.t: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "Allah." Say, "Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allah? If Allah intended me harm, are they removers of His harm; or if He intended me mercy, are they withholders of His mercy?" Say, "Sufficient for me is Allah; upon Him [alone] rely the [wise] reliers."
ayahs.n: and if you asked them who created the heavens and the earth they would surely say allah say then have you considered what you invoke besides allah if allah intended me harm are they removers of his harm or if he intended me mercy are they withholders of his mercy say sufficient for me is allah upon him alone rely the wise reliers

ayahs.t: Say, "O my people, work according to your position, [for] indeed, I am working; and you are going to know
ayahs.n: say o my people work according to your position for indeed i am working and you are going to know

ayahs.t: To whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment."
ayahs.n: to whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager over them.
ayahs.n: indeed we sent down to you the book for the people in truth so whoever is guided it is for the benefit of his soul and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment and you are not a manager over them

ayahs.t: Allah takes the souls at the time of their death, and those that do not die [He takes] during their sleep. Then He keeps those for which He has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: allah takes the souls at the time of their death and those that do not die he takes during their sleep then he keeps those for which he has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: Or have they taken other than Allah as intercessors? Say, "Even though they do not possess [power over] anything, nor do they reason?"
ayahs.n: or have they taken other than allah as intercessors say even though they do not possess power over anything nor do they reason

ayahs.t: Say, "To Allah belongs [the right to allow] intercession entirely. To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned."
ayahs.n: say to allah belongs the right to allow intercession entirely to him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth then to him you will be returned

ayahs.t: And when Allah is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion, but when those [worshipped] other than Him are mentioned, immediately they rejoice.
ayahs.n: and when allah is mentioned alone the hearts of those who do not believe in the hereafter shrink with aversion but when those worshipped other than him are mentioned immediately they rejoice

ayahs.t: Say, "O Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, You will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ."
ayahs.n: say o allah creator of the heavens and the earth knower of the unseen and the witnessed you will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ

ayahs.t: And if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. And there will appear to them from Allah that which they had not taken into account.
ayahs.n: and if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it they would attempt to ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the day of resurrection and there will appear to them from allah that which they had not taken into account

ayahs.t: And there will appear to them the evils they had earned, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
ayahs.n: and there will appear to them the evils they had earned and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule

ayahs.t: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We bestow on him a favor from Us, he says, "I have only been given it because of [my] knowledge." Rather, it is a trial, but most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: and when adversity touches man he calls upon us then when we bestow on him a favor from us he says i have only been given it because of my knowledge rather it is a trial but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: Those before them had already said it, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: those before them had already said it but they were not availed by what they used to earn

ayahs.t: And the evil consequences of what they earned struck them. And those who have wronged of these [people] will be afflicted by the evil consequences of what they earned; and they will not cause failure.
ayahs.n: and the evil consequences of what they earned struck them and those who have wronged of these people will be afflicted by the evil consequences of what they earned and they will not cause failure

ayahs.t: Do they not know that Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
ayahs.n: do they not know that allah extends provision for whom he wills and restricts it indeed in that are signs for a people who believe

ayahs.t: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful."
ayahs.n: say o my servants who have transgressed against themselves by sinning do not despair of the mercy of allah indeed allah forgives all sins indeed it is he who is the forgiving the merciful

ayahs.t: And return [in repentance] to your Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you; then you will not be helped.
ayahs.n: and return in repentance to your lord and submit to him before the punishment comes upon you then you will not be helped

ayahs.t: And follow the best of what was revealed to you from your Lord before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive,
ayahs.n: and follow the best of what was revealed to you from your lord before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive

ayahs.t: Lest a soul should say, "Oh [how great is] my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allah and that I was among the mockers."
ayahs.n: lest a soul should say oh how great is my regret over what i neglected in regard to allah and that i was among the mockers

ayahs.t: Or [lest] it say, "If only Allah had guided me, I would have been among the righteous."
ayahs.n: or lest it say if only allah had guided me i would have been among the righteous

ayahs.t: Or [lest] it say when it sees the punishment, "If only I had another turn so I could be among the doers of good."
ayahs.n: or lest it say when it sees the punishment if only i had another turn so i could be among the doers of good

ayahs.t: But yes, there had come to you My verses, but you denied them and were arrogant, and you were among the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: but yes there had come to you my verses but you denied them and were arrogant and you were among the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And on the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied about Allah [with] their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a residence for the arrogant?
ayahs.n: and on the day of resurrection you will see those who lied about allah with their faces blackened is there not in hell a residence for the arrogant

ayahs.t: And Allah will save those who feared Him by their attainment; no evil will touch them, nor will they grieve.
ayahs.n: and allah will save those who feared him by their attainment no evil will touch them nor will they grieve

ayahs.t: Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs.
ayahs.n: allah is the creator of all things and he is over all things disposer of affairs

ayahs.t: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. And they who disbelieve in the verses of Allah - it is those who are the losers.
ayahs.n: to him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth and they who disbelieve in the verses of allah it is those who are the losers

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Is it other than Allah that you order me to worship, O ignorant ones?"
ayahs.n: say o muhammad is it other than allah that you order me to worship o ignorant ones

ayahs.t: And it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate [anything] with Allah, your work would surely become worthless, and you would surely be among the losers."
ayahs.n: and it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate anything with allah your work would surely become worthless and you would surely be among the losers

ayahs.t: Rather, worship [only] Allah and be among the grateful.
ayahs.n: rather worship only allah and be among the grateful

ayahs.t: They have not appraised Allah with true appraisal, while the earth entirely will be [within] His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be folded in His right hand. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.
ayahs.n: they have not appraised allah with true appraisal while the earth entirely will be within his grip on the day of resurrection and the heavens will be folded in his right hand exalted is he and high above what they associate with him

ayahs.t: And the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom Allah wills. Then it will be blown again, and at once they will be standing, looking on.
ayahs.n: and the horn will be blown and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom allah wills then it will be blown again and at once they will be standing looking on

ayahs.t: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the record [of deeds] will be placed, and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought, and it will be judged between them in truth, and they will not be wronged.
ayahs.n: and the earth will shine with the light of its lord and the record of deeds will be placed and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought and it will be judged between them in truth and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: And every soul will be fully compensated [for] what it did; and He is most knowing of what they do.
ayahs.n: and every soul will be fully compensated for what it did and he is most knowing of what they do

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups until, when they reach it, its gates are opened and its keepers will say, "Did there not come to you messengers from yourselves, reciting to you the verses of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?" They will say, "Yes, but the word of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieved will be driven to hell in groups until when they reach it its gates are opened and its keepers will say did there not come to you messengers from yourselves reciting to you the verses of your lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours they will say yes but the word of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers

ayahs.t: [To them] it will be said, "Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."
ayahs.n: to them it will be said enter the gates of hell to abide eternally therein and wretched is the residence of the arrogant

ayahs.t: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups until, when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say, "Peace be upon you; you have become pure; so enter it to abide eternally therein," [they will enter].
ayahs.n: but those who feared their lord will be driven to paradise in groups until when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say peace be upon you you have become pure so enter it to abide eternally therein they will enter

ayahs.t: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will. And excellent is the reward of [righteous] workers."
ayahs.n: and they will say praise to allah who has fulfilled for us his promise and made us inherit the earth so we may settle in paradise wherever we will and excellent is the reward of righteous workers

ayahs.t: And you will see the angels surrounding the Throne, exalting [Allah] with praise of their Lord. And it will be judged between them in truth, and it will be said, "[All] praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: and you will see the angels surrounding the throne exalting allah with praise of their lord and it will be judged between them in truth and it will be said all praise to allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: the revelation of the book is from allah the exalted in might the knowing

ayahs.t: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination.
ayahs.n: the forgiver of sin acceptor of repentance severe in punishment owner of abundance there is no deity except him to him is the destination

ayahs.t: No one disputes concerning the signs of Allah except those who disbelieve, so be not deceived by their [uninhibited] movement throughout the land.
ayahs.n: no one disputes concerning the signs of allah except those who disbelieve so be not deceived by their uninhibited movement throughout the land

ayahs.t: The people of Noah denied before them and the [disbelieving] factions after them, and every nation intended [a plot] for their messenger to seize him, and they disputed by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth. So I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty.
ayahs.n: the people of noah denied before them and the disbelieving factions after them and every nation intended a plot for their messenger to seize him and they disputed by using falsehood to attempt to invalidate thereby the truth so i seized them and how terrible was my penalty

ayahs.t: And thus has the word of your Lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the Fire.
ayahs.n: and thus has the word of your lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the fire

ayahs.t: Those [angels] who carry the Throne and those around it exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord and believe in Him and ask forgiveness for those who have believed, [saying], "Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who have repented and followed Your way and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire.
ayahs.n: those angels who carry the throne and those around it exalt allah with praise of their lord and believe in him and ask forgiveness for those who have believed saying our lord you have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge so forgive those who have repented and followed your way and protect them from the punishment of hellfire

ayahs.t: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their offspring. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: our lord and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which you have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers their spouses and their offspring indeed it is you who is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: And protect them from the evil consequences [of their deeds]. And he whom You protect from evil consequences that Day - You will have given him mercy. And that is the great attainment."
ayahs.n: and protect them from the evil consequences of their deeds and he whom you protect from evil consequences that day you will have given him mercy and that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who disbelieve will be addressed, "The hatred of Allah for you was [even] greater than your hatred of yourselves [this Day in Hell] when you were invited to faith, but you refused."
ayahs.n: indeed those who disbelieve will be addressed the hatred of allah for you was even greater than your hatred of yourselves this day in hell when you were invited to faith but you refused

ayahs.t: They will say, "Our Lord, You made us lifeless twice and gave us life twice, and we have confessed our sins. So is there to an exit any way?"
ayahs.n: they will say our lord you made us lifeless twice and gave us life twice and we have confessed our sins so is there to an exit any way

ayahs.t: [They will be told], "That is because, when Allah was called upon alone, you disbelieved; but if others were associated with Him, you believed. So the judgement is with Allah, the Most High, the Grand."
ayahs.n: they will be told that is because when allah was called upon alone you disbelieved but if others were associated with him you believed so the judgement is with allah the most high the grand

ayahs.t: It is He who shows you His signs and sends down to you from the sky, provision. But none will remember except he who turns back [in repentance].
ayahs.n: it is he who shows you his signs and sends down to you from the sky provision but none will remember except he who turns back in repentance

ayahs.t: So invoke Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, although the disbelievers dislike it.
ayahs.n: so invoke allah being sincere to him in religion although the disbelievers dislike it

ayahs.t: [He is] the Exalted above [all] degrees, Owner of the Throne; He places the inspiration of His command upon whom He wills of His servants to warn of the Day of Meeting.
ayahs.n: he is the exalted above all degrees owner of the throne he places the inspiration of his command upon whom he wills of his servants to warn of the day of meeting

ayahs.t: The Day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from Allah. To whom belongs [all] sovereignty this Day? To Allah, the One, the Prevailing.
ayahs.n: the day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from allah to whom belongs all sovereignty this day to allah the one the prevailing

ayahs.t: This Day every soul will be recompensed for what it earned. No injustice today! Indeed, Allah is swift in account.
ayahs.n: this day every soul will be recompensed for what it earned no injustice today indeed allah is swift in account

ayahs.t: And warn them, [O Muhammad], of the Approaching Day, when hearts are at the throats, filled [with distress]. For the wrongdoers there will be no devoted friend and no intercessor [who is] obeyed.
ayahs.n: and warn them o muhammad of the approaching day when hearts are at the throats filled with distress for the wrongdoers there will be no devoted friend and no intercessor who is obeyed

ayahs.t: He knows that which deceives the eyes and what the breasts conceal.
ayahs.n: he knows that which deceives the eyes and what the breasts conceal

ayahs.t: And Allah judges with truth, while those they invoke besides Him judge not with anything. Indeed, Allah - He is the Hearing, the Seeing.
ayahs.n: and allah judges with truth while those they invoke besides him judge not with anything indeed allah he is the hearing the seeing

ayahs.t: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those who were before them? They were greater than them in strength and in impression on the land, but Allah seized them for their sins. And they had not from Allah any protector.
ayahs.n: have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those who were before them they were greater than them in strength and in impression on the land but allah seized them for their sins and they had not from allah any protector

ayahs.t: That was because their messengers were coming to them with clear proofs, but they disbelieved, so Allah seized them. Indeed, He is Powerful and severe in punishment.
ayahs.n: that was because their messengers were coming to them with clear proofs but they disbelieved so allah seized them indeed he is powerful and severe in punishment

ayahs.t: And We did certainly send Moses with Our signs and a clear authority
ayahs.n: and we did certainly send moses with our signs and a clear authority

ayahs.t: To Pharaoh, Haman and Qarun; but they said, "[He is] a magician and a liar."
ayahs.n: to pharaoh haman and qarun but they said he is a magician and a liar

ayahs.t: And when he brought them the truth from Us, they said, "Kill the sons of those who have believed with him and keep their women alive." But the plan of the disbelievers is not except in error.
ayahs.n: and when he brought them the truth from us they said kill the sons of those who have believed with him and keep their women alive but the plan of the disbelievers is not except in error

ayahs.t: And Pharaoh said, "Let me kill Moses and let him call upon his Lord. Indeed, I fear that he will change your religion or that he will cause corruption in the land."
ayahs.n: and pharaoh said let me kill moses and let him call upon his lord indeed i fear that he will change your religion or that he will cause corruption in the land

ayahs.t: But Moses said, "Indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord from every arrogant one who does not believe in the Day of Account."
ayahs.n: but moses said indeed i have sought refuge in my lord and your lord from every arrogant one who does not believe in the day of account

ayahs.t: And a believing man from the family of Pharaoh who concealed his faith said, "Do you kill a man [merely] because he says, 'My Lord is Allah' while he has brought you clear proofs from your Lord? And if he should be lying, then upon him is [the consequence of] his lie; but if he should be truthful, there will strike you some of what he promises you. Indeed, Allah does not guide one who is a transgressor and a liar.
ayahs.n: and a believing man from the family of pharaoh who concealed his faith said do you kill a man merely because he says my lord is allah while he has brought you clear proofs from your lord and if he should be lying then upon him is the consequence of his lie but if he should be truthful there will strike you some of what he promises you indeed allah does not guide one who is a transgressor and a liar

ayahs.t: O my people, sovereignty is yours today, [your being] dominant in the land. But who would protect us from the punishment of Allah if it came to us?" Pharaoh said, "I do not show you except what I see, and I do not guide you except to the way of right conduct."
ayahs.n: o my people sovereignty is yours today your being dominant in the land but who would protect us from the punishment of allah if it came to us pharaoh said i do not show you except what i see and i do not guide you except to the way of right conduct

ayahs.t: And he who believed said, "O my people, indeed I fear for you [a fate] like the day of the companies -
ayahs.n: and he who believed said o my people indeed i fear for you a fate like the day of the companies

ayahs.t: Like the custom of the people of Noah and of 'Aad and Thamud and those after them. And Allah wants no injustice for [His] servants.
ayahs.n: like the custom of the people of noah and of aad and thamud and those after them and allah wants no injustice for his servants

ayahs.t: And O my people, indeed I fear for you the Day of Calling -
ayahs.n: and o my people indeed i fear for you the day of calling

ayahs.t: The Day you will turn your backs fleeing; there is not for you from Allah any protector. And whoever Allah leaves astray - there is not for him any guide.
ayahs.n: the day you will turn your backs fleeing there is not for you from allah any protector and whoever allah leaves astray there is not for him any guide

ayahs.t: And Joseph had already come to you before with clear proofs, but you remained in doubt of that which he brought to you, until when he died, you said, 'Never will Allah send a messenger after him.' Thus does Allah leave astray he who is a transgressor and skeptic."
ayahs.n: and joseph had already come to you before with clear proofs but you remained in doubt of that which he brought to you until when he died you said never will allah send a messenger after him thus does allah leave astray he who is a transgressor and skeptic

ayahs.t: Those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah without an authority having come to them - great is hatred [of them] in the sight of Allah and in the sight of those who have believed. Thus does Allah seal over every heart [belonging to] an arrogant tyrant.
ayahs.n: those who dispute concerning the signs of allah without an authority having come to them great is hatred of them in the sight of allah and in the sight of those who have believed thus does allah seal over every heart belonging to an arrogant tyrant

ayahs.t: And Pharaoh said, "O Haman, construct for me a tower that I might reach the ways -
ayahs.n: and pharaoh said o haman construct for me a tower that i might reach the ways

ayahs.t: The ways into the heavens - so that I may look at the deity of Moses; but indeed, I think he is a liar." And thus was made attractive to Pharaoh the evil of his deed, and he was averted from the [right] way. And the plan of Pharaoh was not except in ruin.
ayahs.n: the ways into the heavens so that i may look at the deity of moses but indeed i think he is a liar and thus was made attractive to pharaoh the evil of his deed and he was averted from the right way and the plan of pharaoh was not except in ruin

ayahs.t: And he who believed said, "O my people, follow me, I will guide you to the way of right conduct.
ayahs.n: and he who believed said o my people follow me i will guide you to the way of right conduct

ayahs.t: O my people, this worldly life is only [temporary] enjoyment, and indeed, the Hereafter - that is the home of [permanent] settlement.
ayahs.n: o my people this worldly life is only temporary enjoyment and indeed the hereafter that is the home of permanent settlement

ayahs.t: Whoever does an evil deed will not be recompensed except by the like thereof; but whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while he is a believer - those will enter Paradise, being given provision therein without account.
ayahs.n: whoever does an evil deed will not be recompensed except by the like thereof but whoever does righteousness whether male or female while he is a believer those will enter paradise being given provision therein without account

ayahs.t: And O my people, how is it that I invite you to salvation while you invite me to the Fire?
ayahs.n: and o my people how is it that i invite you to salvation while you invite me to the fire

ayahs.t: You invite me to disbelieve in Allah and associate with Him that of which I have no knowledge, and I invite you to the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.
ayahs.n: you invite me to disbelieve in allah and associate with him that of which i have no knowledge and i invite you to the exalted in might the perpetual forgiver

ayahs.t: Assuredly, that to which you invite me has no [response to a] supplication in this world or in the Hereafter; and indeed, our return is to Allah, and indeed, the transgressors will be companions of the Fire.
ayahs.n: assuredly that to which you invite me has no response to a supplication in this world or in the hereafter and indeed our return is to allah and indeed the transgressors will be companions of the fire

ayahs.t: And you will remember what I [now] say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allah. Indeed, Allah is Seeing of [His] servants."
ayahs.n: and you will remember what i now say to you and i entrust my affair to allah indeed allah is seeing of his servants

ayahs.t: So Allah protected him from the evils they plotted, and the people of Pharaoh were enveloped by the worst of punishment -
ayahs.n: so allah protected him from the evils they plotted and the people of pharaoh were enveloped by the worst of punishment

ayahs.t: The Fire, they are exposed to it morning and evening. And the Day the Hour appears [it will be said], "Make the people of Pharaoh enter the severest punishment."
ayahs.n: the fire they are exposed to it morning and evening and the day the hour appears it will be said make the people of pharaoh enter the severest punishment

ayahs.t: And [mention] when they will argue within the Fire, and the weak will say to those who had been arrogant, "Indeed, we were [only] your followers, so will you relieve us of a share of the Fire?"
ayahs.n: and mention when they will argue within the fire and the weak will say to those who had been arrogant indeed we were only your followers so will you relieve us of a share of the fire

ayahs.t: Those who had been arrogant will say, "Indeed, all [of us] are in it. Indeed, Allah has judged between the servants."
ayahs.n: those who had been arrogant will say indeed all of us are in it indeed allah has judged between the servants

ayahs.t: And those in the Fire will say to the keepers of Hell, "Supplicate your Lord to lighten for us a day from the punishment."
ayahs.n: and those in the fire will say to the keepers of hell supplicate your lord to lighten for us a day from the punishment

ayahs.t: They will say, "Did there not come to you your messengers with clear proofs?" They will say, "Yes." They will reply, "Then supplicate [yourselves], but the supplication of the disbelievers is not except in error."
ayahs.n: they will say did there not come to you your messengers with clear proofs they will say yes they will reply then supplicate yourselves but the supplication of the disbelievers is not except in error

ayahs.t: Indeed, We will support Our messengers and those who believe during the life of this world and on the Day when the witnesses will stand -
ayahs.n: indeed we will support our messengers and those who believe during the life of this world and on the day when the witnesses will stand

ayahs.t: The Day their excuse will not benefit the wrongdoers, and they will have the curse, and they will have the worst home.
ayahs.n: the day their excuse will not benefit the wrongdoers and they will have the curse and they will have the worst home

ayahs.t: And We had certainly given Moses guidance, and We caused the Children of Israel to inherit the Scripture
ayahs.n: and we had certainly given moses guidance and we caused the children of israel to inherit the scripture

ayahs.t: As guidance and a reminder for those of understanding.
ayahs.n: as guidance and a reminder for those of understanding

ayahs.t: So be patient, [O Muhammad]. Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And ask forgiveness for your sin and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord in the evening and the morning.
ayahs.n: so be patient o muhammad indeed the promise of allah is truth and ask forgiveness for your sin and exalt allah with praise of your lord in the evening and the morning

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah without [any] authority having come to them - there is not within their breasts except pride, [the extent of] which they cannot reach. So seek refuge in Allah. Indeed, it is He who is the Hearing, the Seeing.
ayahs.n: indeed those who dispute concerning the signs of allah without any authority having come to them there is not within their breasts except pride the extent of which they cannot reach so seek refuge in allah indeed it is he who is the hearing the seeing

ayahs.t: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind, but most of the people do not know.
ayahs.n: the creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: And not equal are the blind and the seeing, nor are those who believe and do righteous deeds and the evildoer. Little do you remember.
ayahs.n: and not equal are the blind and the seeing nor are those who believe and do righteous deeds and the evildoer little do you remember

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - but most of the people do not believe.
ayahs.n: indeed the hour is coming no doubt about it but most of the people do not believe

ayahs.t: And your Lord says, "Call upon Me; I will respond to you." Indeed, those who disdain My worship will enter Hell [rendered] contemptible.
ayahs.n: and your lord says call upon me i will respond to you indeed those who disdain my worship will enter hell rendered contemptible

ayahs.t: It is Allah who made for you the night that you may rest therein and the day giving sight. Indeed, Allah is full of bounty to the people, but most of the people are not grateful.
ayahs.n: it is allah who made for you the night that you may rest therein and the day giving sight indeed allah is full of bounty to the people but most of the people are not grateful

ayahs.t: That is Allah, your Lord, Creator of all things; there is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded?
ayahs.n: that is allah your lord creator of all things there is no deity except him so how are you deluded

ayahs.t: Thus were those [before you] deluded who were rejecting the signs of Allah.
ayahs.n: thus were those before you deluded who were rejecting the signs of allah

ayahs.t: It is Allah who made for you the earth a place of settlement and the sky a ceiling and formed you and perfected your forms and provided you with good things. That is Allah, your Lord; then blessed is Allah, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: it is allah who made for you the earth a place of settlement and the sky a ceiling and formed you and perfected your forms and provided you with good things that is allah your lord then blessed is allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: He is the Ever-Living; there is no deity except Him, so call upon Him, [being] sincere to Him in religion. [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: he is the ever living there is no deity except him so call upon him being sincere to him in religion all praise is due to allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, I have been forbidden to worship those you call upon besides Allah once the clear proofs have come to me from my Lord, and I have been commanded to submit to the Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad indeed i have been forbidden to worship those you call upon besides allah once the clear proofs have come to me from my lord and i have been commanded to submit to the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: It is He who created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot; then He brings you out as a child; then [He develops you] that you reach your [time of] maturity, then [further] that you become elders. And among you is he who is taken in death before [that], so that you reach a specified term; and perhaps you will use reason.
ayahs.n: it is he who created you from dust then from a sperm drop then from a clinging clot then he brings you out as a child then he develops you that you reach your time of maturity then further that you become elders and among you is he who is taken in death before that so that you reach a specified term and perhaps you will use reason

ayahs.t: He it is who gives life and causes death; and when He decrees a matter, He but says to it, "Be," and it is.
ayahs.n: he it is who gives life and causes death and when he decrees a matter he but says to it be and it is

ayahs.t: Do you not consider those who dispute concerning the signs of Allah - how are they averted?
ayahs.n: do you not consider those who dispute concerning the signs of allah how are they averted

ayahs.t: Those who deny the Book and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know,
ayahs.n: those who deny the book and that with which we sent our messengers they are going to know

ayahs.t: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged
ayahs.n: when the shackles are around their necks and the chains they will be dragged

ayahs.t: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled [with flame].
ayahs.n: in boiling water then in the fire they will be filled with flame

ayahs.t: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]
ayahs.n: then it will be said to them where is that which you used to associate with him in worship

ayahs.t: Other than Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything." Thus does Allah put astray the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: other than allah they will say they have departed from us rather we did not used to invoke previously anything thus does allah put astray the disbelievers

ayahs.t: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.
ayahs.n: the angels will say that was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently

ayahs.t: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."
ayahs.n: enter the gates of hell to abide eternally therein and wretched is the residence of the arrogant

ayahs.t: So be patient, [O Muhammad]; indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned.
ayahs.n: so be patient o muhammad indeed the promise of allah is truth and whether we show you some of what we have promised them or we take you in death it is to us they will be returned

ayahs.t: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allah. So when the command of Allah comes, it will be concluded in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all].
ayahs.n: and we have already sent messengers before you among them are those whose stories we have related to you and among them are those whose stories we have not related to you and it was not for any messenger to bring a sign or verse except by permission of allah so when the command of allah comes it will be concluded in truth and the falsifiers will thereupon lose all

ayahs.t: It is Allah who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.
ayahs.n: it is allah who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride and some of them you eat

ayahs.t: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.
ayahs.n: and for you therein are other benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts and upon them and upon ships you are carried

ayahs.t: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allah do you deny?
ayahs.n: and he shows you his signs so which of the signs of allah do you deny

ayahs.t: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them they were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land but they were not availed by what they used to earn

ayahs.t: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
ayahs.n: and when their messengers came to them with clear proofs they merely rejoiced in what they had of knowledge but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule

ayahs.t: And when they saw Our punishment, they said," We believe in Allah alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him."
ayahs.n: and when they saw our punishment they said we believe in allah alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with him

ayahs.t: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. [It is] the established way of Allah which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost [all].
ayahs.n: but never did their faith benefit them once they saw our punishment it is the established way of allah which has preceded among his servants and the disbelievers thereupon lost all

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: [This is] a revelation from the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful -
ayahs.n: this is a revelation from the entirely merciful the especially merciful

ayahs.t: A Book whose verses have been detailed, an Arabic Qur'an for a people who know,
