ayahs.n: a book whose verses have been detailed an arabic quran for a people who know

ayahs.t: As a giver of good tidings and a warner; but most of them turn away, so they do not hear.
ayahs.n: as a giver of good tidings and a warner but most of them turn away so they do not hear

ayahs.t: And they say, "Our hearts are within coverings from that to which you invite us, and in our ears is deafness, and between us and you is a partition, so work; indeed, we are working."
ayahs.n: and they say our hearts are within coverings from that to which you invite us and in our ears is deafness and between us and you is a partition so work indeed we are working

ayahs.t: Say, O [Muhammad], "I am only a man like you to whom it has been revealed that your god is but one God; so take a straight course to Him and seek His forgiveness." And woe to those who associate others with Allah -
ayahs.n: say o muhammad i am only a man like you to whom it has been revealed that your god is but one god so take a straight course to him and seek his forgiveness and woe to those who associate others with allah

ayahs.t: Those who do not give zakah, and in the Hereafter they are disbelievers.
ayahs.n: those who do not give zakah and in the hereafter they are disbelievers

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who believe and do righteous deeds - for them is a reward uninterrupted.
ayahs.n: indeed those who believe and do righteous deeds for them is a reward uninterrupted

ayahs.t: Say, "Do you indeed disbelieve in He who created the earth in two days and attribute to Him equals? That is the Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: say do you indeed disbelieve in he who created the earth in two days and attribute to him equals that is the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: And He placed on the earth firmly set mountains over its surface, and He blessed it and determined therein its [creatures'] sustenance in four days without distinction - for [the information] of those who ask.
ayahs.n: and he placed on the earth firmly set mountains over its surface and he blessed it and determined therein its creatures sustenance in four days without distinction for the information of those who ask

ayahs.t: Then He directed Himself to the heaven while it was smoke and said to it and to the earth, "Come [into being], willingly or by compulsion." They said, "We have come willingly."
ayahs.n: then he directed himself to the heaven while it was smoke and said to it and to the earth come into being willingly or by compulsion they said we have come willingly

ayahs.t: And He completed them as seven heavens within two days and inspired in each heaven its command. And We adorned the nearest heaven with lamps and as protection. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and he completed them as seven heavens within two days and inspired in each heaven its command and we adorned the nearest heaven with lamps and as protection that is the determination of the exalted in might the knowing

ayahs.t: But if they turn away, then say, "I have warned you of a thunderbolt like the thunderbolt [that struck] 'Aad and Thamud.
ayahs.n: but if they turn away then say i have warned you of a thunderbolt like the thunderbolt that struck aad and thamud

ayahs.t: [That occurred] when the messengers had come to them before them and after them, [saying], "Worship not except Allah." They said, "If our Lord had willed, He would have sent down the angels, so indeed we, in that with which you have been sent, are disbelievers."
ayahs.n: that occurred when the messengers had come to them before them and after them saying worship not except allah they said if our lord had willed he would have sent down the angels so indeed we in that with which you have been sent are disbelievers

ayahs.t: As for 'Aad, they were arrogant upon the earth without right and said, "Who is greater than us in strength?" Did they not consider that Allah who created them was greater than them in strength? But they were rejecting Our signs.
ayahs.n: as for aad they were arrogant upon the earth without right and said who is greater than us in strength did they not consider that allah who created them was greater than them in strength but they were rejecting our signs

ayahs.t: So We sent upon them a screaming wind during days of misfortune to make them taste the punishment of disgrace in the worldly life; but the punishment of the Hereafter is more disgracing, and they will not be helped.
ayahs.n: so we sent upon them a screaming wind during days of misfortune to make them taste the punishment of disgrace in the worldly life but the punishment of the hereafter is more disgracing and they will not be helped

ayahs.t: And as for Thamud, We guided them, but they preferred blindness over guidance, so the thunderbolt of humiliating punishment seized them for what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: and as for thamud we guided them but they preferred blindness over guidance so the thunderbolt of humiliating punishment seized them for what they used to earn

ayahs.t: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allah.
ayahs.n: and we saved those who believed and used to fear allah

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], the Day when the enemies of Allah will be gathered to the Fire while they are [driven] assembled in rows,
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad the day when the enemies of allah will be gathered to the fire while they are driven assembled in rows

ayahs.t: Until, when they reach it, their hearing and their eyes and their skins will testify against them of what they used to do.
ayahs.n: until when they reach it their hearing and their eyes and their skins will testify against them of what they used to do

ayahs.t: And they will say to their skins, "Why have you testified against us?" They will say, "We were made to speak by Allah, who has made everything speak; and He created you the first time, and to Him you are returned.
ayahs.n: and they will say to their skins why have you testified against us they will say we were made to speak by allah who has made everything speak and he created you the first time and to him you are returned

ayahs.t: And you were not covering yourselves, lest your hearing testify against you or your sight or your skins, but you assumed that Allah does not know much of what you do.
ayahs.n: and you were not covering yourselves lest your hearing testify against you or your sight or your skins but you assumed that allah does not know much of what you do

ayahs.t: And that was your assumption which you assumed about your Lord. It has brought you to ruin, and you have become among the losers."
ayahs.n: and that was your assumption which you assumed about your lord it has brought you to ruin and you have become among the losers

ayahs.t: So [even] if they are patient, the Fire is a residence for them; and if they ask to appease [Allah], they will not be of those who are allowed to appease.
ayahs.n: so even if they are patient the fire is a residence for them and if they ask to appease allah they will not be of those who are allowed to appease

ayahs.t: And We appointed for them companions who made attractive to them what was before them and what was behind them [of sin], and the word has come into effect upon them among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers.
ayahs.n: and we appointed for them companions who made attractive to them what was before them and what was behind them of sin and the word has come into effect upon them among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men indeed they all were losers

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieve say, "Do not listen to this Qur'an and speak noisily during [the recitation of] it that perhaps you will overcome."
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieve say do not listen to this quran and speak noisily during the recitation of it that perhaps you will overcome

ayahs.t: But We will surely cause those who disbelieve to taste a severe punishment, and We will surely recompense them for the worst of what they had been doing.
ayahs.n: but we will surely cause those who disbelieve to taste a severe punishment and we will surely recompense them for the worst of what they had been doing

ayahs.t: That is the recompense of the enemies of Allah - the Fire. For them therein is the home of eternity as recompense for what they, of Our verses, were rejecting.
ayahs.n: that is the recompense of the enemies of allah the fire for them therein is the home of eternity as recompense for what they of our verses were rejecting

ayahs.t: And those who disbelieved will [then] say, "Our Lord, show us those who misled us of the jinn and men [so] we may put them under our feet that they will be among the lowest."
ayahs.n: and those who disbelieved will then say our lord show us those who misled us of the jinn and men so we may put them under our feet that they will be among the lowest

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have said, "Our Lord is Allah " and then remained on a right course - the angels will descend upon them, [saying], "Do not fear and do not grieve but receive good tidings of Paradise, which you were promised.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have said our lord is allah and then remained on a right course the angels will descend upon them saying do not fear and do not grieve but receive good tidings of paradise which you were promised

ayahs.t: We [angels] were your allies in worldly life and [are so] in the Hereafter. And you will have therein whatever your souls desire, and you will have therein whatever you request [or wish]
ayahs.n: we angels were your allies in worldly life and are so in the hereafter and you will have therein whatever your souls desire and you will have therein whatever you request or wish

ayahs.t: As accommodation from a [Lord who is] Forgiving and Merciful."
ayahs.n: as accommodation from a lord who is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: And who is better in speech than one who invites to Allah and does righteousness and says, "Indeed, I am of the Muslims."
ayahs.n: and who is better in speech than one who invites to allah and does righteousness and says indeed i am of the muslims

ayahs.t: And not equal are the good deed and the bad. Repel [evil] by that [deed] which is better; and thereupon the one whom between you and him is enmity [will become] as though he was a devoted friend.
ayahs.n: and not equal are the good deed and the bad repel evil by that deed which is better and thereupon the one whom between you and him is enmity will become as though he was a devoted friend

ayahs.t: But none is granted it except those who are patient, and none is granted it except one having a great portion [of good].
ayahs.n: but none is granted it except those who are patient and none is granted it except one having a great portion of good

ayahs.t: And if there comes to you from Satan an evil suggestion, then seek refuge in Allah. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and if there comes to you from satan an evil suggestion then seek refuge in allah indeed he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: And of His signs are the night and day and the sun and moon. Do not prostrate to the sun or to the moon, but prostate to Allah, who created them, if it should be Him that you worship.
ayahs.n: and of his signs are the night and day and the sun and moon do not prostrate to the sun or to the moon but prostate to allah who created them if it should be him that you worship

ayahs.t: But if they are arrogant - then those who are near your Lord exalt Him by night and by day, and they do not become weary.
ayahs.n: but if they are arrogant then those who are near your lord exalt him by night and by day and they do not become weary

ayahs.t: And of His signs is that you see the earth stilled, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and grows. Indeed, He who has given it life is the Giver of Life to the dead. Indeed, He is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is that you see the earth stilled but when we send down upon it rain it quivers and grows indeed he who has given it life is the giver of life to the dead indeed he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who inject deviation into Our verses are not concealed from Us. So, is he who is cast into the Fire better or he who comes secure on the Day of Resurrection? Do whatever you will; indeed, He is Seeing of what you do.
ayahs.n: indeed those who inject deviation into our verses are not concealed from us so is he who is cast into the fire better or he who comes secure on the day of resurrection do whatever you will indeed he is seeing of what you do

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who disbelieve in the message after it has come to them... And indeed, it is a mighty Book.
ayahs.n: indeed those who disbelieve in the message after it has come to them and indeed it is a mighty book

ayahs.t: Falsehood cannot approach it from before it or from behind it; [it is] a revelation from a [Lord who is] Wise and Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: falsehood cannot approach it from before it or from behind it it is a revelation from a lord who is wise and praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Nothing is said to you, [O Muhammad], except what was already said to the messengers before you. Indeed, your Lord is a possessor of forgiveness and a possessor of painful penalty.
ayahs.n: nothing is said to you o muhammad except what was already said to the messengers before you indeed your lord is a possessor of forgiveness and a possessor of painful penalty

ayahs.t: And if We had made it a non-Arabic Qur'an, they would have said, "Why are its verses not explained in detail [in our language]? Is it a foreign [recitation] and an Arab [messenger]?" Say, "It is, for those who believe, a guidance and cure." And those who do not believe - in their ears is deafness, and it is upon them blindness. Those are being called from a distant place.
ayahs.n: and if we had made it a non arabic quran they would have said why are its verses not explained in detail in our language is it a foreign recitation and an arab messenger say it is for those who believe a guidance and cure and those who do not believe in their ears is deafness and it is upon them blindness those are being called from a distant place

ayahs.t: And We had already given Moses the Scripture, but it came under disagreement. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed they are, concerning the Qur'an, in disquieting doubt.
ayahs.n: and we had already given moses the scripture but it came under disagreement and if not for a word that preceded from your lord it would have been concluded between them and indeed they are concerning the quran in disquieting doubt

ayahs.t: Whoever does righteousness - it is for his [own] soul; and whoever does evil [does so] against it. And your Lord is not ever unjust to [His] servants.
ayahs.n: whoever does righteousness it is for his own soul and whoever does evil does so against it and your lord is not ever unjust to his servants

ayahs.t: To him [alone] is attributed knowledge of the Hour. And fruits emerge not from their coverings nor does a female conceive or give birth except with His knowledge. And the Day He will call to them, "Where are My 'partners'?" they will say, "We announce to You that there is [no longer] among us any witness [to that]."
ayahs.n: to him alone is attributed knowledge of the hour and fruits emerge not from their coverings nor does a female conceive or give birth except with his knowledge and the day he will call to them where are my partners they will say we announce to you that there is no longer among us any witness to that

ayahs.t: And lost from them will be those they were invoking before, and they will be certain that they have no place of escape.
ayahs.n: and lost from them will be those they were invoking before and they will be certain that they have no place of escape

ayahs.t: Man is not weary of supplication for good [things], but if evil touches him, he is hopeless and despairing.
ayahs.n: man is not weary of supplication for good things but if evil touches him he is hopeless and despairing

ayahs.t: And if We let him taste mercy from Us after an adversity which has touched him, he will surely say, "This is [due] to me, and I do not think the Hour will occur; and [even] if I should be returned to my Lord, indeed, for me there will be with Him the best." But We will surely inform those who disbelieved about what they did, and We will surely make them taste a massive punishment.
ayahs.n: and if we let him taste mercy from us after an adversity which has touched him he will surely say this is due to me and i do not think the hour will occur and even if i should be returned to my lord indeed for me there will be with him the best but we will surely inform those who disbelieved about what they did and we will surely make them taste a massive punishment

ayahs.t: And when We bestow favor upon man, he turns away and distances himself; but when evil touches him, then he is full of extensive supplication.
ayahs.n: and when we bestow favor upon man he turns away and distances himself but when evil touches him then he is full of extensive supplication

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered: if the Qur'an is from Allah and you disbelieved in it, who would be more astray than one who is in extreme dissension?"
ayahs.n: say have you considered if the quran is from allah and you disbelieved in it who would be more astray than one who is in extreme dissension

ayahs.t: We will show them Our signs in the horizons and within themselves until it becomes clear to them that it is the truth. But is it not sufficient concerning your Lord that He is, over all things, a Witness?
ayahs.n: we will show them our signs in the horizons and within themselves until it becomes clear to them that it is the truth but is it not sufficient concerning your lord that he is over all things a witness

ayahs.t: Unquestionably, they are in doubt about the meeting with their Lord. Unquestionably He is, of all things, encompassing.
ayahs.n: unquestionably they are in doubt about the meeting with their lord unquestionably he is of all things encompassing

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: 'Ayn, Seen, Qaf.
ayahs.n: ayn seen qaf

ayahs.t: Thus has He revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and to those before you - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: thus has he revealed to you o muhammad and to those before you allah the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and He is the Most High, the Most Great.
ayahs.n: to him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and he is the most high the most great

ayahs.t: The heavens almost break from above them, and the angels exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord and ask forgiveness for those on earth. Unquestionably, it is Allah who is the Forgiving, the Merciful.
ayahs.n: the heavens almost break from above them and the angels exalt allah with praise of their lord and ask forgiveness for those on earth unquestionably it is allah who is the forgiving the merciful

ayahs.t: And those who take as allies other than Him - Allah is [yet] Guardian over them; and you, [O Muhammad], are not over them a manager.
ayahs.n: and those who take as allies other than him allah is yet guardian over them and you o muhammad are not over them a manager

ayahs.t: And thus We have revealed to you an Arabic Qur'an that you may warn the Mother of Cities [Makkah] and those around it and warn of the Day of Assembly, about which there is no doubt. A party will be in Paradise and a party in the Blaze.
ayahs.n: and thus we have revealed to you an arabic quran that you may warn the mother of cities makkah and those around it and warn of the day of assembly about which there is no doubt a party will be in paradise and a party in the blaze

ayahs.t: And if Allah willed, He could have made them [of] one religion, but He admits whom He wills into His mercy. And the wrongdoers have not any protector or helper.
ayahs.n: and if allah willed he could have made them of one religion but he admits whom he wills into his mercy and the wrongdoers have not any protector or helper

ayahs.t: Or have they taken protectors [or allies] besides him? But Allah - He is the Protector, and He gives life to the dead, and He is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: or have they taken protectors or allies besides him but allah he is the protector and he gives life to the dead and he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: And in anything over which you disagree - its ruling is [to be referred] to Allah. [Say], "That is Allah, my Lord; upon Him I have relied, and to Him I turn back."
ayahs.n: and in anything over which you disagree its ruling is to be referred to allah say that is allah my lord upon him i have relied and to him i turn back

ayahs.t: [He is] Creator of the heavens and the earth. He has made for you from yourselves, mates, and among the cattle, mates; He multiplies you thereby. There is nothing like unto Him, and He is the Hearing, the Seeing.
ayahs.n: he is creator of the heavens and the earth he has made for you from yourselves mates and among the cattle mates he multiplies you thereby there is nothing like unto him and he is the hearing the seeing

ayahs.t: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. He extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]. Indeed He is, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: to him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth he extends provision for whom he wills and restricts it indeed he is of all things knowing

ayahs.t: He has ordained for you of religion what He enjoined upon Noah and that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and what We enjoined upon Abraham and Moses and Jesus - to establish the religion and not be divided therein. Difficult for those who associate others with Allah is that to which you invite them. Allah chooses for Himself whom He wills and guides to Himself whoever turns back [to Him].
ayahs.n: he has ordained for you of religion what he enjoined upon noah and that which we have revealed to you o muhammad and what we enjoined upon abraham and moses and jesus to establish the religion and not be divided therein difficult for those who associate others with allah is that to which you invite them allah chooses for himself whom he wills and guides to himself whoever turns back to him

ayahs.t: And they did not become divided until after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord [postponing the penalty] until a specified time, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed, those who were granted inheritance of the Scripture after them are, concerning it, in disquieting doubt.
ayahs.n: and they did not become divided until after knowledge had come to them out of jealous animosity between themselves and if not for a word that preceded from your lord postponing the penalty until a specified time it would have been concluded between them and indeed those who were granted inheritance of the scripture after them are concerning it in disquieting doubt

ayahs.t: So to that [religion of Allah] invite, [O Muhammad], and remain on a right course as you are commanded and do not follow their inclinations but say, "I have believed in what Allah has revealed of the Qur'an, and I have been commanded to do justice among you. Allah is our Lord and your Lord. For us are our deeds, and for you your deeds. There is no [need for] argument between us and you. Allah will bring us together, and to Him is the [final] destination."
ayahs.n: so to that religion of allah invite o muhammad and remain on a right course as you are commanded and do not follow their inclinations but say i have believed in what allah has revealed of the quran and i have been commanded to do justice among you allah is our lord and your lord for us are our deeds and for you your deeds there is no need for argument between us and you allah will bring us together and to him is the final destination

ayahs.t: And those who argue concerning Allah after He has been responded to - their argument is invalid with their Lord, and upon them is [His] wrath, and for them is a severe punishment.
ayahs.n: and those who argue concerning allah after he has been responded to their argument is invalid with their lord and upon them is his wrath and for them is a severe punishment

ayahs.t: It is Allah who has sent down the Book in truth and [also] the balance. And what will make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near.
ayahs.n: it is allah who has sent down the book in truth and also the balance and what will make you perceive perhaps the hour is near

ayahs.t: Those who do not believe in it are impatient for it, but those who believe are fearful of it and know that it is the truth. Unquestionably, those who dispute concerning the Hour are in extreme error.
ayahs.n: those who do not believe in it are impatient for it but those who believe are fearful of it and know that it is the truth unquestionably those who dispute concerning the hour are in extreme error

ayahs.t: Allah is Subtle with His servants; He gives provisions to whom He wills. And He is the Powerful, the Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: allah is subtle with his servants he gives provisions to whom he wills and he is the powerful the exalted in might

ayahs.t: Whoever desires the harvest of the Hereafter - We increase for him in his harvest. And whoever desires the harvest of this world - We give him thereof, but there is not for him in the Hereafter any share.
ayahs.n: whoever desires the harvest of the hereafter we increase for him in his harvest and whoever desires the harvest of this world we give him thereof but there is not for him in the hereafter any share

ayahs.t: Or have they other deities who have ordained for them a religion to which Allah has not consented? But if not for the decisive word, it would have been concluded between them. And indeed, the wrongdoers will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: or have they other deities who have ordained for them a religion to which allah has not consented but if not for the decisive word it would have been concluded between them and indeed the wrongdoers will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: You will see the wrongdoers fearful of what they have earned, and it will [certainly] befall them. And those who have believed and done righteous deeds will be in lush regions of the gardens [in Paradise] having whatever they will in the presence of their Lord. That is what is the great bounty.
ayahs.n: you will see the wrongdoers fearful of what they have earned and it will certainly befall them and those who have believed and done righteous deeds will be in lush regions of the gardens in paradise having whatever they will in the presence of their lord that is what is the great bounty

ayahs.t: It is that of which Allah gives good tidings to His servants who believe and do righteous deeds. Say, [O Muhammad], "I do not ask you for this message any payment [but] only good will through kinship." And whoever commits a good deed - We will increase for him good therein. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Appreciative.
ayahs.n: it is that of which allah gives good tidings to his servants who believe and do righteous deeds say o muhammad i do not ask you for this message any payment but only good will through kinship and whoever commits a good deed we will increase for him good therein indeed allah is forgiving and appreciative

ayahs.t: Or do they say, "He has invented about Allah a lie"? But if Allah willed, He could seal over your heart. And Allah eliminates falsehood and establishes the truth by His words. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: or do they say he has invented about allah a lie but if allah willed he could seal over your heart and allah eliminates falsehood and establishes the truth by his words indeed he is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: And it is He who accepts repentance from his servants and pardons misdeeds, and He knows what you do.
ayahs.n: and it is he who accepts repentance from his servants and pardons misdeeds and he knows what you do

ayahs.t: And He answers [the supplication of] those who have believed and done righteous deeds and increases [for] them from His bounty. But the disbelievers will have a severe punishment.
ayahs.n: and he answers the supplication of those who have believed and done righteous deeds and increases for them from his bounty but the disbelievers will have a severe punishment

ayahs.t: And if Allah had extended [excessively] provision for His servants, they would have committed tyranny throughout the earth. But He sends [it] down in an amount which He wills. Indeed He is, of His servants, Acquainted and Seeing.
ayahs.n: and if allah had extended excessively provision for his servants they would have committed tyranny throughout the earth but he sends it down in an amount which he wills indeed he is of his servants acquainted and seeing

ayahs.t: And it is He who sends down the rain after they had despaired and spreads His mercy. And He is the Protector, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: and it is he who sends down the rain after they had despaired and spreads his mercy and he is the protector the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: And of his signs is the creation of the heavens and earth and what He has dispersed throughout them of creatures. And He, for gathering them when He wills, is competent.
ayahs.n: and of his signs is the creation of the heavens and earth and what he has dispersed throughout them of creatures and he for gathering them when he wills is competent

ayahs.t: And whatever strikes you of disaster - it is for what your hands have earned; but He pardons much.
ayahs.n: and whatever strikes you of disaster it is for what your hands have earned but he pardons much

ayahs.t: And you will not cause failure [to Allah] upon the earth. And you have not besides Allah any protector or helper.
ayahs.n: and you will not cause failure to allah upon the earth and you have not besides allah any protector or helper

ayahs.t: And of His signs are the ships in the sea, like mountains.
ayahs.n: and of his signs are the ships in the sea like mountains

ayahs.t: If He willed, He could still the wind, and they would remain motionless on its surface. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
ayahs.n: if he willed he could still the wind and they would remain motionless on its surface indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful

ayahs.t: Or He could destroy them for what they earned; but He pardons much.
ayahs.n: or he could destroy them for what they earned but he pardons much

ayahs.t: And [that is so] those who dispute concerning Our signs may know that for them there is no place of escape.
ayahs.n: and that is so those who dispute concerning our signs may know that for them there is no place of escape

ayahs.t: So whatever thing you have been given - it is but [for] enjoyment of the worldly life. But what is with Allah is better and more lasting for those who have believed and upon their Lord rely
ayahs.n: so whatever thing you have been given it is but for enjoyment of the worldly life but what is with allah is better and more lasting for those who have believed and upon their lord rely

ayahs.t: And those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, and when they are angry, they forgive,
ayahs.n: and those who avoid the major sins and immoralities and when they are angry they forgive

ayahs.t: And those who have responded to their lord and established prayer and whose affair is [determined by] consultation among themselves, and from what We have provided them, they spend.
ayahs.n: and those who have responded to their lord and established prayer and whose affair is determined by consultation among themselves and from what we have provided them they spend

ayahs.t: And those who, when tyranny strikes them, they defend themselves,
ayahs.n: and those who when tyranny strikes them they defend themselves

ayahs.t: And the retribution for an evil act is an evil one like it, but whoever pardons and makes reconciliation - his reward is [due] from Allah. Indeed, He does not like wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: and the retribution for an evil act is an evil one like it but whoever pardons and makes reconciliation his reward is due from allah indeed he does not like wrongdoers

ayahs.t: And whoever avenges himself after having been wronged - those have not upon them any cause [for blame].
ayahs.n: and whoever avenges himself after having been wronged those have not upon them any cause for blame

ayahs.t: The cause is only against the ones who wrong the people and tyrannize upon the earth without right. Those will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: the cause is only against the ones who wrong the people and tyrannize upon the earth without right those will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And whoever is patient and forgives - indeed, that is of the matters [requiring] determination.
ayahs.n: and whoever is patient and forgives indeed that is of the matters requiring determination

ayahs.t: And he whom Allah sends astray - for him there is no protector beyond Him. And you will see the wrongdoers, when they see the punishment, saying, "Is there for return [to the former world] any way?"
ayahs.n: and he whom allah sends astray for him there is no protector beyond him and you will see the wrongdoers when they see the punishment saying is there for return to the former world any way

ayahs.t: And you will see them being exposed to the Fire, humbled from humiliation, looking from [behind] a covert glance. And those who had believed will say, "Indeed, the [true] losers are the ones who lost themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, the wrongdoers are in an enduring punishment."
ayahs.n: and you will see them being exposed to the fire humbled from humiliation looking from behind a covert glance and those who had believed will say indeed the true losers are the ones who lost themselves and their families on the day of resurrection unquestionably the wrongdoers are in an enduring punishment

ayahs.t: And there will not be for them any allies to aid them other than Allah. And whoever Allah sends astray - for him there is no way.
ayahs.n: and there will not be for them any allies to aid them other than allah and whoever allah sends astray for him there is no way

ayahs.t: Respond to your Lord before a Day comes from Allah of which there is no repelling. No refuge will you have that day, nor for you will there be any denial.
ayahs.n: respond to your lord before a day comes from allah of which there is no repelling no refuge will you have that day nor for you will there be any denial

ayahs.t: But if they turn away - then We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], over them as a guardian; upon you is only [the duty of] notification. And indeed, when We let man taste mercy from us, he rejoices in it; but if evil afflicts him for what his hands have put forth, then indeed, man is ungrateful.
ayahs.n: but if they turn away then we have not sent you o muhammad over them as a guardian upon you is only the duty of notification and indeed when we let man taste mercy from us he rejoices in it but if evil afflicts him for what his hands have put forth then indeed man is ungrateful

ayahs.t: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; He creates what he wills. He gives to whom He wills female [children], and He gives to whom He wills males.
ayahs.n: to allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth he creates what he wills he gives to whom he wills female children and he gives to whom he wills males

ayahs.t: Or He makes them [both] males and females, and He renders whom He wills barren. Indeed, He is Knowing and Competent.
ayahs.n: or he makes them both males and females and he renders whom he wills barren indeed he is knowing and competent

ayahs.t: And it is not for any human being that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a partition or that He sends a messenger to reveal, by His permission, what He wills. Indeed, He is Most High and Wise.
ayahs.n: and it is not for any human being that allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a partition or that he sends a messenger to reveal by his permission what he wills indeed he is most high and wise

ayahs.t: And thus We have revealed to you an inspiration of Our command. You did not know what is the Book or [what is] faith, but We have made it a light by which We guide whom We will of Our servants. And indeed, [O Muhammad], you guide to a straight path -
ayahs.n: and thus we have revealed to you an inspiration of our command you did not know what is the book or what is faith but we have made it a light by which we guide whom we will of our servants and indeed o muhammad you guide to a straight path

ayahs.t: The path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Unquestionably, to Allah do [all] matters evolve.
ayahs.n: the path of allah to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth unquestionably to allah do all matters evolve

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: By the clear Book,
ayahs.n: by the clear book

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur'an that you might understand.
ayahs.n: indeed we have made it an arabic quran that you might understand

ayahs.t: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.
ayahs.n: and indeed it is in the mother of the book with us exalted and full of wisdom

ayahs.t: Then should We turn the message away, disregarding you, because you are a transgressing people?
ayahs.n: then should we turn the message away disregarding you because you are a transgressing people

ayahs.t: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples,
ayahs.n: and how many a prophet we sent among the former peoples

ayahs.t: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.
ayahs.n: but there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him

ayahs.t: And We destroyed greater than them in [striking] power, and the example of the former peoples has preceded.
ayahs.n: and we destroyed greater than them in striking power and the example of the former peoples has preceded

ayahs.t: And if you should ask them, "Who has created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "They were created by the Exalted in Might, the Knowing."
ayahs.n: and if you should ask them who has created the heavens and the earth they would surely say they were created by the exalted in might the knowing

ayahs.t: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided
ayahs.n: the one who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

ayahs.t: And who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts, and We revive thereby a dead land - thus will you be brought forth -
ayahs.n: and who sends down rain from the sky in measured amounts and we revive thereby a dead land thus will you be brought forth

ayahs.t: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount.
ayahs.n: and who created the species all of them and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount

ayahs.t: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say. "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.
ayahs.n: that you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your lord when you have settled upon them and say exalted is he who has subjected this to us and we could not have otherwise subdued it

ayahs.t: And indeed we, to our Lord, will [surely] return."
ayahs.n: and indeed we to our lord will surely return

ayahs.t: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful.
ayahs.n: but they have attributed to him from his servants a portion indeed man is clearly ungrateful

ayahs.t: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons?
ayahs.n: or has he taken out of what he has created daughters and chosen you for having sons

ayahs.t: And when one of them is given good tidings of that which he attributes to the Most Merciful in comparison, his face becomes dark, and he suppresses grief.
ayahs.n: and when one of them is given good tidings of that which he attributes to the most merciful in comparison his face becomes dark and he suppresses grief

ayahs.t: So is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident [attributed to Allah]?
ayahs.n: so is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident attributed to allah

ayahs.t: And they have made the angels, who are servants of the Most Merciful, females. Did they witness their creation? Their testimony will be recorded, and they will be questioned.
ayahs.n: and they have made the angels who are servants of the most merciful females did they witness their creation their testimony will be recorded and they will be questioned

ayahs.t: And they said, "If the Most Merciful had willed, we would not have worshipped them." They have of that no knowledge. They are not but falsifying.
ayahs.n: and they said if the most merciful had willed we would not have worshipped them they have of that no knowledge they are not but falsifying

ayahs.t: Or have We given them a book before the Qur'an to which they are adhering?
ayahs.n: or have we given them a book before the quran to which they are adhering

ayahs.t: Rather, they say, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are in their footsteps [rightly] guided."
ayahs.n: rather they say indeed we found our fathers upon a religion and we are in their footsteps rightly guided

ayahs.t: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following."
ayahs.n: and similarly we did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said indeed we found our fathers upon a religion and we are in their footsteps following

ayahs.t: [Each warner] said, "Even if I brought you better guidance than that [religion] upon which you found your fathers?" They said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers."
ayahs.n: each warner said even if i brought you better guidance than that religion upon which you found your fathers they said indeed we in that with which you were sent are disbelievers

ayahs.t: So we took retribution from them; then see how was the end of the deniers.
ayahs.n: so we took retribution from them then see how was the end of the deniers

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, "Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when abraham said to his father and his people indeed i am disassociated from that which you worship

ayahs.t: Except for He who created me; and indeed, He will guide me."
ayahs.n: except for he who created me and indeed he will guide me

ayahs.t: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].
ayahs.n: and he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return to it

ayahs.t: However, I gave enjoyment to these [people of Makkah] and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear Messenger.
ayahs.n: however i gave enjoyment to these people of makkah and their fathers until there came to them the truth and a clear messenger

ayahs.t: But when the truth came to them, they said, "This is magic, and indeed we are, concerning it, disbelievers."
ayahs.n: but when the truth came to them they said this is magic and indeed we are concerning it disbelievers

ayahs.t: And they said, "Why was this Qur'an not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?"
ayahs.n: and they said why was this quran not sent down upon a great man from one of the two cities

ayahs.t: Do they distribute the mercy of your Lord? It is We who have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and have raised some of them above others in degrees [of rank] that they may make use of one another for service. But the mercy of your Lord is better than whatever they accumulate.
ayahs.n: do they distribute the mercy of your lord it is we who have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and have raised some of them above others in degrees of rank that they may make use of one another for service but the mercy of your lord is better than whatever they accumulate

ayahs.t: And if it were not that the people would become one community [of disbelievers], We would have made for those who disbelieve in the Most Merciful - for their houses - ceilings and stairways of silver upon which to mount
ayahs.n: and if it were not that the people would become one community of disbelievers we would have made for those who disbelieve in the most merciful for their houses ceilings and stairways of silver upon which to mount

ayahs.t: And for their houses - doors and couches [of silver] upon which to recline
ayahs.n: and for their houses doors and couches of silver upon which to recline

ayahs.t: And gold ornament. But all that is not but the enjoyment of worldly life. And the Hereafter with your Lord is for the righteous.
ayahs.n: and gold ornament but all that is not but the enjoyment of worldly life and the hereafter with your lord is for the righteous

ayahs.t: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.
ayahs.n: and whoever is blinded from remembrance of the most merciful we appoint for him a devil and he is to him a companion

ayahs.t: And indeed, the devils avert them from the way [of guidance] while they think that they are [rightly] guided
ayahs.n: and indeed the devils avert them from the way of guidance while they think that they are rightly guided

ayahs.t: Until, when he comes to Us [at Judgement], he says [to his companion], "Oh, I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west - how wretched a companion."
ayahs.n: until when he comes to us at judgement he says to his companion oh i wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and west how wretched a companion

ayahs.t: And never will it benefit you that Day, when you have wronged, that you are [all] sharing in the punishment.
ayahs.n: and never will it benefit you that day when you have wronged that you are all sharing in the punishment

ayahs.t: Then will you make the deaf hear, [O Muhammad], or guide the blind or he who is in clear error?
ayahs.n: then will you make the deaf hear o muhammad or guide the blind or he who is in clear error

ayahs.t: And whether [or not] We take you away [in death], indeed, We will take retribution upon them.
ayahs.n: and whether or not we take you away in death indeed we will take retribution upon them

ayahs.t: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.
ayahs.n: or whether or not we show you that which we have promised them indeed we are perfect in ability

ayahs.t: So adhere to that which is revealed to you. Indeed, you are on a straight path.
ayahs.n: so adhere to that which is revealed to you indeed you are on a straight path

ayahs.t: And indeed, it is a remembrance for you and your people, and you [all] are going to be questioned.
ayahs.n: and indeed it is a remembrance for you and your people and you all are going to be questioned

ayahs.t: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?
ayahs.n: and ask those we sent before you of our messengers have we made besides the most merciful deities to be worshipped

ayahs.t: And certainly did We send Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, and he said, "Indeed, I am the messenger of the Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: and certainly did we send moses with our signs to pharaoh and his establishment and he said indeed i am the messenger of the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.
ayahs.n: but when he brought them our signs at once they laughed at them

ayahs.t: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].
ayahs.n: and we showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister and we seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return to faith

ayahs.t: And they said [to Moses], "O magician, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. Indeed, we will be guided."
ayahs.n: and they said to moses o magician invoke for us your lord by what he has promised you indeed we will be guided

ayahs.t: But when We removed from them the affliction, at once they broke their word.
ayahs.n: but when we removed from them the affliction at once they broke their word

ayahs.t: And Pharaoh called out among his people; he said, "O my people, does not the kingdom of Egypt belong to me, and these rivers flowing beneath me; then do you not see?
ayahs.n: and pharaoh called out among his people he said o my people does not the kingdom of egypt belong to me and these rivers flowing beneath me then do you not see

ayahs.t: Or am I [not] better than this one who is insignificant and hardly makes himself clear?
ayahs.n: or am i not better than this one who is insignificant and hardly makes himself clear

ayahs.t: Then why have there not been placed upon him bracelets of gold or come with him the angels in conjunction?"
ayahs.n: then why have there not been placed upon him bracelets of gold or come with him the angels in conjunction

ayahs.t: So he bluffed his people, and they obeyed him. Indeed, they were [themselves] a people defiantly disobedient [of Allah].
ayahs.n: so he bluffed his people and they obeyed him indeed they were themselves a people defiantly disobedient of allah

ayahs.t: And when they angered Us, We took retribution from them and drowned them all.
ayahs.n: and when they angered us we took retribution from them and drowned them all

ayahs.t: And We made them a precedent and an example for the later peoples.
ayahs.n: and we made them a precedent and an example for the later peoples

ayahs.t: And when the son of Mary was presented as an example, immediately your people laughed aloud.
ayahs.n: and when the son of mary was presented as an example immediately your people laughed aloud

ayahs.t: And they said, "Are your gods better, or is he?" They did not present the comparison except for [mere] argument. But, [in fact], they are a people prone to dispute.
ayahs.n: and they said are your gods better or is he they did not present the comparison except for mere argument but in fact they are a people prone to dispute

ayahs.t: Jesus was not but a servant upon whom We bestowed favor, and We made him an example for the Children of Israel.
ayahs.n: jesus was not but a servant upon whom we bestowed favor and we made him an example for the children of israel

ayahs.t: And if We willed, We could have made [instead] of you angels succeeding [one another] on the earth.
ayahs.n: and if we willed we could have made instead of you angels succeeding one another on the earth

ayahs.t: And indeed, Jesus will be [a sign for] knowledge of the Hour, so be not in doubt of it, and follow Me. This is a straight path.
ayahs.n: and indeed jesus will be a sign for knowledge of the hour so be not in doubt of it and follow me this is a straight path

ayahs.t: And never let Satan avert you. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.
ayahs.n: and never let satan avert you indeed he is to you a clear enemy

ayahs.t: And when Jesus brought clear proofs, he said, "I have come to you with wisdom and to make clear to you some of that over which you differ, so fear Allah and obey me.
ayahs.n: and when jesus brought clear proofs he said i have come to you with wisdom and to make clear to you some of that over which you differ so fear allah and obey me

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. This is a straight path."
ayahs.n: indeed allah is my lord and your lord so worship him this is a straight path

ayahs.t: But the denominations from among them differed [and separated], so woe to those who have wronged from the punishment of a painful Day.
ayahs.n: but the denominations from among them differed and separated so woe to those who have wronged from the punishment of a painful day

ayahs.t: Are they waiting except for the Hour to come upon them suddenly while they perceive not?
ayahs.n: are they waiting except for the hour to come upon them suddenly while they perceive not

ayahs.t: Close friends, that Day, will be enemies to each other, except for the righteous
ayahs.n: close friends that day will be enemies to each other except for the righteous

ayahs.t: [To whom Allah will say], "O My servants, no fear will there be concerning you this Day, nor will you grieve,
ayahs.n: to whom allah will say o my servants no fear will there be concerning you this day nor will you grieve

ayahs.t: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims.
ayahs.n: you who believed in our verses and were muslims

ayahs.t: Enter Paradise, you and your kinds, delighted."
ayahs.n: enter paradise you and your kinds delighted

ayahs.t: Circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold. And therein is whatever the souls desire and [what] delights the eyes, and you will abide therein eternally.
ayahs.n: circulated among them will be plates and vessels of gold and therein is whatever the souls desire and what delights the eyes and you will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: And that is Paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do.
ayahs.n: and that is paradise which you are made to inherit for what you used to do

ayahs.t: For you therein is much fruit from which you will eat.
ayahs.n: for you therein is much fruit from which you will eat

ayahs.t: Indeed, the criminals will be in the punishment of Hell, abiding eternally.
ayahs.n: indeed the criminals will be in the punishment of hell abiding eternally

ayahs.t: It will not be allowed to subside for them, and they, therein, are in despair.
ayahs.n: it will not be allowed to subside for them and they therein are in despair

ayahs.t: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: and we did not wrong them but it was they who were the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: And they will call, "O Malik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain."
ayahs.n: and they will call o malik let your lord put an end to us he will say indeed you will remain

ayahs.t: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.
ayahs.n: we had certainly brought you the truth but most of you to the truth were averse

ayahs.t: Or have they devised [some] affair? But indeed, We are devising [a plan].
ayahs.n: or have they devised some affair but indeed we are devising a plan

ayahs.t: Or do they think that We hear not their secrets and their private conversations? Yes, [We do], and Our messengers are with them recording.
ayahs.n: or do they think that we hear not their secrets and their private conversations yes we do and our messengers are with them recording

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad if the most merciful had a son then i would be the first of his worshippers

ayahs.t: Exalted is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
ayahs.n: exalted is the lord of the heavens and the earth lord of the throne above what they describe

ayahs.t: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.
ayahs.n: so leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their day which they are promised

ayahs.t: And it is Allah who is [the only] deity in the heaven, and on the earth [the only] deity. And He is the Wise, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: and it is allah who is the only deity in the heaven and on the earth the only deity and he is the wise the knowing

ayahs.t: And blessed is He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the Hour and to whom you will be returned.
ayahs.n: and blessed is he to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them and with whom is knowledge of the hour and to whom you will be returned

ayahs.t: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.
ayahs.n: and those they invoke besides him do not possess power of intercession but only those who testify to the truth can benefit and they know

ayahs.t: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allah." So how are they deluded?
ayahs.n: and if you asked them who created them they would surely say allah so how are they deluded

ayahs.t: And [Allah acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe."
ayahs.n: and allah acknowledges his saying o my lord indeed these are a people who do not believe

ayahs.t: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know.
ayahs.n: so turn aside from them and say peace but they are going to know

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: By the clear Book,
ayahs.n: by the clear book

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].
ayahs.n: indeed we sent it down during a blessed night indeed we were to warn mankind

ayahs.t: On that night is made distinct every precise matter -
ayahs.n: on that night is made distinct every precise matter

ayahs.t: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]
ayahs.n: every matter proceeding from us indeed we were to send a messenger

ayahs.t: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
ayahs.n: as mercy from your lord indeed he is the hearing the knowing

ayahs.t: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.
ayahs.n: lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them if you would be certain

ayahs.t: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.
ayahs.n: there is no deity except him he gives life and causes death he is your lord and the lord of your first forefathers

ayahs.t: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.
ayahs.n: but they are in doubt amusing themselves

ayahs.t: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke.
ayahs.n: then watch for the day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

ayahs.t: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.
ayahs.n: covering the people this is a painful torment

ayahs.t: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."
ayahs.n: they will say our lord remove from us the torment indeed we are believers

ayahs.t: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.
ayahs.n: how will there be for them a reminder at that time and there had come to them a clear messenger

ayahs.t: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."
ayahs.n: then they turned away from him and said he was taught and is a madman

ayahs.t: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].
ayahs.n: indeed we will remove the torment for a little indeed you disbelievers will return to disbelief

ayahs.t: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.
ayahs.n: the day we will strike with the greatest assault indeed we will take retribution

ayahs.t: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger,
ayahs.n: and we had already tried before them the people of pharaoh and there came to them a noble messenger

ayahs.t: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"
ayahs.n: saying render to me the servants of allah indeed i am to you a trustworthy messenger

ayahs.t: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority.
ayahs.n: and saying be not haughty with allah indeed i have come to you with clear authority

ayahs.t: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.
ayahs.n: and indeed i have sought refuge in my lord and your lord lest you stone me

ayahs.t: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."
ayahs.n: but if you do not believe me then leave me alone

ayahs.t: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.
ayahs.n: and finally he called to his lord that these were a criminal people

ayahs.t: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.
ayahs.n: allah said then set out with my servants by night indeed you are to be pursued

ayahs.t: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."
ayahs.n: and leave the sea in stillness indeed they are an army to be drowned

ayahs.t: How much they left behind of gardens and springs
ayahs.n: how much they left behind of gardens and springs

ayahs.t: And crops and noble sites
ayahs.n: and crops and noble sites

ayahs.t: And comfort wherein they were amused.
ayahs.n: and comfort wherein they were amused

ayahs.t: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.
ayahs.n: thus and we caused to inherit it another people

ayahs.t: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.
ayahs.n: and the heaven and earth wept not for them nor were they reprieved

ayahs.t: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -
ayahs.n: and we certainly saved the children of israel from the humiliating torment

ayahs.t: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.
ayahs.n: from pharaoh indeed he was a haughty one among the transgressors

ayahs.t: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.
ayahs.n: and we certainly chose them by knowledge over all the worlds

ayahs.t: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.
ayahs.n: and we gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial

ayahs.t: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,
ayahs.n: indeed these disbelievers are saying

ayahs.t: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.
ayahs.n: there is not but our first death and we will not be resurrected

ayahs.t: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: then bring back our forefathers if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.
ayahs.n: are they better or the people of tubba and those before them we destroyed them for indeed they were criminals

ayahs.t: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.
ayahs.n: and we did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play

ayahs.t: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.
ayahs.n: we did not create them except in truth but most of them do not know

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -
ayahs.n: indeed the day of judgement is the appointed time for them all

ayahs.t: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -
ayahs.n: the day when no relation will avail a relation at all nor will they be helped

ayahs.t: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
ayahs.n: except those believers on whom allah has mercy indeed he is the exalted in might the merciful

ayahs.t: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum
ayahs.n: indeed the tree of zaqqum

ayahs.t: Is food for the sinful.
ayahs.n: is food for the sinful

ayahs.t: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies
ayahs.n: like murky oil it boils within bellies

ayahs.t: Like the boiling of scalding water.
ayahs.n: like the boiling of scalding water

ayahs.t: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,
ayahs.n: it will be commanded seize him and drag him into the midst of the hellfire

ayahs.t: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."
ayahs.n: then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water

ayahs.t: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!
ayahs.n: it will be said taste indeed you are the honored the noble

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."
ayahs.n: indeed this is what you used to dispute

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place;
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be in a secure place

ayahs.t: Within gardens and springs,
ayahs.n: within gardens and springs

ayahs.t: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.
ayahs.n: wearing garments of fine silk and brocade facing each other

ayahs.t: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
ayahs.n: thus and we will marry them to fair women with large beautiful eyes

ayahs.t: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.
ayahs.n: they will call therein for every kind of fruit safe and secure

ayahs.t: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
ayahs.n: they will not taste death therein except the first death and he will have protected them from the punishment of hellfire

ayahs.t: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: as bounty from your lord that is what is the great attainment

ayahs.t: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded.
ayahs.n: and indeed we have eased the quran in your tongue that they might be reminded

ayahs.t: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
ayahs.n: so watch o muhammad indeed they are watching for your end

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: the revelation of the book is from allah the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: Indeed, within the heavens and earth are signs for the believers.
ayahs.n: indeed within the heavens and earth are signs for the believers

ayahs.t: And in the creation of yourselves and what He disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain [in faith].
ayahs.n: and in the creation of yourselves and what he disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain in faith

ayahs.t: And [in] the alternation of night and day and [in] what Allah sends down from the sky of provision and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness and [in His] directing of the winds are signs for a people who reason.
ayahs.n: and in the alternation of night and day and in what allah sends down from the sky of provision and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness and in his directing of the winds are signs for a people who reason

ayahs.t: These are the verses of Allah which We recite to you in truth. Then in what statement after Allah and His verses will they believe?
ayahs.n: these are the verses of allah which we recite to you in truth then in what statement after allah and his verses will they believe

ayahs.t: Woe to every sinful liar
ayahs.n: woe to every sinful liar

ayahs.t: Who hears the verses of Allah recited to him, then persists arrogantly as if he had not heard them. So give him tidings of a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: who hears the verses of allah recited to him then persists arrogantly as if he had not heard them so give him tidings of a painful punishment

ayahs.t: And when he knows anything of Our verses, he takes them in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: and when he knows anything of our verses he takes them in ridicule those will have a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: Before them is Hell, and what they had earned will not avail them at all nor what they had taken besides Allah as allies. And they will have a great punishment.
ayahs.n: before them is hell and what they had earned will not avail them at all nor what they had taken besides allah as allies and they will have a great punishment

ayahs.t: This [Qur'an] is guidance. And those who have disbelieved in the verses of their Lord will have a painful punishment of foul nature.
ayahs.n: this quran is guidance and those who have disbelieved in the verses of their lord will have a painful punishment of foul nature

ayahs.t: It is Allah who subjected to you the sea so that ships may sail upon it by His command and that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.
ayahs.n: it is allah who subjected to you the sea so that ships may sail upon it by his command and that you may seek of his bounty and perhaps you will be grateful

ayahs.t: And He has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth - all from Him. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
ayahs.n: and he has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth all from him indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], to those who have believed that they [should] forgive those who expect not the days of Allah so that He may recompense a people for what they used to earn.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad to those who have believed that they should forgive those who expect not the days of allah so that he may recompense a people for what they used to earn

ayahs.t: Whoever does a good deed - it is for himself; and whoever does evil - it is against the self. Then to your Lord you will be returned.
ayahs.n: whoever does a good deed it is for himself and whoever does evil it is against the self then to your lord you will be returned

ayahs.t: And We did certainly give the Children of Israel the Scripture and judgement and prophethood, and We provided them with good things and preferred them over the worlds.
ayahs.n: and we did certainly give the children of israel the scripture and judgement and prophethood and we provided them with good things and preferred them over the worlds

ayahs.t: And We gave them clear proofs of the matter [of religion]. And they did not differ except after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.
ayahs.n: and we gave them clear proofs of the matter of religion and they did not differ except after knowledge had come to them out of jealous animosity between themselves indeed your lord will judge between them on the day of resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ

ayahs.t: Then We put you, [O Muhammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know.
ayahs.n: then we put you o muhammad on an ordained way concerning the matter of religion so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know

ayahs.t: Indeed, they will never avail you against Allah at all. And indeed, the wrongdoers are allies of one another; but Allah is the protector of the righteous.
ayahs.n: indeed they will never avail you against allah at all and indeed the wrongdoers are allies of one another but allah is the protector of the righteous

ayahs.t: This [Qur'an] is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain [in faith].
ayahs.n: this quran is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain in faith

ayahs.t: Or do those who commit evils think We will make them like those who have believed and done righteous deeds - [make them] equal in their life and their death? Evil is that which they judge.
ayahs.n: or do those who commit evils think we will make them like those who have believed and done righteous deeds make them equal in their life and their death evil is that which they judge

ayahs.t: And Allah created the heavens and earth in truth and so that every soul may be recompensed for what it has earned, and they will not be wronged.
ayahs.n: and allah created the heavens and earth in truth and so that every soul may be recompensed for what it has earned and they will not be wronged

ayahs.t: Have you seen he who has taken as his god his [own] desire, and Allah has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil? So who will guide him after Allah? Then will you not be reminded?
ayahs.n: have you seen he who has taken as his god his own desire and allah has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil so who will guide him after allah then will you not be reminded

ayahs.t: And they say, "There is not but our worldly life; we die and live, and nothing destroys us except time." And they have of that no knowledge; they are only assuming.
ayahs.n: and they say there is not but our worldly life we die and live and nothing destroys us except time and they have of that no knowledge they are only assuming

ayahs.t: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, their argument is only that they say, "Bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: and when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences their argument is only that they say bring back our forefathers if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Say, "Allah causes you to live, then causes you to die; then He will assemble you for the Day of Resurrection, about which there is no doubt, but most of the people do not know."
ayahs.n: say allah causes you to live then causes you to die then he will assemble you for the day of resurrection about which there is no doubt but most of the people do not know

ayahs.t: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And the Day the Hour appears - that Day the falsifiers will lose.
ayahs.n: and to allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and the day the hour appears that day the falsifiers will lose

ayahs.t: And you will see every nation kneeling [from fear]. Every nation will be called to its record [and told], "Today you will be recompensed for what you used to do.
ayahs.n: and you will see every nation kneeling from fear every nation will be called to its record and told today you will be recompensed for what you used to do

ayahs.t: This, Our record, speaks about you in truth. Indeed, We were having transcribed whatever you used to do."
ayahs.n: this our record speaks about you in truth indeed we were having transcribed whatever you used to do

ayahs.t: So as for those who believed and did righteous deeds, their Lord will admit them into His mercy. That is what is the clear attainment.
ayahs.n: so as for those who believed and did righteous deeds their lord will admit them into his mercy that is what is the clear attainment

ayahs.t: But as for those who disbelieved, [it will be said], "Were not Our verses recited to you, but you were arrogant and became a people of criminals?
ayahs.n: but as for those who disbelieved it will be said were not our verses recited to you but you were arrogant and became a people of criminals

ayahs.t: And when it was said, 'Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth and the Hour [is coming] - no doubt about it,' you said, 'We know not what is the Hour. We assume only assumption, and we are not convinced.' "
ayahs.n: and when it was said indeed the promise of allah is truth and the hour is coming no doubt about it you said we know not what is the hour we assume only assumption and we are not convinced

ayahs.t: And the evil consequences of what they did will appear to them, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
ayahs.n: and the evil consequences of what they did will appear to them and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule

ayahs.t: And it will be said, "Today We will forget you as you forgot the meeting of this Day of yours, and your refuge is the Fire, and for you there are no helpers.
ayahs.n: and it will be said today we will forget you as you forgot the meeting of this day of yours and your refuge is the fire and for you there are no helpers

ayahs.t: That is because you took the verses of Allah in ridicule, and worldly life deluded you." So that Day they will not be removed from it, nor will they be asked to appease [Allah].
ayahs.n: that is because you took the verses of allah in ridicule and worldly life deluded you so that day they will not be removed from it nor will they be asked to appease allah

ayahs.t: Then, to Allah belongs [all] praise - Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: then to allah belongs all praise lord of the heavens and lord of the earth lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: And to Him belongs [all] grandeur within the heavens and the earth, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: and to him belongs all grandeur within the heavens and the earth and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: Ha, Meem.
ayahs.n: ha meem

ayahs.t: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: the revelation of the book is from allah the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: We did not create the heavens and earth and what is between them except in truth and [for] a specified term. But those who disbelieve, from that of which they are warned, are turning away.
ayahs.n: we did not create the heavens and earth and what is between them except in truth and for a specified term but those who disbelieve from that of which they are warned are turning away

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Have you considered that which you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created of the earth; or did they have partnership in [creation of] the heavens? Bring me a scripture [revealed] before this or a [remaining] trace of knowledge, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad have you considered that which you invoke besides allah show me what they have created of the earth or did they have partnership in creation of the heavens bring me a scripture revealed before this or a remaining trace of knowledge if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: And who is more astray than he who invokes besides Allah those who will not respond to him until the Day of Resurrection, and they, of their invocation, are unaware.
ayahs.n: and who is more astray than he who invokes besides allah those who will not respond to him until the day of resurrection and they of their invocation are unaware

ayahs.t: And when the people are gathered [that Day], they [who were invoked] will be enemies to them, and they will be deniers of their worship.
ayahs.n: and when the people are gathered that day they who were invoked will be enemies to them and they will be deniers of their worship
