ayahs.t: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -
ayahs.n: and that he creates the two mates the male and female

ayahs.t: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
ayahs.n: from a sperm drop when it is emitted

ayahs.t: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation
ayahs.n: and that incumbent upon him is the next creation

ayahs.t: And that it is He who enriches and suffices
ayahs.n: and that it is he who enriches and suffices

ayahs.t: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius
ayahs.n: and that it is he who is the lord of sirius

ayahs.t: And that He destroyed the first [people of] 'Aad
ayahs.n: and that he destroyed the first people of aad

ayahs.t: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -
ayahs.n: and thamud and he did not spare them

ayahs.t: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing.
ayahs.n: and the people of noah before indeed it was they who were even more unjust and oppressing

ayahs.t: And the overturned towns He hurled down
ayahs.n: and the overturned towns he hurled down

ayahs.t: And covered them by that which He covered.
ayahs.n: and covered them by that which he covered

ayahs.t: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
ayahs.n: then which of the favors of your lord do you doubt

ayahs.t: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.
ayahs.n: this prophet is a warner like the former warners

ayahs.t: The Approaching Day has approached.
ayahs.n: the approaching day has approached

ayahs.t: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.
ayahs.n: of it from those besides allah there is no remover

ayahs.t: Then at this statement do you wonder?
ayahs.n: then at this statement do you wonder

ayahs.t: And you laugh and do not weep
ayahs.n: and you laugh and do not weep

ayahs.t: While you are proudly sporting?
ayahs.n: while you are proudly sporting

ayahs.t: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].
ayahs.n: so prostrate to allah and worship him

ayahs.t: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
ayahs.n: the hour has come near and the moon has split in two

ayahs.t: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
ayahs.n: and if they see a miracle they turn away and say passing magic

ayahs.t: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.
ayahs.n: and they denied and followed their inclinations but for every matter is a time of settlement

ayahs.t: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -
ayahs.n: and there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence

ayahs.t: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
ayahs.n: extensive wisdom but warning does not avail them

ayahs.t: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
ayahs.n: so leave them o muhammad the day the caller calls to something forbidding

ayahs.t: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
ayahs.n: their eyes humbled they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading

ayahs.t: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."
ayahs.n: racing ahead toward the caller the disbelievers will say this is a difficult day

ayahs.t: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.
ayahs.n: the people of noah denied before them and they denied our servant and said a madman and he was repelled

ayahs.t: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
ayahs.n: so he invoked his lord indeed i am overpowered so help

ayahs.t: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
ayahs.n: then we opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

ayahs.t: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
ayahs.n: and caused the earth to burst with springs and the waters met for a matter already predestined

ayahs.t: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
ayahs.n: and we carried him on a construction of planks and nails

ayahs.t: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
ayahs.n: sailing under our observation as reward for he who had been denied

ayahs.t: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we left it as a sign so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.n: and how severe were my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we have certainly made the quran easy for remembrance so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: 'Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.n: aad denied and how severe were my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
ayahs.n: indeed we sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune

ayahs.t: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
ayahs.n: extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted

ayahs.t: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.n: and how severe were my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we have certainly made the quran easy for remembrance so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: Thamud denied the warning
ayahs.n: thamud denied the warning

ayahs.t: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
ayahs.n: and said is it one human being among us that we should follow indeed we would then be in error and madness

ayahs.t: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
ayahs.n: has the message been sent down upon him from among us rather he is an insolent liar

ayahs.t: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
ayahs.n: they will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar

ayahs.t: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
ayahs.n: indeed we are sending the she camel as trial for them so watch them and be patient

ayahs.t: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
ayahs.n: and inform them that the water is shared between them each day of drink attended by turn

ayahs.t: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
ayahs.n: but they called their companion and he dared and hamstrung her

ayahs.t: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.n: and how severe were my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.
ayahs.n: indeed we sent upon them one blast from the sky and they became like the dry twig fragments of an animal pen

ayahs.t: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we have certainly made the quran easy for remembrance so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: The people of Lot denied the warning.
ayahs.n: the people of lot denied the warning

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn
ayahs.n: indeed we sent upon them a storm of stones except the family of lot we saved them before dawn

ayahs.t: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
ayahs.n: as favor from us thus do we reward he who is grateful

ayahs.t: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.
ayahs.n: and he had already warned them of our assault but they disputed the warning

ayahs.t: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."
ayahs.n: and they had demanded from him his guests but we obliterated their eyes saying taste my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.
ayahs.n: and there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment

ayahs.t: So taste My punishment and warning.
ayahs.n: so taste my punishment and warning

ayahs.t: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we have certainly made the quran easy for remembrance so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.
ayahs.n: and there certainly came to the people of pharaoh warning

ayahs.t: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.
ayahs.n: they denied our signs all of them so we seized them with a seizure of one exalted in might and perfect in ability

ayahs.t: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?
ayahs.n: are your disbelievers better than those former ones or have you immunity in the scripture

ayahs.t: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
ayahs.n: or do they say we are an assembly supporting each other

ayahs.t: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
ayahs.n: their assembly will be defeated and they will turn their backs in retreat

ayahs.t: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.
ayahs.n: but the hour is their appointment for due punishment and the hour is more disastrous and more bitter

ayahs.t: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.
ayahs.n: indeed the criminals are in error and madness

ayahs.t: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
ayahs.n: the day they are dragged into the fire on their faces it will be said taste the touch of saqar

ayahs.t: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
ayahs.n: indeed all things we created with predestination

ayahs.t: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
ayahs.n: and our command is but one like a glance of the eye

ayahs.t: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.n: and we have already destroyed your kinds so is there any who will remember

ayahs.t: And everything they did is in written records.
ayahs.n: and everything they did is in written records

ayahs.t: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
ayahs.n: and every small and great thing is inscribed

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be among gardens and rivers

ayahs.t: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
ayahs.n: in a seat of honor near a sovereign perfect in ability

ayahs.t: The Most Merciful
ayahs.n: the most merciful

ayahs.t: Taught the Qur'an,
ayahs.n: taught the quran

ayahs.t: Created man,
ayahs.n: created man

ayahs.t: [And] taught him eloquence.
ayahs.n: and taught him eloquence

ayahs.t: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,
ayahs.n: the sun and the moon move by precise calculation

ayahs.t: And the stars and trees prostrate.
ayahs.n: and the stars and trees prostrate

ayahs.t: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
ayahs.n: and the heaven he raised and imposed the balance

ayahs.t: That you not transgress within the balance.
ayahs.n: that you not transgress within the balance

ayahs.t: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance.
ayahs.n: and establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance

ayahs.t: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
ayahs.n: and the earth he laid out for the creatures

ayahs.t: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
ayahs.n: therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths of dates

ayahs.t: And grain having husks and scented plants.
ayahs.n: and grain having husks and scented plants

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.
ayahs.n: he created man from clay like that of pottery

ayahs.t: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
ayahs.n: and he created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.
ayahs.n: he is lord of the two sunrises and lord of the two sunsets

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];
ayahs.n: he released the two seas meeting side by side

ayahs.t: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.
ayahs.n: between them is a barrier so neither of them transgresses

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.
ayahs.n: from both of them emerge pearl and coral

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
ayahs.n: and to him belong the ships with sails elevated in the sea like mountains

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Everyone upon the earth will perish,
ayahs.n: everyone upon the earth will perish

ayahs.t: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
ayahs.n: and there will remain the face of your lord owner of majesty and honor

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
ayahs.n: whoever is within the heavens and earth asks him every day he is bringing about a matter

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.
ayahs.n: we will attend to you o prominent beings

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].
ayahs.n: o company of jinn and mankind if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth then pass you will not pass except by authority from allah

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves.
ayahs.n: there will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke and you will not defend yourselves

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil -
ayahs.n: and when the heaven is split open and becomes rose colored like oil

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
ayahs.n: then on that day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
ayahs.n: the criminals will be known by their marks and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
ayahs.n: this is hell which the criminals deny

ayahs.t: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].
ayahs.n: they will go around between it and scalding water heated to the utmost degree

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -
ayahs.n: but for he who has feared the position of his lord are two gardens

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Having [spreading] branches.
ayahs.n: having spreading branches

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In both of them are two springs, flowing.
ayahs.n: in both of them are two springs flowing

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.
ayahs.n: in both of them are of every fruit two kinds

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
ayahs.n: they are reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -
ayahs.n: in them are women limiting their glances untouched before them by man or jinni

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: As if they were rubies and coral.
ayahs.n: as if they were rubies and coral

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?
ayahs.n: is the reward for good anything but good

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -
ayahs.n: and below them both in excellence are two other gardens

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Dark green [in color].
ayahs.n: dark green in color

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In both of them are two springs, spouting.
ayahs.n: in both of them are two springs spouting

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.
ayahs.n: in both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: In them are good and beautiful women -
ayahs.n: in them are good and beautiful women

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -
ayahs.n: fair ones reserved in pavilions

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Untouched before them by man or jinni -
ayahs.n: untouched before them by man or jinni

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets.
ayahs.n: reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets

ayahs.t: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
ayahs.n: so which of the favors of your lord would you deny

ayahs.t: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
ayahs.n: blessed is the name of your lord owner of majesty and honor

ayahs.t: When the Occurrence occurs,
ayahs.n: when the occurrence occurs

ayahs.t: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
ayahs.n: there is at its occurrence no denial

ayahs.t: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].
ayahs.n: it will bring down some and raise up others

ayahs.t: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
ayahs.n: when the earth is shaken with convulsion

ayahs.t: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
ayahs.n: and the mountains are broken down crumbling

ayahs.t: And become dust dispersing.
ayahs.n: and become dust dispersing

ayahs.t: And you become [of] three kinds:
ayahs.n: and you become of three kinds

ayahs.t: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
ayahs.n: then the companions of the right what are the companions of the right

ayahs.t: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
ayahs.n: and the companions of the left what are the companions of the left

ayahs.t: And the forerunners, the forerunners -
ayahs.n: and the forerunners the forerunners

ayahs.t: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
ayahs.n: those are the ones brought near to allah

ayahs.t: In the Gardens of Pleasure,
ayahs.n: in the gardens of pleasure

ayahs.t: A [large] company of the former peoples
ayahs.n: a large company of the former peoples

ayahs.t: And a few of the later peoples,
ayahs.n: and a few of the later peoples

ayahs.t: On thrones woven [with ornament],
ayahs.n: on thrones woven with ornament

ayahs.t: Reclining on them, facing each other.
ayahs.n: reclining on them facing each other

ayahs.t: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
ayahs.n: there will circulate among them young boys made eternal

ayahs.t: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -
ayahs.n: with vessels pitchers and a cup of wine from a flowing spring

ayahs.t: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -
ayahs.n: no headache will they have therefrom nor will they be intoxicated

ayahs.t: And fruit of what they select
ayahs.n: and fruit of what they select

ayahs.t: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
ayahs.n: and the meat of fowl from whatever they desire

ayahs.t: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
ayahs.n: and for them are fair women with large beautiful eyes

ayahs.t: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,
ayahs.n: the likenesses of pearls well protected

ayahs.t: As reward for what they used to do.
ayahs.n: as reward for what they used to do

ayahs.t: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
ayahs.n: they will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin

ayahs.t: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."
ayahs.n: only a saying peace peace

ayahs.t: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
ayahs.n: the companions of the right what are the companions of the right

ayahs.t: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
ayahs.n: they will be among lote trees with thorns removed

ayahs.t: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
ayahs.n: and banana trees layered with fruit

ayahs.t: And shade extended
ayahs.n: and shade extended

ayahs.t: And water poured out
ayahs.n: and water poured out

ayahs.t: And fruit, abundant [and varied],
ayahs.n: and fruit abundant and varied

ayahs.t: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,
ayahs.n: neither limited to season nor forbidden

ayahs.t: And [upon] beds raised high.
ayahs.n: and upon beds raised high

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
ayahs.n: indeed we have produced the women of paradise in a new creation

ayahs.t: And made them virgins,
ayahs.n: and made them virgins

ayahs.t: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,
ayahs.n: devoted to their husbands and of equal age

ayahs.t: For the companions of the right [who are]
ayahs.n: for the companions of the right who are

ayahs.t: A company of the former peoples
ayahs.n: a company of the former peoples

ayahs.t: And a company of the later peoples.
ayahs.n: and a company of the later peoples

ayahs.t: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
ayahs.n: and the companions of the left what are the companions of the left

ayahs.t: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
ayahs.n: they will be in scorching fire and scalding water

ayahs.t: And a shade of black smoke,
ayahs.n: and a shade of black smoke

ayahs.t: Neither cool nor beneficial.
ayahs.n: neither cool nor beneficial

ayahs.t: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
ayahs.n: indeed they were before that indulging in affluence

ayahs.t: And they used to persist in the great violation,
ayahs.n: and they used to persist in the great violation

ayahs.t: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
ayahs.n: and they used to say when we die and become dust and bones are we indeed to be resurrected

ayahs.t: And our forefathers [as well]?"
ayahs.n: and our forefathers as well

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
ayahs.n: say o muhammad indeed the former and the later peoples

ayahs.t: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
ayahs.n: are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known day

ayahs.t: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
ayahs.n: then indeed you o those astray who are deniers

ayahs.t: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
ayahs.n: will be eating from trees of zaqqum

ayahs.t: And filling with it your bellies
ayahs.n: and filling with it your bellies

ayahs.t: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
ayahs.n: and drinking on top of it from scalding water

ayahs.t: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.
ayahs.n: and will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels

ayahs.t: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.
ayahs.n: that is their accommodation on the day of recompense

ayahs.t: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
ayahs.n: we have created you so why do you not believe

ayahs.t: Have you seen that which you emit?
ayahs.n: have you seen that which you emit

ayahs.t: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
ayahs.n: is it you who creates it or are we the creator

ayahs.t: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
ayahs.n: we have decreed death among you and we are not to be outdone

ayahs.t: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
ayahs.n: in that we will change your likenesses and produce you in that form which you do not know

ayahs.t: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?
ayahs.n: and you have already known the first creation so will you not remember

ayahs.t: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
ayahs.n: and have you seen that seed which you sow

ayahs.t: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
ayahs.n: is it you who makes it grow or are we the grower

ayahs.t: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
ayahs.n: if we willed we could make it dry debris and you would remain in wonder

ayahs.t: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;
ayahs.n: saying indeed we are now in debt

ayahs.t: Rather, we have been deprived."
ayahs.n: rather we have been deprived

ayahs.t: And have you seen the water that you drink?
ayahs.n: and have you seen the water that you drink

ayahs.t: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
ayahs.n: is it you who brought it down from the clouds or is it we who bring it down

ayahs.t: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
ayahs.n: if we willed we could make it bitter so why are you not grateful

ayahs.t: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
ayahs.n: and have you seen the fire that you ignite

ayahs.t: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
ayahs.n: is it you who produced its tree or are we the producer

ayahs.t: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
ayahs.n: we have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers

ayahs.t: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
ayahs.n: so exalt the name of your lord the most great

ayahs.t: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,
ayahs.n: then i swear by the setting of the stars

ayahs.t: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.
ayahs.n: and indeed it is an oath if you could know most great

ayahs.t: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an
ayahs.n: indeed it is a noble quran

ayahs.t: In a Register well-protected;
ayahs.n: in a register well protected

ayahs.t: None touch it except the purified.
ayahs.n: none touch it except the purified

ayahs.t: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: it is a revelation from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
ayahs.n: then is it to this statement that you are indifferent

ayahs.t: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
ayahs.n: and make the thanks for your provision that you deny the provider

ayahs.t: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
ayahs.n: then why when the soul at death reaches the throat

ayahs.t: And you are at that time looking on -
ayahs.n: and you are at that time looking on

ayahs.t: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
ayahs.n: and our angels are nearer to him than you but you do not see

ayahs.t: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
ayahs.n: then why do you not if you are not to be recompensed

ayahs.t: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
ayahs.n: bring it back if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
ayahs.n: and if the deceased was of those brought near to allah

ayahs.t: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.
ayahs.n: then for him is rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure

ayahs.t: And if he was of the companions of the right,
ayahs.n: and if he was of the companions of the right

ayahs.t: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."
ayahs.n: then the angels will say peace for you you are from the companions of the right

ayahs.t: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
ayahs.n: but if he was of the deniers who were astray

ayahs.t: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
ayahs.n: then for him is accommodation of scalding water

ayahs.t: And burning in Hellfire
ayahs.n: and burning in hellfire

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is the true certainty,
ayahs.n: indeed this is the true certainty

ayahs.t: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
ayahs.n: so exalt the name of your lord the most great

ayahs.t: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts allah and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: his is the dominion of the heavens and earth he gives life and causes death and he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: he is the first and the last the ascendant and the intimate and he is of all things knowing

ayahs.t: It is He who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein; and He is with you wherever you are. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
ayahs.n: it is he who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established himself above the throne he knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein and he is with you wherever you are and allah of what you do is seeing

ayahs.t: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
ayahs.n: his is the dominion of the heavens and earth and to allah are returned all matters

ayahs.t: He causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night, and he is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: he causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and he is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward.
ayahs.n: believe in allah and his messenger and spend out of that in which he has made you successors for those who have believed among you and spent there will be a great reward

ayahs.t: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers?
ayahs.n: and why do you not believe in allah while the messenger invites you to believe in your lord and he has taken your covenant if you should truly be believers

ayahs.t: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful.
ayahs.n: it is he who sends down upon his servant muhammad verses of clear evidence that he may bring you out from darknesses into the light and indeed allah is to you kind and merciful

ayahs.t: And why do you not spend in the cause of Allah while to Allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth? Not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest [of Makkah] and fought [and those who did so after it]. Those are greater in degree than they who spent afterwards and fought. But to all Allah has promised the best [reward]. And Allah, with what you do, is Acquainted.
ayahs.n: and why do you not spend in the cause of allah while to allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest of makkah and fought and those who did so after it those are greater in degree than they who spent afterwards and fought but to all allah has promised the best reward and allah with what you do is acquainted

ayahs.t: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward?
ayahs.n: who is it that would loan allah a goodly loan so he will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward

ayahs.t: On the Day you see the believing men and believing women, their light proceeding before them and on their right, [it will be said], "Your good tidings today are [of] gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein you will abide eternally." That is what is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: on the day you see the believing men and believing women their light proceeding before them and on their right it will be said your good tidings today are of gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein you will abide eternally that is what is the great attainment

ayahs.t: On the [same] Day the hypocrite men and hypocrite women will say to those who believed, "Wait for us that we may acquire some of your light." It will be said, "Go back behind you and seek light." And a wall will be placed between them with a door, its interior containing mercy, but on the outside of it is torment.
ayahs.n: on the same day the hypocrite men and hypocrite women will say to those who believed wait for us that we may acquire some of your light it will be said go back behind you and seek light and a wall will be placed between them with a door its interior containing mercy but on the outside of it is torment

ayahs.t: The hypocrites will call to the believers, "Were we not with you?" They will say, "Yes, but you afflicted yourselves and awaited [misfortune for us] and doubted, and wishful thinking deluded you until there came the command of Allah. And the Deceiver deceived you concerning Allah.
ayahs.n: the hypocrites will call to the believers were we not with you they will say yes but you afflicted yourselves and awaited misfortune for us and doubted and wishful thinking deluded you until there came the command of allah and the deceiver deceived you concerning allah

ayahs.t: So today no ransom will be taken from you or from those who disbelieved. Your refuge is the Fire. It is most worthy of you, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: so today no ransom will be taken from you or from those who disbelieved your refuge is the fire it is most worthy of you and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah and what has come down of the truth? And let them not be like those who were given the Scripture before, and a long period passed over them, so their hearts hardened; and many of them are defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of allah and what has come down of the truth and let them not be like those who were given the scripture before and a long period passed over them so their hearts hardened and many of them are defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand.
ayahs.n: know that allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness we have made clear to you the signs perhaps you will understand

ayahs.t: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward.
ayahs.n: indeed the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and they who have loaned allah a goodly loan it will be multiplied for them and they will have a noble reward

ayahs.t: And those who have believed in Allah and His messengers - those are [in the ranks of] the supporters of truth and the martyrs, with their Lord. For them is their reward and their light. But those who have disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of Hellfire.
ayahs.n: and those who have believed in allah and his messengers those are in the ranks of the supporters of truth and the martyrs with their lord for them is their reward and their light but those who have disbelieved and denied our verses those are the companions of hellfire

ayahs.t: Know that the life of this world is but amusement and diversion and adornment and boasting to one another and competition in increase of wealth and children - like the example of a rain whose [resulting] plant growth pleases the tillers; then it dries and you see it turned yellow; then it becomes [scattered] debris. And in the Hereafter is severe punishment and forgiveness from Allah and approval. And what is the worldly life except the enjoyment of delusion.
ayahs.n: know that the life of this world is but amusement and diversion and adornment and boasting to one another and competition in increase of wealth and children like the example of a rain whose resulting plant growth pleases the tillers then it dries and you see it turned yellow then it becomes scattered debris and in the hereafter is severe punishment and forgiveness from allah and approval and what is the worldly life except the enjoyment of delusion

ayahs.t: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
ayahs.n: race toward forgiveness from your lord and a garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth prepared for those who believed in allah and his messengers that is the bounty of allah which he gives to whom he wills and allah is the possessor of great bounty

ayahs.t: No disaster strikes upon the earth or among yourselves except that it is in a register before We bring it into being - indeed that, for Allah, is easy -
ayahs.n: no disaster strikes upon the earth or among yourselves except that it is in a register before we bring it into being indeed that for allah is easy

ayahs.t: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful -
ayahs.n: in order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult in pride over what he has given you and allah does not like everyone self deluded and boastful

ayahs.t: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: those who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess and whoever turns away then indeed allah is the free of need the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: We have already sent Our messengers with clear evidences and sent down with them the Scripture and the balance that the people may maintain [their affairs] in justice. And We sent down iron, wherein is great military might and benefits for the people, and so that Allah may make evident those who support Him and His messengers unseen. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: we have already sent our messengers with clear evidences and sent down with them the scripture and the balance that the people may maintain their affairs in justice and we sent down iron wherein is great military might and benefits for the people and so that allah may make evident those who support him and his messengers unseen indeed allah is powerful and exalted in might

ayahs.t: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: and we have already sent noah and abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture and among them is he who is guided but many of them are defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Then We sent following their footsteps Our messengers and followed [them] with Jesus, the son of Mary, and gave him the Gospel. And We placed in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy and monasticism, which they innovated; We did not prescribe it for them except [that they did so] seeking the approval of Allah. But they did not observe it with due observance. So We gave the ones who believed among them their reward, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: then we sent following their footsteps our messengers and followed them with jesus the son of mary and gave him the gospel and we placed in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy and monasticism which they innovated we did not prescribe it for them except that they did so seeking the approval of allah but they did not observe it with due observance so we gave the ones who believed among them their reward but many of them are defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed fear allah and believe in his messenger he will then give you a double portion of his mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you and allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
ayahs.n: this is so that the people of the scripture may know that they are not able to obtain anything from the bounty of allah and that all bounty is in the hand of allah he gives it to whom he wills and allah is the possessor of great bounty

ayahs.t: Certainly has Allah heard the speech of the one who argues with you, [O Muhammad], concerning her husband and directs her complaint to Allah. And Allah hears your dialogue; indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing.
ayahs.n: certainly has allah heard the speech of the one who argues with you o muhammad concerning her husband and directs her complaint to allah and allah hears your dialogue indeed allah is hearing and seeing

ayahs.t: Those who pronounce thihar among you [to separate] from their wives - they are not [consequently] their mothers. Their mothers are none but those who gave birth to them. And indeed, they are saying an objectionable statement and a falsehood. But indeed, Allah is Pardoning and Forgiving.
ayahs.n: those who pronounce thihar among you to separate from their wives they are not consequently their mothers their mothers are none but those who gave birth to them and indeed they are saying an objectionable statement and a falsehood but indeed allah is pardoning and forgiving

ayahs.t: And those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then [wish to] go back on what they said - then [there must be] the freeing of a slave before they touch one another. That is what you are admonished thereby; and Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: and those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then wish to go back on what they said then there must be the freeing of a slave before they touch one another that is what you are admonished thereby and allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: And he who does not find [a slave] - then a fast for two months consecutively before they touch one another; and he who is unable - then the feeding of sixty poor persons. That is for you to believe [completely] in Allah and His Messenger; and those are the limits [set by] Allah. And for the disbelievers is a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: and he who does not find a slave then a fast for two months consecutively before they touch one another and he who is unable then the feeding of sixty poor persons that is for you to believe completely in allah and his messenger and those are the limits set by allah and for the disbelievers is a painful punishment

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger are abased as those before them were abased. And We have certainly sent down verses of clear evidence. And for the disbelievers is a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: indeed those who oppose allah and his messenger are abased as those before them were abased and we have certainly sent down verses of clear evidence and for the disbelievers is a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all and inform them of what they did. Allah had enumerated it, while they forgot it; and Allah is, over all things, Witness.
ayahs.n: on the day when allah will resurrect them all and inform them of what they did allah had enumerated it while they forgot it and allah is over all things witness

ayahs.t: Have you not considered that Allah knows what is in the heavens and what is on the earth? There is in no private conversation three but that He is the fourth of them, nor are there five but that He is the sixth of them - and no less than that and no more except that He is with them [in knowledge] wherever they are. Then He will inform them of what they did, on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allah is, of all things, Knowing.
ayahs.n: have you not considered that allah knows what is in the heavens and what is on the earth there is in no private conversation three but that he is the fourth of them nor are there five but that he is the sixth of them and no less than that and no more except that he is with them in knowledge wherever they are then he will inform them of what they did on the day of resurrection indeed allah is of all things knowing

ayahs.t: Have you not considered those who were forbidden from private conversation, then they return to that which they were forbidden and converse among themselves about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger? And when they come to you, they greet you with that [word] by which Allah does not greet you and say among themselves, "Why does Allah not punish us for what we say?" Sufficient for them is Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: have you not considered those who were forbidden from private conversation then they return to that which they were forbidden and converse among themselves about sin and aggression and disobedience to the messenger and when they come to you they greet you with that word by which allah does not greet you and say among themselves why does allah not punish us for what we say sufficient for them is hell which they will enter to burn and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when you converse privately do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the messenger but converse about righteousness and piety and fear allah to whom you will be gathered

ayahs.t: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
ayahs.n: private conversation is only from satan that he may grieve those who have believed but he will not harm them at all except by permission of allah and upon allah let the believers rely

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, when you are told, "Space yourselves" in assemblies, then make space; Allah will make space for you. And when you are told, "Arise," then arise; Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when you are told space yourselves in assemblies then make space allah will make space for you and when you are told arise then arise allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge by degrees and allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when you wish to privately consult the messenger present before your consultation a charity that is better for you and purer but if you find not the means then indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Have you feared to present before your consultation charities? Then when you do not and Allah has forgiven you, then [at least] establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: have you feared to present before your consultation charities then when you do not and allah has forgiven you then at least establish prayer and give zakah and obey allah and his messenger and allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: Have you not considered those who make allies of a people with whom Allah has become angry? They are neither of you nor of them, and they swear to untruth while they know [they are lying].
ayahs.n: have you not considered those who make allies of a people with whom allah has become angry they are neither of you nor of them and they swear to untruth while they know they are lying

ayahs.t: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment. Indeed, it was evil that they were doing.
ayahs.n: allah has prepared for them a severe punishment indeed it was evil that they were doing

ayahs.t: They took their [false] oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah, and for them is a humiliating punishment.
ayahs.n: they took their false oaths as a cover so they averted people from the way of allah and for them is a humiliating punishment

ayahs.t: Never will their wealth or their children avail them against Allah at all. Those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally
ayahs.n: never will their wealth or their children avail them against allah at all those are the companions of the fire they will abide therein eternally

ayahs.t: On the Day Allah will resurrect them all, and they will swear to Him as they swear to you and think that they are [standing] on something. Unquestionably, it is they who are the liars.
ayahs.n: on the day allah will resurrect them all and they will swear to him as they swear to you and think that they are standing on something unquestionably it is they who are the liars

ayahs.t: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.
ayahs.n: satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of allah those are the party of satan unquestionably the party of satan they will be the losers

ayahs.t: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled.
ayahs.n: indeed the ones who oppose allah and his messenger those will be among the most humbled

ayahs.t: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
ayahs.n: allah has written i will surely overcome i and my messengers indeed allah is powerful and exalted in might

ayahs.t: You will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day having affection for those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. Those - He has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from Him. And We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him - those are the party of Allah. Unquestionably, the party of Allah - they are the successful.
ayahs.n: you will not find a people who believe in allah and the last day having affection for those who oppose allah and his messenger even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred those he has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from him and we will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein they abide eternally allah is pleased with them and they are pleased with him those are the party of allah unquestionably the party of allah they are the successful

ayahs.t: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts allah and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: It is He who expelled the ones who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first gathering. You did not think they would leave, and they thought that their fortresses would protect them from Allah; but [the decree of] Allah came upon them from where they had not expected, and He cast terror into their hearts [so] they destroyed their houses by their [own] hands and the hands of the believers. So take warning, O people of vision.
ayahs.n: it is he who expelled the ones who disbelieved among the people of the scripture from their homes at the first gathering you did not think they would leave and they thought that their fortresses would protect them from allah but the decree of allah came upon them from where they had not expected and he cast terror into their hearts so they destroyed their houses by their own hands and the hands of the believers so take warning o people of vision

ayahs.t: And if not that Allah had decreed for them evacuation, He would have punished them in [this] world, and for them in the Hereafter is the punishment of the Fire.
ayahs.n: and if not that allah had decreed for them evacuation he would have punished them in this world and for them in the hereafter is the punishment of the fire

ayahs.t: That is because they opposed Allah and His Messenger. And whoever opposes Allah - then indeed, Allah is severe in penalty.
ayahs.n: that is because they opposed allah and his messenger and whoever opposes allah then indeed allah is severe in penalty

ayahs.t: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: whatever you have cut down of their palm trees or left standing on their trunks it was by permission of allah and so he would disgrace the defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: and what allah restored of property to his messenger from them you did not spur for it in an expedition any horses or camels but allah gives his messengers power over whom he wills and allah is over all things competent

ayahs.t: And what Allah restored to His Messenger from the people of the towns - it is for Allah and for the Messenger and for [his] near relatives and orphans and the [stranded] traveler - so that it will not be a perpetual distribution among the rich from among you. And whatever the Messenger has given you - take; and what he has forbidden you - refrain from. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is severe in penalty.
ayahs.n: and what allah restored to his messenger from the people of the towns it is for allah and for the messenger and for his near relatives and orphans and the stranded traveler so that it will not be a perpetual distribution among the rich from among you and whatever the messenger has given you take and what he has forbidden you refrain from and fear allah indeed allah is severe in penalty

ayahs.t: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful.
ayahs.n: for the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties seeking bounty from allah and his approval and supporting allah and his messenger there is also a share those are the truthful

ayahs.t: And [also for] those who were settled in al-Madinah and [adopted] the faith before them. They love those who emigrated to them and find not any want in their breasts of what the emigrants were given but give [them] preference over themselves, even though they are in privation. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.
ayahs.n: and also for those who were settled in al madinah and adopted the faith before them they love those who emigrated to them and find not any want in their breasts of what the emigrants were given but give them preference over themselves even though they are in privation and whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul it is those who will be the successful

ayahs.t: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful."
ayahs.n: and there is a share for those who came after them saying our lord forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts any resentment toward those who have believed our lord indeed you are kind and merciful

ayahs.t: Have you not considered those who practice hypocrisy, saying to their brothers who have disbelieved among the People of the Scripture, "If you are expelled, we will surely leave with you, and we will not obey, in regard to you, anyone - ever; and if you are fought, we will surely aid you." But Allah testifies that they are liars.
ayahs.n: have you not considered those who practice hypocrisy saying to their brothers who have disbelieved among the people of the scripture if you are expelled we will surely leave with you and we will not obey in regard to you anyone ever and if you are fought we will surely aid you but allah testifies that they are liars

ayahs.t: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided.
ayahs.n: if they are expelled they will not leave with them and if they are fought they will not aid them and even if they should aid them they will surely turn their backs then thereafter they will not be aided

ayahs.t: You [believers] are more fearful within their breasts than Allah. That is because they are a people who do not understand.
ayahs.n: you believers are more fearful within their breasts than allah that is because they are a people who do not understand

ayahs.t: They will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls. Their violence among themselves is severe. You think they are together, but their hearts are diverse. That is because they are a people who do not reason.
ayahs.n: they will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls their violence among themselves is severe you think they are together but their hearts are diverse that is because they are a people who do not reason

ayahs.t: [Theirs is] like the example of those shortly before them: they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: theirs is like the example of those shortly before them they tasted the bad consequence of their affair and they will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: [The hypocrites are] like the example of Satan when he says to man, "Disbelieve." But when he disbelieves, he says, "Indeed, I am disassociated from you. Indeed, I fear Allah, Lord of the worlds."
ayahs.n: the hypocrites are like the example of satan when he says to man disbelieve but when he disbelieves he says indeed i am disassociated from you indeed i fear allah lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: So the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the Fire, abiding eternally therein. And that is the recompense of the wrong-doers.
ayahs.n: so the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the fire abiding eternally therein and that is the recompense of the wrong doers

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed fear allah and let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow and fear allah indeed allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient.
ayahs.n: and be not like those who forgot allah so he made them forget themselves those are the defiantly disobedient

ayahs.t: Not equal are the companions of the Fire and the companions of Paradise. The companions of Paradise - they are the attainers [of success].
ayahs.n: not equal are the companions of the fire and the companions of paradise the companions of paradise they are the attainers of success

ayahs.t: If We had sent down this Qur'an upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of Allah. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought.
ayahs.n: if we had sent down this quran upon a mountain you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of allah and these examples we present to the people that perhaps they will give thought

ayahs.t: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
ayahs.n: he is allah other than whom there is no deity knower of the unseen and the witnessed he is the entirely merciful the especially merciful

ayahs.t: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
ayahs.n: he is allah other than whom there is no deity the sovereign the pure the perfection the bestower of faith the overseer the exalted in might the compeller the superior exalted is allah above whatever they associate with him

ayahs.t: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: he is allah the creator the inventor the fashioner to him belong the best names whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting him and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, do not take My enemies and your enemies as allies, extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth, having driven out the Prophet and yourselves [only] because you believe in Allah, your Lord. If you have come out for jihad in My cause and seeking means to My approval, [take them not as friends]. You confide to them affection, but I am most knowing of what you have concealed and what you have declared. And whoever does it among you has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed do not take my enemies and your enemies as allies extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth having driven out the prophet and yourselves only because you believe in allah your lord if you have come out for jihad in my cause and seeking means to my approval take them not as friends you confide to them affection but i am most knowing of what you have concealed and what you have declared and whoever does it among you has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way

ayahs.t: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve.
ayahs.n: if they gain dominance over you they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil and they wish you would disbelieve

ayahs.t: Never will your relatives or your children benefit you; the Day of Resurrection He will judge between you. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
ayahs.n: never will your relatives or your children benefit you the day of resurrection he will judge between you and allah of what you do is seeing

ayahs.t: There has already been for you an excellent pattern in Abraham and those with him, when they said to their people, "Indeed, we are disassociated from you and from whatever you worship other than Allah. We have denied you, and there has appeared between us and you animosity and hatred forever until you believe in Allah alone" except for the saying of Abraham to his father, "I will surely ask forgiveness for you, but I have not [power to do] for you anything against Allah. Our Lord, upon You we have relied, and to You we have returned, and to You is the destination.
ayahs.n: there has already been for you an excellent pattern in abraham and those with him when they said to their people indeed we are disassociated from you and from whatever you worship other than allah we have denied you and there has appeared between us and you animosity and hatred forever until you believe in allah alone except for the saying of abraham to his father i will surely ask forgiveness for you but i have not power to do for you anything against allah our lord upon you we have relied and to you we have returned and to you is the destination

ayahs.t: Our Lord, make us not [objects of] torment for the disbelievers and forgive us, our Lord. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
ayahs.n: our lord make us not objects of torment for the disbelievers and forgive us our lord indeed it is you who is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: There has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: there has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in allah and the last day and whoever turns away then indeed allah is the free of need the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: perhaps allah will put between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them affection and allah is competent and allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.
ayahs.n: allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them indeed allah loves those who act justly

ayahs.t: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion forbids that you make allies of them and whoever makes allies of them then it is those who are the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, when the believing women come to you as emigrants, examine them. Allah is most knowing as to their faith. And if you know them to be believers, then do not return them to the disbelievers; they are not lawful [wives] for them, nor are they lawful [husbands] for them. But give the disbelievers what they have spent. And there is no blame upon you if you marry them when you have given them their due compensation. And hold not to marriage bonds with disbelieving women, but ask for what you have spent and let them ask for what they have spent. That is the judgement of Allah; He judges between you. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when the believing women come to you as emigrants examine them allah is most knowing as to their faith and if you know them to be believers then do not return them to the disbelievers they are not lawful wives for them nor are they lawful husbands for them but give the disbelievers what they have spent and there is no blame upon you if you marry them when you have given them their due compensation and hold not to marriage bonds with disbelieving women but ask for what you have spent and let them ask for what they have spent that is the judgement of allah he judges between you and allah is knowing and wise

ayahs.t: And if you have lost any of your wives to the disbelievers and you subsequently obtain [something], then give those whose wives have gone the equivalent of what they had spent. And fear Allah, in whom you are believers.
ayahs.n: and if you have lost any of your wives to the disbelievers and you subsequently obtain something then give those whose wives have gone the equivalent of what they had spent and fear allah in whom you are believers

ayahs.t: O Prophet, when the believing women come to you pledging to you that they will not associate anything with Allah, nor will they steal, nor will they commit unlawful sexual intercourse, nor will they kill their children, nor will they bring forth a slander they have invented between their arms and legs, nor will they disobey you in what is right - then accept their pledge and ask forgiveness for them of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o prophet when the believing women come to you pledging to you that they will not associate anything with allah nor will they steal nor will they commit unlawful sexual intercourse nor will they kill their children nor will they bring forth a slander they have invented between their arms and legs nor will they disobey you in what is right then accept their pledge and ask forgiveness for them of allah indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, do not make allies of a people with whom Allah has become angry. They have despaired of [reward in] the Hereafter just as the disbelievers have despaired of [meeting] the inhabitants of the graves.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed do not make allies of a people with whom allah has become angry they have despaired of reward in the hereafter just as the disbelievers have despaired of meeting the inhabitants of the graves

ayahs.t: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts allah and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?
ayahs.n: o you who have believed why do you say what you do not do

ayahs.t: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do.
ayahs.n: great is hatred in the sight of allah that you say what you do not do

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.
ayahs.n: indeed allah loves those who fight in his cause in a row as though they are a single structure joined firmly

ayahs.t: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Moses said to his people, "O my people, why do you harm me while you certainly know that I am the messenger of Allah to you?" And when they deviated, Allah caused their hearts to deviate. And Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
ayahs.n: and mention o muhammad when moses said to his people o my people why do you harm me while you certainly know that i am the messenger of allah to you and when they deviated allah caused their hearts to deviate and allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people

ayahs.t: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, "O children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allah to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Ahmad." But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, "This is obvious magic."
ayahs.n: and mention when jesus the son of mary said o children of israel indeed i am the messenger of allah to you confirming what came before me of the torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me whose name is ahmad but when he came to them with clear evidences they said this is obvious magic

ayahs.t: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
ayahs.n: and who is more unjust than one who invents about allah untruth while he is being invited to islam and allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: They want to extinguish the light of Allah with their mouths, but Allah will perfect His light, although the disbelievers dislike it.
ayahs.n: they want to extinguish the light of allah with their mouths but allah will perfect his light although the disbelievers dislike it

ayahs.t: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allah dislike it.
ayahs.n: it is he who sent his messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion although those who associate others with allah dislike it

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, shall I guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment?
ayahs.n: o you who have believed shall i guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment

ayahs.t: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know.
ayahs.n: it is that you believe in allah and his messenger and strive in the cause of allah with your wealth and your lives that is best for you if you should know

ayahs.t: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: he will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.
ayahs.n: and you will obtain another favor that you love victory from allah and an imminent conquest and give good tidings to the believers

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, be supporters of Allah, as when Jesus, the son of Mary, said to the disciples, "Who are my supporters for Allah?" The disciples said, "We are supporters of Allah." And a faction of the Children of Israel believed and a faction disbelieved. So We supported those who believed against their enemy, and they became dominant.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed be supporters of allah as when jesus the son of mary said to the disciples who are my supporters for allah the disciples said we are supporters of allah and a faction of the children of israel believed and a faction disbelieved so we supported those who believed against their enemy and they became dominant

ayahs.t: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting allah the sovereign the pure the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: It is He who has sent among the unlettered a Messenger from themselves reciting to them His verses and purifying them and teaching them the Book and wisdom - although they were before in clear error -
ayahs.n: it is he who has sent among the unlettered a messenger from themselves reciting to them his verses and purifying them and teaching them the book and wisdom although they were before in clear error

ayahs.t: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: and to others of them who have not yet joined them and he is the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
