ayahs.n: that is the bounty of allah which he gives to whom he wills and allah is the possessor of great bounty

ayahs.t: The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes [of books]. Wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of Allah. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
ayahs.n: the example of those who were entrusted with the torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes of books wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of allah and allah does not guide the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."
ayahs.n: say o you who are jews if you claim that you are allies of allah excluding the other people then wish for death if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: But they will not wish for it, ever, because of what their hands have put forth. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers.
ayahs.n: but they will not wish for it ever because of what their hands have put forth and allah is knowing of the wrongdoers

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, the death from which you flee - indeed, it will meet you. Then you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you about what you used to do."
ayahs.n: say indeed the death from which you flee indeed it will meet you then you will be returned to the knower of the unseen and the witnessed and he will inform you about what you used to do

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, when [the adhan] is called for the prayer on the day of Jumu'ah [Friday], then proceed to the remembrance of Allah and leave trade. That is better for you, if you only knew.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed when the adhan is called for the prayer on the day of jumuah friday then proceed to the remembrance of allah and leave trade that is better for you if you only knew

ayahs.t: And when the prayer has been concluded, disperse within the land and seek from the bounty of Allah, and remember Allah often that you may succeed.
ayahs.n: and when the prayer has been concluded disperse within the land and seek from the bounty of allah and remember allah often that you may succeed

ayahs.t: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers."
ayahs.n: but when they saw a transaction or a diversion o muhammad they rushed to it and left you standing say what is with allah is better than diversion and than a transaction and allah is the best of providers

ayahs.t: When the hypocrites come to you, [O Muhammad], they say, "We testify that you are the Messenger of Allah." And Allah knows that you are His Messenger, and Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars.
ayahs.n: when the hypocrites come to you o muhammad they say we testify that you are the messenger of allah and allah knows that you are his messenger and allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars

ayahs.t: They have taken their oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah. Indeed, it was evil that they were doing.
ayahs.n: they have taken their oaths as a cover so they averted people from the way of allah indeed it was evil that they were doing

ayahs.t: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand.
ayahs.n: that is because they believed and then they disbelieved so their hearts were sealed over and they do not understand

ayahs.t: And when you see them, their forms please you, and if they speak, you listen to their speech. [They are] as if they were pieces of wood propped up - they think that every shout is against them. They are the enemy, so beware of them. May Allah destroy them; how are they deluded?
ayahs.n: and when you see them their forms please you and if they speak you listen to their speech they are as if they were pieces of wood propped up they think that every shout is against them they are the enemy so beware of them may allah destroy them how are they deluded

ayahs.t: And when it is said to them, "Come, the Messenger of Allah will ask forgiveness for you," they turn their heads aside and you see them evading while they are arrogant.
ayahs.n: and when it is said to them come the messenger of allah will ask forgiveness for you they turn their heads aside and you see them evading while they are arrogant

ayahs.t: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
ayahs.n: it is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them never will allah forgive them indeed allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people

ayahs.t: They are the ones who say, "Do not spend on those who are with the Messenger of Allah until they disband." And to Allah belongs the depositories of the heavens and the earth, but the hypocrites do not understand.
ayahs.n: they are the ones who say do not spend on those who are with the messenger of allah until they disband and to allah belongs the depositories of the heavens and the earth but the hypocrites do not understand

ayahs.t: They say, "If we return to al-Madinah, the more honored [for power] will surely expel therefrom the more humble." And to Allah belongs [all] honor, and to His Messenger, and to the believers, but the hypocrites do not know.
ayahs.n: they say if we return to al madinah the more honored for power will surely expel therefrom the more humble and to allah belongs all honor and to his messenger and to the believers but the hypocrites do not know

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of allah and whoever does that then those are the losers

ayahs.t: And spend [in the way of Allah] from what We have provided you before death approaches one of you and he says, "My Lord, if only You would delay me for a brief term so I would give charity and be among the righteous."
ayahs.n: and spend in the way of allah from what we have provided you before death approaches one of you and he says my lord if only you would delay me for a brief term so i would give charity and be among the righteous

ayahs.t: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: but never will allah delay a soul when its time has come and allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent.
ayahs.n: whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting allah to him belongs dominion and to him belongs all praise and he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
ayahs.n: it is he who created you and among you is the disbeliever and among you is the believer and allah of what you do is seeing

ayahs.t: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination.
ayahs.n: he created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms and to him is the final destination

ayahs.t: He knows what is within the heavens and earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare. And Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: he knows what is within the heavens and earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare and allah is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: Has there not come to you the news of those who disbelieved before? So they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: has there not come to you the news of those who disbelieved before so they tasted the bad consequence of their affair and they will have a painful punishment

ayahs.t: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.
ayahs.n: that is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences but they said shall human beings guide us and disbelieved and turned away and allah dispensed with them and allah is free of need and praiseworthy

ayahs.t: Those who disbelieve have claimed that they will never be resurrected. Say, "Yes, by my Lord, you will surely be resurrected; then you will surely be informed of what you did. And that, for Allah, is easy."
ayahs.n: those who disbelieve have claimed that they will never be resurrected say yes by my lord you will surely be resurrected then you will surely be informed of what you did and that for allah is easy

ayahs.t: So believe in Allah and His Messenger and the Qur'an which We have sent down. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
ayahs.n: so believe in allah and his messenger and the quran which we have sent down and allah is acquainted with what you do

ayahs.t: The Day He will assemble you for the Day of Assembly - that is the Day of Deprivation. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: the day he will assemble you for the day of assembly that is the day of deprivation and whoever believes in allah and does righteousness he will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow wherein they will abide forever that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: But the ones who disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of the Fire, abiding eternally therein; and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: but the ones who disbelieved and denied our verses those are the companions of the fire abiding eternally therein and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah. And whoever believes in Allah - He will guide his heart. And Allah is Knowing of all things.
ayahs.n: no disaster strikes except by permission of allah and whoever believes in allah he will guide his heart and allah is knowing of all things

ayahs.t: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification.
ayahs.n: and obey allah and obey the messenger but if you turn away then upon our messenger is only the duty of clear notification

ayahs.t: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
ayahs.n: allah there is no deity except him and upon allah let the believers rely

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, indeed, among your wives and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed indeed among your wives and your children are enemies to you so beware of them but if you pardon and overlook and forgive then indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.
ayahs.n: your wealth and your children are but a trial and allah has with him a great reward

ayahs.t: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.
ayahs.n: so fear allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend in the way of allah it is better for your selves and whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul it is those who will be the successful

ayahs.t: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing.
ayahs.n: if you loan allah a goodly loan he will multiply it for you and forgive you and allah is most appreciative and forbearing

ayahs.t: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
ayahs.n: knower of the unseen and the witnessed the exalted in might the wise

ayahs.t: O Prophet, when you [Muslims] divorce women, divorce them for [the commencement of] their waiting period and keep count of the waiting period, and fear Allah, your Lord. Do not turn them out of their [husbands'] houses, nor should they [themselves] leave [during that period] unless they are committing a clear immorality. And those are the limits [set by] Allah. And whoever transgresses the limits of Allah has certainly wronged himself. You know not; perhaps Allah will bring about after that a [different] matter.
ayahs.n: o prophet when you muslims divorce women divorce them for the commencement of their waiting period and keep count of the waiting period and fear allah your lord do not turn them out of their husbands houses nor should they themselves leave during that period unless they are committing a clear immorality and those are the limits set by allah and whoever transgresses the limits of allah has certainly wronged himself you know not perhaps allah will bring about after that a different matter

ayahs.t: And when they have [nearly] fulfilled their term, either retain them according to acceptable terms or part with them according to acceptable terms. And bring to witness two just men from among you and establish the testimony for [the acceptance of] Allah. That is instructed to whoever should believe in Allah and the Last day. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him a way out
ayahs.n: and when they have nearly fulfilled their term either retain them according to acceptable terms or part with them according to acceptable terms and bring to witness two just men from among you and establish the testimony for the acceptance of allah that is instructed to whoever should believe in allah and the last day and whoever fears allah he will make for him a way out

ayahs.t: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent.
ayahs.n: and will provide for him from where he does not expect and whoever relies upon allah then he is sufficient for him indeed allah will accomplish his purpose allah has already set for everything a decreed extent

ayahs.t: And those who no longer expect menstruation among your women - if you doubt, then their period is three months, and [also for] those who have not menstruated. And for those who are pregnant, their term is until they give birth. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him of his matter ease.
ayahs.n: and those who no longer expect menstruation among your women if you doubt then their period is three months and also for those who have not menstruated and for those who are pregnant their term is until they give birth and whoever fears allah he will make for him of his matter ease

ayahs.t: That is the command of Allah, which He has sent down to you; and whoever fears Allah - He will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward.
ayahs.n: that is the command of allah which he has sent down to you and whoever fears allah he will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward

ayahs.t: Lodge them [in a section] of where you dwell out of your means and do not harm them in order to oppress them. And if they should be pregnant, then spend on them until they give birth. And if they breastfeed for you, then give them their payment and confer among yourselves in the acceptable way; but if you are in discord, then there may breastfeed for the father another woman.
ayahs.n: lodge them in a section of where you dwell out of your means and do not harm them in order to oppress them and if they should be pregnant then spend on them until they give birth and if they breastfeed for you then give them their payment and confer among yourselves in the acceptable way but if you are in discord then there may breastfeed for the father another woman

ayahs.t: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.
ayahs.n: let a man of wealth spend from his wealth and he whose provision is restricted let him spend from what allah has given him allah does not charge a soul except according to what he has given it allah will bring about after hardship ease

ayahs.t: And how many a city was insolent toward the command of its Lord and His messengers, so We took it to severe account and punished it with a terrible punishment.
ayahs.n: and how many a city was insolent toward the command of its lord and his messengers so we took it to severe account and punished it with a terrible punishment

ayahs.t: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.
ayahs.n: and it tasted the bad consequence of its affair and the outcome of its affair was loss

ayahs.t: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment; so fear Allah, O you of understanding who have believed. Allah has sent down to you the Qur'an.
ayahs.n: allah has prepared for them a severe punishment so fear allah o you of understanding who have believed allah has sent down to you the quran

ayahs.t: [He sent] a Messenger [Muhammad] reciting to you the distinct verses of Allah that He may bring out those who believe and do righteous deeds from darknesses into the light. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will admit him into gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein forever. Allah will have perfected for him a provision.
ayahs.n: he sent a messenger muhammad reciting to you the distinct verses of allah that he may bring out those who believe and do righteous deeds from darknesses into the light and whoever believes in allah and does righteousness he will admit him into gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein forever allah will have perfected for him a provision

ayahs.t: It is Allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth, the like of them. [His] command descends among them so you may know that Allah is over all things competent and that Allah has encompassed all things in knowledge.
ayahs.n: it is allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth the like of them his command descends among them so you may know that allah is over all things competent and that allah has encompassed all things in knowledge

ayahs.t: O Prophet, why do you prohibit [yourself from] what Allah has made lawful for you, seeking the approval of your wives? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: o prophet why do you prohibit yourself from what allah has made lawful for you seeking the approval of your wives and allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: Allah has already ordained for you [Muslims] the dissolution of your oaths. And Allah is your protector, and He is the Knowing, the Wise.
ayahs.n: allah has already ordained for you muslims the dissolution of your oaths and allah is your protector and he is the knowing the wise

ayahs.t: And [remember] when the Prophet confided to one of his wives a statement; and when she informed [another] of it and Allah showed it to him, he made known part of it and ignored a part. And when he informed her about it, she said, "Who told you this?" He said, "I was informed by the Knowing, the Acquainted."
ayahs.n: and remember when the prophet confided to one of his wives a statement and when she informed another of it and allah showed it to him he made known part of it and ignored a part and when he informed her about it she said who told you this he said i was informed by the knowing the acquainted

ayahs.t: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants.
ayahs.n: if you two wives repent to allah it is best for your hearts have deviated but if you cooperate against him then indeed allah is his protector and gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels moreover are his assistants

ayahs.t: Perhaps his Lord, if he divorced you [all], would substitute for him wives better than you - submitting [to Allah], believing, devoutly obedient, repentant, worshipping, and traveling - [ones] previously married and virgins.
ayahs.n: perhaps his lord if he divorced you all would substitute for him wives better than you submitting to allah believing devoutly obedient repentant worshipping and traveling ones previously married and virgins

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.
ayahs.n: o you who have believed protect yourselves and your families from a fire whose fuel is people and stones over which are appointed angels harsh and severe they do not disobey allah in what he commands them but do what they are commanded

ayahs.t: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do.
ayahs.n: o you who have disbelieved make no excuses that day you will only be recompensed for what you used to do

ayahs.t: O you who have believed, repent to Allah with sincere repentance. Perhaps your Lord will remove from you your misdeeds and admit you into gardens beneath which rivers flow [on] the Day when Allah will not disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. Their light will proceed before them and on their right; they will say, "Our Lord, perfect for us our light and forgive us. Indeed, You are over all things competent."
ayahs.n: o you who have believed repent to allah with sincere repentance perhaps your lord will remove from you your misdeeds and admit you into gardens beneath which rivers flow on the day when allah will not disgrace the prophet and those who believed with him their light will proceed before them and on their right they will say our lord perfect for us our light and forgive us indeed you are over all things competent

ayahs.t: O Prophet, strive against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them. And their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: o prophet strive against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them and their refuge is hell and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: Allah presents an example of those who disbelieved: the wife of Noah and the wife of Lot. They were under two of Our righteous servants but betrayed them, so those prophets did not avail them from Allah at all, and it was said, "Enter the Fire with those who enter."
ayahs.n: allah presents an example of those who disbelieved the wife of noah and the wife of lot they were under two of our righteous servants but betrayed them so those prophets did not avail them from allah at all and it was said enter the fire with those who enter

ayahs.t: And Allah presents an example of those who believed: the wife of Pharaoh, when she said, "My Lord, build for me near You a house in Paradise and save me from Pharaoh and his deeds and save me from the wrongdoing people."
ayahs.n: and allah presents an example of those who believed the wife of pharaoh when she said my lord build for me near you a house in paradise and save me from pharaoh and his deeds and save me from the wrongdoing people

ayahs.t: And [the example of] Mary, the daughter of 'Imran, who guarded her chastity, so We blew into [her garment] through Our angel, and she believed in the words of her Lord and His scriptures and was of the devoutly obedient.
ayahs.n: and the example of mary the daughter of imran who guarded her chastity so we blew into her garment through our angel and she believed in the words of her lord and his scriptures and was of the devoutly obedient

ayahs.t: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -
ayahs.n: blessed is he in whose hand is dominion and he is over all things competent

ayahs.t: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -
ayahs.n: he who created death and life to test you as to which of you is best in deed and he is the exalted in might the forgiving

ayahs.t: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?
ayahs.n: and who created seven heavens in layers you do not see in the creation of the most merciful any inconsistency so return your vision to the sky do you see any breaks

ayahs.t: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.
ayahs.n: then return your vision twice again your vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued

ayahs.t: And We have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with stars and have made [from] them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze.
ayahs.n: and we have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with stars and have made from them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the blaze

ayahs.t: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.n: and for those who disbelieved in their lord is the punishment of hell and wretched is the destination

ayahs.t: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.
ayahs.n: when they are thrown into it they hear from it a dreadful inhaling while it boils up

ayahs.t: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"
ayahs.n: it almost bursts with rage every time a company is thrown into it its keepers ask them did there not come to you a warner

ayahs.t: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, 'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.'"
ayahs.n: they will say yes a warner had come to us but we denied and said allah has not sent down anything you are not but in great error

ayahs.t: And they will say, "If only we had been listening or reasoning, we would not be among the companions of the Blaze."
ayahs.n: and they will say if only we had been listening or reasoning we would not be among the companions of the blaze

ayahs.t: And they will admit their sin, so [it is] alienation for the companions of the Blaze.
ayahs.n: and they will admit their sin so it is alienation for the companions of the blaze

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.
ayahs.n: indeed those who fear their lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward

ayahs.t: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.n: and conceal your speech or publicize it indeed he is knowing of that within the breasts

ayahs.t: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?
ayahs.n: does he who created not know while he is the subtle the acquainted

ayahs.t: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
ayahs.n: it is he who made the earth tame for you so walk among its slopes and eat of his provision and to him is the resurrection

ayahs.t: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?
ayahs.n: do you feel secure that he who holds authority in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway

ayahs.t: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.
ayahs.n: or do you feel secure that he who holds authority in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones then you would know how severe was my warning

ayahs.t: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
ayahs.n: and already had those before them denied and how terrible was my reproach

ayahs.t: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.
ayahs.n: do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and sometimes folded in none holds them aloft except the most merciful indeed he is of all things seeing

ayahs.t: Or who is it that could be an army for you to aid you other than the Most Merciful? The disbelievers are not but in delusion.
ayahs.n: or who is it that could be an army for you to aid you other than the most merciful the disbelievers are not but in delusion

ayahs.t: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.
ayahs.n: or who is it that could provide for you if he withheld his provision but they have persisted in insolence and aversion

ayahs.t: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?
ayahs.n: then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path

ayahs.t: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."
ayahs.n: say it is he who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts little are you grateful

ayahs.t: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered."
ayahs.n: say it is he who has multiplied you throughout the earth and to him you will be gathered

ayahs.t: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.n: and they say when is this promise if you should be truthful

ayahs.t: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."
ayahs.n: say the knowledge is only with allah and i am only a clear warner

ayahs.t: But when they see it approaching, the faces of those who disbelieve will be distressed, and it will be said, "This is that for which you used to call."
ayahs.n: but when they see it approaching the faces of those who disbelieve will be distressed and it will be said this is that for which you used to call

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "Have you considered: whether Allah should cause my death and those with me or have mercy upon us, who can protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment?"
ayahs.n: say o muhammad have you considered whether allah should cause my death and those with me or have mercy upon us who can protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment

ayahs.t: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."
ayahs.n: say he is the most merciful we have believed in him and upon him we have relied and you will come to know who it is that is in clear error

ayahs.t: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"
ayahs.n: say have you considered if your water was to become sunken into the earth then who could bring you flowing water

ayahs.t: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,
ayahs.n: nun by the pen and what they inscribe

ayahs.t: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.
ayahs.n: you are not o muhammad by the favor of your lord a madman

ayahs.t: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.
ayahs.n: and indeed for you is a reward uninterrupted

ayahs.t: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.
ayahs.n: and indeed you are of a great moral character

ayahs.t: So you will see and they will see
ayahs.n: so you will see and they will see

ayahs.t: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].
ayahs.n: which of you is the afflicted by a devil

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from his way and he is most knowing of the rightly guided

ayahs.t: Then do not obey the deniers.
ayahs.n: then do not obey the deniers

ayahs.t: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].
ayahs.n: they wish that you would soften in your position so they would soften toward you

ayahs.t: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer
ayahs.n: and do not obey every worthless habitual swearer

ayahs.t: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -
ayahs.n: and scorner going about with malicious gossip

ayahs.t: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,
ayahs.n: a preventer of good transgressing and sinful

ayahs.t: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.
ayahs.n: cruel moreover and an illegitimate pretender

ayahs.t: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,
ayahs.n: because he is a possessor of wealth and children

ayahs.t: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
ayahs.n: when our verses are recited to him he says legends of the former peoples

ayahs.t: We will brand him upon the snout.
ayahs.n: we will brand him upon the snout

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning
ayahs.n: indeed we have tried them as we tried the companions of the garden when they swore to cut its fruit in the early morning

ayahs.t: Without making exception.
ayahs.n: without making exception

ayahs.t: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.
ayahs.n: so there came upon the garden an affliction from your lord while they were asleep

ayahs.t: And it became as though reaped.
ayahs.n: and it became as though reaped

ayahs.t: And they called one another at morning,
ayahs.n: and they called one another at morning

ayahs.t: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."
ayahs.n: saying go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit

ayahs.t: So they set out, while lowering their voices,
ayahs.n: so they set out while lowering their voices

ayahs.t: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."
ayahs.n: saying there will surely not enter it today upon you any poor person

ayahs.t: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.
ayahs.n: and they went early in determination assuming themselves able

ayahs.t: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;
ayahs.n: but when they saw it they said indeed we are lost

ayahs.t: Rather, we have been deprived."
ayahs.n: rather we have been deprived

ayahs.t: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?' "
ayahs.n: the most moderate of them said did i not say to you why do you not exalt allah

ayahs.t: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
ayahs.n: they said exalted is our lord indeed we were wrongdoers

ayahs.t: Then they approached one another, blaming each other.
ayahs.n: then they approached one another blaming each other

ayahs.t: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.
ayahs.n: they said o woe to us indeed we were transgressors

ayahs.t: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."
ayahs.n: perhaps our lord will substitute for us one better than it indeed we are toward our lord desirous

ayahs.t: Such is the punishment [of this world]. And the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.
ayahs.n: such is the punishment of this world and the punishment of the hereafter is greater if they only knew

ayahs.t: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.
ayahs.n: indeed for the righteous with their lord are the gardens of pleasure

ayahs.t: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?
ayahs.n: then will we treat the muslims like the criminals

ayahs.t: What is [the matter] with you? How do you judge?
ayahs.n: what is the matter with you how do you judge

ayahs.t: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn
ayahs.n: or do you have a scripture in which you learn

ayahs.t: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?
ayahs.n: that indeed for you is whatever you choose

ayahs.t: Or do you have oaths [binding] upon Us, extending until the Day of Resurrection, that indeed for you is whatever you judge?
ayahs.n: or do you have oaths binding upon us extending until the day of resurrection that indeed for you is whatever you judge

ayahs.t: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.
ayahs.n: ask them which of them for that claim is responsible

ayahs.t: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.
ayahs.n: or do they have partners then let them bring their partners if they should be truthful

ayahs.t: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able,
ayahs.n: the day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able

ayahs.t: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.
ayahs.n: their eyes humbled humiliation will cover them and they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound

ayahs.t: So leave Me, [O Muhammad], with [the matter of] whoever denies the Qur'an. We will progressively lead them [to punishment] from where they do not know.
ayahs.n: so leave me o muhammad with the matter of whoever denies the quran we will progressively lead them to punishment from where they do not know

ayahs.t: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.
ayahs.n: and i will give them time indeed my plan is firm

ayahs.t: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
ayahs.n: or do you ask of them a payment so they are by debt burdened down

ayahs.t: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
ayahs.n: or have they knowledge of the unseen so they write it down

ayahs.t: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muhammad], and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed.
ayahs.n: then be patient for the decision of your lord o muhammad and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed

ayahs.t: If not that a favor from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured.
ayahs.n: if not that a favor from his lord overtook him he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured

ayahs.t: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.
ayahs.n: and his lord chose him and made him of the righteous

ayahs.t: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad."
ayahs.n: and indeed those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message and they say indeed he is mad

ayahs.t: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.
ayahs.n: but it is not except a reminder to the worlds

ayahs.t: The Inevitable Reality -
ayahs.n: the inevitable reality

ayahs.t: What is the Inevitable Reality?
ayahs.n: what is the inevitable reality

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the inevitable reality

ayahs.t: Thamud and 'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.
ayahs.n: thamud and aad denied the striking calamity

ayahs.t: So as for Thamud, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast].
ayahs.n: so as for thamud they were destroyed by the overpowering blast

ayahs.t: And as for 'Aad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind
ayahs.n: and as for aad they were destroyed by a screaming violent wind

ayahs.t: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
ayahs.n: which allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees

ayahs.t: Then do you see of them any remains?
ayahs.n: then do you see of them any remains

ayahs.t: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.
ayahs.n: and there came pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin

ayahs.t: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].
ayahs.n: and they disobeyed the messenger of their lord so he seized them with a seizure exceeding in severity

ayahs.t: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship
ayahs.n: indeed when the water overflowed we carried your ancestors in the sailing ship

ayahs.t: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.
ayahs.n: that we might make it for you a reminder and that a conscious ear would be conscious of it

ayahs.t: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast
ayahs.n: then when the horn is blown with one blast

ayahs.t: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -
ayahs.n: and the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow

ayahs.t: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,
ayahs.n: then on that day the resurrection will occur

ayahs.t: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.
ayahs.n: and the heaven will split open for that day it is infirm

ayahs.t: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].
ayahs.n: and the angels are at its edges and there will bear the throne of your lord above them that day eight of them

ayahs.t: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.
ayahs.n: that day you will be exhibited for judgement not hidden among you is anything concealed

ayahs.t: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
ayahs.n: so as for he who is given his record in his right hand he will say here read my record

ayahs.t: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."
ayahs.n: indeed i was certain that i would be meeting my account

ayahs.t: So he will be in a pleasant life -
ayahs.n: so he will be in a pleasant life

ayahs.t: In an elevated garden,
ayahs.n: in an elevated garden

ayahs.t: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.
ayahs.n: its fruit to be picked hanging near

ayahs.t: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."
ayahs.n: they will be told eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past

ayahs.t: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
ayahs.n: but as for he who is given his record in his left hand he will say oh i wish i had not been given my record

ayahs.t: And had not known what is my account.
ayahs.n: and had not known what is my account

ayahs.t: I wish my death had been the decisive one.
ayahs.n: i wish my death had been the decisive one

ayahs.t: My wealth has not availed me.
ayahs.n: my wealth has not availed me

ayahs.t: Gone from me is my authority."
ayahs.n: gone from me is my authority

ayahs.t: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.
ayahs.n: allah will say seize him and shackle him

ayahs.t: Then into Hellfire drive him.
ayahs.n: then into hellfire drive him

ayahs.t: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."
ayahs.n: then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him

ayahs.t: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
ayahs.n: indeed he did not used to believe in allah the most great

ayahs.t: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
ayahs.n: nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor

ayahs.t: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
ayahs.n: so there is not for him here this day any devoted friend

ayahs.t: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;
ayahs.n: nor any food except from the discharge of wounds

ayahs.t: None will eat it except the sinners.
ayahs.n: none will eat it except the sinners

ayahs.t: So I swear by what you see
ayahs.n: so i swear by what you see

ayahs.t: And what you do not see
ayahs.n: and what you do not see

ayahs.t: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is the word of a noble Messenger.
ayahs.n: that indeed the quran is the word of a noble messenger

ayahs.t: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.
ayahs.n: and it is not the word of a poet little do you believe

ayahs.t: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
ayahs.n: nor the word of a soothsayer little do you remember

ayahs.t: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: it is a revelation from the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
ayahs.n: and if muhammad had made up about us some false sayings

ayahs.t: We would have seized him by the right hand;
ayahs.n: we would have seized him by the right hand

ayahs.t: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.
ayahs.n: then we would have cut from him the aorta

ayahs.t: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.
ayahs.n: and there is no one of you who could prevent us from him

ayahs.t: And indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder for the righteous.
ayahs.n: and indeed the quran is a reminder for the righteous

ayahs.t: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.
ayahs.n: and indeed we know that among you are deniers

ayahs.t: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers.
ayahs.n: and indeed it will be a cause of regret upon the disbelievers

ayahs.t: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.
ayahs.n: and indeed it is the truth of certainty

ayahs.t: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
ayahs.n: so exalt the name of your lord the most great

ayahs.t: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen
ayahs.n: a supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen

ayahs.t: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer.
ayahs.n: to the disbelievers of it there is no preventer

ayahs.t: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.
ayahs.n: it is from allah owner of the ways of ascent

ayahs.t: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
ayahs.n: the angels and the spirit will ascend to him during a day the extent of which is fifty thousand years

ayahs.t: So be patient with gracious patience.
ayahs.n: so be patient with gracious patience

ayahs.t: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,
ayahs.n: indeed they see it as distant

ayahs.t: But We see it [as] near.
ayahs.n: but we see it as near

ayahs.t: On the Day the sky will be like murky oil,
ayahs.n: on the day the sky will be like murky oil

ayahs.t: And the mountains will be like wool,
ayahs.n: and the mountains will be like wool

ayahs.t: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,
ayahs.n: and no friend will ask anything of a friend

ayahs.t: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children
ayahs.n: they will be shown each other the criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that day by his children

ayahs.t: And his wife and his brother
ayahs.n: and his wife and his brother

ayahs.t: And his nearest kindred who shelter him
ayahs.n: and his nearest kindred who shelter him

ayahs.t: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
ayahs.n: and whoever is on earth entirely so then it could save him

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],
ayahs.n: no indeed it is the flame of hell

ayahs.t: A remover of exteriors.
ayahs.n: a remover of exteriors

ayahs.t: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
ayahs.n: it invites he who turned his back on truth and went away from obedience

ayahs.t: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.
ayahs.n: and collected wealth and hoarded

ayahs.t: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:
ayahs.n: indeed mankind was created anxious

ayahs.t: When evil touches him, impatient,
ayahs.n: when evil touches him impatient

ayahs.t: And when good touches him, withholding [of it],
ayahs.n: and when good touches him withholding of it

ayahs.t: Except the observers of prayer -
ayahs.n: except the observers of prayer

ayahs.t: Those who are constant in their prayer
ayahs.n: those who are constant in their prayer

ayahs.t: And those within whose wealth is a known right
ayahs.n: and those within whose wealth is a known right

ayahs.t: For the petitioner and the deprived -
ayahs.n: for the petitioner and the deprived

ayahs.t: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense
ayahs.n: and those who believe in the day of recompense

ayahs.t: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord -
ayahs.n: and those who are fearful of the punishment of their lord

ayahs.t: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe -
ayahs.n: indeed the punishment of their lord is not that from which one is safe

ayahs.t: And those who guard their private parts
ayahs.n: and those who guard their private parts

ayahs.t: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed -
ayahs.n: except from their wives or those their right hands possess for indeed they are not to be blamed

ayahs.t: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
ayahs.n: but whoever seeks beyond that then they are the transgressors

ayahs.t: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
ayahs.n: and those who are to their trusts and promises attentive

ayahs.t: And those who are in their testimonies upright
ayahs.n: and those who are in their testimonies upright

ayahs.t: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:
ayahs.n: and those who carefully maintain their prayer

ayahs.t: They will be in gardens, honored.
ayahs.n: they will be in gardens honored

ayahs.t: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad],
ayahs.n: so what is the matter with those who disbelieve hastening from before you o muhammad

ayahs.t: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?
ayahs.n: to sit on your right and your left in separate groups

ayahs.t: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
ayahs.n: does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.
ayahs.n: no indeed we have created them from that which they know

ayahs.t: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
ayahs.n: so i swear by the lord of all risings and settings that indeed we are able

ayahs.t: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.
ayahs.n: to replace them with better than them and we are not to be outdone

ayahs.t: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -
ayahs.n: so leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their day which they are promised

ayahs.t: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.
ayahs.n: the day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were toward an erected idol hastening

ayahs.t: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
ayahs.n: their eyes humbled humiliation will cover them that is the day which they had been promised

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."
ayahs.n: indeed we sent noah to his people saying warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment

ayahs.t: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
ayahs.n: he said o my people indeed i am to you a clear warner

ayahs.t: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
ayahs.n: saying worship allah fear him and obey me

ayahs.t: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.' "
ayahs.n: allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term indeed the time set by allah when it comes will not be delayed if you only knew

ayahs.t: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
ayahs.n: he said my lord indeed i invited my people to truth night and day

ayahs.t: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
ayahs.n: but my invitation increased them not except in flight

ayahs.t: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
ayahs.n: and indeed every time i invited them that you may forgive them they put their fingers in their ears covered themselves with their garments persisted and were arrogant with great arrogance

ayahs.t: Then I invited them publicly.
ayahs.n: then i invited them publicly

ayahs.t: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
ayahs.n: then i announced to them and also confided to them secretly

ayahs.t: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
ayahs.n: and said ask forgiveness of your lord indeed he is ever a perpetual forgiver

ayahs.t: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
ayahs.n: he will send rain from the sky upon you in continuing showers

ayahs.t: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
ayahs.n: and give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers

ayahs.t: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
ayahs.n: what is the matter with you that you do not attribute to allah due grandeur

ayahs.t: While He has created you in stages?
ayahs.n: while he has created you in stages

ayahs.t: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
ayahs.n: do you not consider how allah has created seven heavens in layers

ayahs.t: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
ayahs.n: and made the moon therein a reflected light and made the sun a burning lamp

ayahs.t: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
ayahs.n: and allah has caused you to grow from the earth a progressive growth

ayahs.t: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
ayahs.n: then he will return you into it and extract you another extraction

ayahs.t: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
ayahs.n: and allah has made for you the earth an expanse

ayahs.t: That you may follow therein roads of passage.' "
ayahs.n: that you may follow therein roads of passage

ayahs.t: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.
ayahs.n: noah said my lord indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss

ayahs.t: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
ayahs.n: and they conspired an immense conspiracy

ayahs.t: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr.
ayahs.n: and said never leave your gods and never leave wadd or suwa or yaghuth and yauq and nasr

ayahs.t: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
ayahs.n: and already they have misled many and my lord do not increase the wrongdoers except in error

ayahs.t: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
ayahs.n: because of their sins they were drowned and put into the fire and they found not for themselves besides allah any helpers

ayahs.t: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.
ayahs.n: and noah said my lord do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant

ayahs.t: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
ayahs.n: indeed if you leave them they will mislead your servants and not beget except every wicked one and confirmed disbeliever

ayahs.t: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
ayahs.n: my lord forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women and do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an.
ayahs.n: say o muhammad it has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said indeed we have heard an amazing quran

ayahs.t: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.
ayahs.n: it guides to the right course and we have believed in it and we will never associate with our lord anyone

ayahs.t: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son
ayahs.n: and it teaches that exalted is the nobleness of our lord he has not taken a wife or a son

ayahs.t: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.
ayahs.n: and that our foolish one has been saying about allah an excessive transgression

ayahs.t: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.
ayahs.n: and we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about allah a lie

ayahs.t: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden.
ayahs.n: and there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn so they only increased them in burden

ayahs.t: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].
ayahs.n: and they had thought as you thought that allah would never send anyone as a messenger

ayahs.t: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.
ayahs.n: and we have sought to reach the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames

ayahs.t: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.
ayahs.n: and we used to sit therein in positions for hearing but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him

ayahs.t: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.
ayahs.n: and we do not know therefore whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their lord intends for them a right course

ayahs.t: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.
ayahs.n: and among us are the righteous and among us are others not so we were of divided ways

ayahs.t: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.
ayahs.n: and we have become certain that we will never cause failure to allah upon earth nor can we escape him by flight

ayahs.t: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.
ayahs.n: and when we heard the guidance we believed in it and whoever believes in his lord will not fear deprivation or burden

ayahs.t: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.
ayahs.n: and among us are muslims in submission to allah and among us are the unjust and whoever has become muslim those have sought out the right course

ayahs.t: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.'
ayahs.n: but as for the unjust they will be for hell firewood

ayahs.t: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision
ayahs.n: and allah revealed that if they had remained straight on the way we would have given them abundant provision

ayahs.t: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.
ayahs.n: so we might test them therein and whoever turns away from the remembrance of his lord he will put into arduous punishment

ayahs.t: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.
ayahs.n: and he revealed that the masjids are for allah so do not invoke with allah anyone

ayahs.t: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."
ayahs.n: and that when the servant of allah stood up supplicating him they almost became about him a compacted mass

ayahs.t: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."
ayahs.n: say o muhammad i only invoke my lord and do not associate with him anyone

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."
ayahs.n: say indeed i do not possess for you the power of harm or right direction

ayahs.t: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.
ayahs.n: say indeed there will never protect me from allah anyone if i should disobey nor will i find in other than him a refuge

ayahs.t: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.
ayahs.n: but i have for you only notification from allah and his messages and whoever disobeys allah and his messenger then indeed for him is the fire of hell they will abide therein forever

ayahs.t: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.
ayahs.n: the disbelievers continue until when they see that which they are promised then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number

ayahs.t: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."
ayahs.n: say i do not know if what you are promised is near or if my lord will grant for it a long period

ayahs.t: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone
ayahs.n: he is knower of the unseen and he does not disclose his knowledge of the unseen to anyone

ayahs.t: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers
ayahs.n: except whom he has approved of messengers and indeed he sends before each messenger and behind him observers

ayahs.t: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
ayahs.n: that he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their lord and he has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number

ayahs.t: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],
ayahs.n: o you who wraps himself in clothing

ayahs.t: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -
ayahs.n: arise to pray the night except for a little

ayahs.t: Half of it - or subtract from it a little
ayahs.n: half of it or subtract from it a little

ayahs.t: Or add to it, and recite the Qur'an with measured recitation.
ayahs.n: or add to it and recite the quran with measured recitation

ayahs.t: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.
ayahs.n: indeed we will cast upon you a heavy word

ayahs.t: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.
ayahs.n: indeed the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence of heart and tongue and more suitable for words

ayahs.t: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.
ayahs.n: indeed for you by day is prolonged occupation

ayahs.t: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.
ayahs.n: and remember the name of your lord and devote yourself to him with complete devotion

ayahs.t: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.
ayahs.n: he is the lord of the east and the west there is no deity except him so take him as disposer of your affairs

ayahs.t: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.
ayahs.n: and be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance

ayahs.t: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.
ayahs.n: and leave me with the matter of the deniers those of ease in life and allow them respite a little

ayahs.t: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
ayahs.n: indeed with us for them are shackles and burning fire

ayahs.t: And food that chokes and a painful punishment -
ayahs.n: and food that chokes and a painful punishment

ayahs.t: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.
ayahs.n: on the day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.
ayahs.n: indeed we have sent to you a messenger as a witness upon you just as we sent to pharaoh a messenger

ayahs.t: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.
ayahs.n: but pharaoh disobeyed the messenger so we seized him with a ruinous seizure

ayahs.t: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?
ayahs.n: then how can you fear if you disbelieve a day that will make the children white haired

ayahs.t: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.
ayahs.n: the heaven will break apart therefrom ever is his promise fulfilled

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.
ayahs.n: indeed this is a reminder so whoever wills may take to his lord a way

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muhammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allah determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur'an. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allah and others fighting for the cause of Allah. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakah and loan Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allah. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord knows o muhammad that you stand in prayer almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it and so do a group of those with you and allah determines the extent of the night and the day he has known that you muslims will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness so recite what is easy for you of the quran he has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking something of the bounty of allah and others fighting for the cause of allah so recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakah and loan allah a goodly loan and whatever good you put forward for yourselves you will find it with allah it is better and greater in reward and seek forgiveness of allah indeed allah is forgiving and merciful

ayahs.t: O you who covers himself [with a garment],
ayahs.n: o you who covers himself with a garment

ayahs.t: Arise and warn
ayahs.n: arise and warn

ayahs.t: And your Lord glorify
ayahs.n: and your lord glorify

ayahs.t: And your clothing purify
ayahs.n: and your clothing purify

ayahs.t: And uncleanliness avoid
ayahs.n: and uncleanliness avoid

ayahs.t: And do not confer favor to acquire more
ayahs.n: and do not confer favor to acquire more

ayahs.t: But for your Lord be patient.
ayahs.n: but for your lord be patient

ayahs.t: And when the trumpet is blown,
ayahs.n: and when the trumpet is blown

ayahs.t: That Day will be a difficult day
ayahs.n: that day will be a difficult day

ayahs.t: For the disbelievers - not easy.
ayahs.n: for the disbelievers not easy

ayahs.t: Leave Me with the one I created alone
ayahs.n: leave me with the one i created alone

ayahs.t: And to whom I granted extensive wealth
ayahs.n: and to whom i granted extensive wealth

ayahs.t: And children present [with him]
ayahs.n: and children present with him

ayahs.t: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life].
ayahs.n: and spread everything before him easing his life

ayahs.t: Then he desires that I should add more.
ayahs.n: then he desires that i should add more

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate.
ayahs.n: no indeed he has been toward our verses obstinate

ayahs.t: I will cover him with arduous torment.
ayahs.n: i will cover him with arduous torment

ayahs.t: Indeed, he thought and deliberated.
ayahs.n: indeed he thought and deliberated

ayahs.t: So may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated.
ayahs.n: so may he be destroyed for how he deliberated

ayahs.t: Then may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated.
ayahs.n: then may he be destroyed for how he deliberated

ayahs.t: Then he considered [again];
ayahs.n: then he considered again

ayahs.t: Then he frowned and scowled;
ayahs.n: then he frowned and scowled

ayahs.t: Then he turned back and was arrogant
ayahs.n: then he turned back and was arrogant

ayahs.t: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others].
ayahs.n: and said this is not but magic imitated from others

ayahs.t: This is not but the word of a human being."
ayahs.n: this is not but the word of a human being

ayahs.t: I will drive him into Saqar.
ayahs.n: i will drive him into saqar

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is Saqar?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is saqar

ayahs.t: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned],
ayahs.n: it lets nothing remain and leaves nothing unburned

ayahs.t: Blackening the skins.
ayahs.n: blackening the skins

ayahs.t: Over it are nineteen [angels].
ayahs.n: over it are nineteen angels

ayahs.t: And We have not made the keepers of the Fire except angels. And We have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve - that those who were given the Scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the Scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is hypocrisy and the disbelievers will say, "What does Allah intend by this as an example?" Thus does Allah leave astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And none knows the soldiers of your Lord except Him. And mention of the Fire is not but a reminder to humanity.
ayahs.n: and we have not made the keepers of the fire except angels and we have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve that those who were given the scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is hypocrisy and the disbelievers will say what does allah intend by this as an example thus does allah leave astray whom he wills and guides whom he wills and none knows the soldiers of your lord except him and mention of the fire is not but a reminder to humanity

ayahs.t: No! By the moon
ayahs.n: no by the moon

ayahs.t: And [by] the night when it departs
ayahs.n: and by the night when it departs

ayahs.t: And [by] the morning when it brightens,
ayahs.n: and by the morning when it brightens

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]
ayahs.n: indeed the fire is of the greatest afflictions

ayahs.t: As a warning to humanity -
ayahs.n: as a warning to humanity

ayahs.t: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind.
ayahs.n: to whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind

ayahs.t: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained
ayahs.n: every soul for what it has earned will be retained

ayahs.t: Except the companions of the right,
ayahs.n: except the companions of the right

ayahs.t: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other
ayahs.n: who will be in gardens questioning each other

ayahs.t: About the criminals,
ayahs.n: about the criminals

ayahs.t: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar?"
ayahs.n: and asking them what put you into saqar

ayahs.t: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,
ayahs.n: they will say we were not of those who prayed

ayahs.t: Nor did we used to feed the poor.
ayahs.n: nor did we used to feed the poor

ayahs.t: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],
ayahs.n: and we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged in it

ayahs.t: And we used to deny the Day of Recompense
ayahs.n: and we used to deny the day of recompense

ayahs.t: Until there came to us the certainty."
ayahs.n: until there came to us the certainty

ayahs.t: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.
ayahs.n: so there will not benefit them the intercession of any intercessors

ayahs.t: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away
ayahs.n: then what is the matter with them that they are from the reminder turning away

ayahs.t: As if they were alarmed donkeys
ayahs.n: as if they were alarmed donkeys

ayahs.t: Fleeing from a lion?
ayahs.n: fleeing from a lion

ayahs.t: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about.
ayahs.n: rather every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about

ayahs.t: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter.
ayahs.n: no but they do not fear the hereafter

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder
ayahs.n: no indeed the quran is a reminder

ayahs.t: Then whoever wills will remember it.
ayahs.n: then whoever wills will remember it

ayahs.t: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.
ayahs.n: and they will not remember except that allah wills he is worthy of fear and adequate for granting forgiveness

ayahs.t: I swear by the Day of Resurrection
ayahs.n: i swear by the day of resurrection

ayahs.t: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].
ayahs.n: and i swear by the reproaching soul to the certainty of resurrection

ayahs.t: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?
ayahs.n: does man think that we will not assemble his bones

ayahs.t: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
ayahs.n: yes we are able even to proportion his fingertips

ayahs.t: But man desires to continue in sin.
ayahs.n: but man desires to continue in sin

ayahs.t: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection?"
ayahs.n: he asks when is the day of resurrection

ayahs.t: So when vision is dazzled
ayahs.n: so when vision is dazzled

ayahs.t: And the moon darkens
ayahs.n: and the moon darkens

ayahs.t: And the sun and the moon are joined,
ayahs.n: and the sun and the moon are joined

ayahs.t: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"
ayahs.n: man will say on that day where is the place of escape

ayahs.t: No! There is no refuge.
ayahs.n: no there is no refuge

ayahs.t: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.
ayahs.n: to your lord that day is the place of permanence

ayahs.t: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
ayahs.n: man will be informed that day of what he sent ahead and kept back

ayahs.t: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,
ayahs.n: rather man against himself will be a witness

ayahs.t: Even if he presents his excuses.
ayahs.n: even if he presents his excuses

ayahs.t: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur'an.
ayahs.n: move not your tongue with it o muhammad to hasten with recitation of the quran

ayahs.t: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.
ayahs.n: indeed upon us is its collection in your heart and to make possible its recitation

ayahs.t: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation.
ayahs.n: so when we have recited it through gabriel then follow its recitation

ayahs.t: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].
ayahs.n: then upon us is its clarification to you

ayahs.t: No! But you love the immediate
ayahs.n: no but you love the immediate

ayahs.t: And leave the Hereafter.
ayahs.n: and leave the hereafter

ayahs.t: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,
ayahs.n: some faces that day will be radiant

ayahs.t: Looking at their Lord.
ayahs.n: looking at their lord

ayahs.t: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,
ayahs.n: and some faces that day will be contorted

ayahs.t: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.
ayahs.n: expecting that there will be done to them something backbreaking

ayahs.t: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
ayahs.n: no when the soul has reached the collar bones

ayahs.t: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"
ayahs.n: and it is said who will cure him

ayahs.t: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
ayahs.n: and the dying one is certain that it is the time of separation

ayahs.t: And the leg is wound about the leg,
ayahs.n: and the leg is wound about the leg

ayahs.t: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.
ayahs.n: to your lord that day will be the procession

ayahs.t: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.
ayahs.n: and the disbeliever had not believed nor had he prayed

ayahs.t: But [instead], he denied and turned away.
ayahs.n: but instead he denied and turned away

ayahs.t: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].
ayahs.n: and then he went to his people swaggering in pride
