ayahs.t: Woe to you, and woe!
ayahs.n: woe to you and woe

ayahs.t: Then woe to you, and woe!
ayahs.n: then woe to you and woe

ayahs.t: Does man think that he will be left neglected?
ayahs.n: does man think that he will be left neglected

ayahs.t: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
ayahs.n: had he not been a sperm from semen emitted

ayahs.t: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
ayahs.n: then he was a clinging clot and allah created his form and proportioned him

ayahs.t: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.
ayahs.n: and made of him two mates the male and the female

ayahs.t: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
ayahs.n: is not that creator able to give life to the dead

ayahs.t: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
ayahs.n: has there not come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing even mentioned

ayahs.t: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.
ayahs.n: indeed we created man from a sperm drop mixture that we may try him and we made him hearing and seeing

ayahs.t: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
ayahs.n: indeed we guided him to the way be he grateful or be he ungrateful

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.
ayahs.n: indeed we have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will drink from a cup of wine whose mixture is of kafur

ayahs.t: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
ayahs.n: a spring of which the righteous servants of allah will drink they will make it gush forth in force and abundance

ayahs.t: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.
ayahs.n: they are those who fulfill their vows and fear a day whose evil will be widespread

ayahs.t: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
ayahs.n: and they give food in spite of love for it to the needy the orphan and the captive

ayahs.t: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
ayahs.n: saying we feed you only for the countenance of allah we wish not from you reward or gratitude

ayahs.t: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."
ayahs.n: indeed we fear from our lord a day austere and distressful

ayahs.t: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
ayahs.n: so allah will protect them from the evil of that day and give them radiance and happiness

ayahs.t: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
ayahs.n: and will reward them for what they patiently endured with a garden in paradise and silk garments

ayahs.t: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.
ayahs.n: they will be reclining therein on adorned couches they will not see therein any burning sun or freezing cold

ayahs.t: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
ayahs.n: and near above them are its shades and its fruit to be picked will be lowered in compliance

ayahs.t: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
ayahs.n: and there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been created clear as glass

ayahs.t: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
ayahs.n: clear glasses made from silver of which they have determined the measure

ayahs.t: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
ayahs.n: and they will be given to drink a cup of wine whose mixture is of ginger

ayahs.t: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.
ayahs.n: from a fountain within paradise named salsabeel

ayahs.t: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
ayahs.n: there will circulate among them young boys made eternal when you see them you would think them as beautiful as scattered pearls

ayahs.t: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.
ayahs.n: and when you look there in paradise you will see pleasure and great dominion

ayahs.t: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
ayahs.n: upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade and they will be adorned with bracelets of silver and their lord will give them a purifying drink

ayahs.t: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."
ayahs.n: and it will be said indeed this is for you a reward and your effort has been appreciated

ayahs.t: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively.
ayahs.n: indeed it is we who have sent down to you o muhammad the quran progressively

ayahs.t: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
ayahs.n: so be patient for the decision of your lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful disbeliever

ayahs.t: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
ayahs.n: and mention the name of your lord in prayer morning and evening

ayahs.t: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.
ayahs.n: and during the night prostrate to him and exalt him a long part of the night

ayahs.t: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.
ayahs.n: indeed these disbelievers love the immediate and leave behind them a grave day

ayahs.t: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.
ayahs.n: we have created them and strengthened their forms and when we will we can change their likenesses with complete alteration

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
ayahs.n: indeed this is a reminder so he who wills may take to his lord a way

ayahs.t: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.n: and you do not will except that allah wills indeed allah is ever knowing and wise

ayahs.t: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
ayahs.n: he admits whom he wills into his mercy but the wrongdoers he has prepared for them a painful punishment

ayahs.t: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
ayahs.n: by those winds sent forth in gusts

ayahs.t: And the winds that blow violently
ayahs.n: and the winds that blow violently

ayahs.t: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]
ayahs.n: and by the winds that spread clouds

ayahs.t: And those [angels] who bring criterion
ayahs.n: and those angels who bring criterion

ayahs.t: And those [angels] who deliver a message
ayahs.n: and those angels who deliver a message

ayahs.t: As justification or warning,
ayahs.n: as justification or warning

ayahs.t: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.
ayahs.n: indeed what you are promised is to occur

ayahs.t: So when the stars are obliterated
ayahs.n: so when the stars are obliterated

ayahs.t: And when the heaven is opened
ayahs.n: and when the heaven is opened

ayahs.t: And when the mountains are blown away
ayahs.n: and when the mountains are blown away

ayahs.t: And when the messengers' time has come...
ayahs.n: and when the messengers time has come

ayahs.t: For what Day was it postponed?
ayahs.n: for what day was it postponed

ayahs.t: For the Day of Judgement.
ayahs.n: for the day of judgement

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the day of judgement

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Did We not destroy the former peoples?
ayahs.n: did we not destroy the former peoples

ayahs.t: Then We will follow them with the later ones.
ayahs.n: then we will follow them with the later ones

ayahs.t: Thus do We deal with the criminals.
ayahs.n: thus do we deal with the criminals

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?
ayahs.n: did we not create you from a liquid disdained

ayahs.t: And We placed it in a firm lodging
ayahs.n: and we placed it in a firm lodging

ayahs.t: For a known extent.
ayahs.n: for a known extent

ayahs.t: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.
ayahs.n: and we determined it and excellent are we to determine

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Have We not made the earth a container
ayahs.n: have we not made the earth a container

ayahs.t: Of the living and the dead?
ayahs.n: of the living and the dead

ayahs.t: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
ayahs.n: and we placed therein lofty firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
ayahs.n: they will be told proceed to that which you used to deny

ayahs.t: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
ayahs.n: proceed to a shadow of smoke having three columns

ayahs.t: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
ayahs.n: but having no cool shade and availing not against the flame

ayahs.t: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,
ayahs.n: indeed it throws sparks as huge as a fortress

ayahs.t: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.
ayahs.n: as if they were yellowish black camels

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: This is a Day they will not speak,
ayahs.n: this is a day they will not speak

ayahs.t: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.
ayahs.n: nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples.
ayahs.n: this is the day of judgement we will have assembled you and the former peoples

ayahs.t: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.
ayahs.n: so if you have a plan then plan against me

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be among shades and springs

ayahs.t: And fruits from whatever they desire,
ayahs.n: and fruits from whatever they desire

ayahs.t: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
ayahs.n: being told eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do

ayahs.t: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
ayahs.n: indeed we thus reward the doers of good

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals.
ayahs.n: o disbelievers eat and enjoy yourselves a little indeed you are criminals

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow.
ayahs.n: and when it is said to them bow in prayer they do not bow

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Then in what statement after the Qur'an will they believe?
ayahs.n: then in what statement after the quran will they believe

ayahs.t: About what are they asking one another?
ayahs.n: about what are they asking one another

ayahs.t: About the great news -
ayahs.n: about the great news

ayahs.t: That over which they are in disagreement.
ayahs.n: that over which they are in disagreement

ayahs.t: No! They are going to know.
ayahs.n: no they are going to know

ayahs.t: Then, no! They are going to know.
ayahs.n: then no they are going to know

ayahs.t: Have We not made the earth a resting place?
ayahs.n: have we not made the earth a resting place

ayahs.t: And the mountains as stakes?
ayahs.n: and the mountains as stakes

ayahs.t: And We created you in pairs
ayahs.n: and we created you in pairs

ayahs.t: And made your sleep [a means for] rest
ayahs.n: and made your sleep a means for rest

ayahs.t: And made the night as clothing
ayahs.n: and made the night as clothing

ayahs.t: And made the day for livelihood
ayahs.n: and made the day for livelihood

ayahs.t: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
ayahs.n: and constructed above you seven strong heavens

ayahs.t: And made [therein] a burning lamp
ayahs.n: and made therein a burning lamp

ayahs.t: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water
ayahs.n: and sent down from the rain clouds pouring water

ayahs.t: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
ayahs.n: that we may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation

ayahs.t: And gardens of entwined growth.
ayahs.n: and gardens of entwined growth

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -
ayahs.n: indeed the day of judgement is an appointed time

ayahs.t: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
ayahs.n: the day the horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes

ayahs.t: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways
ayahs.n: and the heaven is opened and will become gateways

ayahs.t: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
ayahs.n: and the mountains are removed and will be but a mirage

ayahs.t: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
ayahs.n: indeed hell has been lying in wait

ayahs.t: For the transgressors, a place of return,
ayahs.n: for the transgressors a place of return

ayahs.t: In which they will remain for ages [unending].
ayahs.n: in which they will remain for ages unending

ayahs.t: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
ayahs.n: they will not taste therein any coolness or drink

ayahs.t: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
ayahs.n: except scalding water and foul purulence

ayahs.t: An appropriate recompense.
ayahs.n: an appropriate recompense

ayahs.t: Indeed, they were not expecting an account
ayahs.n: indeed they were not expecting an account

ayahs.t: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.
ayahs.n: and denied our verses with emphatic denial

ayahs.t: But all things We have enumerated in writing.
ayahs.n: but all things we have enumerated in writing

ayahs.t: "So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment."
ayahs.n: so taste the penalty and never will we increase you except in torment

ayahs.t: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
ayahs.n: indeed for the righteous is attainment

ayahs.t: Gardens and grapevines
ayahs.n: gardens and grapevines

ayahs.t: And full-breasted [companions] of equal age
ayahs.n: and full breasted companions of equal age

ayahs.t: And a full cup.
ayahs.n: and a full cup

ayahs.t: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
ayahs.n: no ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood

ayahs.t: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,
ayahs.n: as reward from your lord a generous gift made due by account

ayahs.t: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
ayahs.n: from the lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them the most merciful they possess not from him authority for speech

ayahs.t: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
ayahs.n: the day that the spirit and the angels will stand in rows they will not speak except for one whom the most merciful permits and he will say what is correct

ayahs.t: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
ayahs.n: that is the true day so he who wills may take to his lord a way of return

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust!"
ayahs.n: indeed we have warned you of a near punishment on the day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say oh i wish that i were dust

ayahs.t: By those [angels] who extract with violence
ayahs.n: by those angels who extract with violence

ayahs.t: And [by] those who remove with ease
ayahs.n: and by those who remove with ease

ayahs.t: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
ayahs.n: and by those who glide as if swimming

ayahs.t: And those who race each other in a race
ayahs.n: and those who race each other in a race

ayahs.t: And those who arrange [each] matter,
ayahs.n: and those who arrange each matter

ayahs.t: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation],
ayahs.n: on the day the blast of the horn will convulse creation

ayahs.t: There will follow it the subsequent [one].
ayahs.n: there will follow it the subsequent one

ayahs.t: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,
ayahs.n: hearts that day will tremble

ayahs.t: Their eyes humbled.
ayahs.n: their eyes humbled

ayahs.t: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
ayahs.n: they are presently saying will we indeed be returned to our former state of life

ayahs.t: Even if we should be decayed bones?
ayahs.n: even if we should be decayed bones

ayahs.t: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
ayahs.n: they say that then would be a losing return

ayahs.t: Indeed, it will be but one shout,
ayahs.n: indeed it will be but one shout

ayahs.t: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.
ayahs.n: and suddenly they will be alert upon the earths surface

ayahs.t: Has there reached you the story of Moses? -
ayahs.n: has there reached you the story of moses

ayahs.t: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
ayahs.n: when his lord called to him in the sacred valley of tuwa

ayahs.t: "Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.
ayahs.n: go to pharaoh indeed he has transgressed

ayahs.t: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
ayahs.n: and say to him would you be willing to purify yourself

ayahs.t: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?'"
ayahs.n: and let me guide you to your lord so you would fear him

ayahs.t: And he showed him the greatest sign,
ayahs.n: and he showed him the greatest sign

ayahs.t: But Pharaoh denied and disobeyed.
ayahs.n: but pharaoh denied and disobeyed

ayahs.t: Then he turned his back, striving.
ayahs.n: then he turned his back striving

ayahs.t: And he gathered [his people] and called out
ayahs.n: and he gathered his people and called out

ayahs.t: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."
ayahs.n: and said i am your most exalted lord

ayahs.t: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression].
ayahs.n: so allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first transgression

ayahs.t: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].
ayahs.n: indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear allah

ayahs.t: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
ayahs.n: are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven allah constructed it

ayahs.t: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
ayahs.n: he raised its ceiling and proportioned it

ayahs.t: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
ayahs.n: and he darkened its night and extracted its brightness

ayahs.t: And after that He spread the earth.
ayahs.n: and after that he spread the earth

ayahs.t: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
ayahs.n: he extracted from it its water and its pasture

ayahs.t: And the mountains He set firmly
ayahs.n: and the mountains he set firmly

ayahs.t: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
ayahs.n: as provision for you and your grazing livestock

ayahs.t: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -
ayahs.n: but when there comes the greatest overwhelming calamity

ayahs.t: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove,
ayahs.n: the day when man will remember that for which he strove

ayahs.t: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
ayahs.n: and hellfire will be exposed for all those who see

ayahs.t: So as for he who transgressed
ayahs.n: so as for he who transgressed

ayahs.t: And preferred the life of the world,
ayahs.n: and preferred the life of the world

ayahs.t: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.
ayahs.n: then indeed hellfire will be his refuge

ayahs.t: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,
ayahs.n: but as for he who feared the position of his lord and prevented the soul from unlawful inclination

ayahs.t: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
ayahs.n: then indeed paradise will be his refuge

ayahs.t: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
ayahs.n: they ask you o muhammad about the hour when is its arrival

ayahs.t: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
ayahs.n: in what position are you that you should mention it

ayahs.t: To your Lord is its finality.
ayahs.n: to your lord is its finality

ayahs.t: You are only a warner for those who fear it.
ayahs.n: you are only a warner for those who fear it

ayahs.t: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof.
ayahs.n: it will be on the day they see it as though they had not remained in the world except for an afternoon or a morning thereof

ayahs.t: The Prophet frowned and turned away
ayahs.n: the prophet frowned and turned away

ayahs.t: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].
ayahs.n: because there came to him the blind man interrupting

ayahs.t: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
ayahs.n: but what would make you perceive o muhammad that perhaps he might be purified

ayahs.t: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
ayahs.n: or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him

ayahs.t: As for he who thinks himself without need,
ayahs.n: as for he who thinks himself without need

ayahs.t: To him you give attention.
ayahs.n: to him you give attention

ayahs.t: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
ayahs.n: and not upon you is any blame if he will not be purified

ayahs.t: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
ayahs.n: but as for he who came to you striving for knowledge

ayahs.t: While he fears [Allah],
ayahs.n: while he fears allah

ayahs.t: From him you are distracted.
ayahs.n: from him you are distracted

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
ayahs.n: no indeed these verses are a reminder

ayahs.t: So whoever wills may remember it.
ayahs.n: so whoever wills may remember it

ayahs.t: [It is recorded] in honored sheets,
ayahs.n: it is recorded in honored sheets

ayahs.t: Exalted and purified,
ayahs.n: exalted and purified

ayahs.t: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,
ayahs.n: carried by the hands of messenger angels

ayahs.t: Noble and dutiful.
ayahs.n: noble and dutiful

ayahs.t: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
ayahs.n: cursed is man how disbelieving is he

ayahs.t: From what substance did He create him?
ayahs.n: from what substance did he create him

ayahs.t: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
ayahs.n: from a sperm drop he created him and destined for him

ayahs.t: Then He eased the way for him;
ayahs.n: then he eased the way for him

ayahs.t: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
ayahs.n: then he causes his death and provides a grave for him

ayahs.t: Then when He wills, He will resurrect him.
ayahs.n: then when he wills he will resurrect him

ayahs.t: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
ayahs.n: no man has not yet accomplished what he commanded him

ayahs.t: Then let mankind look at his food -
ayahs.n: then let mankind look at his food

ayahs.t: How We poured down water in torrents,
ayahs.n: how we poured down water in torrents

ayahs.t: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
ayahs.n: then we broke open the earth splitting it with sprouts

ayahs.t: And caused to grow within it grain
ayahs.n: and caused to grow within it grain

ayahs.t: And grapes and herbage
ayahs.n: and grapes and herbage

ayahs.t: And olive and palm trees
ayahs.n: and olive and palm trees

ayahs.t: And gardens of dense shrubbery
ayahs.n: and gardens of dense shrubbery

ayahs.t: And fruit and grass -
ayahs.n: and fruit and grass

ayahs.t: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
ayahs.n: as enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock

ayahs.t: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
ayahs.n: but when there comes the deafening blast

ayahs.t: On the Day a man will flee from his brother
ayahs.n: on the day a man will flee from his brother

ayahs.t: And his mother and his father
ayahs.n: and his mother and his father

ayahs.t: And his wife and his children,
ayahs.n: and his wife and his children

ayahs.t: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
ayahs.n: for every man that day will be a matter adequate for him

ayahs.t: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
ayahs.n: some faces that day will be bright

ayahs.t: Laughing, rejoicing at good news.
ayahs.n: laughing rejoicing at good news

ayahs.t: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
ayahs.n: and other faces that day will have upon them dust

ayahs.t: Blackness will cover them.
ayahs.n: blackness will cover them

ayahs.t: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones.
ayahs.n: those are the disbelievers the wicked ones

ayahs.t: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
ayahs.n: when the sun is wrapped up in darkness

ayahs.t: And when the stars fall, dispersing,
ayahs.n: and when the stars fall dispersing

ayahs.t: And when the mountains are removed
ayahs.n: and when the mountains are removed

ayahs.t: And when full-term she-camels are neglected
ayahs.n: and when full term she camels are neglected

ayahs.t: And when the wild beasts are gathered
ayahs.n: and when the wild beasts are gathered

ayahs.t: And when the seas are filled with flame
ayahs.n: and when the seas are filled with flame

ayahs.t: And when the souls are paired
ayahs.n: and when the souls are paired

ayahs.t: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
ayahs.n: and when the girl who was buried alive is asked

ayahs.t: For what sin she was killed
ayahs.n: for what sin she was killed

ayahs.t: And when the pages are made public
ayahs.n: and when the pages are made public

ayahs.t: And when the sky is stripped away
ayahs.n: and when the sky is stripped away

ayahs.t: And when Hellfire is set ablaze
ayahs.n: and when hellfire is set ablaze

ayahs.t: And when Paradise is brought near,
ayahs.n: and when paradise is brought near

ayahs.t: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
ayahs.n: a soul will then know what it has brought with it

ayahs.t: So I swear by the retreating stars -
ayahs.n: so i swear by the retreating stars

ayahs.t: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
ayahs.n: those that run their courses and disappear

ayahs.t: And by the night as it closes in
ayahs.n: and by the night as it closes in

ayahs.t: And by the dawn when it breathes
ayahs.n: and by the dawn when it breathes

ayahs.t: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
ayahs.n: that indeed the quran is a word conveyed by a noble messenger

ayahs.t: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
ayahs.n: who is possessed of power and with the owner of the throne secure in position

ayahs.t: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
ayahs.n: obeyed there in the heavens and trustworthy

ayahs.t: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
ayahs.n: and your companion is not at all mad

ayahs.t: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
ayahs.n: and he has already seen gabriel in the clear horizon

ayahs.t: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
ayahs.n: and muhammad is not a withholder of knowledge of the unseen

ayahs.t: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
ayahs.n: and the quran is not the word of a devil expelled from the heavens

ayahs.t: So where are you going?
ayahs.n: so where are you going

ayahs.t: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
ayahs.n: it is not except a reminder to the worlds

ayahs.t: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
ayahs.n: for whoever wills among you to take a right course

ayahs.t: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.n: and you do not will except that allah wills lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: When the sky breaks apart
ayahs.n: when the sky breaks apart

ayahs.t: And when the stars fall, scattering,
ayahs.n: and when the stars fall scattering

ayahs.t: And when the seas are erupted
ayahs.n: and when the seas are erupted

ayahs.t: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered,
ayahs.n: and when the contents of graves are scattered

ayahs.t: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
ayahs.n: a soul will then know what it has put forth and kept back

ayahs.t: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
ayahs.n: o mankind what has deceived you concerning your lord the generous

ayahs.t: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?
ayahs.n: who created you proportioned you and balanced you

ayahs.t: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
ayahs.n: in whatever form he willed has he assembled you

ayahs.t: No! But you deny the Recompense.
ayahs.n: no but you deny the recompense

ayahs.t: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
ayahs.n: and indeed appointed over you are keepers

ayahs.t: Noble and recording;
ayahs.n: noble and recording

ayahs.t: They know whatever you do.
ayahs.n: they know whatever you do

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be in pleasure

ayahs.t: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
ayahs.n: and indeed the wicked will be in hellfire

ayahs.t: They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
ayahs.n: they will enter to burn therein on the day of recompense

ayahs.t: And never therefrom will they be absent.
ayahs.n: and never therefrom will they be absent

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the day of recompense

ayahs.t: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
ayahs.n: then what can make you know what is the day of recompense

ayahs.t: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah.
ayahs.n: it is the day when a soul will not possess for another soul power to do a thing and the command that day is entirely with allah

ayahs.t: Woe to those who give less [than due],
ayahs.n: woe to those who give less than due

ayahs.t: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
ayahs.n: who when they take a measure from people take in full

ayahs.t: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
ayahs.n: but if they give by measure or by weight to them they cause loss

ayahs.t: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
ayahs.n: do they not think that they will be resurrected

ayahs.t: For a tremendous Day -
ayahs.n: for a tremendous day

ayahs.t: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?
ayahs.n: the day when mankind will stand before the lord of the worlds

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
ayahs.n: no indeed the record of the wicked is in sijjeen

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is sijjeen

ayahs.t: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
ayahs.n: it is their destination recorded in a register inscribed

ayahs.t: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
ayahs.n: woe that day to the deniers

ayahs.t: Who deny the Day of Recompense.
ayahs.n: who deny the day of recompense

ayahs.t: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
ayahs.n: and none deny it except every sinful transgressor

ayahs.t: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
ayahs.n: when our verses are recited to him he says legends of the former peoples

ayahs.t: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
ayahs.n: no rather the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
ayahs.n: no indeed from their lord that day they will be partitioned

ayahs.t: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.
ayahs.n: then indeed they will enter and burn in hellfire

ayahs.t: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
ayahs.n: then it will be said to them this is what you used to deny

ayahs.t: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun.
ayahs.n: no indeed the record of the righteous is in illiyyun

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is illiyyun

ayahs.t: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
ayahs.n: it is their destination recorded in a register inscribed

ayahs.t: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
ayahs.n: which is witnessed by those brought near to allah

ayahs.t: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
ayahs.n: indeed the righteous will be in pleasure

ayahs.t: On adorned couches, observing.
ayahs.n: on adorned couches observing

ayahs.t: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
ayahs.n: you will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure

ayahs.t: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.
ayahs.n: they will be given to drink pure wine which was sealed

ayahs.t: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
ayahs.n: the last of it is musk so for this let the competitors compete

ayahs.t: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
ayahs.n: and its mixture is of tasneem

ayahs.t: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.
ayahs.n: a spring from which those near to allah drink

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
ayahs.n: indeed those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed

ayahs.t: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.
ayahs.n: and when they passed by them they would exchange derisive glances

ayahs.t: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.
ayahs.n: and when they returned to their people they would return jesting

ayahs.t: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
ayahs.n: and when they saw them they would say indeed those are truly lost

ayahs.t: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.
ayahs.n: but they had not been sent as guardians over them

ayahs.t: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
ayahs.n: so today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers

ayahs.t: On adorned couches, observing.
ayahs.n: on adorned couches observing

ayahs.t: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
ayahs.n: have the disbelievers not been rewarded this day for what they used to do

ayahs.t: When the sky has split [open]
ayahs.n: when the sky has split open

ayahs.t: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
ayahs.n: and has responded to its lord and was obligated to do so

ayahs.t: And when the earth has been extended
ayahs.n: and when the earth has been extended

ayahs.t: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
ayahs.n: and has cast out that within it and relinquished it

ayahs.t: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
ayahs.n: and has responded to its lord and was obligated to do so

ayahs.t: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
ayahs.n: o mankind indeed you are laboring toward your lord with great exertion and will meet it

ayahs.t: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
ayahs.n: then as for he who is given his record in his right hand

ayahs.t: He will be judged with an easy account
ayahs.n: he will be judged with an easy account

ayahs.t: And return to his people in happiness.
ayahs.n: and return to his people in happiness

ayahs.t: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
ayahs.n: but as for he who is given his record behind his back

ayahs.t: He will cry out for destruction
ayahs.n: he will cry out for destruction

ayahs.t: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
ayahs.n: and enter to burn in a blaze

ayahs.t: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
ayahs.n: indeed he had once been among his people in happiness

ayahs.t: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].
ayahs.n: indeed he had thought he would never return to allah

ayahs.t: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
ayahs.n: but yes indeed his lord was ever of him seeing

ayahs.t: So I swear by the twilight glow
ayahs.n: so i swear by the twilight glow

ayahs.t: And [by] the night and what it envelops
ayahs.n: and by the night and what it envelops

ayahs.t: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
ayahs.n: and by the moon when it becomes full

ayahs.t: [That] you will surely experience state after state.
ayahs.n: that you will surely experience state after state

ayahs.t: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,
ayahs.n: so what is the matter with them that they do not believe

ayahs.t: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]?
ayahs.n: and when the quran is recited to them they do not prostrate to allah

ayahs.t: But those who have disbelieved deny,
ayahs.n: but those who have disbelieved deny

ayahs.t: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
ayahs.n: and allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves

ayahs.t: So give them tidings of a painful punishment,
ayahs.n: so give them tidings of a painful punishment

ayahs.t: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
ayahs.n: except for those who believe and do righteous deeds for them is a reward uninterrupted

ayahs.t: By the sky containing great stars
ayahs.n: by the sky containing great stars

ayahs.t: And [by] the promised Day
ayahs.n: and by the promised day

ayahs.t: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
ayahs.n: and by the witness and what is witnessed

ayahs.t: Cursed were the companions of the trench
ayahs.n: cursed were the companions of the trench

ayahs.t: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,
ayahs.n: containing the fire full of fuel

ayahs.t: When they were sitting near it
ayahs.n: when they were sitting near it

ayahs.t: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.
ayahs.n: and they to what they were doing against the believers were witnesses

ayahs.t: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,
ayahs.n: and they resented them not except because they believed in allah the exalted in might the praiseworthy

ayahs.t: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.
ayahs.n: to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and allah over all things is witness

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of hell and they will have the punishment of the burning fire

ayahs.t: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
ayahs.n: indeed those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow that is the great attainment

ayahs.t: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.
ayahs.n: indeed the vengeance of your lord is severe

ayahs.t: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
ayahs.n: indeed it is he who originates creation and repeats

ayahs.t: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
ayahs.n: and he is the forgiving the affectionate

ayahs.t: Honorable Owner of the Throne,
ayahs.n: honorable owner of the throne

ayahs.t: Effecter of what He intends.
ayahs.n: effecter of what he intends

ayahs.t: Has there reached you the story of the soldiers -
ayahs.n: has there reached you the story of the soldiers

ayahs.t: [Those of] Pharaoh and Thamud?
ayahs.n: those of pharaoh and thamud

ayahs.t: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
ayahs.n: but they who disbelieve are in persistent denial

ayahs.t: While Allah encompasses them from behind.
ayahs.n: while allah encompasses them from behind

ayahs.t: But this is an honored Qur'an
ayahs.n: but this is an honored quran

ayahs.t: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
ayahs.n: inscribed in a preserved slate

ayahs.t: By the sky and the night comer -
ayahs.n: by the sky and the night comer

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the night comer

ayahs.t: It is the piercing star -
ayahs.n: it is the piercing star

ayahs.t: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
ayahs.n: there is no soul but that it has over it a protector

ayahs.t: So let man observe from what he was created.
ayahs.n: so let man observe from what he was created

ayahs.t: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
ayahs.n: he was created from a fluid ejected

ayahs.t: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
ayahs.n: emerging from between the backbone and the ribs

ayahs.t: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
ayahs.n: indeed allah to return him to life is able

ayahs.t: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,
ayahs.n: the day when secrets will be put on trial

ayahs.t: Then man will have no power or any helper.
ayahs.n: then man will have no power or any helper

ayahs.t: By the sky which returns [rain]
ayahs.n: by the sky which returns rain

ayahs.t: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
ayahs.n: and by the earth which cracks open

ayahs.t: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement,
ayahs.n: indeed the quran is a decisive statement

ayahs.t: And it is not amusement.
ayahs.n: and it is not amusement

ayahs.t: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
ayahs.n: indeed they are planning a plan

ayahs.t: But I am planning a plan.
ayahs.n: but i am planning a plan

ayahs.t: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.
ayahs.n: so allow time for the disbelievers leave them awhile

ayahs.t: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
ayahs.n: exalt the name of your lord the most high

ayahs.t: Who created and proportioned
ayahs.n: who created and proportioned

ayahs.t: And who destined and [then] guided
ayahs.n: and who destined and then guided

ayahs.t: And who brings out the pasture
ayahs.n: and who brings out the pasture

ayahs.t: And [then] makes it black stubble.
ayahs.n: and then makes it black stubble

ayahs.t: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,
ayahs.n: we will make you recite o muhammad and you will not forget

ayahs.t: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
ayahs.n: except what allah should will indeed he knows what is declared and what is hidden

ayahs.t: And We will ease you toward ease.
ayahs.n: and we will ease you toward ease

ayahs.t: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
ayahs.n: so remind if the reminder should benefit

ayahs.t: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
ayahs.n: he who fears allah will be reminded

ayahs.t: But the wretched one will avoid it -
ayahs.n: but the wretched one will avoid it

ayahs.t: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,
ayahs.n: he who will enter and burn in the greatest fire

ayahs.t: Neither dying therein nor living.
ayahs.n: neither dying therein nor living

ayahs.t: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
ayahs.n: he has certainly succeeded who purifies himself

ayahs.t: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
ayahs.n: and mentions the name of his lord and prays

ayahs.t: But you prefer the worldly life,
ayahs.n: but you prefer the worldly life

ayahs.t: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
ayahs.n: while the hereafter is better and more enduring

ayahs.t: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
ayahs.n: indeed this is in the former scriptures

ayahs.t: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
ayahs.n: the scriptures of abraham and moses

ayahs.t: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
ayahs.n: has there reached you the report of the overwhelming event

ayahs.t: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
ayahs.n: some faces that day will be humbled

ayahs.t: Working [hard] and exhausted.
ayahs.n: working hard and exhausted

ayahs.t: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
ayahs.n: they will enter to burn in an intensely hot fire

ayahs.t: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.
ayahs.n: they will be given drink from a boiling spring

ayahs.t: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
ayahs.n: for them there will be no food except from a poisonous thorny plant

ayahs.t: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
ayahs.n: which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger

ayahs.t: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
ayahs.n: other faces that day will show pleasure

ayahs.t: With their effort [they are] satisfied
ayahs.n: with their effort they are satisfied

ayahs.t: In an elevated garden,
ayahs.n: in an elevated garden

ayahs.t: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
ayahs.n: wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech

ayahs.t: Within it is a flowing spring.
ayahs.n: within it is a flowing spring

ayahs.t: Within it are couches raised high
ayahs.n: within it are couches raised high

ayahs.t: And cups put in place
ayahs.n: and cups put in place

ayahs.t: And cushions lined up
ayahs.n: and cushions lined up

ayahs.t: And carpets spread around.
ayahs.n: and carpets spread around

ayahs.t: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
ayahs.n: then do they not look at the camels how they are created

ayahs.t: And at the sky - how it is raised?
ayahs.n: and at the sky how it is raised

ayahs.t: And at the mountains - how they are erected?
ayahs.n: and at the mountains how they are erected

ayahs.t: And at the earth - how it is spread out?
ayahs.n: and at the earth how it is spread out

ayahs.t: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
ayahs.n: so remind o muhammad you are only a reminder

ayahs.t: You are not over them a controller.
ayahs.n: you are not over them a controller

ayahs.t: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
ayahs.n: however he who turns away and disbelieves

ayahs.t: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment.
ayahs.n: then allah will punish him with the greatest punishment

ayahs.t: Indeed, to Us is their return.
ayahs.n: indeed to us is their return

ayahs.t: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
ayahs.n: then indeed upon us is their account

ayahs.t: By the dawn
ayahs.n: by the dawn

ayahs.t: And [by] ten nights
ayahs.n: and by ten nights

ayahs.t: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
ayahs.n: and by the even number and the odd

ayahs.t: And [by] the night when it passes,
ayahs.n: and by the night when it passes

ayahs.t: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?
ayahs.n: is there not in all that an oath sufficient for one of perception

ayahs.t: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad -
ayahs.n: have you not considered how your lord dealt with aad

ayahs.t: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,
ayahs.n: with iram who had lofty pillars

ayahs.t: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
ayahs.n: the likes of whom had never been created in the land

ayahs.t: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
ayahs.n: and with thamud who carved out the rocks in the valley

ayahs.t: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes? -
ayahs.n: and with pharaoh owner of the stakes

ayahs.t: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
ayahs.n: all of whom oppressed within the lands

ayahs.t: And increased therein the corruption.
ayahs.n: and increased therein the corruption

ayahs.t: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.
ayahs.n: so your lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment

ayahs.t: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
ayahs.n: indeed your lord is in observation

ayahs.t: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
ayahs.n: and as for man when his lord tries him and thus is generous to him and favors him he says my lord has honored me

ayahs.t: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
ayahs.n: but when he tries him and restricts his provision he says my lord has humiliated me

ayahs.t: No! But you do not honor the orphan
ayahs.n: no but you do not honor the orphan

ayahs.t: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
ayahs.n: and you do not encourage one another to feed the poor

ayahs.t: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
ayahs.n: and you consume inheritance devouring it altogether

ayahs.t: And you love wealth with immense love.
ayahs.n: and you love wealth with immense love

ayahs.t: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -
ayahs.n: no when the earth has been leveled pounded and crushed

ayahs.t: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,
ayahs.n: and your lord has come and the angels rank upon rank

ayahs.t: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
ayahs.n: and brought within view that day is hell that day man will remember but what good to him will be the remembrance

ayahs.t: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."
ayahs.n: he will say oh i wish i had sent ahead some good for my life

ayahs.t: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,
ayahs.n: so on that day none will punish as severely as his punishment

ayahs.t: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
ayahs.n: and none will bind as severely as his binding of the evildoers

ayahs.t: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
ayahs.n: to the righteous it will be said o reassured soul

ayahs.t: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
ayahs.n: return to your lord well pleased and pleasing to him

ayahs.t: And enter among My [righteous] servants
ayahs.n: and enter among my righteous servants

ayahs.t: And enter My Paradise."
ayahs.n: and enter my paradise

ayahs.t: I swear by this city, Makkah -
ayahs.n: i swear by this city makkah

ayahs.t: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
ayahs.n: and you o muhammad are free of restriction in this city

ayahs.t: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
ayahs.n: and by the father and that which was born of him

ayahs.t: We have certainly created man into hardship.
ayahs.n: we have certainly created man into hardship

ayahs.t: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
ayahs.n: does he think that never will anyone overcome him

ayahs.t: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
ayahs.n: he says i have spent wealth in abundance

ayahs.t: Does he think that no one has seen him?
ayahs.n: does he think that no one has seen him

ayahs.t: Have We not made for him two eyes?
ayahs.n: have we not made for him two eyes

ayahs.t: And a tongue and two lips?
ayahs.n: and a tongue and two lips

ayahs.t: And have shown him the two ways?
ayahs.n: and have shown him the two ways

ayahs.t: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
ayahs.n: but he has not broken through the difficult pass

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is breaking through the difficult pass

ayahs.t: It is the freeing of a slave
ayahs.n: it is the freeing of a slave

ayahs.t: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
ayahs.n: or feeding on a day of severe hunger

ayahs.t: An orphan of near relationship
ayahs.n: an orphan of near relationship

ayahs.t: Or a needy person in misery
ayahs.n: or a needy person in misery

ayahs.t: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
ayahs.n: and then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion

ayahs.t: Those are the companions of the right.
ayahs.n: those are the companions of the right

ayahs.t: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.
ayahs.n: but they who disbelieved in our signs those are the companions of the left

ayahs.t: Over them will be fire closed in.
ayahs.n: over them will be fire closed in

ayahs.t: By the sun and its brightness
ayahs.n: by the sun and its brightness

ayahs.t: And [by] the moon when it follows it
ayahs.n: and by the moon when it follows it

ayahs.t: And [by] the day when it displays it
ayahs.n: and by the day when it displays it

ayahs.t: And [by] the night when it covers it
ayahs.n: and by the night when it covers it

ayahs.t: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
ayahs.n: and by the sky and he who constructed it

ayahs.t: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
ayahs.n: and by the earth and he who spread it

ayahs.t: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
ayahs.n: and by the soul and he who proportioned it

ayahs.t: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
ayahs.n: and inspired it with discernment of its wickedness and its righteousness

ayahs.t: He has succeeded who purifies it,
ayahs.n: he has succeeded who purifies it

ayahs.t: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
ayahs.n: and he has failed who instills it with corruption

ayahs.t: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
ayahs.n: thamud denied their prophet by reason of their transgression

ayahs.t: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.
ayahs.n: when the most wretched of them was sent forth

ayahs.t: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink."
ayahs.n: and the messenger of allah salih said to them do not harm the she camel of allah or prevent her from her drink

ayahs.t: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].
ayahs.n: but they denied him and hamstrung her so their lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal upon all of them

ayahs.t: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
ayahs.n: and he does not fear the consequence thereof

ayahs.t: By the night when it covers
ayahs.n: by the night when it covers

ayahs.t: And [by] the day when it appears
ayahs.n: and by the day when it appears

ayahs.t: And [by] He who created the male and female,
ayahs.n: and by he who created the male and female

ayahs.t: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
ayahs.n: indeed your efforts are diverse

ayahs.t: As for he who gives and fears Allah
ayahs.n: as for he who gives and fears allah

ayahs.t: And believes in the best [reward],
ayahs.n: and believes in the best reward

ayahs.t: We will ease him toward ease.
ayahs.n: we will ease him toward ease

ayahs.t: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
ayahs.n: but as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need

ayahs.t: And denies the best [reward],
ayahs.n: and denies the best reward

ayahs.t: We will ease him toward difficulty.
ayahs.n: we will ease him toward difficulty

ayahs.t: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
ayahs.n: and what will his wealth avail him when he falls

ayahs.t: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.
ayahs.n: indeed incumbent upon us is guidance

ayahs.t: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
ayahs.n: and indeed to us belongs the hereafter and the first life

ayahs.t: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
ayahs.n: so i have warned you of a fire which is blazing

ayahs.t: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
ayahs.n: none will enter to burn therein except the most wretched one

ayahs.t: Who had denied and turned away.
ayahs.n: who had denied and turned away

ayahs.t: But the righteous one will avoid it -
ayahs.n: but the righteous one will avoid it

ayahs.t: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
ayahs.n: he who gives from his wealth to purify himself

ayahs.t: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
ayahs.n: and not giving for anyone who has done him a favor to be rewarded

ayahs.t: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
ayahs.n: but only seeking the countenance of his lord most high

ayahs.t: And he is going to be satisfied.
ayahs.n: and he is going to be satisfied

ayahs.t: By the morning brightness
ayahs.n: by the morning brightness

ayahs.t: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,
ayahs.n: and by the night when it covers with darkness

ayahs.t: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
ayahs.n: your lord has not taken leave of you o muhammad nor has he detested you

ayahs.t: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
ayahs.n: and the hereafter is better for you than the first life

ayahs.t: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
ayahs.n: and your lord is going to give you and you will be satisfied

ayahs.t: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
ayahs.n: did he not find you an orphan and give you refuge

ayahs.t: And He found you lost and guided [you],
ayahs.n: and he found you lost and guided you

ayahs.t: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
ayahs.n: and he found you poor and made you self sufficient

ayahs.t: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
ayahs.n: so as for the orphan do not oppress him

ayahs.t: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
ayahs.n: and as for the petitioner do not repel him

ayahs.t: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
ayahs.n: but as for the favor of your lord report it

ayahs.t: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast?
ayahs.n: did we not expand for you o muhammad your breast

ayahs.t: And We removed from you your burden
ayahs.n: and we removed from you your burden

ayahs.t: Which had weighed upon your back
ayahs.n: which had weighed upon your back

ayahs.t: And raised high for you your repute.
ayahs.n: and raised high for you your repute

ayahs.t: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
ayahs.n: for indeed with hardship will be ease

ayahs.t: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
ayahs.n: indeed with hardship will be ease

ayahs.t: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].
ayahs.n: so when you have finished your duties then stand up for worship

ayahs.t: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
ayahs.n: and to your lord direct your longing

ayahs.t: By the fig and the olive
ayahs.n: by the fig and the olive

ayahs.t: And [by] Mount Sinai
ayahs.n: and by mount sinai

ayahs.t: And [by] this secure city [Makkah],
ayahs.n: and by this secure city makkah

ayahs.t: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
ayahs.n: we have certainly created man in the best of stature

ayahs.t: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
ayahs.n: then we return him to the lowest of the low

ayahs.t: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
ayahs.n: except for those who believe and do righteous deeds for they will have a reward uninterrupted

ayahs.t: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
ayahs.n: so what yet causes you to deny the recompense

ayahs.t: Is not Allah the most just of judges?
ayahs.n: is not allah the most just of judges

ayahs.t: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
ayahs.n: recite in the name of your lord who created

ayahs.t: Created man from a clinging substance.
ayahs.n: created man from a clinging substance

ayahs.t: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
ayahs.n: recite and your lord is the most generous

ayahs.t: Who taught by the pen -
ayahs.n: who taught by the pen

ayahs.t: Taught man that which he knew not.
ayahs.n: taught man that which he knew not

ayahs.t: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses
ayahs.n: no but indeed man transgresses

ayahs.t: Because he sees himself self-sufficient.
ayahs.n: because he sees himself self sufficient

ayahs.t: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
ayahs.n: indeed to your lord is the return

ayahs.t: Have you seen the one who forbids
ayahs.n: have you seen the one who forbids

ayahs.t: A servant when he prays?
ayahs.n: a servant when he prays

ayahs.t: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
ayahs.n: have you seen if he is upon guidance

ayahs.t: Or enjoins righteousness?
ayahs.n: or enjoins righteousness

ayahs.t: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
ayahs.n: have you seen if he denies and turns away

ayahs.t: Does he not know that Allah sees?
ayahs.n: does he not know that allah sees

ayahs.t: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
ayahs.n: no if he does not desist we will surely drag him by the forelock

ayahs.t: A lying, sinning forelock.
ayahs.n: a lying sinning forelock

ayahs.t: Then let him call his associates;
ayahs.n: then let him call his associates

ayahs.t: We will call the angels of Hell.
ayahs.n: we will call the angels of hell

ayahs.t: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
ayahs.n: no do not obey him but prostrate and draw near to allah

ayahs.t: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
ayahs.n: indeed we sent the quran down during the night of decree

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the night of decree

ayahs.t: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
ayahs.n: the night of decree is better than a thousand months

ayahs.t: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
ayahs.n: the angels and the spirit descend therein by permission of their lord for every matter

ayahs.t: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
ayahs.n: peace it is until the emergence of dawn

ayahs.t: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence -
ayahs.n: those who disbelieved among the people of the scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted from misbelief until there came to them clear evidence

ayahs.t: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures
ayahs.n: a messenger from allah reciting purified scriptures

ayahs.t: Within which are correct writings.
ayahs.n: within which are correct writings

ayahs.t: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.
ayahs.n: nor did those who were given the scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence

ayahs.t: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.
ayahs.n: and they were not commanded except to worship allah being sincere to him in religion inclining to truth and to establish prayer and to give zakah and that is the correct religion

ayahs.t: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.
ayahs.n: indeed they who disbelieved among the people of the scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of hell abiding eternally therein those are the worst of creatures

ayahs.t: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.
ayahs.n: indeed they who have believed and done righteous deeds those are the best of creatures

ayahs.t: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.
ayahs.n: their reward with allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow wherein they will abide forever allah being pleased with them and they with him that is for whoever has feared his lord

ayahs.t: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
ayahs.n: when the earth is shaken with its final earthquake

ayahs.t: And the earth discharges its burdens
ayahs.n: and the earth discharges its burdens

ayahs.t: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
ayahs.n: and man says what is wrong with it

ayahs.t: That Day, it will report its news
ayahs.n: that day it will report its news

ayahs.t: Because your Lord has commanded it.
ayahs.n: because your lord has commanded it

ayahs.t: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
ayahs.n: that day the people will depart separated into categories to be shown the result of their deeds

ayahs.t: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,
ayahs.n: so whoever does an atoms weight of good will see it

ayahs.t: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
ayahs.n: and whoever does an atoms weight of evil will see it

ayahs.t: By the racers, panting,
ayahs.n: by the racers panting

ayahs.t: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
ayahs.n: and the producers of sparks when striking

ayahs.t: And the chargers at dawn,
ayahs.n: and the chargers at dawn

ayahs.t: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust,
ayahs.n: stirring up thereby clouds of dust

ayahs.t: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
ayahs.n: arriving thereby in the center collectively

ayahs.t: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
ayahs.n: indeed mankind to his lord is ungrateful

ayahs.t: And indeed, he is to that a witness.
ayahs.n: and indeed he is to that a witness

ayahs.t: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
ayahs.n: and indeed he is in love of wealth intense

ayahs.t: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
ayahs.n: but does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered

ayahs.t: And that within the breasts is obtained,
ayahs.n: and that within the breasts is obtained

ayahs.t: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
ayahs.n: indeed their lord with them that day is fully acquainted

ayahs.t: The Striking Calamity -
ayahs.n: the striking calamity

ayahs.t: What is the Striking Calamity?
ayahs.n: what is the striking calamity

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the striking calamity

ayahs.t: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,
ayahs.n: it is the day when people will be like moths dispersed

ayahs.t: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
ayahs.n: and the mountains will be like wool fluffed up

ayahs.t: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
ayahs.n: then as for one whose scales are heavy with good deeds

ayahs.t: He will be in a pleasant life.
ayahs.n: he will be in a pleasant life

ayahs.t: But as for one whose scales are light,
ayahs.n: but as for one whose scales are light

ayahs.t: His refuge will be an abyss.
ayahs.n: his refuge will be an abyss

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what that is?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what that is

ayahs.t: It is a Fire, intensely hot.
ayahs.n: it is a fire intensely hot

ayahs.t: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you
ayahs.n: competition in worldly increase diverts you

ayahs.t: Until you visit the graveyards.
ayahs.n: until you visit the graveyards

ayahs.t: No! You are going to know.
ayahs.n: no you are going to know

ayahs.t: Then no! You are going to know.
ayahs.n: then no you are going to know

ayahs.t: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
ayahs.n: no if you only knew with knowledge of certainty

ayahs.t: You will surely see the Hellfire.
ayahs.n: you will surely see the hellfire

ayahs.t: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
ayahs.n: then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty

ayahs.t: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
ayahs.n: then you will surely be asked that day about pleasure

ayahs.t: By time,
ayahs.n: by time

ayahs.t: Indeed, mankind is in loss,
ayahs.n: indeed mankind is in loss

ayahs.t: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
ayahs.n: except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience

ayahs.t: Woe to every scorner and mocker
ayahs.n: woe to every scorner and mocker

ayahs.t: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
ayahs.n: who collects wealth and continuously counts it

ayahs.t: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
ayahs.n: he thinks that his wealth will make him immortal

ayahs.t: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
ayahs.n: no he will surely be thrown into the crusher

ayahs.t: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
ayahs.n: and what can make you know what is the crusher

ayahs.t: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
ayahs.n: it is the fire of allah eternally fueled

ayahs.t: Which mounts directed at the hearts.
ayahs.n: which mounts directed at the hearts

ayahs.t: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
ayahs.n: indeed hellfire will be closed down upon them

ayahs.t: In extended columns.
ayahs.n: in extended columns

ayahs.t: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
ayahs.n: have you not considered o muhammad how your lord dealt with the companions of the elephant

ayahs.t: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
ayahs.n: did he not make their plan into misguidance

ayahs.t: And He sent against them birds in flocks,
ayahs.n: and he sent against them birds in flocks

ayahs.t: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
ayahs.n: striking them with stones of hard clay

ayahs.t: And He made them like eaten straw.
ayahs.n: and he made them like eaten straw

ayahs.t: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
ayahs.n: for the accustomed security of the quraysh

ayahs.t: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
ayahs.n: their accustomed security in the caravan of winter and summer

ayahs.t: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
ayahs.n: let them worship the lord of this house

ayahs.t: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
ayahs.n: who has fed them saving them from hunger and made them safe saving them from fear

ayahs.t: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
ayahs.n: have you seen the one who denies the recompense

ayahs.t: For that is the one who drives away the orphan
ayahs.n: for that is the one who drives away the orphan

ayahs.t: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
ayahs.n: and does not encourage the feeding of the poor

ayahs.t: So woe to those who pray
ayahs.n: so woe to those who pray

ayahs.t: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -
ayahs.n: but who are heedless of their prayer

ayahs.t: Those who make show [of their deeds]
ayahs.n: those who make show of their deeds

ayahs.t: And withhold [simple] assistance.
ayahs.n: and withhold simple assistance

ayahs.t: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.
ayahs.n: indeed we have granted you o muhammad al kawthar

ayahs.t: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].
ayahs.n: so pray to your lord and sacrifice to him alone

ayahs.t: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.
ayahs.n: indeed your enemy is the one cut off

ayahs.t: Say, "O disbelievers,
ayahs.n: say o disbelievers

ayahs.t: I do not worship what you worship.
ayahs.n: i do not worship what you worship

ayahs.t: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
ayahs.n: nor are you worshippers of what i worship

ayahs.t: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
ayahs.n: nor will i be a worshipper of what you worship

ayahs.t: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
ayahs.n: nor will you be worshippers of what i worship

ayahs.t: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
ayahs.n: for you is your religion and for me is my religion

ayahs.t: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
ayahs.n: when the victory of allah has come and the conquest

ayahs.t: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
ayahs.n: and you see the people entering into the religion of allah in multitudes

ayahs.t: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
ayahs.n: then exalt him with praise of your lord and ask forgiveness of him indeed he is ever accepting of repentance

ayahs.t: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
ayahs.n: may the hands of abu lahab be ruined and ruined is he

ayahs.t: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
ayahs.n: his wealth will not avail him or that which he gained

ayahs.t: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
ayahs.n: he will enter to burn in a fire of blazing flame

ayahs.t: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
ayahs.n: and his wife as well the carrier of firewood

ayahs.t: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
ayahs.n: around her neck is a rope of twisted fiber

ayahs.t: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,
ayahs.n: say he is allah who is one

ayahs.t: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.
ayahs.n: allah the eternal refuge

ayahs.t: He neither begets nor is born,
ayahs.n: he neither begets nor is born

ayahs.t: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
ayahs.n: nor is there to him any equivalent

ayahs.t: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
ayahs.n: say i seek refuge in the lord of daybreak

ayahs.t: From the evil of that which He created
ayahs.n: from the evil of that which he created

ayahs.t: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
ayahs.n: and from the evil of darkness when it settles

ayahs.t: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
ayahs.n: and from the evil of the blowers in knots

ayahs.t: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
ayahs.n: and from the evil of an envier when he envies

ayahs.t: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,
ayahs.n: say i seek refuge in the lord of mankind

ayahs.t: The Sovereign of mankind.
ayahs.n: the sovereign of mankind

ayahs.t: The God of mankind,
ayahs.n: the god of mankind

ayahs.t: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -
ayahs.n: from the evil of the retreating whisperer

ayahs.t: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -
ayahs.n: who whispers evil into the breasts of mankind

ayahs.t: From among the jinn and mankind."
ayahs.n: from among the jinn and mankind
